Membrance Maze's Serene Treehouse
迷路迷境的祈愿笛哨
Membrance Maze's Wishing Whistle
翁法罗斯的西风尽途
Last West Wind of Amphoreus
万敌
Mydei
万敌不是也健身么，先用他的吧
Doesn't Mydei also lift weights? Use his for now
树庭学者的研究表明，每周充分摄入一次卡路里，对减脂很有帮助哦
Research from Grove scholars shows that eating a full-calorie meal once a week actually helps with fat loss.
都说万敌是大厨，让我尝尝吧
I've heard Mydei is an excellent chef. I'd like to try his food
*我们*知道！奥赫玛也流行过这种店，好像叫欧玛…卡什么的
We've heard of these! Places like this were all the rage in Okhema, too. They called it... omaka-something
@万敌是当值主厨，让他来教更适合
@Mydei is the head chef on duty, so he should be the one teaching
万师傅炒
Take the wok, Chef Mydei!
让万敌来教
Mydei should take the role
生长于哀丽秘榭的主厨依照回忆烹饪而成的菜肴。加入了田埂里生长的野菜，随着时序变换，食材也会全然不同。
A nostalgic dish crafted by the head chef from Aedes Elysiae. Made with wild greens growing along the ridges, its ingredients shift with the changing seasons.
以南瓜的奶香替代了焦糖的甜味。是奥赫玛城中观赏戏剧时的必备小吃。
Creamy pumpkin aroma replaces traditional caramel sweetness. A staple snack when enjoying theatrical plays in the city of Okhema.
为他带去树庭的证伪。
Bring him the Grove of Epiphany's negative evidence.
我要成为翁法罗斯首富。
I want to become the richest person in Amphoreus.
我要成为神悟树庭贤者。
I want to become a sage in the Grove of Epiphany.
大地与海洋是如此辽阔，哪怕是瑟希斯的学者，也难免在其中迷失。唯有雅努斯的加持，方能令世人得到指引。它慷慨地在镜中向人们揭示道路，在艾格勒紧闭百眼的夜晚，石镜散射的微弱光辉，也足以让旅者在黑暗中找到正确的方向。更有甚时，命运泰坦会以镜像昭示即将到来的灾难，以闪烁的群星，引领人们从黑潮中逃离。纵使早已陨落，万径之门也仍庇佑着翁法罗斯的众多子民。

The expanse of land and sea can overwhelm even the learned scholars of Cerces, leading them astray. Only with Janus's blessing can true guidance be found. The Stone Mirror of Revelation generously unveils paths, offering just enough light to navigate during the nights when Aquila's all-seeing eyes are shut. At crucial times, the Fate Titans use the mirror to predict impending calamities, guiding people away from looming disasters with the flickering of stars. Even in its decline, the Gate of Infinity continues to offer its protection to the many descendants of Amphoreus.
在遥远的年代，人们也曾用双脚丈量大地的尺度，然而行走的速度终究太过缓慢，没有人能描绘翁法罗斯的全貌。艾格勒的学者莱特泽维尔决定挣脱引力的桎梏，他打造出铁制的飞鸟，仅需涉取泰坦的光辉便能扇动双翼。铁鸟掠过之处，山川和江河尽数收入瞳孔，最终化为桌案上精准的地图。在铁鸟起飞前，学者都会虔诚地赞美艾格勒，他们相信这能让铁鸟飞得更快更稳。

Long ago, humans tried to map the vastness of Amphoreus with their steps, yet the speed of their gait was far too slow to capture the world's entire expanse. Seeking to break free from the constraints of gravity, Aquila's scholar, Ritzwehr, crafted an iron bird that could fly by merely harnessing the brilliance of the Titans. This iron bird captured the landscape in its pupils with such precision that rivers and mountains were shrunk into maps on his desk. Before each flight, the scholars of Aquila would offer their devout praises, believing their faith would grant the iron bird greater speed and stability.
自黄金世结束以来，翁法罗斯就从来不乏希冀逃避死亡的愚人。有人将自己关在一群疯子里面，试图以此混淆泰坦的视线。有人则把自己藏进棺椁，以磐石隔绝冥河的湍流，想要保留永世的容颜。而命运也自然赋予他们应得的下场，疯掉的王，再也没法死去；沉睡的少女，在永眠中迎来了不朽。而在灰黯之手的长船上，赐福和诅咒，从来都并无差别。

Since the end of Era Chrysea, Amphoreus has never lacked fools hoping to evade death. Some lock themselves among madmen, attempting to confuse the eyes of the Titan. Others hide in coffins, using boulders to isolate themselves from the turbulent River of Souls, seeking to preserve eternal beauty. And fate naturally bestows upon them their deserved end. Thus, the mad king can never die, while the slumbering maiden greets immortality in her eternal sleep. On the Hand of Shadow's long ship, blessings and curses are indistinguishable.
尼卡多利的眷属之所以是令所有翁法罗斯人畏惧的战争机器，一方面归功于纷争泰坦赐予的力量，另一方面则是因为出色的后勤保养。每当一场战争结束，悬锋人都会用特制的按摩仪为眷属们进行全身放松，这种仪器通过每秒钟数十次的快速击打，可以有效缓解各关节的迟钝，提高眷属的作战能力。唯一的缺点是，该按摩器的使用寿命十分有限，但悬锋人很快发现，退役的按摩器依旧可以在拷问战俘方面有很大的发挥空间。

The kins of Nikador are feared across Amphoreus as relentless war machines, owing not only to the power bestowed by the Strife Titan, but also to their exceptional logistical upkeep. After every battle, the Kremnoans use specially designed massage devices to relax the kins' bodies. These instruments deliver rapid dozens-per-second strikes, effectively loosening stiff joints and enhancing combat readiness. The only drawback? The devices have a notoriously short lifespan. However, the Kremnoans soon discovered that even after retirement, these massage tools could still serve a rather effective role in the interrogation of prisoners of war.
翁法罗斯有句名言——观察规律、总结规律、利用规律。某位塔兰顿的传教官无疑是这句话最优秀的践行者，她利用塔兰顿赐福过的天平有自动归正的特性，让人们向天平一侧许愿，一旦愿望成真，另一侧就会自动生出与之重量相等的奖赏。换句话说，愿望落空不亏，愿望达成加倍。许多人通过这种方式认识到了塔兰顿的力量，并心甘情愿的成为其信徒。

There is a well-known saying in Amphoreus: "Observe patterns, summarize patterns, utilize patterns." A certain missionary of Talanton was undoubtedly the finest practitioner of this philosophy. She took advantage of how Talanton's sacred scales would automatically rebalance to get people to make wishes on one side of the scales, and if the wish was fulfilled, an equivalent reward would manifest on the other side. In other words, if the wish failed, no harm was done. If it succeeded, the reward was doubled. Through this miraculous display, many came to recognize Talanton's power and willingly became devoted followers.
或沉默，或身陨，但泰坦的赐福却仍残留于世间。往昔的呐喊与呼唤被封存进水晶，为后继者带来些许希望。倘若赐福的存在并不依赖于泰坦，那泰坦与神权究竟谁先一步诞生？树庭曾围绕这一话题展开一场空前的辩论，可直到愤怒压倒了理性，也没能得出答案。

The Titans have all either fallen silent or demised, but their benedictions remain in this world. The calls and bellows of the past were sealed into crystals and will bring some meager hope to those who will come after them. But if such benedictions exist independently of the Titans, then what came first — Titans or divine authority? The Grove had once conducted a spectacular debate on this topic, but could not reach an answer before the participants' rage overwhelmed their reason.

让我来讲述一群强大的战士吧，锋刃之间的纷争。 米勒达人与我们的战争，信仰尼卡多利的战士各自为伍， 从不偏袒的战神将力量赐予勇士， 即使他们并未将自己拱卫。 米勒达的重甲步兵气势轩昂，向移动的要塞进军， 呐喊在方阵上涤荡波浪，长矛在天空汇成交叉的大雨。 他们的卫队如同河水，柔软却强硬， 变化的军阵，纵是悬锋伙友也疲于应付。 悬锋终是无匹的城邦，王的长矛贯穿了另一位的心脏， 可我绝不会忘记，有群战士曾与我同享胜利父的威光。

Let me tell you about a group of mighty warriors, the strife between blades. Amidst the war between the Mildanians and ourselves, warriors who believe in Nikador align themselves with different factions, And the impartial War God grants power to the brave, Even if they do not guard themselves. The Mildanians' heavily armored infantry strides forward with great momentum, marching towards mobile fortresses. Their battle cries resonate like rolling waves across the phalanx, and their spears converge in the sky, forming a downpour of crossing blades. Their guards move like a river in battle, flexible yet unyielding, With ever-changing formations that leave even Kremnos vanguards struggling to keep pace. Kremnos, an unmatched city-state, stands victorious as the king's spear pierces the other's heart. But I'll never forget the warriors who stood alongside me, sharing in the glory of our victories.

不必多言，在血亲的根系里，我们已知晓你的来意。 在刻法勒创造人类以前，仙女木便已遍及世界， 与无知的你们不同，我们的理性扎根于大地， 智慧如雨露在其间流淌，即使凋零，也终有新生的种子传承。 我们仍能记得， 瑟希斯的灵智教导我们如何舒展叶片，如何思辨自我， 来往的学者曾被我们质问至沉默， 树庭最初的贤者，因我们的低语而灵光乍现。 那场弑神的旅途，若你想要知晓我们的答案，就侧耳倾听吧， 花瓣落入土壤，死亡成就新生，失败也绝非终结。

There is no need for words. Through the roots that connect our blood, your intent is already known to us. Before Kephale created humanity, the White Dryad had already spread across the world. Unlike your ignorant kind, our reason is deeply rooted in the earth. Wisdom flows among us like the morning dew. Though we may wither, our seeds carry the promise of renewal. We remember. Cerces taught us to unfurl our leaves, to question our very being. The travelling scholars all fell silent by our questions. The first sage of the Grove got their revelation from our whispers. So, are you seeking answers to the godslayer's journey? Then just lend your ear and listen. Petals fall off, bury in the soil. Death nourishes new life. Failure is never the end.

我的表亲蒂泰尼，是守望沙漏的记述官之一。 岁月的指尖划出河流，让时间在其中流淌， 大地静默地陪伴着世人，承载千载的时光。 他们从河畔淘来沙粒，当它从沙漏中落下， 承载的历史也得以释放。 它曾是阿卡索斯的短剑，被战争卷携， 受冥河侵蚀，在水中迷离了百年的时光。 它曾是埃普斯的石雕，随纷争陷落深渊，因嬉戏的奇兽被洗刷至此。 由大地与岁月降下的赐福，自沙粒中解读出过往， 他们笃信，只要仍有人在读着翁法罗斯的故事，世界便永不灭亡。

My cousin Titanis is one of the chroniclers who watch over the Hourglass. The fingers of time drew river ways, time flowing through them. The earth quietly stood by, bearing the weight of centuries. The chroniclers gathered grains of sand from the riverbank and put them in the hourglass. Each grain of sand would release a piece of history it bore. Once, it was the short sword of Icatus, swept away by war, Eroded by the River of Souls, lost to the currents for a century. Once, it was a statue from Epos, fallen into the abyss in the wake of conflict, brought ashore by the playful beasts of legend. A benediction from the earth and time enables us to read the past from the sand. They believe that as long as there are those who read the stories of Amphoreus, the world shall never perish.

可别笑老恩勒我无礼，实在是停不下手头的工作。 以天空与烈阳为基准，锻造出钢铁的飞鸟， 螺旋工坊尚未焚毁的年岁，萨库曾四季如春。 我们的造物足以媲美天空祭司的城邦， 推论的公式连绳结学派也远道来求访。 破灭终至，翁法罗斯亦如天空日渐黯淡。 但螺旋的子嗣仍行走在大地上，背负沉重的行囊， 穿行于苟延残喘的城邦，修复断裂的机械， 重现业已消逝的技术、知识和思想。 此世曾受我主照耀，而我等将为它带回， 曾遍及此世的理性与睿智之光。

Gee, please forgive me for my lack of manners. I simply can't stop my work at hand. With the sky and the blazing sun as our measure, we once forged steel birds to fly. In the years before the Helix Workshop burned down, Saku basked in eternal spring. Our creations could rival those made by the cities of the Sky Priest. Even the Nodists came from afar to study the theories we derived. But later the destruction came, and Amphoreus grew dimmer by the day. Yet, the offspring of the Helix Workshop still walk the earth, burdened with heavy backpacks, Traveling through the crumbling city-states to fix broken machines. They are dedicated to reviving the lost technologies, knowledge, and ideals. This world was once blessed by the light of our god. So we shall bring back to them the light of reason and intelligence that once illuminated every corner of it.

想知道我此行的目的地吗？被群山环绕的故乡。 崖壁上雕刻着蹩脚的花朵，大地兽俯身休憩，听着笑声入眠。 我们来自翁法罗斯的各个角落， 废墟的深处，因轻雨的冷而发出哭泣，直到被山之民们收养。 他们失去了自己的神灵，失去了一切， 不再冶炼，笨拙的手播撒种子，坚硬的臂膀拥抱新生， 哺育生命，乃是磐岩之脊留存给世人的，最后的天职。 大地已然陨落，背负着火种的巨兽不知去向， 但我仍愿合掌，向创造此间的吉奥里亚祈祷，愿生命茁壮成长。

You want to know where I am going? It's my homeland, surrounded by mountains. The cliffs there are adorned with awkwardly carved flowers, and the dromas rest in the valley, lulled to sleep by laughter of the inhabitants. We were from every corner of Amphoreus. In the deep ruins, we wailed in the cold rains until the Mountain Dwellers took them in. The Mountain Dwellers lost everything, including their gods. They stopped smelting. Their clumsy hands started to plow and sow. Their sturdy arms cradled new life. Nurture was the last calling left to humans by the Pillar of Stone. The earth has fallen. The Coreflame-carrying beasts have disappeared. And I'll fold my hands in prayer to Georios. May life flourish again.

你可知在神悟树庭之外，还存在一批不被承认的学者？ 他们不关注现有知识的传承， 只在意世人未曾知晓的领域。 他们将求知视为人生的苦旅， 身披荆棘，脚踩独木桥， 不仅须忍受煎熬，稍不留神还会粉身碎骨。 无论是黄金血的秘密，还是泰坦本身的存在， 甚至是那人人避之不及的黑潮， 皆是他们求知的方向。 如此亵渎的行为，必遭到神罚的苦难， 几乎所有学者都在研究稍有进展时遇难， 或被泰坦信徒围杀，或离奇意外死亡。 可他们依旧如飞蛾扑火一般，奔向那永远解不开的答案。

Do you know that there's a group of unrecognized scholars beyond the Grove of Epiphany? They don't care about the inheritance of established knowledge. Instead, they focus solely on the mysterious, unexplored realms. They regard the pursuit of knowledge as an arduous odyssey, Where they brave thorny paths and precariously walk tightropes. At every step, they endure immense suffering, and one misstep could spell their destruction. Whether it's unraveling the mystery of the golden blood, probing into the existence of the Titans, Or even the dreaded black tide, Became a direction in their pursuit of knowledge. Such blasphemous endeavors will surely invite divine punishment and suffering. Nearly all scholars meet their untimely ends as soon as they make slight progress in their research, Either being hunted down by Titan followers or dying in bizarre accidents. Yet they continue to plunge toward those eternally unsolvable answers, like moths drawn to the flame.

没错，是我在照料这片花园， 无忧无虑之人才能定居的，无人流泪的理想乡， 将黑潮和战争都抛诸脑后，与世隔绝的田园。 何必去思考百年后的灾厄？何必苦恼后世的烦忧？ 我们约定俗成地忘却翁法罗斯的一切， 在醒来后播种， 疲惫了便找块石头，坐着谈笑。 万径之门残存的赐福，护卫着它的壁垒， 只要人们仍依恋这片土地，它就不会倾倒。 你说这是自欺欺人，可忧虑无法改变事实， 不如趁着年华大好，流干最后的眼泪， 然后，围坐在篝火前，在宴会里安度余生。

That's right, I'm the one tending this garden, A utopia where only carefree people can settle, a place where no one sheds tears. An isolated haven where the black tide and wars are thrown behind. Why dwell on disasters a hundred years from now? Why fret over the troubles of future generations? We conventionally forget everything about Amphoreus. We sow seeds after a sound sleep, And when weary, we find a stone to sit on and chat. The remaining blessing of the Gate of Infinity protects its ramparts. And as long as people remain attached to this land, it will not fall. You say this is self-deception? But worry changes nothing. So why not make the most of our good years, shed our last tears, And gather by the bonfire to enjoy life's endless banquet?

这是刻录在石板上的巡猎时刻，天谴之矛尼卡多利的神迹。 无数人都曾见证过，征服者追猎天空的身形， 雷电扫过它的肩膀，双翼的眷属撕咬它的手臂， 无畏的纷争之神无暇擦拭金血， 以百支洞穿云翳的长矛作为回应。 于是天穹的百眼巨鸟尖啸着逃离， 胜利父跋涉过山峦和沟谷， 追猎那霸占了天空的，傲慢的仇敌。 从翁法罗斯的起点到终点， 如倒转的雨滴落入天空的长矛照亮黑夜， 刺入大地的雷枪亦永恒轰鸣。 模仿着神明，天空的祭司与悬锋的战士相向而对， 直到将另一方消灭殆尽，这场猎杀都绝不会止息。

This is an instance of the hunt inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Nikador, the Lance of Fury. Countless witnesses had beheld the conqueror's heroic bearing as they fought in the sky. Lightning swept across their shoulders, and the winged Titankin gnawed at their arms. The fearless God of Strife spared no time to wipe away the golden blood. In response, a hundred lances pierced through the dark clouds. Wounded, the many-eyed giant bird of the sky dome shrieked and fled. The Father of Victory traversed mountains and valleys To relentlessly hunt the arrogant foe that usurped the sky. Across Amphoreus, from north to south, Lances like inverted raindrops pierced the sky, illuminating the night. Thunder spears roared eternally as they struck the earth. Imitating the divine, the sky priests and the warriors of Kremnos clashed head-on. This hunt would never cease until one side was utterly annihilated.

这是刻录在石板上的智识话语，裂分之枝瑟希斯的神迹。 埃杜利亚的少女在诞生时，智慧便超脱常人， 她将百年间留下的难题尽数解开。 已无疑问能困扰的少女，找到瑟希斯的圣树， 傲慢的她向瑟希斯祈求一个问题， 倘若泰坦也无法难住自己， 自诩穷尽了世间知识的人子，便能证明， 自己比神明还要睿智。 瑟希斯提问，翁法罗斯之外有什么？ 茫然的少女愣在原地，三天三夜亦无法解答。 问题的答案究竟是什么？ 神明微笑着摇曳枝条，它亦无从知晓。 承认自我的愚钝，正是它比少女更睿智的地方。

This is an erudite utterance inscribed on a stone tablet. This is the miracle of Cerces, the Bough of Rift. A girl from Idilia was born with wisdom far surpassing that of ordinary people. She solved all the puzzles left over a century. With no questions left to challenge her, she found the sacred tree of Cerces. In her arrogance, she prayed to Cerces for a question, Believing even the Titans could not stump her. She claimed to have exhausted all knowledge of the world, and wished to prove, That she was wiser even than the gods. Cerces asked, "What lies beyond Amphoreus?" Bewildered, the girl stood motionless for three days and nights, unable to answer. What, indeed, was the answer to the question? The god smiled and swayed their branches, for they too did not know. Admitting their own ignorance was what made them wiser than the girl.
万敌
Mydei
单次生效，对万敌施放时解除控制类负面状态，若万敌处于【血仇】状态，则使其自动施放【弑神登神】并使暴击伤害提高。若万敌不处于【血仇】状态，使万敌行动提前。

One-time effect. When used on Mydei, removes Crowd Control debuffs. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses "Godslayer Be God" and increases his CRIT DMG. If he is not in the "Vendetta" state, Mydei's action advances.
单次生效，对万敌施放时解除万敌陷入的所有控制类负面状态，若万敌处于【血仇】状态，则使其自动施放1次不消耗充能的【弑神登神】，本次攻击中万敌的暴击伤害提高#1[i]%，若施放前目标被消灭则对新入场的敌方目标施放。若万敌不处于【血仇】状态，则使万敌行动提前#2[i]%。

One-time effect. When used on Mydei, removes all Crowd Control debuffs inflicted on him. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses 1 instance of "Godslayer Be God" without consuming Charge. Mydei's CRIT DMG increases by #1[i]% during this attack. If the target gets defeated before the use, then it will target the newly arriving enemy targets instead. If Mydei is not in the "Vendetta" state, then advances Mydei's action by #2[i]%.
【血仇】状态下万敌免疫控制类负面状态。
While in the "Vendetta" state, Mydei is immune to Crowd Control debuffs.
【血仇】状态下万敌受到致命攻击时不会退出【血仇】状态。
During the "Vendetta" state, Mydei will not exit the "Vendetta" state when receiving a killing blow.
【天谴之矛，迈德漠斯】征服了%CasterName的魂灵，受到%CasterName攻击的伤害提高#1[i]%，被我方消灭后解除%CasterName的【受征服】。
"Mydeimos, Lance of Fury" conquered %CasterName's soul and will take #1[i]% more DMG from %CasterName's attacks. After being defeated by targets, dispel "Conquered" on %CasterName.
【天谴之矛，迈德漠斯】征服了%CasterName的魂灵，受到%CasterName及其忆灵攻击的伤害提高#1[i]%，被我方消灭后解除%CasterName的【受征服】。
"Mydeimos, Lance of Fury" conquers %CasterName's soul and will take #1[i]% more DMG from %CasterName's memosprite attacks. After being defeated by targets, dispel "Conquered" on %CasterName.
可回复的生命上限和可回复的战技点上限降低，当【翁法罗斯的「恨」】降低时可削弱该效果。
Maximum Restorable HP and Maximum Recoverable Skill Points are reduced. This effect can be weakened when "Amphorean Hatred" decreases.
永恒之地翁法罗斯
Amphoreus, The Eternal Land
悬锋盾牌
Kremnos Shield
悬锋重剑
Greatsword of Kremnos
在那黎明照拂的圣城，织者抚弄金丝，连缀命运。 背负「浪漫」火种的黄金裔，召集世间英雄，带领他们再度踏上漫长的征程 ——击落众神，归还神火，予以几近覆灭的翁法罗斯新生。

In that holy city kissed by the dawn, the weaver caresses the golden threads, entwining fates. The Chrysos Heir that bears the "Romance" Coreflame gathered the world's heroes, leading them on a long journey once more — to topple the gods, reclaim the divine flame, and grant rebirth to the nearly fallen Amphoreus.

许多年之后，当她无意间找到少女时代织就的衣物，温柔自绸缎流淌而下，令她久无波动的心为之一颤。 世代供奉「墨涅塔」的家族中，人人从小学习一项「美」的技艺，大师们的画像悬于私人浴池的名誉墙上，无时无刻不审视着他们的子孙。 谁到了这里不是噤若寒蝉，可偏偏她在那大师目光的重压下轻盈走动。 「绘画失之于虚假，音乐失之于抽象，雕塑失之于笨重，戏剧失之于流俗……」 长辈一脸无奈，稚嫩的声音却让人无法反驳。 「小雅，还能有什么比它们更美？」 她踏出浴池，踮脚舞蹈至镜前，淡金色的长发如瀑般流淌而下。 「不。」 水晕弥漫的镜面上，金色的双眸牵引着万缕千丝的视线—— 「我一定会找到——那更美的存在。」 「就是为了这样单纯的理由，后来啊……」衣物的温暖触着指尖，泛起回忆。 她在树庭中淘气攀爬，浴池中沉思想象，只为了拾一枚金叶，一捧灵感的浪花。 她在屋顶跳跃奔跑，在原野逗留张望，为了用丝线重现微风的自由与弥远的花香。 时间流淌，织机不停，她的作品源源不断，于奥赫玛中掀起风潮，一次又一次。 她穿着最为得意的织物拜访神殿，但她仍怀有疑问：「这是美吗？」 那「墨涅塔」的祭司已至暮年，虽难以清晰视物，但女孩的光彩仍刺破了她眼前的昏暗。 「小雅，当你接过『金织』的职责时，你一定能创造出令诸神嫉妒的作品。 「这件衣物，以及穿着这件衣物的你，都是如此美丽…但这并不是『美』。」 「可…美和美丽…不是一个意思吗？」 「你呀，还不懂…不懂是好事，好事啊……」

Years later, when she unexpectedly discovers a garment she had woven in her youth, tenderness pours from the silk, gently shaking her long-stilled heart. In the family devoted to Mnestia throughout the generations, each member is taught a "beautiful" art from a young age. Portraits of the great masters hang on the honor wall of the private bath, ever watching over their progeny. While many are left speechless by the intense scrutiny of these masters, she moves with an effortless grace beneath their heavy gaze. "Painting succumbs to pretense, music to abstraction, sculpture to bulkiness, and drama to the mundane..." The elders show clear signs of defeat, but her voice, young and resolute, silences any objections. "Little Agy, surely there is nothing more beautiful than these." Stepping out of the bath, she dances on tiptoes to the mirror, her pale golden hair cascading like a waterfall. "No." In the steam-clouded mirror, her golden eyes pull countless strands of attention along — "I will find it — the existence that surpasses all others in beauty." "It was for such a simple reason that, later on..." The warmth of the garment touches her fingertips, awakening memories. She mischievously climbs in the Grove and mused in the baths, all for a golden leaf, a handful of inspirational spray. She dashed across rooftops and paused in meadows, all to weave the freedom of the breeze and the far-off fragrance of flowers into her threads. Time flowed on. The loom never stilled. Her creations spark trends in Okhema, again and again. Dressed in her finest fabric, she visits the temple, yet she still wonders, "Is this beauty?" The priest of Mnestia had reached her twilight years, her eyesight diminished, yet the girl's brilliance still cut through the gloom before her. "Little Agy, when you assume the mantle of the 'Goldweaver,' you're destined to craft works that even the gods would envy." "This garment, and you in this garment, are indeed beautiful... yet this isn't 'beauty'." "But... aren't 'beauty' and 'beautiful' the same?" "You still don't understand... and not understanding, that's a good thing, truly a good thing..."

「▇▇▇月▇▇日 我们初见阿雅的时候，她说喜欢缇里西庇俄丝这个名字，听起来又高贵又美丽，就像她编织的衣服。我们问她，就为了这个把我们留下？她摇摇头，说，主要是想听老师每天晚上讲故事。 当时阿雅也是个姑娘，又怕黑又怕鬼，想到她嘴馋了还要拉上我们偷偷去厨房吃晚上剩下的面包，我们就忍不住想笑。时光是个雕刻家，像刻律德菈、海瑟音一样，现在阿雅出落得多么美丽啊！ 就像我们平时教导的那样，阿雅没有让任何人失望，她手中的金丝就像密网一般，任何敌人都无法飞出她的指尖。 可那活在阴影中的清洗者在返程途中偷袭了我们的队伍，服务于元老院的刺客组织绝不允许能领导圣城奥赫玛的黄金裔成长起来。但我们也一样，宁愿选择牺牲自己，也绝不会眼睁睁地看着年轻的英雄夭折—— 我们顺利用百界门度过了这次劫难，但意识也模糊了一分…上一次用百界门以后，我还以为再也找不到缇宁和缇宝了…… 没事的，阿雅。还不是现在，我们只需要休息一会，一会便好…… 只是旅程的脚步，必须要加快了啊……」 ——一封字迹虚弱的日记 缇安在回忆，缇宁提笔写，缇宝来补充

"Date: ▇▇▇ / ▇▇ The first time we met Agy, she told us she was fond of the name Tribios, praising it as noble and beautiful, much like the garments she crafted. We asked if that was her sole reason for keeping us around. She shook her head, explaining she mainly wanted to hear this teacher's nightly tales. Agy was also just a girl back then, afraid of the dark and ghosts. Remembering how her cravings led us on stealthy trips to the kitchen for leftover bread at night always brings a smile to our faces. Time is a sculptor, and having shaped Cerydra and Hysilens, now it has rendered Agy beautifully. Agy never lets anyone down, just as we've always taught her. Her golden threads weave a dense net, ensnaring any foe that dares come close to her fingertips. Yet the Cleaners who dwell in the shadows ambushed our team on the return journey. The assassins loyal to the Council of Elders would never allow the growth of Chrysos Heir who could lead the holy city of Okhema. We are no different. We, too, would rather sacrifice ourselves rather than stand by and look on as the young heroes' lives were cut short — We managed to escape the ordeal using the Century Gate, though our consciousness grew hazy by one more portion... After the last passage through the Century Gate, I feared we'd never find Trinnon and Tribbie again... Don't worry, Agy. It's not our time yet. We just need a brief rest, and we'll be back on our feet... But we must hasten our steps now..." — A diary with weaker and weaker handwriting Reminisced by Trianne, recorded by Trinnon, and finalized by Tribbie
那沉入迷雾的悬锋，纷乱与战争之城！它的王室流着弑亲的血脉，它的神明以灾厄为名。 不死的迈德漠斯，离群的狮子，逐猎「纷争」火种的黄金裔。你要忍受万死，浴血还乡，孤身背负疯狂的宿命 ——弑王成王，弑神登神。征战的铁蹄踏遍荒野，终归要沾上故乡的血。

Kremnos, the mist-shrouded city of chaos and war! Its royal lineage is tainted with patricide, and its god bears the name of calamity. The undying Mydeimos, the lion apart from the rest. Chrysos Heir who seeks the Coreflame of Strife, must suffer a thousand deaths, be bathed in blood on the path home, and bear the madness of fate alone. — Kingslayer be king, godslayer be god. Iron-hooves pound across the wilderness for the campaign, and must eventually soak in the blood of their homeland.
神悟树庭，滋养知识的学府，诞育哲人的摇床。 但渎神的阿那克萨戈拉斯，诘问「理性」火种的黄金裔，试问：你甘愿身负恶名，也要违逆预言，将怀疑的枝杈刺入智慧的圣树？ ——「可笑。这世界遍地虚假，唯有我才是真实。」

The Grove of Epiphany, where knowledge flourishes and philosophers are born. Yet here stands Anaxagoras the blasphemer, the Chrysos Heir who challenges the Coreflame of Reason. He is questioned: Would you defy the prophecy even if you must bear infamy, and insist on driving the thorns of doubt into the Sacred Tree of wisdom? ——"Ridiculous. In a world full of lies, I am the only truth."

「时至今日，我也未曾认同那神神叨叨的逐火之旅。但唯有一句话令我印象深刻——逐火是不断失却的旅途。 我从来不信黄金裔拥有相同的宿命，但毫无疑问，我也同样走在失却的道路上。 只是我失去的还不够…和我追求的东西相比，远不够满足等价交换的法则。 从提出泰坦与人的灵魂本质无异，灵魂由智种构成的理论后，我一直在等待一个彻底证实它的机会… 现在，这个机会终于来了！来得有些猝不及防，却也恰如其分。 今天，我终于能弥补多年前一场相似的灾难留下的遗憾。 我从死亡中得到灵感，也该如此偿还 ——我的身躯将作熔炼神明火种的容器，我的灵魂将成逼迫神明低头的枷锁，成就吾之理论的终极证明！ 现在的我无比快乐。 第一次造出能飞上天空的机械鸟，我曾这样笑着。第一次孵化出新生命时，我的双手曾这样颤抖。 后来的学子，倘若你看到这番话语，证明我已功败垂成，倒在黎明之前。 尽情使用我的成果，把我当作研究的对象！踏过我的身体，接过我的火把，把我当作照亮真理的薪柴投入燃烧的火焰！ 不要害怕亵渎—— 跨越神明本是禁忌，成为神明那又如何！」 ——树庭沦落后那刻夏记忆的回声之一，因无人发现而消散

"Even up till today, I still disagree with that bizarre Flame-Chase Journey. However, there is one statement that left a deep impression — Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. I never believed that the Chrysos Heirs shared the same destiny, but I am undoubtedly also on the path of losses. Yet, I have not lost enough... In comparison to what I pursue, I have not lost enough to fulfill the law of equivalent exchange. After I had proposed the theory that the nature of souls of Titans and humans are no different, and that souls are constructed from seeds of wisdom, I have been waiting for a chance to prove it once and for all... Now, the opportunity has presented itself! It came rather unexpectedly, but also right on time. Today, I can finally make up for the regret, akin to a calamity, from numerous years ago. I gained inspiration from death, and should repay as such. My body shall become the vessel to forge the Coreflames of gods, and my soul shall become the chains that force the gods to bow. That will become the ultimate evidence for my theory! I am incredibly happy now. I once smiled like this, when I first created a mechanical bird that could fly in the sky. My hands once trembled like this, when I developed a new life through incubation. My future students, if you see these words, it proves that my endeavor has failed at the final step, falling just before the break of dawn. Use my results to the fullest extent, and make me the subject of your research! Step over my body and take the torch from my hands. Use me as the firewood to ignite the flames that will bring light to the truth! Do not fear blasphemy— It is already a sin to transcend the gods, so what if you become a god!" — One of the echoes in Anaxa's memories after the Grove had fallen, which vanished because nobody discovered it

哀丽秘榭，少年的家乡。 村庄日出而作，日落而息，如同他的身世，朴实无华。 只能容纳数人的校舍内，少年听着令人昏昏欲睡的历史课，心思早已跟手中飞舞的木屑一同飘向遥远的地方。 一笔一划，藏在桌屉里的木头逐渐显现出战士的模样。 「要有一把沉重的大剑，才配得上这样的实力……」 对着阳光，他磨利木片的边缘。 「铠甲闪耀着荣誉的伤痕，披风好似搏击风云的翅膀。 「还有……」 「白厄！想要成为最强的战士…就该好好听讲。」 皮西厄斯老师总是不厌其烦地打破他的幻想。 相比学校，少年更喜欢那麦秸堆垛的训练场。 那里是他的战场，稻草人时而是来袭的兵团，时而是横冲直撞的恶兽。 不上学的时候，他常常在这里与木头雕成的伙伴消磨一整天的时光，直到每一隅村户飘散出烹调的香味。 清凉的树荫下，疲惫的少年枕在草地便能安睡。 支离破碎的梦境中，他眺望着从未见过的城邦，见证波澜壮阔的故事。 「去成为英雄吧……」 那心声如同哀丽秘榭翻涌不息的麦浪，引领少年踏上远行的路。

Aedes Elysiae, the boy's hometown. The village lived by the rhythm of the sun: working at daybreak, resting at sundown, just like his own life, simple and unadorned. In a tiny schoolhouse that could barely fit a handful of students, the boy drifted off during a droning history lesson, his thoughts floating away with the wood shavings dancing from his hands. Stroke by stroke, the figure of a warrior slowly emerged from the block of wood hidden in his desk drawer. "A mighty greatsword... only a blade like that could match this strength..." He sharpened the edges of the wood chip in the sunlight. "Armor scarred by honor, a cloak like wings soaring through the storm." "And then..." "Phainon! If you want to be the strongest warrior... you'd better start paying attention." Miss Pythias never gets tired of dragging him back to reality. The boy preferred the training yard stacked with hay bales far more than school. It was his battlefield — where scarecrows turned into charging soldiers, or wild beasts on the rampage. When he was not at school, he often spent entire days there with his carved wooden comrades, until the smell of cooking wafted from every household. Beneath the cool shade of the trees, the exhausted boy could fall asleep right on the grass. In his broken dreams, he gazed at city-states he had never seen and witnessed grand tales unfold. "Go... become a hero." That voice, like the endless waves of wheat in Aedes Elysiae, guided the boy onto the road of adventure.
北境帝国，失落的王朝，寒冷的疆土燃烧着征伐的野心。 君主刻律德菈，执握「律法」火种的黄金裔，布局设子，与神相弈，审判异心的罪囚，为此世奠定逐火的基业 ——「这绝非终点，翁法罗斯的征途，当是银河群星！」

The Northern Empire, a lost dynasty, where its frozen lands burn with the fever of conquest. Sovereign Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir who wields the Coreflame of "Law," weaves her schemes, contends with the gods, passes judgment upon the faithless, and lays the foundation of Flame-Chase into this world. ..."This is far from the end. Amphoreus's journey is set to blaze across the stars!"

三相的神谕自雅努萨波利斯，传向大地上无尽纷争的城邦。 「拯救世界…从来不是执棋者的兴趣。」 她品味神谕，熊熊燃烧的未来仿佛就在眼前—— 「但与那自视为主宰的神明相争，乃至走向天外…的确是旷古而绝世的一局！」 漫漫长夜中，她如璀璨的灯火吸引流淌金血的人子： 奥赫玛的议院中，黄金裔与平民共享争论与决议的公民权。 宏伟的图书馆拔地而起，逐火的使命人人皆可获取。 军队的旧习被废除，深海的游鱼搁浅在陆地，循着血与火的气味成为她的剑旗。 奥赫玛的政坛中，圣城的「金织」冉冉升起，金丝的颤动将众人的命运彼此连缀。 …… 但那棋盘以黄金之血勾勒，她的对手是神明。即便她以燃烧之痛换来冠冕，以永驻幼年换取未来，胜利的天平似乎从未真正倾向人子。 「逐火是不断失却的旅途…… 「唯有同等的代价，才能交换同等的胜利。但要击落神明，还远远不够……」 她日日夜夜推演，不愿自己的忧虑被人看见。 「既然你是棋手，我们便是棋子，对吧？」 不等她的回答，以剑为琴的少女洗去手上的血腥，点了点头。 「我明白了。」 唯有此时，那高傲的女皇才会罕见地沉默。 「如果可以……」 她的脸上浮现一丝似有若无的苦涩。 「不，没有如果。」 猎夺「海洋」火种的战役前，她再一次站在高台，望着五百位屏息等待谕令的臣子。 「诸位——」 当她的声音响起，欢呼声响彻云霄。 「今日，『海洋』将为我们倾覆，那『毁灭』的巨兽将成为无往而不利的武器，为征服星海举杯吧！」 她知道前方是有去无回的血海，但她必须扮演斩钉截铁的君王。 再一次，她仿佛听到老师的告诫—— 「棋是牺牲的艺术。 因此，棋手须首先立下必死的决心。」

The tripartite prophecy spreads from Janusopolis to the city-states in endless strife throughout the land. "Saving the world... has never been of a chessmaster's interest." She ponders the prophecy, envisioning a fiery future unfolding before her. "But to challenge gods who see themselves as rulers, and even venture beyond the sky... now that's a game worth playing!" Through the endless night, she draws golden-blooded children of humanity like a brilliant flame: In Okhema's Council, Chrysos Heirs and common folk alike share the right to debate and vote. Magnificent libraries rise from the ground, granting all access to knowledge of the Flame-Chase mission. As ancient military orders crumble into dust, a gladius of the deep is drawn to shore, following the perfume of blood and fire to serve as her blades. In the political waters of the holy city, the Goldweaver of Okhema rises on the horizon, and the trembles of golden threads entangle the people's fates. ... Yet her chessboard is etched in golden blood, and she plays against gods themselves. Though she trades burning pain for her crown and suffers eternal infancy for the future, the scales of victory have never truly tipped in humanity's favor. "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey..." "Only through a worthy sacrifice can we gain a befitting victory. But to topple gods, this is far from enough..." Day and night she studies the board, concealing her anxieties from any watchful eyes. "If you're the chess master, then that makes us the pawns, right?" Without waiting for an answer, the girl who wields a sword like a musical instrument wipes blood from her hands and nods. "I understand now." Only in moments like these would the proud empress fall uncharacteristically silent. "If only..." A trace of bitterness flickers across her face. "No, there are no 'if onlys' anymore." Before the battle to claim the Ocean's Coreflame, she stands once more upon the platform, looking down at five hundred subjects who hold their breath, awaiting her decree. "My warriors..." As her voice resounds, cheers erupt throughout the crowd. "Today, the 'Ocean' shall surrender to us, and the beast of 'Destruction' will become our unstoppable weapon. Now, raise your cups! To our conquest of the sea of stars!" She knows that only a crimson sea of no return awaits ahead, but she must wear the mask of the unflinching ruler. In that moment, the wisdom of her teacher whispers to her again... "Chess is the art of sacrifice." "Your hands must accept death before touching the board."

Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

尼卡多利以神躯之百死淬炼剑刃，试图挥动「天谴之锋」刺穿远方的奥赫玛城。危急时刻，万敌独自殿后拖住尼卡多利，而其余人则回到奥赫玛，商议破局之法。

Nikador invoked the Body of a Hundred Deaths to temper blades, aiming to swing the Blade of Fury to pierce the distant Okhema. In this moment of crisis, Mydei held off Nikador alone, giving the rest of the party a chance to return to Okhema and strategize a way to counter this threat.
虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。
We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures.
虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。在这剑拔弩张之时，欧洛尼斯的态度却在见到{NICKNAME}后发生了转变。

白厄的火种试炼突生变故，情急之下，我们决定与遐蝶、万敌一同介入试炼，将可能遭遇危险的白厄救出。
When crisis struck during Phainon's Coreflame trial as we waited anxiously, we made the snap decision to join Castorice and Mydei in rescuing Phainon from possible peril.
将白厄安顿好后，我与{NICKNAME}回到浴宫稍作休整。关于翁法罗斯世界的现状，我们也做了一些自己的判断与总结。
After ensuring Phainon's safety, {NICKNAME} and I retreated to the bath chamber to rest. We also drew our own conclusions about the present situation in the world of Amphoreus

斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。 杀出冥界的战士万敌，他那灵魂的幻影也出现在冥河滩涂之上。

Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city. Illusions of Mydei's soul seem to have appeared on the banks of the River of Souls as he slaughters his way out of the nether realm.
公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。 掌握翁法罗斯命运的最后一枚陶片就在你的手中，你会将它掷于何处？

三月七的状况似乎更加严重了。 黑天鹅似乎仍有隐瞒，翁法罗斯对忆庭来说意味着什么，它又为何如此重要。
March 7th's condition seems to be getting worse. Black Swan still seems to be hiding something... What does Amphoreus mean to the Garden of Recollection? And why is it so important?
感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。 黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？

学着点吧，星穹列车。黑塔大人不用肉身闯关，就能亲自降临翁法罗斯，只要轻轻出手，就能立刻探明这个陌生世界的奥秘。 别问为什么我如此肯定，因为我早就是黑粉了。

Learn from this, Astral Express. Madam Herta doesn't need to traverse obstacles in the flesh to personally visit Amphoreus. She can immediately uncover the secrets of this unknown world with just a simple touch. Don't ask me why I'm so sure — it's because I've been a Heritor for so long.

Meanwhile, in Okhema, the Council of Elders' despicable scheme was quietly taking shape, and soon, it erupted into a storm of chaos.

赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。

Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.
赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。

Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.
黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。

Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

在遐蝶权能的掩护下，万敌帮我们拖住了盗火行者的脚步，让我们得以从云崖脱身，抵达云石天宫附近。这里也同样是一片狼藉，好在奥赫玛的居民受到风堇的庇护，其时已无大碍。 距离创世涡心只有一步之遥，得加快脚步了。

Shielded by Castorice's power, Mydei buys us time against the Flame Reaver, enabling our escape from Dawncloud to Marmoreal Palace. Though this place too lies in ruins, we're relieved to find Okhema's residents unharmed under Hyacine's protection. The Vortex of Genesis awaits just a short distance away — we must hasten our steps.

翁法罗斯！我并非陡然地呼唤你的名字。 我来此，是为了讲述历史—— 末日的黑潮降临大地，神明堕入疯狂，凡人举戈相向。 但仍有逐火的英雄，在创世的伟业中先行。 此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。 来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？ 以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。

Amphoreus! I do not beckon your name in haste. I come here to tell a tale of history. When the black tide of doom descended upon Earth, gods fell into madness, and mortals turned against each other. Yet there were Flame-Chasing heroes, pioneering the great enterprise of creating a world. In this world, they shall meld burning golden blood into their bodies. Will the destiny of days to come remember their names? In the name of Worldbearing, I promise you: Kephale will never forget.
天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。 而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？

A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for. Now that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

翁法罗斯与外界的隔绝状态被打破，三位无名客先行者成为新世界的泰坦。圣城居民向「负世」的{NICKNAME}祈祷，虔诚等待全世的神谕降临。

The isolation of Amphoreus has been shattered, and the three Nameless forerunners have become Titans of the new world. The holy city's residents pray to the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, devoutly awaiting the divine prophecy to descend upon the world.

归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。

The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of 30 million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

在黄金裔们的陪伴下，我们终于来到归墟的最深处，白厄的英魂就在此处镇守「毁灭」的劫火。当空白的愿望烧灼为负世的意志，我们终将为卡厄斯兰那带来解脱，并接过他的责任与最后的心愿——击败铁墓，拯救翁法罗斯，乃至全银河。

Accompanied by the Chrysos Heirs, we finally reached the deepest part of the ruins, where Phainon's heroic soul guards the cataclysmic fire of the Destruction. As the blank wish is transformed through fire into the will to bear the world, we shall finally bring release to Khaslana and inherit his responsibility and final wish: to defeat Irontomb, help Amphoreus, and save even the entire cosmos.

在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。 在过去的悬锋城中，记忆的主人却不见踪影，看来你又要来一次轰轰烈烈的劫狱作战了。

With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness. In this past version of Castrum Kremnos, the master of this memory is nowhere to be seen... Looks like you have another explosive jailbreak battle ahead of you.

With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness. You rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。 你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。

不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——但这真的是她想做的吗？ 是否和你一样，只是被任务目标一样的命运牵着走呢？ 戏剧的过场有时也代表着岁月的流逝，有剧作家否认这种做法，提倡将时间、地点与人物统一，好让观众与舞台同调——但这样很难。

Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... But is this truly what she wants to do? Is she not the same as you, being blindly led along by fate towards her mission? Sometimes play interludes are used to represent the passage of time. Some playwrights criticize this approach, saying that time, location, and characters should be unified in order for spectators to resonate with the scene... But this is very difficult.

Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... The person that gave her this mission, was it this person that seems to love her? Or are they both simply bound by their own cocoons? "What we seek is not only the good, it is also the permanent. What love seeks is to have something good forever."
这回是真的走到最后了。我们的故事，会被寰宇铭记吧？ 翁法罗斯，明天见。
This is truly the end of the road. Will the universe remember our story? See you tomorrow, Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……

The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

「黄金替罪羊」当中蕴含的信息既神秘又若有所指。来古士对它颇有兴趣，提出可以利用树庭的装置对其进一步分析。
The information within the Golden Scapegoat is both enigmatic and revealing. Lygus, intrigued by it, suggests using the Grove's devices for deeper analysis.
奥赫玛维系千年的黎明结束了，黑潮袭来，城邦为苦痛、哭号和死亡吞没。 聚集着大批避难者的黎明云崖圣殿里，似乎有人正在请求帮助……

The millennium-long dawn of Okhema has ended. The black tide surges in, engulfing the city-states in suffering, wailing, and death. In the Dawncloud Temple, where many refugees have gathered, someone seems to be seeking help...
整个树庭倾覆之前，竟然没有一只无辜的小动物受到伤害…这一切的原因竟然是「贼灵」巴特鲁斯。 它想炫耀一下自己的英雄事迹，你可以打听打听，听完有赏。

Before the Grove collapsed, miraculously, not a single innocent critter was harmed... and it was all thanks to the Spirithief Bartholos. They're eager to brag about their heroic deed. Ask them about it, and you might get rewarded.
泰坦的恩赐无处不在，奥赫玛也不例外。探寻过往的奥秘，重启神秘的仪式。
The Titan's blessing surrounds us, as does Okhema. Uncover the mysteries of the past and reignite the mystical ceremony.
辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。

The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

奥赫玛的集市上总有个小女孩跑来跑去，叫卖着不存在的新闻…难道她很缺钱？
There is a young girl that is always running around the Okhema market selling made-up news... Could it be that she is in dire need of money?
在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。 但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。

You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request. Aside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

The Rating Pistol gazes at Mydei: "0.59 points?" the gaze reveals a look of confusion and semi-suspicion.
「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」。
The Eternal Land, Amphoreus.
「你呢，迈德漠斯？你的杀意足以与命运相配么？！」
"What about you, Mydeimos? Can your murderous intent match up to what fate has in store for you!?"
「在恐惧中抛却凡躯吧，悬锋之王！」
"In fear you shall abandon your mortal body, King of Kremnos!"
悬锋诸王，这就是你们渴望的力量么？
Kings of Kremnos, this is the power you desired?
（悬锋的未来…去找克拉特鲁斯吧。）
(The future of Kremnos... I should find Krateros.)
被三重命途缠绕的神秘天体于忆者之镜中映现——那是「开拓」的下一站目的地，「永恒之地」翁法罗斯。
A mysterious celestial body entangled by Three Paths appears in the Memokeeper's mirror — Amphoreus, The Eternal Land, the next stop for the Trailblaze.
但降落的过程不算顺利，绝处逢生后，开拓小队结识了当地的「黄金裔」英雄，并从他们口中得知，支撑世界的泰坦诸神正在腐坏，翁法罗斯的大地遍布伤痕。

But the landing is not a smooth one. After surviving the crash, the Trailblaze squad meets the local Chrysos Heir heroes. They learn from them that the Titans supporting the world are rotting away, and that the land of Amphoreus is covered in scars.
为彻底摧毁尼卡多利的正身，众人计划潜入往日的悬锋城捞取真相。在命运重渊的尽头，开拓者谒见「岁月」泰坦欧洛尼斯，神差鬼使间接受了浮黎的瞥视。

In order to destroy Nikador's true form, the group plans to infiltrate Castrum Kremnos of the past to discover the truth. At the end of the Abyss of Fate, the Trailblazer communes with the Time Titan Oronyx, and somehow receives a gaze from Fuli.
就这样，奥赫玛度过了漫长的一天。
And so, this long day passed for Okhema.
准备好，迈德漠斯。
Get ready, Mydeimos.
两位贵客没有为逐火之旅出生入死的义务，还是由我和万敌阁下同行吧。
Our two distinguished guests are not obliged to risk their lives for the Flame-Chase Journey. Let me join you instead, Lord Mydei.
机会难得…火种事关翁法罗斯的世界本质，我们还是一探究竟为好。
This is a rare opportunity, though... The Coreflame has something to do with the workings of Amphoreus. It's best for us to learn more.
…遵命。
...Yes, Lord Mydei.
来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?
来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?
是让翁法罗斯众生陷入疯狂的元凶之一。自纷争世起，此种不可名状之物便如同瘟疫，随{RUBY_B#死亡、纷争与诡计}灾厄三泰坦{RUBY_E#}一同降临大地……

It is one of the culprits that drives the people of Amphoreus to madness. It was during the Era Bellica that this... unspeakable thing first appeared, like a plague, alongside the {RUBY_B#Death, Strife, and Trickery}Three Titans of Calamity{RUBY_E#}.
万敌，你身为悬锋的继业者，自然明白：若只是在「纷争」的疆场上取胜，对你们而言易如反掌……
As the successor to Kremnos, Mydei, you know better than anyone that if it were simply about emerging triumphant on the battlefield of Strife, you and your people could manage it with ease.
不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.
不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.
再回想下翁法罗斯的特征吧——这是一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
Let's think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus instead. An isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power...
我先前就很在意，种种迹象表明，翁法罗斯绝不是一个从未接触过宇宙的世界。无论是泰坦的降生，还是黑潮来袭…都难以用文明的自然发展解释。

This has been bothering me for a while now. Everything we have seen thus far suggests that Amphoreus wasn't always isolated from the rest of the universe. Be it the birth of the Titans or the encroaching black tide, none of these can be explained as a "natural progression" of a civilization.
悬锋人…在和奥赫玛人交战？
Kremnoans... and Okhemans are at war?
随你怎么说，下贱的奥赫玛人……
Say whatever you like, despicable Okheman...
{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
{RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...
{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
{RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...
…荒唐透顶。我认得这奥赫玛人，他是个磊落的战士，却被「纷争」捏造成了这般扭曲模样。
...Absurd. I know this Okheman. Strife contorted an honorable warrior into this perverse and twisted being.
迈德漠斯，你是……
Mydeimos, you are...
羞辱我，不必——滚出去，滚出奥赫玛！
Humiliate me, you shall not. Leave. Get out of Okhema!
滚吧！你们的王权，带上！悬锋的印戒，享受染血的荣光，你们自己！
Get out! Symbol of your sovereignty, take it! Signet of Kremnos, bask in blood-soaked glory, your kind alone!
「呵，迈德漠斯…你诚然是个目光闪亮的勇士。」
"Ah, Mydeimos... You are a keen warrior, indeed."
「为什么？她为捍卫你的尊严，明知自己将死于毒计，却仍向悬锋先王发起角斗。难道你想说，这一切都不过是她空自劳苦么？」
"Why not? She challenged the former Kremnos king to a duel, even knowing that it was a deadly trap, all to protect your dignity. Are you suggesting her efforts were for naught?"
「呵！你的恨意了然于色，迈德漠斯，这些话想必刺痛了你的心胸。但也正因此，我终于明白了……」
"Hah! Your hatred is as clear as day, Mydeimos. My words must have stung you deeply. But thanks to them, I have also come to realize..."
「这就是你弑父夺得王权，却任凭印戒沉入冥海，不愿延续悬锋荣光的理由……」
"This is why you killed your father for the throne, only to let your signet sink to the bottom of the Sea of Souls, refusing to let the glory of Kremnos live on..."
「当你破开我的胸膛，那也正是你登神之时——悬锋的继业者啊，我向你致敬！」
"The very moment you rip my chest apart shall be the moment of your ascension. To you, the successor of Kremnos!"
奥赫玛将两位卷入{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一战，令你们身处险境，实属无奈。我等对两位的「开拓」义举感激不尽，愿以奥赫玛最上等的礼仪相谢。

For all that has happened, it was never our intention to drag you two into the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and jeopardize your safety. To express our gratitude for your kind Trailblazing endeavors, we would like to present you with the highest honor of Okhema.
此物名为「神血蜜露」，据传仅有十二瓶，乃是用众泰坦各自神血浇灌的作物酿成。世间仅存的三瓶现皆已收入奥赫玛宝库。

This is the Dew of Divine Blood, brewed from crops nourished by the blood of the Titans. It is said that only twelve bottles existed. The last three bottles are now being kept in the treasure vault of Okhema.
如今，奥赫玛愿依传统为天外来客斟饮奉赠，以表诚意。
And now, in keeping with tradition, Okhema dedicates this drink to our esteemed guests from beyond the sky in appreciation of what you have done for us.
恕我直言…与黄金裔结盟，是否意味着我们会被卷入奥赫玛的内部纠葛？
With all due respect... won't forging an alliance with the Chrysos Heirs embroil us in the conflicts within Okhema?
只是…我听说黄金裔与奥赫玛的元老院之间存在分歧，作为外来者，我们不想在这场斗争中站队……
It's just... I've heard of the friction between the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Okhema. As outsiders, we are wary of getting caught up in this conflict—
所以…我想和两位交朋友，听两位讲有关天空的故事！阿格莱雅女士，奥赫玛好不容易拿出这么珍贵的礼物，就让我也沾沾光吧？
Can we be friends? I'd love to hear your tales of the sky! And ooh, it's a rare occasion that Okhema presents such an invaluable gift to guests. Lady Aglaea, may I have the honor of tasting it, too?
当然，我不会拒绝。也请二位相信，这份礼物的背后并无过多深意——结盟一事，我们可以择日再议。
Of course you may. Esteemed guests of Okhema, please believe me when I say that this gift carries no hidden agendas. As for the matter of the alliance, you need not give me an answer here and now.
既然如此…那我们也不推辞了。感谢奥赫玛的赠礼，也欢迎风堇女士随时交流。
...I see. In that case, we will accept this gift from Okhema. We welcome the chance to talk with you, Lady Hyacine.
正式引荐一下吧——这位是来自神悟树庭「智种学派」的讲师助理，也是医疗机构「昏光庭院」的首席护理师，风堇。
Allow me to do the honors. This young lady is Hyacine, assistant lecturer of the Nousporists at the Grove of Epiphany and head nurse at the medical institution known as the Twilight Courtyard.
前些日子奥赫玛遭{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}袭城，不少黄金裔因战负伤，树庭特遣风堇女士前来支援奥赫玛，为伤者提供治疗……
Many of the Chrysos Heirs suffered injuries during {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s attack on Okhema, so the Grove sent Lady Hyacine to treat the wounded in Okhema.
虽然很想再多留你几日，但若将你强留在奥赫玛…树庭的人可要背后多话了。
I would love to keep you in Okhema for a few more days, but I would hate to provoke the ire of the Grove.
既然事涉奥赫玛邦交事务，我们就先行离开了。
Since this involves Okhema's diplomatic affairs, we'll give you some privacy.
我倒是有个提议。{NICKNAME}若闲不下来，何不与大家同去树庭？那里的景貌幽邃雅致，适合旅行。
If you're not keen on just sitting around, {NICKNAME}, why not go with them? The Grove is a picturesque place, perfect for sightseeing.
这个提议好，欢迎灰宝来树庭做客！就由我来做你的导游吧？
That's a wonderful suggestion! Come visit the Grove, Grayie! I'd be delighted to show you around!
听起来不错。多收集翁法罗斯不同地区的风土人情，也是「开拓」的一环。
Sounds good. Gaining more insight into the customs and geography of different regions of Amphoreus is also part of Trailblazing.
此物名为「引纬」，是我家族世代相传的纺衣器具，如今象征意义已远大于实用性。见到此物便等于见过我本人，倘若树庭有为难的意思，出示之便可。

This tool, called the Weft, is used to spin thread and has been passed down in my family through generations. Though it doesn't see much practical use nowadays, it's become a symbol of great significance. In this respect, it is the perfect token to represent my will. If you encounter trouble at the Grove, just take this out and show it to them.
此外，遐蝶知道，在树庭的地界上，它引出的金丝能为各位勾勒周遭一切已形或未形之物，如同…我之所见。

While you're in the Grove, the golden thread of the Weft can also render all things around you visible, regardless of whether they're corporeal or not, allowing you to see things as I would. Castorice knows this, too.
善加运用吧。缇安在奥赫玛的城郊等待各位——祝你们此行顺利。
Make good use of it. Trianne is already waiting for you at the outskirts of Okhema, so I won't keep you any longer. May your journey be smooth.
我和白厄等人曾在树庭求学，那刻夏老师当时负责教授我们与黄金裔和泰坦相关的知识。我也是在那时结识了风堇小姐——她曾是那刻夏老师的助教。

When I was studying at the Grove alongside Phainon and the others, Professor Anaxa was responsible for teaching us about the Chrysos Heirs and the Titans. That's also when I met Miss Hyacine... She was Anaxa's teaching assistant then.
神悟树庭是什么样的地方？
What is the Grove of Epiphany?
神悟树庭是奥赫玛的友邦学院——他们保管着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，是研究黑潮、泰坦等神秘事物的前沿机构，也为逐火之旅提供学术研究支持。

The Grove of Epiphany is Okhema's partner academy. They look after the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and are the organization at the forefront of researching phenomena such as the black tide and the Titans. They also provide academic research support for the Flame-Chase Journey.
在那里同样驻扎着几名黄金裔，其中就有风堇小姐和那刻夏老师。
Several Chrysos Heirs are based in the Grove, including Miss Hyacine and Professor Anaxa.
发生什么事了吗，克莱门汀…啊，好重的伤！
Did something happen, Clementine? Ah... that's a serious injury!
…是缇安发现的！缇安今天早上心情不好，就跑到奥赫玛的郊外散心，然后，然后就发现他倒在了路边！
...Was discovered by Trianne! Trianne was in a baaaad mood this morning, so we went to the outskirts of Okhema for some fresh air... b—but then we found him collapsed on the roadside!
灰宝、蝶宝、还有缇安老师，麻烦你们先行赶赴树庭吧？待伤者情况转好，我会和克莱门汀赶上你们的。
Grayie, Cassie, and Trianne. Would you mind making your way to the Grove first? Once this man is out of danger, Clementine and I will join you.
请你们先赶赴树庭吧——愿瑟希斯捍卫你们的思想！
Please make your way to the Grove first. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts!
从这条路，飞起来，我们就要，离开奥赫玛！
Down this road we go! To the skies we fly! Leaving Okhema behind!
好喔，我们，大手拉小手！去树庭！
Okie-dokie! Everybody, let's hold hands! To the Grove we go!
树庭，路途远！准备，要做好！
The Grove is far! It's important to be ready!
几日后 神悟树庭
A few days later, Grove of Epiphany
开个玩笑！不过，人家相信，这次来神悟树庭，一定也会收获满满。
I was just kidding! Anyway, I believe that this trip to the Grove of Epiphany will definitely be a fruitful one.
好！缇安记得，*我们*要帮阿雅去问问大树，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}愿不愿意去奥赫玛做客……
Okie-dokie! Trianne remembers that we need to help Agy ask the Big Tree whether {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} would be willing to visit Okhema...
愿这条浪漫之路，能为奥赫玛带去佳音。
May this romantic path bring good tidings to Okhema.
很久以前，「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯带领众人在林间建立起花园与庭院，并取名「神悟树庭」，供世人醒神、求识、悟道之用。

A long time ago, Thalesus, the First Scholar, led the masses to build a garden and courtyard in the forest, naming the site the "Grove of Epiphany." There, people sought mental clarity, knowledge, and enlightenment.
树庭历来欢迎求学者，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}也会借微风捎来嫩叶，并伸出枝梢，结成道路，以示迎接。
The Grove has always welcomed scholars. So too would {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} give us her delicate leaves and extend her branches in greeting.
可现在…树庭的使者也好，泰坦也好，似乎都无动于衷。
Yet... it seems both the Grove's messengers and the Titan are indifferent to our arrival.
树庭闭门谢客了？
Is the Grove closed to visitors?
阁下，这种话…等下进去以后可千万不要说。
Um... Please don't speak such words once we're in the confines of the Grove.
不太可能…在我记忆里，树庭里的辩论声终日不绝于耳。
That's not very likely... As far as I can recall, the voices of people engaged in debate echoed throughout the Grove at all hours of the day.
还记得吗？阿格莱雅大人说过：「在树庭的地界上，它引出的金丝也能为各位勾勒周遭一切已形或未形之物」……
Do you remember? Lady Aglaea said this: "While you're in the Grove, the golden thread of the Weft can also render all things around you visible, regardless of whether they're corporeal or not."
这是因为，树庭并不单是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系所在，也是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}「黄金之茧」{RUBY_E#}显迹之地——
This is achievable because the Grove is not only where the roots of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} are... but also where the Chrysalis of Gold manifests.
大家，提高警惕…无论树庭发生了什么，能在这里见到黑潮造物的遗骸，绝不是个好兆头。
Everybody, stay alert. Regardless of what has happened to the Grove, the fact that we're seeing the remains of a black tide creation here definitely doesn't bode well.
虽然树庭所处地理位置相对偏僻，但黑潮竟能迅速蔓延至此……
To think the black tide has spread this quickly to the Grove despite its remote location...
呜，那奥赫玛岂不是也危险了？
Oh no... Does this mean that Okhema is also in danger?
与此同时 奥赫玛
At the same time, in Okhema
别有压力，你已尽了你的职责。现在也别着急回树庭了，先好好休息吧。
Don't stress yourself out over this. You've already done everything in your power to save him. There's no need to hurry to the Grove either. You deserve a good rest now.
他并非奥赫玛人。其身上所着衣裳，针脚的藏埋方式颇为特殊…是树庭的手艺。
He is not Okheman. The way the stitches on his clothes are hidden is quite unique... Such craftsmanship is undeniably from the Grove.
树庭？难道说……
The Grove? You mean...
算算时间，遐蝶她们也该到了。
Now that I think about it, Castorice and the rest should have arrived at the Grove by now.
*我们*…*我们*看到树庭已遭黑潮造物入侵……
The black tide has invaded the Grove...
…黑潮威胁果真加剧了，只没想到竟是树庭首当其冲。
...The black tide is posing an even greater risk to us now. I did not expect the Grove to be the first to be impacted, though.
当务之急是尽快确认并转移火种，搜寻幸存者，以便厘清树庭之灾始末…就这么转告{M#他们}{F#她们}吧。

Please let them know that for now, the most pressing task is to identify the Coreflame and transfer it to a safe place as quickly as possible. We must also search for survivors and find out exactly what happened to the Grove.
内忧外患呵。{RUBY_B#「黄金战争」}痛苦的残杀{RUBY_E#}虽已辍停，奥赫玛的宿敌却在我们眼下砥砺锋芒至今……
We're facing threats from both within and without Okhema. The {RUBY_B#Chrysos War}merciless carnage{RUBY_E#} may have ceased, but Okhema's nemeses continue to sharpen their blades even now...
唉…希望树庭的人们，度过这次难关的…越多越好。
...We can only hope that the Grove weathers this crisis with as many survivors as possible.
…除他拼死逃出，树庭恐怕凶多吉少。
...It's likely he is the only one who managed to escape from the Grove, against all odds.
缇安觉得…会没事的！树庭的大家都很聪明，肯定能赶跑黑潮。
Everything will be fine! The people at the Grove are really smart. They'll definitely be able to chase away the black tide!
啊？这种人还在这里搞研究…你们刚才不是说，树庭是围绕泰坦建立的学院嘛？
Huh? And he's still able to conduct research here? Didn't you just say that the Grove is an academy that was established around a Titan?
缇安相信，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}不会有事的！毕竟都说了，树庭的大家都很聪明嘛。
Trianne believes {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} will be alright! After all, everybody says that the people of the Grove are really smart.
黑色的怪物业已倒下，如同倾圮的雕像。其身躯内有金色的余灰残留，与翁法罗斯常见的黄金血或为一物。
The black-colored monster has fallen like a toppled statue. Within its body lie golden ashes, perhaps the same substance as the golden blood that is commonly seen in Amphoreus.
嗯，翁法罗斯的绝大多数门都是靠{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量封闭的。
Yes, most of the doors on Amphoreus are sealed using the power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.
我名为阿那克萨戈拉斯，神悟树庭七贤人之一，「智种学派」的创始者。丑话先说在前头：第一，别叫我那刻夏。
My name is Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the founder of the Nousporists. Before we go any further: Rule number one, do not call me Anaxa.
只有小部分学者与我一起留守，捍卫树庭。如果不出意外，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种应在不久后同时抵达奥赫玛……
Only a small fraction of the scholars stayed behind with me to defend the Grove. If all goes well, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame will reach Okhema before long...
犹如天雷贯地，「毁灭」金光直欲撕裂黎明机器，摧坼穹窿。一时间，翁法罗斯无数洞天里，众人只觉天地翻覆、山河动荡。真可谓帝弓再临射星矢，灵木摧折云埃起……

Like a celestial thunderbolt piercing the earth, the "Destruction" radiance threatened to tear apart the Dawn Device, shattering the firmament. In an instant, within the many delves of Amphoreus, everyone felt the world overturn and the mountains and rivers tremble. It was as if the imperial bow had returned to shoot the stars, splintering sacred trees and raising clouds of dust...
这颗心脏是树庭一切水流之源……
This heart is the source of all water in the Grove...
正是。新灵感的火花每每在树庭中迸发，露水便会自此垂落，落入池中。
Indeed. When the sparks of inspiration burst forth within the Grove, dewdrops fall and land within the pool.
怎么区别对待呀，是怕人家太聪明，问出颠覆整个翁法罗斯的问题吗？
What's with this unfair treatment? Is it because I'm too smart and you're afraid that the question I ask will turn Amphoreus upside down?
方才已告说过了，吾乃神悟树庭七贤人之一。若觉着这答案不够利落，再附赠一条：吾实为七贤人之首。
As I've previously mentioned, I'm one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany. If you think that this answer is insufficient, then I'll add to it. I'm the leader of the Seven Sages.
吾想确认汝等是否有实力，为吾夺回正身…更从黑潮手中夺回树庭。
I want to ascertain your ability to help me reclaim my true form... and reclaim the Grove from the black tide.
一个在树庭游荡的…幽灵？
A spirit... wandering around the Grove?
嗯！缇安不久前在一根树枝上找到的。缇安还顺着用金丝找了找，发现整个树庭到处都有类似的气息。
Yup! Trianne found it on a branch not long ago. Trianne even used the golden thread to search around and found that the entire Grove is giving off a similar aura.
抱歉，我也不知道…毕竟这可是整个树庭、乃至翁法罗斯，都只有极少数人知晓的秘中之秘。
Sorry, but even I don't know how... After all, this is a secret among secrets that only a select few in the entire Grove and even Amphoreus know.
即便是翁法罗斯本土神话，也不外乎「心诚则灵」四个字。只要你能展现出诚意，蝴蝶便绝不会无动于衷……
Even in the native myths of Amphoreus, it all boils down to "sincerity brings miracles." Show genuine intent, and the butterfly will surely respond...
还有，「出言必有据」——这正是我在树庭求学时习得的宝贵知识。
Also, "to make a claim, one must have evidence" — this is the precious knowledge that I acquired during my time at the Grove.
呵呵，毕竟树庭的学者们为了捍卫吾之火种，不惜赴火蹈刃，从容就义…吾既贵为尊神，若只眼睁睁看着人子们舍己成人，未免太没面子。

Hehe, after all, the scholars of the Grove have always been willing to lay down their lives to defend my Coreflame... As a respected god, it would be too embarrassing if I were to do nothing and simply watch the children of humanity give up their lives for me.
尤其是那名唤那刻夏的异端——不惜磔裂灵魂当作础石，引发奇迹，在这树庭中布下天罗地网，将一众黑潮造物困于樊笼中，以免殃及他方。

Especially that heretic named Anaxa. He did not even hesitate to tear his soul apart and use it to perform a miracle. He trapped all the creations of the black tide within the Grove so that they would not be able to harm others.
真是只伶俐的小兔子。如此，吾既能夺回正身，汝等也能将火种和恩师迎回奥赫玛……
What a smart little bunny. This way, I'll be able to regain my true form, and you will be able to bring the Coreflame and your teacher back to Okhema...
大家，跟缇安走！从奥赫玛，飞呀飞！
Everybody, follow Trianne! Fly, fly, fly away from Okhema!
为了翁法罗斯…给我陪葬吧，泰坦。
For the sake of Amphoreus... Die with me, Titan.
如果接过神权的是你，他们一定会心甘情愿追随的…因为你是悬锋城的英雄。
If you take on the divine role, they will have no reservations about following your lead... After all, you're the hero of Castrum Kremnos.
我父母现在在圣城守备队中服役…他们是悬锋的战士，比所有奥赫玛人都勇敢。
My parents are serving in the Holy City Garrison now. As warriors of Kremnos, they're braver than any Okheman!
你们几个，可曾去过悬锋城？
Have you ever been to Castrum Kremnos?
你们出生在圣城，生活与奥赫玛人无异，对一族的了解也只来自旁人口述。
You were all born in the holy city and are living lives no different from the Okhemans. Everything you know about our people comes only from the tales of others.
爸爸妈妈说，悬锋的孩子打出生起就手持利剑，注定要奔向战场。
Mom and Dad told me that the children of Kremnos are born to wield swords and fight on the battlefield.
他们还说，王子率领的{RUBY_B#悬锋城流亡军}悬锋孤军{RUBY_E#}是翁法罗斯最勇猛的军队，战无不胜。
They also said that the {RUBY_B#Kremnoan army in exile}Kremnoan Detachment{RUBY_E#} led by the crown prince is the bravest army across all of Amphoreus. No one can defeat them!
还不是时候。悬锋的年轻人，听我口令：回到父母身边，从今日起，把全部时间用在饮食和锻炼上。想成为合格的悬锋勇士，这两件事决不能落下。

That time has not yet arrived, but... Young men of Kremnos, heed my command! Return to your parents at once. From hereon, you are to dedicate yourselves to rigorous training and a healthy diet. You must not neglect these two aspects if you are to become a brave warrior of Kremnos.
糟了，是他，那悬锋城的王储……
Drat! It's the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos...
奥、奥赫玛的宪兵队正在执行公务，请勿随便靠近！
Th—The Civil Guard of Okhema is on official duty. Please keep out of this area!
你觉得自己博古通今？那我考考你，你可知道悬锋城的黄金狮首，是怎么被砌到墙上去的？
So, you think yourself knowledgeable? Then here is a question for you: Do you know how Chryseus Leo in Castrum Kremnos came to be mounted on the wall?
哈哈哈，那我就给你说道说道。当年，悬锋城的建立者带着一众战士在特雷托斯城郊围猎雄狮……
Hahaha! Let me enlighten you. A long time ago, the founder of Castrum Kremnos led a group of warriors to hunt down a lion on the outskirts of the city of Tretos.
那牙尖爪利的恶兽为害多年，巢穴里的骸骨垒得比环绕奥赫玛的山峰还高。
That vicious beast had been a menace for years, and the bones in its den were stacked even higher than the peaks around Okhema.
——哎哟，这不是，万敌阁下嘛？！真是好久不见哪，哈，哈哈……
— Well, well. If it isn't Lord Mydei! It's been a while, ahaha...
哦？这奥赫玛吹的是什么风……
Oho, what in Okhema is happening?
言外之意…你曾想过放弃悬锋的王权，放弃领导你的族人。
In other words... you did entertain the thought of giving up the throne of Kremnos and forsaking your people.
假如让他们知道，备受族人尊崇的王储萌生了放弃的念头…迈德漠斯，你该如何向你逝去的母亲交代？
If they ever learn that the crown prince they look up to so much is actually toying with the notion of stepping down... think of the disgrace it would bring upon your departed mother, Mydeimos.
别忘了，她可是为了你——为了重振悬锋的荣光——才会死于{RUBY_B#悬锋先王，万敌之父}欧利庞{RUBY_E#}的毒计！
You'd best remember that she died for you because of {RUBY_B#Former Kremnoan King, Father of Mydei}Eurypon's{RUBY_E#} schemes! To restore the glory of Kremnos!
你是在羞辱我吗，迈德漠斯？我是老了，但还没老到愚痴。我当然记得，欧利庞死于悬锋孤军的围剿……
Are you trying to shame me, Mydeimos? I may be old, but I haven't become so decrepit that I've forgotten it all. Of course, I remember that Eurypon died when the Kremnoan Detachment surrounded him.
走吧，万敌——那些黄金裔是这么称呼你的——走你自以为正确的道路。你骨子里是个我行我素的战士，一旦下定决心，没人能阻止你。

Go, Mydei... Hah, that's what those Chrysos Heirs call you, isn't it? Go down the path you have deemed correct. Deep down, you have always been one to do as you please, and I am well aware that no one can deter you once you've made up your mind.
可是不要妄图否定悬锋的传统…我们身在奥赫玛，但永远是「纷争」的子民。
But don't you ever dream of renouncing the traditions of Kremnos... We may reside in Okhema now, but we remain eternally bound to Strife by blood.
欧利庞，{RUBY_B#万敌}这孩子{RUBY_E#}没做错任何事！
Eurypon, {RUBY_B#Mydei}the boy{RUBY_E#} did nothing wrong!
这是一场谋杀！别让婴孩无辜的鲜血玷污悬锋人的荣耀——别把软肋暴露给你的敌人！
This is murder! Do not sully the noble name of Kremnos with the blood of an innocent child! You mustn't reveal your weaknesses to the enemy!
我们…必须拯救悬锋城。
We must... save Castrum Kremnos.
荒谬！他的手就连枪头都举不起来，你觉得他能威胁到悬锋城？
Don't be absurd! Those tiny hands lack the strength to even lift a spear! Do you truly believe him a threat to Castrum Kremnos!?
你要是真这么做，那才是断绝了悬锋的血脉——让我们千百年的荣光变成彻头彻尾的笑柄！
You'll be ending the bloodline of Kremnos if you do this. Our millennia-old glory will become nothing more than a joke!
至于悬锋城千百年的「荣光」，那本来就是个笑话——杀戮就是杀戮，为虚荣而高兴的杀人凶手，并不比翁法罗斯最凶蛮的野兽更高贵。

As for our millennia-old "glory"... it has always been a joke in my eyes. Glorify it all you want, but it will not alter the nature of slaughter. Those who revel in it are but murderers. They are no more noble than the most monstrous beasts in Amphoreus.
大言不惭！你，还有悬锋诸王，你们的每一顶王冠，哪个不是从父辈的尸身摘得……
Enough with your words! Among all the kings of Kremnos, which one did not inherit the crown only after plucking it from the lifeless body of his father?
吾儿…迈德漠斯。
My son... Mydeimos.
迈德漠斯，吾儿啊……
Mydeimos, my son...
若无王冠便无以为悬锋…那我就夺来它，掷碎它，激醒众人吧。
If there is no Kremnos without the crown... then I shall seize the crown and smash it to pieces to bring the people to their senses.
为了奥赫玛！死吧！
In Okhema's name! Perish!
怎么了…是树庭那面遇到麻烦了么？
What's wrong...? Is there trouble at the Grove?
凶手…是…迈德漠斯……
The culprit... is... Mydeimos...
说说吧，万敌？告诉我们，你和白厄做了些什么傻事。
Speak up, Mydei. Tell us exactly what kind of foolishness you and Phainon indulged in this time.
「…长夜最后的光亮，城垣坚固的奥赫玛。」
"In twilight's last gleam, Okhema stands bold. Her walls sturdy, tales untold."
这几句表达了作者的思乡之情，正如奥赫玛离大部分人的故乡都很遥远。
These lines express the poet's yearning for their home, just as Okhema is distant from many people's homes.
嚯…听你的意思，勇猛的迈德漠斯，悬锋王位的继承人，居然想打破一族延续千年的古老传统？
So... are you suggesting that you, the mighty Mydeimos and the heir to the throne of Kremnos, wish to defy the tradition that has endured among your people for millennia?
或许我们都需要释放压力。来吧，迈德漠斯，延续你我之前的竞赛……
Maybe we both need to relieve some stress. Come, Mydeimos! Let's recommence our previous competition...
翁法罗斯的大地上，有些生命死于黄昏，有些生命死于拂晓，而有些生命——它们命中注定死于正午的烈阳！
On the land of Amphoreus, some lives meet their end at dusk, some at dawn, and yet others... are fated to perish under the blistering sun at noon!
状态恢复后，白厄与万敌将晕倒的浴客们送离了案发现场……
After recovery, Phainon and Mydei escorted the fainted bathers away from the scene.
那…先前和{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}对决时，你们在奥赫玛上空张开的巨大「百界门」，岂不是……
In that case... when you opened that giant Century Gate above Okhema during the battle against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}...
咱俩认识也有段时间了，听你说悬锋古语的次数…屈指可数啊。
Though we've been acquainted for some time, I have... rarely heard you talk in the ancient tongue of Kremnos.
呵…因为实在没什么可说的。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，因为战火，早就不复存在了。
Well... It's because there isn't much to say. Aedes Elysiae is simply a tiny village that disappeared many years ago in the flames of war.
嗯，我看见了，燃烧的哀丽秘榭，我的亲人、朋友、同族…所有人都倒在火海里。
Yes, I saw it all. Aedes Elysiae ablaze, with everyone — my family, friends, and my kin — lying in a sea of flames.
对…所以我由衷地感谢你，迈德漠斯。
That's right... And that's why I am truly thankful to you, Mydeimos.
那你呢，万敌？你在那试炼里看见了什么…你的恐惧又是什么？
Then what about you, Mydei? What did you see in that trial? ...What do you fear?
然后，我在其中看到了奥赫玛。以及……
But to answer your question, I saw Okhema in the trial, as well as...
翁法罗斯的野风有铁锈的味道。赫菲斯辛总笑话我喝蜜酿加羊奶，说把鲜红的血色拌得不伦不类。他生得瘦小，但在战场上凶悍无比，杀敌如麻。

The wind in the wilds of Amphoreus smells like rust. Hephaestion would always tease me about adding goat milk to the honey brew, claiming I ruined the blood-red color of the drink. He had a scrawny figure, but was a relentless force on the battlefield, dispatching foes without so much as a blink.
托勒密总爱咬文嚼字，离开悬锋时，从大图书馆顺走了不少古籍——都是我家的，也不用还了。至于朴塞塔…呵，他不爱说话，但弹得一手好琴……

Ptolemy was a real bookworm, always spouting off in chapters and verses. When we left Kremnos, he made off with a stack of ancient tomes from the grand library — not like it mattered, since my family owns the library. And then there was Peucesta... Heh, he was the silent type, but a truly masterful musician...
当然。在悬锋孤军与奥赫玛联合前，他们就战死了。
They died on the battlefield before the Kremnoan Detachment managed to join Okhema.
「迈德漠斯，不要悲伤。我已挣得荣耀，用光荣的死亡回敬夙敌……」
"Mydeimos, do not mourn. I have achieved honor by bestowing a noble death upon the enemy..."
「多好啊，迈德漠斯…我终于能将你成王的讯息带向冥界了……」
"This is perfect, Mydeimos... I can finally deliver the news of you ascending the throne to the nether realm..."
「迈德漠斯，请你转告我的家人：打倒我托勒密的并非歹毒的诡计，而是翁法罗斯一切历史的重量。」
"Mydeimos, please tell my family: It was not cunning schemes that vanquished Ptolemy, but the immense weight of Amphoreus' entire history."
「迈德漠斯，戴上王冠吧。」
"Mydeimos, don the crown."
「迈德漠斯…{RUBY_B#悬锋人}我们{RUBY_E#}的王啊…不要落泪，那不称你的身份。」
"Mydeimos... {RUBY_B#Kremnoan}Our{RUBY_E#} king... Do not shed tears for me. It's not befitting of your status."
他死后，我本想过带领族人回归故乡。但彼时的悬锋已是一片荒芜，能在其中生长的只有黑暗与疯狂。
Following his demise, I considered leading my people back to our homeland, but Kremnos had already turned into a wasteland. Only darkness and insanity thrived there.
顶着许多人——也包括克拉特鲁斯——的反对之声，我让悬锋孤军留在了奥赫玛。但我明白，他们的荣耀不可能被磨灭。
Against the dissent of many — Krateros included — I made the Kremnoan Detachment stay in Okhema, but I know that their glory will never be doused out.
不久后 奥赫玛城下
Shortly after, in Okhema
呼…真是险之又险的逃生。但幸好，终究是安全抵达奥赫玛了。
Phew... That was a close call. Thank goodness that we returned to Okhema unharmed.
奥赫玛，你的球棒侠回来了！
Okhema, your baseballer is back!
不对，缇安大人。若不是你挺身而出，我们早已葬身树庭了。
Please don't blame yourself, Lady Trianne. If it weren't for you, we would've already met our end at the Grove.
真是嘈杂…奥赫玛还是老样子啊。
All this noise and commotion... Okhema hasn't changed a bit, has it?
…老师，我直说了：阿格莱雅大人给我们的任务是，寻找幸存者、弄清树庭之灾的原委，以及…回收{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种。

...Professor, let me be frank: The mission Lady Aglaea entrusted us is to search for survivors, uncover the truth about the disaster at the Grove, and... retrieve the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.
只是在那之前，我还有些事情要办。树庭有几位同僚的家属就住在圣城，我想在面见阿格莱雅前…先去慰问一下他们。
But I have some things to take care of first. The families of some of my fellow Grove scholars live in the holy city. Before we meet Aglaea... I want to visit them.
呵…我猜猜，她不但会拒绝让我慰问死者家属，还会封锁树庭的消息，那女人就是这般冷血。
Heh... Let me guess. That woman will not only prevent me from visiting the families of the deceased, but will also suppress any information about the Grove. She's always been that cold-hearted.
树庭的一些朋友为了和我一起捍卫火种，抗击黑潮，不幸牺牲，他们的家属…有权利得知这一切。
My fellows at the Grove gave their lives defending the Coreflame and fighting the black tide alongside me. Their families... deserve to know the truth.
女士，卡林尼库斯在几日前，为了保护树庭，牺牲在抗击黑潮的过程中了。
Ma'am, Callinicus passed away a few days ago defending the Grove against the black tide.
那么，树庭…他守住了么？
So... did he manage to defend the Grove?
我是悬锋人。死亡、牺牲…我皆能坦然面对。
I come from Kremnos. Death... and sacrifice... are things I have learned to face with composure.
如今，悬锋的新王要降临了。丈夫的仇债，我自会用手中的长枪问黑潮怪物们讨回。
With the coming coronation of the new king of Kremnos, I'll take up my lance against the creatures of the black tide and seek vengeance for my husband.
哎哟，你瞧我，都老糊涂了。我那俩争气的女儿，早就毕业啦，现在在树庭做学者呢。你说我，年纪大了，总是一个晃神，就看到好多年前的事情。
Alas, forgive this old brain of mine. Both of my daughters graduated long ago, and they are now scholars at the Grove. As I get older, memories from years past tend to blend together.
…她们为了保护树庭、抗争黑潮，战至最后一刻了。
...They fought until their last breath against the black tide to defend the Grove.
我是驻留树庭的黄金裔，没能保护好她们，费贝尔先生，如果您有怒火……
As the Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, I failed to protect them. Mr. Fabio, if you're upset...
冷静，提图斯。我是神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，与你的父亲老提图斯是同道。
Keep your cool, Titus. I'm Anaxagoras from the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of your father, Old Titus.
我早和他说过，一把年纪了，老老实实回圣城养老不好么？非要去什么树庭，和一群神神叨叨的学者瞎折腾。
I've been telling him for ages to stay in the holy city and enjoy his retirement. But no, he just had to go off to that Grove and mess around with those scholars.
还请小心。奥赫玛不是树庭，这里……
Please be careful. Okhema isn't the Grove. This place...
{NICKNAME}阁下，这趟树庭之行…实在发生了太多意料外的事情，我们本无意将你卷入危险，遑论直面黑潮……
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, so many unexpected things happened on our journey to the Grove... We truly had no intention of putting you in danger, let alone face the black tide head on...
如今{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}火种缺位，黑潮卷土重来…作为对黑潮研究最深的学院城邦，树庭绝非不堪一击之辈，却在朝夕之间倾覆，徒留一城英灵血泪……

{RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} Coreflame now sits vacant and the black tide has returned... The Grove is an academic city with the best understanding of the black tide. It shouldn't have fallen so easily, and yet it was taken overnight, leaving the city in blood and tears, haunted by the spirits of departed heroes...
「纷争」的试炼已是迫在眉睫，希望万敌…能尽早下定决心吧。
The trial of Strife is imminent. I pray Mydei will be able to steel his resolve soon...
树庭的可怕敌人，也是黑潮造物？
The dreadful enemies of the Grove are also creations of the black tide?
缇宝老师曾走遍翁法罗斯万千城邦，可就连她们都对这个黑袍剑士毫无印象…此人绝不可小觑，一人一剑便将我们逼得喘不过气，对黄金裔来说，无疑是新的威胁。

Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...
缇宝大人为了抗击黑潮踏上旅途，然而自旅途伊始，到走过万千城邦，她们都未曾在黑潮中遭遇如此强敌。说不定是「纷争」陨落，暗中激起了更为骇人的影响……

Lady Tribbie once traveled across thousands of cities in Amphoreus to repel the black tide, but even they have no recollection of this powerful enemy in all their journeys. Perhaps the fall of Strife has triggered even more terrifying events in unseen places...
但当时，在树庭，你接下我的时候……
Yet when you caught me in the Grove...
奔波数日，想必{NICKNAME}阁下也很疲惫了吧？请暂时将树庭的惨剧抛在脑后，好好休息一日吧。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, you must be tired after being on the move these past few days. Please set aside the tragedy at the Grove for now and rest for the day.
呵…没想到翁法罗斯还能锤炼无名客的意志。
Heh... I wasn't expecting Amphoreus to temper the will of the Nameless.
发现一件很有趣的事。还记得么？翁法罗斯的天空被一位泰坦封锁了，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}…它的存在让这个世界与天外隔绝。

I discovered something interesting. Do you remember that Amphoreus's sky was sealed away by a Titan? {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} presence keeps this world isolated from the rest of the world beyond the sky.
树庭事发，接下来肯定又会有几番动荡。事已至此，先休息吧。
After what happened at the Grove, there's sure to be unrest in the coming days. We should rest for now.
啊，迈德漠斯……
Ah, Mydeimos...
你要维护这女人吗，迈德漠斯？过去的千年里，围绕她——还有她们宣扬的神谕，多少战火燃起，多少城邦自相残杀？
Are you defending this woman, Mydeimos? How many wars did people start because of her and her so-called prophecy? How many cities fell in the past millennium, their people massacring each other?
自你的父亲死后，我和族人就一直在等待复兴悬锋的时机。我们将一切希望寄托于你，却迟迟没有得到回应。
Ever since your father died, our people and I have been waiting for a day to revive Kremnos. We placed all of our hopes in you but never received an answer.
你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.
真是勇猛的斗士…软弱的奥赫玛人，竟也拥有如此豪杰。
A fierce fighter... I did not expect such heroism from a feeble Okheman.
洗耳恭听吧！我是悬锋孤军之首，{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}——
Listen closely! I am the leader of the Kremnoan Detachment — {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}!
那就挥剑吧！拿走我的王冠，用先王的血加冕，继承一切…名正言顺，成为悬锋的新王。
Then swing your blade! Take my crown, coronate yourself with an old king's blood, and inherit it all... Become the new rightful king of Kremnos.
不，我不要王冠。听好了——倘若悬锋的王只有一种宿命，那它对我毫无意义……
No, I don't want the crown. Listen — If there's only one end for the kings of Kremnos, then the crown means nothing to me...
但悬锋的城墙不会随我一同崩塌…吾儿，你以为自己逃得出命运的掌心？
But the walls of Kremnos will not fall with me. Do you truly think you can escape fate's grasp, my son?
悬锋的王，是你。你会来，我有预感。
King of Kremnos, it is. That you would come, I knew.
悬锋，王者的印戒，属于你母亲。重铸、修复…由我。
A signet ring. For the king of Kremnos. Belonged to your mother. Recast and restore it... I did.
{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女能聆听门神的指引，也许你梦见的，就是翁法罗斯某处仙境的景象哦。
{RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' Holy Maidens can receive guidance from the god of passages. Perhaps what you saw in your dream is a divine land somewhere in Amphoreus.
嗯…很遗憾，它确实存在于翁法罗斯，只是离我们的圣殿还很遥远。
Yes... Unfortunately, it does exist in Amphoreus, but it's very far away from our temple.
既然心意已决，就穿越黑潮，为翁法罗斯拨开迷雾吧……
Since your mind is made up, then traverse the black tide and dispel the fog for Amphoreus...
与此同时 奥赫玛某处
At the same time, somewhere in Okhema
不会错…就是它。烧毁了哀丽秘榭…杀害所有人的凶手。
I was right... It is this thing. The one who torched Aedes Elysiae to the ground... and killed everyone.
奉劝你别逞英雄。眼下的奥赫玛，恐怕没人是它的对手。
Don't try to be a hero. No one in Okhema stands a chance against that thing right now.
你想主张…它来自翁法罗斯之外？
Are you suggesting that... it originates from beyond Amphoreus?
我只想为自己发誓保护的城邦除掉一个祸端，仅此而已。树庭的惨剧，绝不能再度上演。
I just want to eliminate a threat to the city I pledged to protect. That's all. The tragedy at the Grove must never happen again.
没什么！只是…又想起树庭的事。
Nothing! Just... remembering what happened at the Grove.
不久前 奥赫玛
Not long ago, in Okhema
但要是如你所说，它岂不是很快就会冲着奥赫玛来？创世涡心可是摆满了泰坦的火种。
But if your argument holds up, wouldn't they be headed to Okhema soon? The Vortex of Genesis is full of the Titans' Coreflames.
未必。我们暂且将此人称为「盗火行者」。假设推测成立，此人的目标共有三处。
Not necessarily. Let's call that person the "Flame Reaver" for now. If my presumption holds, that person has three targets.
一是我本人；二是仍未陨落的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}；三是保管诸神火种的奥赫玛和创世涡心。
The first target is me. The second target is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, who hasn't yet fallen. And the third is Okhema and the Vortex of Genesis, where the Coreflames are housed.
不过，我猜奥赫玛不会是首选。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院的秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕应该也足以隔断外界的感应。

But I suspect Okhema won't be their first target. {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the Council of Elders' arcane power, and {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain should be able to block out any external perceptions.
它若生有羽翼，我就不可能从树庭活着回来。
If they had wings, I wouldn't have made it out of the Grove alive.
那还真该庆幸啊。那么，既然盗火行者可能的目标有二，我们更得加快动作了……
That's a relief. Anyway, since the Flame Reaver has two targets, we need to move fast...
考虑到奥赫玛、树庭和这几处目标地点的距离，我想，最应该设防的是……
With the distances between Okhema, the Grove, and these potential targets, I believe we should bolster our defense in...
我权赐你与悬锋众英灵，同享尸床的权利——
Rejoice, for I grant you the honor of sharing your final resting place with Kremnos' departed heroes!
又来这套…万敌，我配合你进攻。
Not the same trick again... Mydei, I'll follow your lead.
阿雅，还是不要苛责小白了…奥赫玛的处境，非常危险。
Agy, there's no need to scold Snowy... Okhema is currently in grave danger.
对，和「逐火之旅」如出一辙…那刻夏老师认为盗火行者的出现，也许是黑潮进一步蔓延的表征。
Yes, just like the Flame-Chase Journey is doing. Professor Anaxa thinks the Flame Reaver's arrival is likely a sign that the black tide has spread further.
莫非是悬锋城？
Is it Castrum Kremnos?
