正是。各位一定记得，{NICKNAME}和{M#他}{F#她}的伙伴在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一役中施展过令人惊叹的神迹，唤醒了悬锋城的过往。

Yes. I'm sure everyone remembers the astonishing miracle {NICKNAME} performed with {M#his}{F#her} companion during the battle with {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and how they awakened Castrum Kremnos' past.
然后，将盗火行者「封印」在岁月的迷宫。
Then, we'll "seal" the Flame Reaver in the Maze of Time.
白厄，我希望与你达成共识：我们要将那盗火行者一举拿下，斩获战果。此后，面对元老院的挑战，我们也将有自己的底牌。

Phainon, it is my hope that we can come to an understanding on this: We must take down the Flame Reaver in one go and retrieve the Coreflame, and in doing so, grant ourselves an advantage against the Council of Elders.
抱歉，{NICKNAME}阁下，如今奥赫玛内忧外患，又将你推上浪尖。
I apologize for tasking you to spearhead the plan once again, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, but Okhema is currently beset by enemies from within and without.
但…盗火行者的剑想要伤到你，得先穿透我的胸膛。
But the Flame Reaver will have to step over my dead body if they wish to do you harm.
自然。与盗火行者交锋后，若阁下心力不支，自可抽身脱离战场，我们另寻他法。
Of course. Should you feel fatigued after our confrontation with the Flame Reaver, you are free to withdraw from the battlefield. We will find another way.
你说万敌么？他正在解决另一桩难题呢。
You mean Mydei? He's dealing with a different problem.
奥赫玛 创世涡心
Vortex of Genesis, Okhema
你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.
没错，这会是无比艰难的一仗。目的地…还是悬锋城。
That's right. It's going to be a tough battle, and our destination is... turns out to be Castrum Kremnos.
不久之后，我就会离开奥赫玛，去和这世间的至暗搏斗，去背负…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的命运。
I'll be leaving Okhema soon to fight the great darkness of this world... and to shoulder {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} destiny.
但我的事不重要。迈德漠斯，我看到了…最后，你还是拥抱了自己的命运。
But this isn't about me, Mydeimos. I saw it... You've finally decided to embrace your own fate.
没错，你实现了每一位悬锋先王的野心。
Indeed. You've realized the aspirations of every former king of Kremnos.
现在，你终于能带领族人还乡，去重铸悬锋的荣光了。
And now, you can at last bring our people home and reforge the glory of Kremnos.
别这么做，迈德漠斯……
Do not do this, Mydeimos...
拿上它，召集失去了身份的人们。告诉他们，登上神阶的迈德漠斯昭告天下——
Take it and rally those who have lost their identities. Convey the words of Mydeimos, now ascended to divinity:
翁法罗斯将迎来残酷的明天。大敌当前，再辉煌的王朝也不过是一堆瓦砾。
A cruel fate awaits Amphoreus. No matter how illustrious a dynasty may seem, it crumbles to rubble and gravel before formidable foes.
那一晚，说服阿格莱雅放了我的…是你么，迈德漠斯？
The one who persuaded Aglaea to set me free that night... Was that you, Mydeimos?
那现在呢，迈德漠斯？
And what is next, Mydeimos...?
那折磨{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂，吞噬整个翁法罗斯的黑暗……
The madness that has plagued {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and the darkness that has consumed Amphoreus...
你来了，迈德漠斯……
You're here, Mydeimos...
你帮奥赫玛渡过了又一道难关，没有言语能表达我的谢意。
You aided Okhema through yet another trying ordeal, and my gratitude knows no bounds.
那正是悬锋城的历代僭主缺失的东西。
That is precisely what every ruler of Castrum Kremnos has been missing.
翁法罗斯会迎来新生的，迈德漠斯…只是，带领人们抵达终点的不一定要是你我。
Mydeimos, a new chapter awaits Amphoreus... Yet, the one who guides the people to the destination need not be you and I.
所以，你也看见了么，迈德漠斯？
So, I assume you also glimpsed yours, Mydeimos?
再见了，万敌。
Farewell, Mydei.
…万敌？
...Mydei?
假如万事顺利，我们也许不会再见。感谢你们为翁法罗斯带来的一切。
If all goes according to plan, this may be our final meeting. I just want to let you know that I appreciate everything you have done for Amphoreus.
如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.
感觉不错。你觉得呢，万敌？
Looks pretty good. What do you think, Mydei?
…也祝你们在翁法罗斯不留遗憾。
...I wish the same for you during your time in Amphoreus.
悬锋之王，虽无印戒…却更有王相，如今。
The King of Kremnos, without the signet ring... But looking more like a king now.
与众人一同，我将在此，聆听悬锋城…那道惊雷。
Together with everyone, I shall remain here. That thunder... from Castrum Kremnos, we wait to hear.
万敌阁下！
Lord Mydei!
树庭的事，我听说了。请你节哀。
I've heard about what happened at the Grove. I am deeply sorry for your loss.
总是这么一针见血呢，万敌阁下。请放心吧，假如命运真的指定了我，我会做好准备的。
You've always been so perceptive, Lord Mydei. Rest assured. If fate has truly selected me, I will be ready.
我将返回悬锋城对抗黑潮，恐怕不会再回到奥赫玛了。
I'm heading back to Castrum Kremnos to fight against the black tide. In all likelihood, I will never again return to Okhema.
尽管说吧，万敌阁下。我一定逐字逐句帮你传达。
I'm all ears, Lord Mydei. I'll make sure to convey every single word.
——告诉她们，以后不必再以肉身勘察敌后了。只需一条讯息，天谴的锋刃便会指向奥赫玛的敌人。
...Tell them that there is no longer a need to send scouts behind enemy lines. With a single message, the Lance of Fury will target anyone who dares oppose Okhema.
…万敌阁下。
...Lord Mydei.
我不会那么做的，万敌阁下。死亡不是游戏。
I would never do that, Lord Mydei. Death is not a game.
所以，你要独自返乡了吗，万敌阁下？
So, are you returning home alone, Lord Mydei?
还乡…也许吧。现在悬锋城不仅是我的故乡，还是我命运的归宿。
Returning home, you say... Heh, maybe. At this moment, Castrum Kremnos is not just my birthplace, but also my fated destination.
我会的，万敌阁下。
I will, Lord Mydei.
从这里到悬锋城，路途漫长。
The road to Castrum Kremnos from here is long.
但话都说到这份上了…感谢你助我手刃仇敌，迈德漠斯。
Well, with that said... thank you for aiding me in defeating my archenemy, Mydeimos.
融入奥赫玛的过程中，他们一定会遇到阻力…我唯一的遗憾，便是无法与他们同担这段时光。
They will undoubtedly face challenges while assimilating into Okhema... It is my sole regret that I cannot stand by them during this time.
祝你战无不胜，迈德漠斯。
May triumph always be yours, Mydeimos.
怎么了，迈德漠斯？
What is it, Mydeimos?
…你是对的，迈德漠斯。
...You're right, Mydeimos.
那时我才发现，自己信奉的一切都脆弱不堪。也许悬锋精神真的存在过…但随着贪欲之花绽放，它早已随我们的荣耀一同凋零了。

It was at that moment I realized how everything I believed in was utterly hollow. Perhaps the spirit of Kremnos had once existed... but as greed bloomed in the hearts of humanity over the years, such spirit had long faded alongside our glory.
那就是你的母亲，迈德漠斯，你的守护者……
That of your mother, Mydeimos. Your guardian...
…梦总会结束于此。返回悬锋城的路途也比我预想更久。
...That dream always ends there. The journey back to Castrum Kremnos is proving to be longer than expected.
光历4931年 平衡月 「纷争」之泰坦，天谴之矛，尼卡多利陨落。悬锋之王迈德漠斯战胜试炼，新神诞生。
Year 4931 of the Light Calendar, Month of Balance Nikador — the Strife Titan, Lance of Fury — fell. Mydeimos, king of Kremnos, triumphed over the trial, and the new god was born.
向翁法罗斯的守护者——致敬——！
We salute the Guardian of Amphoreus!
再见了…悬锋的拯救者。
Farewell... Savior of Kremnos.
愿你战无不胜，悬锋的王。
May triumph always be yours, King of Kremnos.
再见了，迈德漠斯！
Farewell, Mydeimos!
看啊，迈德漠斯回来了！
Look, Mydeimos is back!
迈德漠斯！你刚训练回来吗？
Mydeimos! Did you just come back from training?
欢迎回家…迈德漠斯。
Welcome home... Mydeimos.
你现在可是「翁法罗斯」的守护者。
You're now the Guardian of Amphoreus, after all.
…奥赫玛人？你为什么在这里……
...An Okheman? Why are you here...?
为什么…阿格莱雅没告诉你们吗？我们受命前来协助各位，围猎盗火行者。
What...? Didn't Aglaea tell you? We have been instructed to assist you in trapping the Flame Reaver.
还记得之前万敌说的话，身在战场，就要抛却杂念……
But remember what Mydei said before? "Cast aside all distractions once you're on the battlefield"...
为了悬锋！为了王！
For Kremnos! For the king!
——来吧！为了悬锋，为了吾王……
Come, let us fight! For Kremnos! For my king!
…为了翁法罗斯！
...For Amphoreus!
我用了天空祭司的手段，才让他能再度行走。但倘若有一日，光明从奥赫玛彻底消失…但愿那种事不会发生吧。
I had to use the Sky Priests' techniques to help him walk again, but if light ever disappears from Okhema for good... No, let's hope that never happens.
白厄、遐蝶、万敌、风堇…我和吾师在世间寻觅千年，才终于找到了他们。
Phainon, Castorice, Mydei, and Hyacine... Tribbie and I devoted a millennium scouring the world, only to find these few people.
我是认真的哦！你对翁法罗斯具有特别的意义，这点大家都心知肚明。而{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
I'm serious! You're special to Amphoreus, and we all know that. Now, about {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...
奥赫玛的风中有阳光的味道……
We smell sunlight in the wind of Okhema...
迈德漠斯出发了，去背负属于他的命运。
Mydeimos has left the city to face his own fate.
所以，我想知道——身为翁法罗斯第一位半神，是怎样的勇气让你迈出了这条路上最初的一步。
So, what I want to know is — As Amphoreus' first demigod, what compelled you to take the first step on this journey?
因为翁法罗斯已步入纷争世？
Is it because Amphoreus has entered Era Bellica?
嗯。眼下纷争还远在翁法罗斯的另一边，但五年后的同一个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，这座圣殿将成为又一场战火的源头。
Yes. Strife remains distant from this part of Amphoreus right now, but in five years' time, at the same {RUBY_B#Dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#}, this temple will become the source of another war.
听起来挺简单的，也许万敌都能一遍过。
Seems pretty straightforward. Even Mydei might be able to complete it in a single try.
怎么背后说人坏话！
How could you talk smack about Mydei behind his back!
你说得对，但至少得两遍。
I agree it's straightforward, but Mydei might need at least two shots at it.
哎，那家伙…要是他还在，许多问题根本不必弯弯绕绕。
Mydei... If he were still here, we'd probably take a lot fewer detours to solve our issues.
嚯，这书架可真够壮观的，堪比树庭的友爱之馆了。
Look at that! This bookshelf is quite a sight, almost on par with the Library of Philia back at the Grove.
如此，拨开翁法罗斯漆黑的迷雾……
And thus, we shall sweep apart Amphoreus' pitch-dark fog...
她穿越「万径之门」，分裂为千名信使，将创世的神谕传向翁法罗斯大地。
She traversed the "Gate of Infinity," splitting into a thousand messengers to spread the divine prophecy across the land of Amphoreus.
为新世界带来明天的，或许只是几位英雄。但引领大家迈向明天的预言，却属于翁法罗斯的每一个人。
It may be that only a few heroes will bring tomorrow to the new world, but the prophecy of leading everyone to tomorrow belongs to all in Amphoreus.
但我更害怕的是，你会把自己和翁法罗斯绑得太紧…如果真的接过了那位泰坦的神职，你还有机会把它放下么？
But what concerns me even more is that you'll further bind yourself to Amphoreus... If you truly assume that Titan's divinity, do you believe you'll be able to lay it down again?
奥赫玛城里暗流涌动啊。
Looks like dark undercurrents are roiling in Okhema.
黑夜不可能降临在奥赫玛。
Nights do not fall upon Okhema.
可惜，我得代表奥赫玛，请你们放缓脚步了。
Unfortunately, on behalf of Okhema, I must ask you to slow your pace.
现在 奥赫玛
Presently, in Okhema
奥赫玛的祸患…
A disaster for Okhema...
翁法罗斯没有你们的位置！
There's no place for you in Amphoreus!
「永恒之地」翁法罗斯……
Amphoreus, The Eternal Land...
帕姆还不知道这项提议，也得征询列车长的意见。
We should consider Pom-Pom's opinion, too. They don't know we're considering Amphoreus as a destination.
是啊，就算最后不去那儿，燃料问题也得解决。
Yeah! Plus, even if we pass Amphoreus over, we've still got a fuel problem to solve.
考虑到这趟旅程的特殊性，不妨多做些准备。在正式决定前，我也会尝试从列车的盟友那里打听翁法罗斯的消息。

Seeing as how this is going to be an unusual adventure, it'd be good for us to take some time out to make preparations for the journey. Meanwhile, I'll see if I can find out more about Amphoreus from our allies before we depart.
的确还有另一个原因：黑天鹅小姐提到翁法罗斯是个受三重命途影响的世界，而其中一条就是「智识」。
Yes, there is something else. Miss Black Swan said Amphoreus is a world influenced by three Paths, and the Erudition is one such Path.
可惜俱乐部的会员往来甚少，大部分人也已死在寂静领主手上。我从未听说过「翁法罗斯」这个名字。
It's a pity we do not communicate much within the society, not to mention we've lost most of our members to the Lord of Silence. I have never heard of Amphoreus, however.
嗯，但在出发前，我还想尝试联络下黑塔女士。此前请她帮忙调查翁法罗斯，即便没有结果，也不能不打招呼就一走了之。
Yeah, but let me try contacting Madam Herta again before we set off. She helped us look into Amphoreus, even though nothing new came up... I should at least let her know we're leaving.
另外，那位忆者还补了句——相信各位一定会选择「翁法罗斯」。
Though she did say that she believes we'll end up deciding on Amphoreus.
最后，也是最大胆的选项——「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」。
And finally, the most adventurous option: The Eternal Land, Amphoreus.
果然比起其他选项，翁法罗斯还是多了个非去不可的理由啊……
Amphoreus does have something to offer, unlike the other options...
我的看法也一样。虽说前路未卜，但另外两个站点也谈不上多么安全。既然都要冒险，不如大胆一点。

I feel the same. While we know nothing about Amphoreus, we know the other two worlds aren't exactly safe options. Anyway, if it's a risk we're taking, we might as well throw in some adventure for good measure.
——当然，我的答案也是翁法罗斯。
That includes me, too. I'm for Amphoreus.
那我正式宣布：下一站——翁法罗斯！
It's official, then. Our next stop is... Amphoreus!
那等到了翁法罗斯，咱们一落地就去拍两张吧！
Then let's go snap some photos as soon as we arrive in Amphoreus!
咱也是。这次翁法罗斯之旅，可要留下一张大家都满意的合照！
Me too! This time in Amphoreus let's make sure we get a group photo that everyone loves!
是翁法罗斯。
We're going to Amphoreus.
你来啦。听说各位无名客选择了翁法罗斯，十分明智的决定。
Ah, you're here. I hear the Nameless are going to Amphoreus. A very wise decision.
你为什么要去翁法罗斯？
Why do you want to go to Amphoreus?
打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而忆庭之镜映照出的翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，闪闪发光，也难以触及。
It's my duty to salvage unknown memories, and the Amphoreus that has been revealed by the Garden's mirror is like a treasure inside a display case — dazzling yet out of reach.
我需要一枚能钉破玻璃的尖钉，也就是各位。只有「开拓」能深入翁法罗斯，穿过层层迷雾，令世界的「记忆」重现天日。

I need a sharp nail to break through that glass, and that's where you come in. Only through trailblazing can we reach the heart of Amphoreus, cut through the thick mist, and bring the world's "memories" back to light.
「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」。
The Eternal Land, Amphoreus.
「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
"Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...
难怪忆庭的使者能揭开它的面纱啊。那，最后一重呢？
I see. Then it makes sense that a messenger of the Garden would be capable of unveiling Amphoreus for us. What about the final Path?
这条缠绕翁法罗斯的白色光带，也许就是三重命途彼此交织的结果。也只有各位「开拓」的行者能深入漩涡中心，看清它的容貌。

This white ribbon of light encircling Amphoreus might very well be a product of the three interwoven Paths. Only when Pathstriders of the Trailblaze enter the center of the vortex will its true nature be revealed.
我想此刻也是同理。三月小姐受到了某种来自外部的影响，可能是来自命途、星神…或是翁法罗斯本身。
I'm guessing this is something similar. Miss March appears to be affected by a certain external stimulus, perhaps a Path, an Aeon, or even... Amphoreus itself.
不过，在查明原因前，我建议三月七小姐不要贸然接近翁法罗斯。
Before we identify the cause, my suggestion is for Miss March to avoid venturing anywhere near Amphoreus.
咱们遇见的第一个当地人，肯定藏着不得了的大秘密！
The first local we met in each of those worlds all harbored their own deep secret! I'm sure it'll be the same on Amphoreus.
你觉得翁法罗斯会和三月七的过去有关吗？
Do you think March 7th's past could be connected to Amphoreus?
不至于这么巧，我没见到任何和「六相冰」有关的线索。更有可能是翁法罗斯的某种力量率先在她身上显现了。
No, that'd be too much of a coincidence. I haven't seen anything related to Six-Phased Ice yet. It's more likely that some kind of energy on Amphoreus affected her before any of us.
翁法罗斯这一站意义特殊，车上的每位乘客都不可或缺。开荒世界的工作交给年轻人正合适，相信你和丹恒能成为彼此的照应。

Amphoreus is a crucial stop, so everyone on the Express has been roped in to help in some way or another. Venturing into the unknown world is a task perfect for you youngsters. I'm sure you'll both have each other's backs.
翁法罗斯不在星际和平通信的服务范围内，缺乏远程联络的手段。
Amphoreus is outside the Interastral Peace Communications' coverage zone, so there's no chance of remote communication when you're there.
为了给你们最大限度的支援，我们计划将星穹列车的一节车厢分离出去，当作降落舱使用，落地后也能充当安全屋。
Uncoupling and using one of the Express's cars as your landing capsule is the best way we can ease your exploration. It can also be your safe house once you're on Amphoreus.
放心，车厢上有独立的推进器，一定能把你们送进翁法罗斯，找个安全的地点着陆。
The car you're getting has its own thrusters, so just buckle up, and It'll take you into Amphoreus and land you somewhere safe.
翁法罗斯之外，银河中某个熟悉的角落……
Outside Amphoreus, in a familiar corner of the Cosmos...
黑塔女士，我们是为「翁法罗斯」而来。
We're here because of Amphoreus, Madam Herta.
但依旧剩下一份天文数字的清单——什么「『翁法罗斯神王队』下一赛季将使用王者巴维鲁取代队徽」——希望能帮上各位的忙吧。

There's still an unbelievably long list of generated results. Something about how the Divine Amphoreus team will swap out their current crest emblem for one in King Baviru's likeness in the next season. I hope that can be of some help to you.
尤其是在亲眼见证后，如果翁法罗斯真的与星神、命途，乃至「智识」密切相关，我们需要天才的智慧。
If Amphoreus is indeed inextricably entwined with Aeons, Paths, and even the Erudition, we're going to need the wisdom of a genius to help us. Especially now that we've seen the planet for ourselves.
对我们而言十分重要的两位同伴，在进入翁法罗斯后便杳无音讯。
We've lost all contact with two indispensable companions since they entered Amphoreus.
拍摄悬锋斗技场
Take a photograph of Kremnos Arena
得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...
不像是智库中记载的任何一个物种，这也是理所当然，翁法罗斯对于我们是彻彻底底的「未知」。
It's unlike any of the known species in our data bank. But I guess that's to be expected. We know nothing about Amphoreus, after all.
哪怕是雅利洛-Ⅵ，列车在抵达前也对它的历史和地貌有所了解。但翁法罗斯…黑天鹅口中的几句描述，就是我们对它全部的认知。

Back when we were trailblazing into Jarilo-VI, we knew its history and terrain even before arriving on the planet. But with Amphoreus... All we have is whatever little Black Swan told us about the world.
我是哀丽秘榭的白厄。先前有所冒犯，请接受我的致歉。
I'm Phainon from Aedes Elysiae. Sorry if I offended you just now.
心思也很缜密，对话过程中始终保持着距离。我尝试套取「翁法罗斯」的情报，他俩一唱一和都糊弄过去了。
He was also quite cautious, keeping his distance throughout the conversation. I tried probing for more information on Amphoreus, but they both casually glossed over it.
枪断了固然可惜，却换来了有价值的信息：翁法罗斯的锻兵技术能和造出这柄击云的技艺一较高下。
Though losing the spear is unfortunate, we gained some important insight: Amphoreus' weapon-forging skills are on par with the craftsmanship that forged Cloud-Piercer.
失去信仰，失去一切。你真以为奥赫玛容得下我们？末世将近，身在何处都是朝不保夕！
Lose your faith, and you lose everything. Do you seriously think you can seek shelter in Okhema? Nowhere is safe with the end times looming!
前些天，我又目睹同伴死在那些怪物手下，实在崩溃了…就向奥赫玛做出祈祷。本以为回应没这么快，时间足够我说服诺杜斯先生，没想到各位来得如此迅速……

A few days ago, I watched another companion fall to those monsters, and I was shattered... I offered a prayer to Okhema, thinking the answer would take time, at least enough for me to convince Mr. Noldus. I didn't expect your arrival to be so swift...
那位老人刚才提到了「末世」，还说翁法罗斯哪里都不安全。请问这是……
The elder spoke of the "end times" just now and claimed that no place in Amphoreus is safe. What did he mean by that...?
诺杜斯先生，维尔图斯说的没错呀，你们在这儿可危险了，还是跟*我们*一起回奥赫玛吧。
Mr. Noldus, Virtus was right. It's too dangerous for all of you to be here. Please come back to Okhema with us.
但*我们*以万径之门，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的名义向你起誓，只要黄金裔一日尚存，奥赫玛就会保护每一位泰坦的子民，*我们*不分彼此。

But we swear to you in the name of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus,{RUBY_E#} the Gate of Infinity that so long as the Chrysos Heirs live, Okhema will protect all followers of the Titans. We are one and the same.
也许各位真能从末日手中解救翁法罗斯。就像今日，四位英雄拯救了我们的生命和信仰。
Perhaps you really can save Amphoreus from its doom, just like how the four of you heroes saved our very lives and faith today.
也是如今唯一的人类城邦，「圣城」奥赫玛存在的意义。
It's also the reason for the holy city Okhema's existence — the only human city left in our present day.
哎呀，别把气氛弄得这么沉重嘛。总之，{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}圣城{RUBY_E#}是绝对安全的，到那里就没事啦。
Hey now, don't be so serious. You're bringing the mood down. Anyway, in short, {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city{RUBY_E#} is absolutely safe. Everything will be fine once we get there.
大伙儿都坐稳了吗？那我们就出发吧——目的地，奥赫玛！
Is everyone properly seated? Then we're off! Next stop: Okhema!
希望奥赫玛是个安全的地方。
Hopefully, Okhema is a safe place.
求求你们，救救奥赫玛吧，疯王{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}回来了，看哪，混乱、纷争，到处都是……
Please, I beg of you! Save Okhema! The mad king {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has returned! Look! There's strife and conflict everywhere...
感激不尽。幸亏奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
You have my gratitude. Thankfully, Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.
不必惊慌，奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
There's no need to panic. Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.
…翁法罗斯的惊喜越来越多了。
...The surprises never cease in Amphoreus.
放心吧！有我们在呢，只要用「百界门」，啪的一下就能把大伙儿送去翁法罗斯最安全的地方——
Don't worry! With us here, we can just use the Century Gate to whoosh the people to the safest place in Amphoreus—
那不就是奥赫玛吗？
Wouldn't that be Okhema?
放心吧，虽然有些孩童心性，但缇宝老师在黄金裔中也称得上资历深厚，更是奥赫玛的支柱之一。她们值得信赖。
Don't worry. Although they are a little childish, the trio are experienced Chrysos Heirs and one of the pillars of Okhema. Therefore, they can definitely be trusted.
至于你，万敌…如果我没记错，你的责任应当是保护市民吧？
As for you, Mydei... If I'm not mistaken, shouldn't your responsibility be protecting the citizens?
{RUBY_B#缇宁，缇宝，缇安}雅努斯的三位祭司{RUBY_E#}，同面同心，耳目相连。你们的一举一动早已暴露在奥赫玛人的视线下。

{RUBY_B#Trinnon, Tribbie, Trianne}The three priests of Janus{RUBY_E#} share the same appearance and mind, and their senses are also interlinked. The Okhemans have long been aware of your presence and what you have been doing.
自打相识起，我就告诉过你们，无论过往抑或未来，悬锋人都不可能同意与你们握手言和……
From the moment we first met, I already told you that regardless of whether it's in the past or in the future, the people of Kremnos will never agree to make peace with the likes of you...
——我，万敌，身为悬锋的继业者，无法在这种问题上独断专行。况且到了这份上，我更有必要提醒各位*贵客*，你们的东道主可谈不上精于待客之道。

As the successor of Kremnos, I, Mydei, am not able to act independently on such matters. Furthermore, things have escalated to a point where I must warn you, esteemed guests, that your host is anything but proficient in the ways of hospitality.
别和万敌较真，因为他真的不开玩笑。
Avoid getting too serious with Mydei, because he means every word he says.
好在无人伤亡。希望万敌只是嘴上说说，他是无可挑剔的战士，但如果铁了心要我行我素…恐怕没人能阻止他，就算是我。

Thankfully, no one was hurt. I hope that Mydei doesn't act on his words. After all, he's an exemplary fighter, if he's dead set on doing things his way... I fear not a soul could prevent it, not even myself.
欢迎来到奥赫玛。
Welcome to Okhema.
但今天，白厄阁下…奥赫玛需要你。
But today, Lord Phainon... Okhema needs you.
奥赫玛，黄金裔，一群懦夫。忠诚和荣耀，铸就我们。欺瞒和软弱，捏成你们。
Okhema, Chrysos Heirs — what cowards. We live by loyalty and glory, while you live by weakness and deceit.
出发吧。在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}尚未沉默的年代，无人能当它的敌手。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——

Let's get going. In the era when {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} had not yet fallen silent, none could stand as their equal. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus.
奥赫玛的两位新盟友，欢迎来到翁法罗斯。
New allies of Okhema, welcome to Amphoreus.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}堕入疯狂后，它的堡垒便消失在了迷雾中，无人知晓其所在。但如今，它一反常态，主动向奥赫玛发起攻势……

After {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} succumbed to madness, their fortress disappeared into the fog, with no one being able to ascertain its location anymore. However, now that they have acted out of character and attacked Okhema of their own accord...
我答应过他们，在时局安定后，要为我们的盟友解答翁法罗斯的一切。
I gave my word that after the situation stabilized, I would reveal all about Amphoreus to our allies.
但奥赫玛刚刚脱离一场劫难，还有许多惊魂未定的民众需要安抚。阿格莱雅，能请你代劳吗？
However, given that Okhema has just barely survived a calamity, and there are still many shaken citizens who need comfort... Aglaea, would you mind taking care of this in my stead?
胜利属于奥赫玛！
Victory belongs to Okhema!
奥赫玛永世唾弃你！
Okhema shall forever despise you!
住口，万敌！你想让圣城毁于一旦吗？
Enough, Mydei. Are you trying to destroy the holy city?
预言中的英雄会扫清命运的阴影，刻法勒的光辉会永远庇护奥赫玛……
The hero from the prophecy will sweep away the shadows of fate, and Kephale's light will always protect Okhema...
我向你保证，这不会带来任何负面的后果——请把它当作一种旅程的仪式。
I can assure you that this will not bring any repercussions to Okhema. Think of it as a ceremony when traveling to someplace new.
这样翁法罗斯也有「界域定锚」了——「开拓」的又一大步。
With this Space Anchor on Amphoreus, we've taken yet another giant step on the Path of Trailblaze.
两位初来乍到，想必对人们口中的泰坦、黄金裔、神谕都满心疑虑。在回答具体的问题前，我想先向二位展现翁法罗斯的历史。

Both of you are new here, so it's only natural to be confused about the prophecy, Titans, and Chrysos Heirs that have been mentioned in passing. But I'd like you to learn about Amphoreus' history before I tell you more.
灵水会为你诠释，翁法罗斯的前世今生。
The spirit water shall show you Amphoreus' distant and recent past.
「起初，翁法罗斯是一团混沌！」
"Amphoreus started off as a ball of chaos!"
「一道神谕出现了！它突然降临在翁法罗斯——」
"A prophecy appeared on Amphoreus! Something no one saw coming!"
「所以，大家明白了嘛？一定要吃饱喝好、坚持锻炼，这样长大后才有可能成为大英雄，为翁法罗斯献出自己的力量——」
"So, here's the takeaway: Eat well and train well, so you can grow up into a powerful hero and do your part for Amphoreus!"
翁法罗斯面临的困境不小啊。
Amphoreus seems to be going through a rough patch.
看来在奥赫玛，英雄和平民的地位并不对等。
Seems like prophesied heroes and civilians aren't treated equally in Okhema.
就是这样，很不错。补上迟来的自我介绍吧，我是「金织」阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的「黄金裔」之一。承蒙同袍信任，我暂时主持着黄金裔的行动。

Yes, you're doing great. Alright, it's about time I formally introduce myself: I am Aglaea the Goldweaver, dressmaster of Okhema and one of the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus. The trust placed in me is how I came to lead the Chrysos Heirs in our mission today.
感觉到了吗？金线起了波痕。它告诉我，你对奥赫玛的真诚尚存一丝怀疑，我必须消除这份顾虑。
Did you feel that? The golden threads are rippling. They reveal the distrust you still have for Okhema, and I take it upon myself to dispel these concerns.
而今，黑潮席卷全世，大地沉入永夜，唯有奥赫玛在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，保有最后一丝光明。

Amphoreus has since fallen into eternal night, the black tide engulfing our world. Okhema is now the only city to still receive light, and we owe it to {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.
集结于此的黄金裔是世人唯一的希望。人们奉我们为英雄、守护者、救世主……
The Chrysos Heirs gathered here are Amphoreus' only hope. People hail us as heroes, as protectors, and as deliverers...
这便是翁法罗斯的逐火之旅——「一众英雄踏上弑神的旅途，摘得十二枚火种，实现再创世的伟业。」
This is Amphoreus' Flame-Chase Journey — "a band of heroes dedicated to slaying the gods and reclaiming the twelve Coreflames for the world to start over anew."
我们身陷末世，还需指引万千民众行向山顶。奥赫玛亟需更多盟友，成为我们坚实的助力。
With the end times before us, we are expected to lead all of our people toward the summit. Okhema needs as many allies as possible, to aid us in the upcoming battles.
可能我将希望放错了地方。但为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
If I'm putting my hopes in the wrong place, so be it. But for Amphoreus, I am willing to take the chance.
或许是我有些心急…为了翁法罗斯，我愿意一试。
I may be getting ahead of myself, but for Amphoreus, I am willing to take a chance on you.
请答应我：无论如何，不要向市民透露「天外之界」的存在。
Promise me to never tell the people of Okhema about the worlds beyond the sky, no matter what may happen.
但在翁法罗斯，天空更像是…一座监牢，就连谈论天外都成了一种禁忌。明明有着如此先进的技术……
The sky above Amphoreus, though, is more like... a prison. They clearly have advanced technology, so who could imagine that even discussing what's beyond the sky would be taboo?
还记得那团遮蔽世界的混沌物质吗？我总有种预感，翁法罗斯是被人为封锁的。神话中的那些泰坦，也可能和某位星神有所关联。

Do you remember the mass of chaotic matter concealing Amphoreus from the rest of the universe? I can't help thinking that someone is intentionally keeping Amphoreus hidden. Their Titans could also be related to some Aeon.
咦，你是说刚到奥赫玛那会儿吗？这么一说，*我们*当时也觉得有点奇怪。
Eh? When we all arrived in Okhema? Come to think of it, we felt something a bit odd, too.
咦，你怎么也念上啦？说起来，刚到奥赫玛那会儿，你是不是也这么做了？
Eh? You can recite this, too? Wait, did you also chant this when we arrived in Okhema?
翁法罗斯也有新闻学？
They also teach journalism here in Amphoreus?
认真地讲，*我们*都觉得两位降临在…咳咳，来到奥赫玛绝非偶然。上手就能和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}共鸣的祭司，缇宝老师也是第一次见。
You know, we are pretty certain there's more to your sudden... arrival to Okhema. And Tribbie has never seen a priest achieve resonance with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} on their first try.
学会了它，你们在翁法罗斯就能畅行无阻啦。嗯，基本上吧。
But with this, you should be able to clear any obstacle when traveling around Amphoreus... Um, most of the time, at least.
啊对了，差点忘记正事…*我们*来找两位，是想确认你们有没有传信石版。没了它，在奥赫玛可是寸步难行。
Oh, right... We came by to check if you have teleslates with you. It'll be a lot easier to get around Okhema with them.
就是它！果然，天外…两位的城邦也有雅努萨波利斯的祭司嘛！
Yeah! We knew it, there are also Janusopolis priests beyond the sk — um, beyond Okhema... like the city you're from!
大功告成！以后*我们*就能通过石版联络对方啦。不过仅限于奥赫玛城中哦，离开了阿雅编织的金线，传信就不起效果了。
All set! Now we can contact one another with our teleslates. Only in Okhema though. Messages won't send once you're outside Agy's web of golden threads.
我们初来奥赫玛，希望能留下些纪念，所以来到视野宽阔的地方…嗯，制作…不对，捕捉？总之，想留住这片风景。
It's our first time in Okhema, so we thought we'd find a nice vantage point to... uh, create...? No, capture...? I mean, to remember this city and its sights by.
——奥赫玛欢迎你们。
Okhema welcomes you.
毕竟「塔拉萨波利斯」只是我临场编造的，如果他真是探险家，又对翁法罗斯的地理了如指掌，恐怕我们早就被看穿了。
After all, Thalassopolis was something I came up with on the fly. If he's truly an explorer familiar with the geography of Amphoreus, I'm afraid that he'll have already seen through our lies.
所幸没留下什么证据。不过…就算星空在翁法罗斯是一种禁忌，果然还是会有人对它报以憧憬。
Fortunately, there's no evidence. But... seems like even though the starry sky is taboo on Amphoreus, there are people who still yearn for it.
造出这柄枪的人也是位赫赫有名的工匠吧，天外有天，我完全无法想象一个翁法罗斯之外的世界。
The one who crafted this spear must also be a renowned master. I guess there's always someone greater out there. Although I still can't imagine a world outside Amphoreus.
壁画以简约而细腻的雕工记载了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}创生、奥赫玛建城的故事。
The murals record in simple and delicate carvings the stories of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} creating life and building Okhema.
在它的脚下，沐浴金血的人类们合力修建起一座宏伟的城邦。这就是奥赫玛，翁法罗斯文明的发源地。
At their feet, the humans bathed in the golden blood work together to create a great city. This city is Okhema, the origin of Amphoreus civilization.
奥赫玛唷！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}全世之座{RUBY_E#}足下，金血溯流之始。
Okhema! Standing at the foot of the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}, your golden blood can be traced back to the very beginning.
我们是异邦来的战士，此前参与了奥赫玛保卫战。
We're warriors from a foreign land who assisted in the defense of Okhema.
请两位拿出石版，我来教你们连入奥赫玛的万帷网。
Please take out your teleslate. I'll help you connect to Okhema's World Wound Web.
想用匹诺康尼的剑斩翁法罗斯的官？哈，你想多了。
You think you can use a Penaconian key to open an Amphorean lock? Ha, that's wishful thinking!
下次再见到这些「若虫」，就把它们收集起来吧…说不定能借助它们进一步了解翁法罗斯。
We should catch these nymphs the next time we encounter them... Perhaps they can help us better understand Amphoreus.
这不是奥赫玛的新朋友，两位远道而来的勇士吗？幸会幸会，吼吼吼！
Aren't you Okhema's two new friends? The brave warriors from a faraway place? It's an honor to meet you, roarrr!
没人告诉你们吗？本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听。
Didn't anyone tell you? I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place.
哦、哦吼、吼吼！这不、这不是万敌阁下嘛！您、您最近可还好啊？
O—Oh, roarrr! Isn't this Lord Mydei! H—How have you been lately?
翁法罗斯的地貌十分壮丽，这里过去一定是个如仙境般美丽的世界。
The landscape of Amphoreus is breathtaking. In the past, this place must have been a beautiful paradise.
即便是「神」也要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
Even gods have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.
万事万物都要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
All things have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.
还没呢，但*我们*摸清了那些逃兵的去向。要不了多久，就能追踪到悬锋城的方位了。
Not yet. But we've already figured out where the deserters are headed to. With a little more time, we'll be able to track down the location of Castrum Kremnos.
悬锋城…是哪？
Castrum Kremnos... Where is that?
是万敌提到过的地名。
Mydei has mentioned this place before.
悬锋城是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
Castrum Kremnos, both {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode, is a moving city-state enveloped in fog.
你倚在阳台的石栏边眺望远方，翁法罗斯层叠的山峦被雾气遮蔽，轮廓若隐若现，如同一组在缓慢匍匐与站立之间转变姿态的石之巨人。

You lean against the stone railing of the balcony, gazing into the distance. The mist-shrouded mountains of Amphoreus appear as vague outlines, like stone giants slowly shifting between crouching and standing.
翁法罗斯的历史，还有「圣城」奥赫玛，你们已有所见闻。而现在…对于黄金裔的旅途，我想带两位亲眼见证。
You have learned, to some extent, about the history of Amphoreus and of the holy city Okhema. Now... I wish for both of you to witness the journey of the Chrysos Heirs for yourselves.
粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
Rosy Celestial Maiden, Okhema's light...
缇宝再次开启「百界门」，与白厄、丹恒一同驰援悬锋城。
Tribbie opens the Century Gate once more, rushing to the rescue of Castrum Kremnos with Phainon and Dan Heng.
你们三人赶赴悬锋城，来到斗技场的中央
The three of you rush into Castrum Kremnos and arrive at the arena
此地名为云石天宫，是奥赫玛的公共浴场。换作平时，气氛会更熙攘些。
We're here at Marmoreal Palace, Okhema's public baths. Normally, this place would be much livelier.
回头看看吧，从这里望去，可以看见整座奥赫玛。
Turn around and look. We can see the entire city of Okhema from here.
边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...
若要留在奥赫玛，两位自然需要一处落脚之地。
If you are to stay in Okhema, you'll need a place to rest.
翁法罗斯从不缺少向往天外的人。曾有一邦僭主穷尽举国之力修建「天舟」，意欲突破苍穹、企及星空……

There have always been people in Amphoreus who looked beyond the skies. Indeed, there used to be a tyrant nation that spared no expense in constructing "skyships," with the desire to break through the blue sky and reach the stars...
翁法罗斯并非不愿行向群星，只是妄图触犯天穹者，无不触怒神明，令生灵的大地燃烧，凡人的国度殒灭，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}只是其中一例。

It's not that Amphoreus is unwilling to head toward the stars. Yet, anyone who even thinks about breaching the firmament would undoubtedly infuriate the gods, causing this land of the living to burn and an entire nation of mortals to perish. The {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is only one example of this.
我们对翁法罗斯没有恶意…
We mean no harm toward Amphoreus...
神罚没有公正可言，而我身为奥赫玛的守护者，同样身不由己。
Divine punishment has never been fair. As Okhema's guardian, I must do the same.
异乡人——你们为何来到翁法罗斯？
Outlanders, why have you come to Amphoreus?
异乡人——你们因何对奥赫玛伸出援手？
Outlanders, why did you lend your aid to Okhema?
我后悔了，压根就不该出手！
I regret what we did. We shouldn't have aided Okhema at all!
异乡人——倘若形势剧变，你是否可能将刀尖对准奥赫玛，还有它的公民？
Outlanders, if the current situation changed dramatically, could you eventually point your blades at Okhema and its citizens?
二位也许是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望。但在一切得到证明前…你们不能变成翁法罗斯的一道威胁。
You may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus. However, until all has been proven, you cannot be allowed to pose a threat to Amphoreus.
如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.
眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.
二位可能是降临在翁法罗斯的一道希望，但也可能…是翁法罗斯的一道威胁。我别无选择，只能为你们关上命运的门扉。
While you may be a ray of hope that fell onto Amphoreus, you may also be... a threat to Amphoreus. You leave me no choice but to shut the doors of your fates.
重生之我在翁法罗斯？
I've been reborn on Amphoreus?
你们来到翁法罗斯才多久？无情如{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，也不会这么仓促结束一段旅程吧？
You've been on Amphoreus for such a short time. Even someone as ruthless as {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't end a journey so hurriedly.
眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.
阿格莱雅她…为了奥赫玛，她的心早就结成了冰。
Aglaea... She has long sealed her heart in ice, for Okhema's sake.
啊…又多了一件需要解释的事。别担心，翁法罗斯最深的秘密都藏在这儿了。
Ah... one more thing to explain. Let's not worry about that for now. You'll soon find out that Amphoreus' deepest secrets are all hidden here.
十二张虚位的图腾，对应翁法罗斯的十二尊泰坦。而每一座被点亮的星宿，都代表一颗被人类归于原位的火种。
The twelve vacant signs symbolize the twelve Titans of Amphoreus, while each illuminated constellation represents one Coreflame that mankind has restored to its rightful place.
黄金裔、半神…神谕中书写的，真的是翁法罗斯唯一的命运吗？
Chrysos Heirs, demigods... Is what's written in the prophecy truly Amphoreus' only possible fate?
勇气和决心都已具备，只等缇安老师找到悬锋城的所在，我们就踏上征程。
Armed with courage and unwavering resolve, our quest will begin as soon as Trianne locates Castrum Kremnos.
前路艰险，我不会强迫你们。但如果二位决定留下，我——哀丽秘榭的白厄，定会努力修补你们和黄金裔之间的嫌隙，不遗余力。

The path ahead is bound to be perilous, and I won't impose my will upon you. Yet, if you choose to stay, I, Phainon from Aedes Elysiae, will spare no effort to bridge the gap between you and the Chrysos Heirs.
留在翁法罗斯。
Stay on Amphoreus.
太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.
请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.
离开翁法罗斯。
Leave Amphoreus.
太好了，你们果真是翁法罗斯的希望。
That's wonderful to hear. You truly are the hope of Amphoreus.
请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.
…我明白了。回头想想，两位一直出于无私和善意帮助奥赫玛，我们却总是以怀疑和胁迫回应，的确不公平。
...I understand. Now that I think back on it, you both have selflessly helped Okhema, while we have met your good will with doubt and intimidation. It's indeed not fair.
在一名长成智械模样的奥赫玛公民的协助下，你们驶离了翁法罗斯，没有遭受那所谓「天外诅咒」的谴罚。
With the assistance of an Okhema citizen resembling an Intellitron, you depart Amphoreus without suffering the so-called "curse from beyond the sky."
至于「永恒之地」翁法罗斯的命运，以及它终将为银河带来的剧变…至少在你的有生之年内，这一切都与你无关了。
As for the fate of Amphoreus, the Eternal Land, and the dramatic changes it will bring to the Cosmos... It has nothing to do with you, at least in your lifetime.
你我终有一日要退出这舞台，翁法罗斯的命运将被移交至他人之手…那是你看到的未来，不是吗？
You and I will eventually step off the stage and leave Amphoreus' fate in the hands of others... That's the future you foresee, isn't it?
你睡着的时候，我思考了一些问题，眼下最麻烦的，果然还是翁法罗斯人对天外世界的态度。短期内，我们恐怕没办法联络上列车了。

While you were asleep, I did some thinking. I believe the most pressing concern is still how the people of Amphoreus view what's beyond the sky. Unfortunately, contacting the Express might not be feasible for a while.
如果我们尝试飞出翁法罗斯…
If we try to fly out of Amphoreus...
是的。最坏情况下，翁法罗斯的入口是道单向门，只能进不能出。
Yes. In the worst case, the entrance to Amphoreus is a one-way door, letting people in but not out.
说不定两者兼有呢。万敌，你也该多交几个朋友了。
Maybe both. You should really make more friends, Mydei.
缇安捎回了信息：多年以来，我们首次驱散了包围悬锋城的迷雾，确定了它的位置。
Trianne has returned with news: For the first time in many years, we have dispersed the fog around Castrum Kremnos and verified its location.
{NICKNAME}擅长使用多种武器，那把炎枪不止一次化解了敌人的攻势。而我和万敌都更擅长进攻，如果仅从作战角度考虑……

{NICKNAME} excels in wielding a range of weapons, and {M#his}{F#her} flaming lance has quelled the enemy's advances multiple times. Mydei and I are both better at offense, so from a tactical standpoint...
…悬锋城是你的故乡，迈德漠斯，你的族人曾是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的子民——但你选择了依归奥赫玛，为神谕奉献己身。
Mydeimos, Castrum Kremnos was your home. Your people were once {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} followers, yet you've chosen to turn to Okhema and dedicate yourself to the prophecy.
我——奥赫玛的阿格莱雅，黄金裔，承载{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}神权的半神——对你们即将践行的道路施以祝福。
I — Aglaea from Okhema, Chrysos Heir and the demigod who bears {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s divine authority — hereby bless your journey ahead.
缇安会为你们打开通往悬锋城的大门。愿金色的丝线指引你们的征途，亦愿它能带你们找到归家的路。
Trianne will open the gate that will lead you to Castrum Kremnos. May the golden thread guide you on your journey and bring you safely home.
走哇，走哇~风风…旋风…悬锋城！
Blow, wind, blow~! All the way to Castrum Kremnos!
别看缇安老师贪玩，她可是翁法罗斯技艺最精湛的门匠，创造出的「百界门」万无一失。
It's true Trianne is very playful, but she's the best gatekeeper in Amphoreus. Her Century Gate never fails.
这可不像你啊？万敌的万，难道不是「以一敌万」的万吗？
That's not like you at all, Mydei. Don't tell me you're scared?
我打算多花些时间留在这，向缇宝女士讨教翁法罗斯的知识。你负责行动，我负责研究，我们各司其职。
I plan to stay here for a while and learn more about Amphoreus from Lady Tribbie. You'll handle the action, and I'll deal with the research. We each have a role to play.
神意使然，你终究还是站在了奥赫玛这边。
It is by the will of the gods that you stood on Okhema's side in the end.
你是白厄与万敌的同伴，只要他们愿意向你托付生死，我的信任并不重要。
You are Phainon and Mydei's companion. So long as they're willing to entrust you with their lives, my trust in you doesn't matter.
去吧，和两位黄金裔一起。奥赫玛需要一位真正的战神。疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，他的统治该被终结了。
Go. Stand with the two Chrysos Heirs. Okhema has need of a true god of war. It's time for the mad god {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} reign to end.
迈德漠斯
Mydeimos
万敌
Mydei
「永恒之地」翁法罗斯
Amphoreus, The Eternal Land
这里就是「悬锋城」。
This is Castrum Kremnos.
要是悬锋城还留有昔日兵力，哪怕只剩半成，阿格莱雅也是在让我们送死。
If even half of Castrum Kremnos' old might remains, it would mean that Aglaea sent us to our deaths.
是啊，悬锋城曾是每一位战士的向往之地。
Yeah, Kremnos used to be the place every warrior longed for.
…万敌，你会觉得可惜吗？自己没有活在那个强者如云的年代。若非往日的英雄一一凋零，我也不会是你唯一的对手。
Kind of a shame you didn't live in that era full of strong warriors, eh Mydei? If all the heroes of the past hadn't fallen one after another, I wouldn't be the only worthy opponent you have left.
走吧，夺回「纷争」的火种，或是死在它的悬锋下——
Let's go. We'll take back the Coreflame of Strife or die in Kremnos.
为了翁法罗斯，缇安老师也付出了很多代价。
Trianne has sacrificed a lot for Amphoreus.
说起来，你不打算给{NICKNAME}讲讲悬锋城的事吗？不担心我给{F#她}{M#他}灌输些你最痛恨的野史？
By the way, aren't you going to tell {NICKNAME} any stories about Castrum Kremnos? Aren't you worried I'll tell {M#him}{F#her} all the historical myths you despise?
悬锋城自古便是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，是信众围绕泰坦建立的军事要塞，也是一座巨大的移动堡垒。
Castrum Kremnos has been {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory since ancient times. It's a massive moving fortress that surrounds the Titan, built by their followers.
在{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}尚未堕落的年代，悬锋城会随它一同出征，以战养战，是纪律严明、极端尚武的城邦。

In the age before the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#} fell from grace, Castrum Kremnos would follow the Lance into battle after battle. It's a city that enforces strict discipline and reveres military might.
看来阻碍我们的不止有敌人。这桥年久失修，悬锋城的工艺也有不可靠的时候？
It seems enemies aren't the only things stopping us. This bridge has fallen into disrepair. I suppose even Kremnoan craftsmanship can be unreliable sometimes.
有点夸张了吧？悬锋城在黄金战争中的失利，我一下能记起来的就有三场。
I think you're exaggerating a little. I can think of at least three losses suffered by Castrum Kremnos in the Chrysos War, just off the top of my head.
猜猜我在想什么，万敌？
Guess what I'm thinking, Mydei?
让我见识见识悬锋城最盛大的搏杀竞技项目，也给眼前这场征伐多镀上一层荣耀的金边。看看谁能干掉更多发疯的眷属——如何？

Show me what the grandest fighting competition in Castrum Kremnos was like. Let's gild this expedition with another layer of glory and compete to see who can kill the most crazed Titankin. How about it?
我了解他，这家伙只爱单打独斗。这前面有两条通路，{NICKNAME}就跟我走一边。
I know Mydei. He prefers to fight alone. There are two paths ahead. {NICKNAME} and I will take the same one.
你和白厄合力打倒了4个泰坦眷属，并从它们身上收集了悬锋徽记……
You and Phainon defeated 4 Titankins together, and you collected Kremnos crests from their bodies...
别担心，万敌很强，我也一样。
Don't worry. Mydei is strong, and so am I.
毕竟对万敌而言，族人和荣誉大于一切。就算破败成这样，能让他自由自在的地方，也只有悬锋城一处了。
Nothing is more important to Mydei than his people and glory. The city may be in ruins, but... Kremnos is still the only place where he can be free.
区区闪电，也想拦住悬锋城的战士？
Mere lightning won't stop a warrior of Castrum Kremnos.
积了一大层灰，应该很久没人动过了。大概是万敌的族人在离开时留下的吧？
There's a thick layer of dust. Guess no one's been here for a long time. They must have been left behind by Mydei's people when they departed.
你在奥赫玛一定见过，但只靠双眼很难辨别。
You've likely seen them in Okhema, but it's hard to tell just by appearance.
我也看不懂上面的符文，大概写的是悬锋城的古语。
I can't read the runes either. It must be written in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos.
别怕，隔壁不还有一位专家么？等和万敌合流了，让他看看吧。
Don't worry. We have an expert next door. We can show it to Mydei when we group back up.
但说起这个…我一直很奇怪，你明明来自天外，为什么能理解翁法罗斯的文字和语言？
Though that does remind me: I've been wondering how you can understand the language and writing we use in Amphoreus when you're from beyond the sky.
也许翁法罗斯没那么封闭。
Maybe Amphoreus isn't that isolated after all.
难道翁法罗斯和天外之界的交集远比人们想象更多？但史料里完全没有这部分记载啊。
Did Amphoreus have more dealings with worlds beyond the sky than we thought? But nothing like this was ever recorded in our historical materials.
不是你的问题。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
It's not your fault. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
当然不是。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
It really isn't. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.
换句话说，我们有机会超过万敌了。
In other words, this is our chance to overtake Mydei.
如果记载无误，「天谴之锋」的正下方就是举世闻名的「悬锋斗技场」。我们脚下这条路，或是通向荣耀，或是通向死亡……
If the records are correct, directly beneath the Blade of Fury lies the world-renowned Kremnos Arena. The path before us leads either to glory or to death...
或许可以用铁球砸碎路障，但愿那边是悬锋城的藏宝室吧，否则可不值当。
Maybe we can use the iron ball to smash through the roadblock. Hopefully, it leads to Castrum Kremnos' treasure vault. Otherwise, it might not be worth the effort.
对了，刚才忘了说，前面拿到一块刻着悬锋城古语的石板，待会儿帮忙翻译下？
I just remembered — we came across a slate with inscriptions in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos. Could you help translate it?
难怪悬锋城能连战连捷，借这种方式，士兵简直源源不绝啊。
No wonder Castrum Kremnos keeps winning battle after battle. With this method, they can create as many soldiers as they want...
万敌展示出他收集的三十枚悬锋城徽记。
Mydei displays the thirty Castrum Kremnos crests in his collection.
与万敌比较了徽记总数……
Compare the total number of crests you obtained with Mydei's...
不愧是悬锋城的「王储」，对这些繁文缛节还真是重视啊。
I guess being the crown prince of Kremnos makes you obsessed with all this ceremonial stuff.
黄金狮首是悬锋城首屈一指的参谋，它的谏言为我族赢下了诸多战役，化解了无数阴谋。
Chryseus Leo was the top advisor in Castrum Kremnos, whose wise counsel helped my tribe win many battles and thwart numerous schemes.
迈德…漠斯？
M—Mydeimos...
迈德…漠斯……
M—Mydeimos...
人民为生存迁徙，传统被时光消磨，但荣光？哪怕隐入浓雾，城墙崩析，悬锋城从未背弃战士的荣耀。为何口出此言？

To survive, our people have migrated, and our traditions have faded with time. But glory? Even though it has vanished into the mist and its walls have crumbled, Castrum Kremnos has never forsaken the glory of its warriors. Why say otherwise?
我恳求你，迈德漠斯…终结它漫长的痛苦，让它以战士的身份死去！它必须…带着荣耀……
I urge you, Mydeimos, to put an end to their endless suffering. Allow them to die as a warrior! They must... go with honor...
…万敌。
...Mydei.
难怪奥赫玛会遭遇袭击，没想到堕入疯狂的泰坦还能有此算计……
That explains the surprise attack on Okhema. I didn't think that the mad Titan could have orchestrated it...
奥赫玛将要面临灭顶之灾。必须有人回援。
Okhema is on the brink of destruction. Someone needs to go back and rescue them.
就如同那可怕的一击，你和我也是离弦的箭矢。{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}能给奥赫玛带来灭顶之灾，反过来，我们也一样。
Just like that decisive strike, there is no turning back for us. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} could drive Okhema to the brink of ruin, but we can do the same to them.
而且…我信任阿格莱雅和缇宝老师。奥赫玛有两位半神驻守，还有我们的伙伴，她们能保护好圣城。
Besides, I have faith in Aglaea and Tribbie. With two demigods and our allies watching over Okhema, they should be more than capable of protecting the holy city.
眷属，我问你——悬锋城是否正准备灭绝奥赫玛？
Titankin, let me ask you this: Is Castrum Kremnos planning to destroy Okhema?
进攻奥赫玛的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}只是一具半身。按它的意思，悬锋城中不会还有吧？
The {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} that attacked Okhema was only a double. Considering what the Titankin said, could there be more of them in Castrum Kremnos?
它们和悬锋城一样，被那疯狂扭曲了。虽然仍记得如何杀戮，但忘却了杀戮背后的意义。
They've been twisted by madness, just like Castrum Kremnos. They remember how to kill, but they've forgotten why.
我是悬锋之子，神谕中的黄金裔。我为你带来了最公平的价码——
I am a son of Kremnos and a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy, and I now offer you the fairest deal—
战魂正在悬锋城上空聚集…正在涌向「天谴之锋」！
The souls of war are amassing in the skies above Kremnos... surging toward the Blade of Fury!
我必须留下，不是为了奥赫玛的安危，而是要和自己的神明做个了结。
I must stay here, not for Okhema's safety, but to settle the score with my god.
呵…不愧是悬锋的王储。
Oh... As befitting of the crown prince of Kremnos.
漂亮！去收获我们应得的奖励吧，反正悬锋城是没人用得上了。
Well done! Go claim our rewards — no one else in Kremnos will have any use for them anyway.
马上就要跟万敌汇合了，要不要把这片区域清理干净，多收集些{RUBY_B#悬锋徽记}战利品{RUBY_E#}？
We'll be meeting up with Mydei soon. Want to clean up this area and increase our {RUBY_B#Kremnos crest}trophy{RUBY_E#} count?
你的残酷不亚于悬锋城的刽子手。
Your ruthlessness is akin to that of the executioners in Castrum Kremnos.
万敌，我做不到和你一样……
Mydei, I may not be able to fight like you...
你与白厄在掩护下撤离、回到奥赫玛……
You and Phainon retreat using the opportunity and return to Okhema...
万敌与尼卡多利的战吼自颓垣之后传出…不要辜负了万敌的搏命鏖战，抓紧时间破解尼卡多利的秘密吧。
Mydei and Nikador's battle cries can be heard from beyond the crumbling walls... Don't let Mydei's desperate struggle be in vain. Hurry up and uncover Nikador's secrets as fast as you can.
接着赶路吧，不能让那家伙太得意。那扇紧闭的大门，也许可以用预言算碑打开。
Let's keep going. We can't let Mydeimos get too full of himself. The Prophecy Tablet might be able to unlock that closed gate.
没事的…{RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}是我见过最强悍的战士。
He'll be fine... {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#} is the fiercest warrior I know.
是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.
是万敌生来就背负的赐福，但也是诅咒。那是他身为黄金裔的表征。
Something Mydei was born with. A blessing and a curse — the true mark of a Chrysos Heir.
若要以同样的方式应对每桩危机，奥赫玛会终日不得安宁。于无声中抹去威胁，让他们不必活在恐惧的阴霾之下，才是黄金裔的职责。

Okhema would be in constant turmoil if we were to raise the alert each time danger befell us. Silently eliminating threats and sparing them from living under the shadow of fear — that is the duty of the Chrysos Heirs.
但{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}为自己打造了不灭的躯壳，无法被彻底杀死。万敌正在拖延时间…我们必须珍惜他争取到的每一秒。

But {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} has crafted an indestructible body for themself, one that can't be entirely destroyed. Mydei is buying us time... We need to cherish every second he's fought for.
但悬锋城隐入迷雾许久，我们无从得知{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神躯不灭的奥秘。
Castrum Kremnos has been shrouded in the fog far too long, leaving us unable to discover the mystery behind {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s undying body.
还有另一件事。悬锋堡的石板上提到了「渗透」……
There's one other thing. We found a slate in Kremnos that mentioned an infiltration...
接下来的每一步都至关重要。这不止关系到万敌…还有圣城的全体公民。
Important decisions will be waiting for us every step of the way. What we're about to do will not only determine Mydei's fate... but also that of every single resident in Okhema.
「现在置于左侧托盘的配重…代表着翁法罗斯的命运。」
"Weights in the left weighing pan... represent the fate of Amphoreus."
也就是说，我们需要找到字面意义上比「翁法罗斯的命运」更为沉重之物？听上去是一道无解的难题。
Which means that we have to find something that literally has more weight than the fate of Amphoreus? It sounds like an impossible task.
对于翁法罗斯人，真的存在比这片土地更重要的东西吗？他们甚至没有逃向天外这个选项。
For the people of Amphoreus, is there really anything that has more weight than this land? They don't even have the option to flee beyond the sky.
的确，对翁法罗斯人而言，「世界的命运」实在是过于沉重的砝码。
Indeed, for the people of Amphoreus, the fate of the world is a weight that is far too heavy.
{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的疯狂正将翁法罗斯推向末日。它摒弃了荣耀，以疯狂的手段复制自身，意图毁灭天父和它庇护的文明。

The madness of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} is pushing Amphoreus toward the end times. They have abandoned their honor, replicating themself through crazed means, and are fully intending to destroy the sky father and the civilization they protect.
万敌不知已赔上了几条性命，遐蝶。我的犹豫就是对他的残忍。
Castorice, our hesitation is just cruelty to Mydei. How many lives must he have lost already?
我们需要收集悬锋城的记忆。
We must collect the memories of Kremnos.
长话短说：{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}不愿帮我们揭露悬锋城的过去。但不知为何，它对{NICKNAME}展现出了兴趣。
Simply put, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} refused to help us uncover the past of Castrum Kremnos. But for some reason, they showed interest toward {NICKNAME}.
缇宝老师，接下来我想兵分两路：由我立刻动身，赶往悬锋城支援万敌。
Tribbie, let's split up here. I'll make my way to Kremnos immediately to lend my support to Mydei.
我和万敌在战场上等你。
Mydei and I will be waiting for you on the battlefield.
「但你从未屈服！你也从未临阵脱逃过啊。你金黄的战士之魂，也终有一日会战胜黑潮，重塑那悬锋的王座啊。」
"But you never faltered, nor did you flee! Your golden warrior spirit, brave and bold, will conquer the black tide, as foretold. To the throne of Kremnos, you'll return once more!"
哈托努斯…这么说来，我是听说过它为悬锋城打造圣器的故事。
Chartonus... Come to think of it, I remember hearing about them making a holy vessel for Kremnos.
为了保护奥赫玛。
To protect Okhema.
悬锋城最上等的石料，拿来。纷争泰坦的黄金血，找来。剑皿，我会锻造。
The finest stones in Kremnos, give me. The golden blood of Strife Titan, find me. The Sword Vessel, I shall craft.
和平，给我的族人。山之民，不再做悬锋城的奴隶或斗士，永远。
Peace, for my people. Mountain Dwellers, no longer servants or fighters for Kremnos. Ever.
你有和悬锋城相关的记忆吗？
Do you have any memories related to Castrum Kremnos?
悬锋城？对于我们这些手无寸铁的平民，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领土可是禁地。就算是在从前……
Castrum Kremnos? For us unarmed civilians, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s territory is off-limits. Even in the past...
…等等，你提醒了我，阁下…我的确去过悬锋城。请给我片刻……
Oh, n–no... Wait, I just remembered! I did visit Castrum Kremnos once. Let me find it for you...
…该出发去悬锋城了。
...It's time to head to Castrum Kremnos.
阿格莱雅大人，她为奥赫玛做出的奉献值得更多感激。但大多数人只记住了她冰冷的一面。
Lady Aglaea's contributions to Okhema deserve more appreciation, but people mostly see her as distant and aloof.
现在不是说这些的时候…该出发了。希望这个小家伙能帮我们复现悬锋城的记忆。
We don't have time to talk about this right now... Let's set off. Hopefully, this little one will help us recreate the memories of Castrum Kremnos.
伙伴，相信！出发，悬锋！
Friend, trust! Go, Kremnos!
记住，阿格莱雅，无论黄金裔还是元老院，我们的地位都是由奥赫玛的公民赋予的。
Remember, Aglaea, whether it be the Chrysos Heirs or the Council, our positions are entrusted to us by the people of Okhema.
那会惊动奥赫玛的公民。假使他们知晓敌人有绕过黄金裔、渗透奥赫玛的手段，局面可能失控。
That would alarm Okhema's citizens. If they learn that the enemy can bypass the Chrysos Heirs and infiltrate the city, the situation might spiral out of control.
（不…没什么。你要记得，以后不可以独自在街上玩耍…即便是在奥赫玛。）
(Nothing. But promise me you won't play on the streets alone from now on, even in Okhema.)
呃，当然是…当然是因为我们想为奥赫玛的公民除害啦，桀桀桀！
Uh, it's... it's we're just trying to get rid of any threats to Okhema, haha!
我们可不敢骗您啊，阿格莱雅大人~您可是整个奥赫玛最受尊敬的……
We would never dream of deceiving you, Lady Aglaea. In all of Okhema, you are the most revered—
神有神的耳目，人也有人的应对。待到所谓的「神谕」破灭之时…奥赫玛的命运会重新被公民握在手中。

While gods see and hear more extensively, mortals have their own means of dealing with things. When that so-called prophecy crumbles... the destiny of Okhema shall once again rest in the grasp of its people.
接着走你自己的路吧，半神，用尽你的浑身解数来证明我们是错的…但一刻也别忘记，在翁法罗斯，即便是「神」也不能为所欲为。
Keep following your chosen path, demigod, use every bit of your power to show that we are mistaken... but don't forget for a second, in Amphoreus, even "gods" are not above the law.
我会尽己所能拯救翁法罗斯，凯妮斯阁下。不论是从诸神手中……
I will employ every means at my disposal to save Amphoreus, Elder Caenis. Whether it means wresting it from the grasp of the gods...
悬锋城……
Castrum Kremnos...
怕是…会被当做可疑的人吧？悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
...We may draw suspicion this way. Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.
的确…有些奇妙。悬锋城不是闲游之地，我们不该表现得太过显眼。
It's... quite intriguing, indeed. But Castrum Kremnos is no leisure spot for tourists. We shouldn't draw unnecessary attention to ourselves.
迈德漠斯是个懦夫！随他离开悬锋城的人愧对{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的名…耻辱的逃亡者，此生将无法再沐浴荣光！
Mydeimos is just a coward! Those who deserted Kremnos with him have brought shame upon the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... Despicable traitors will never bask in glory again!
但迈德漠斯确实是我们之中最强大的战士…如今他也选择了离开，我们还能追随谁？
But Mydeimos is undoubtedly the mightiest warrior among us... Who else can we turn to now that he's gone?
你在胡言乱语什么？王欧利庞——悬锋城真正的领导者——还没有倒下！他仍坚守在这座城邦，也未曾放弃唤醒伟大的泰坦。
What nonsense are you spouting? King Eurypon, the rightful ruler of Castrum Kremnos, has not fallen! He still stands firm in this city and has never given up on awakening the great Titan.
万敌是个…逃兵？
Mydeimos... is a deserter?
不…我不认为万敌阁下的出走是出于怯懦…相反，那是勇敢的决定。
No... I don't believe that Lord Mydei left out of cowardice. It was, in fact, a courageous choice.
他们有理由愤慨…因为万敌阁下曾是悬锋城的英雄。
They are entitled to that rage... because Lord Mydei was once the hero of Castrum Kremnos.
…被万敌阁下杀死的结局。
...He was killed by Lord Mydei.
上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!
上等武器！都来看啊，悬锋城最锋利的武器！
Finest weapons for sale! Come take a look! The sharpest blades in all of Kremnos!
看来我们回到了黄金战争的末年，悬锋城正面临内部分化和泰坦失神的两重打击。
It seems that we've traveled back to the last years of the Chrysos War, a time when Castrum Kremnos grappled with both internal strife and the Titan's waning divinity.
没人胆敢迎战吗？你们难道不愿赌上荣耀，在悬锋的光辉下燃烧自己的生命吗？
Does no one have the courage to take up the challenge? Are you not prepared to wager your glory and set your lives ablaze under the splendor of Kremnos?
来吧——「生存」就是唯一的规则！只要你们还有一丝呼吸，要么克服所有难关，赢得此世的荣耀——要么把灵魂留在悬锋城，成为「纷争」的养料！

Let the trial begin, then! Your only goal is to survive! As long as you still hold the breath of life, you'll either triumph over every trial and claim worldly glory — or leave your soul in Kremnos to become fuel for Strife!
要坚定，{NICKNAME}阁下…想想白厄和万敌，我们也要拿出同样的决心。
Have faith, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei are still fighting. We must match their unwavering resolve.
愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.
愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.
…是在说万敌吗？
...Is that Mydei?
年迈又昏聩的王，在密谋着不可言说的计划…他们想要亵渎{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神性、它的灵魂、还有它留给悬锋城的遗产啊。
The aging and feeble king is plotting something unspeakable... One that seeks to defile {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, their soul, and the legacy they left to Kremnos.
如果不加以阻止，它会对后世的翁法罗斯形成巨大的威胁。
If we do not stop them now, they will pose a grave danger to the future generations of Amphoreus.
「听说了吗？欧利庞王的谋臣们正在拟定计划，他们好像打算对奥赫玛发动总攻。」
"Have you heard? King Eurypon's advisors are coming up with a plan to launch an all-out attack on Okhema."
袭击奥赫玛的计划，在如此久远的年代就已有雏形了吗？
So their plan to attack Okhema was conceived that long ago?
遥远未来的某日…陷入疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}会把我们的伙伴和家园逼上绝路。我们回到这里…就是为了寻找阻止末日降临的方法。

Some day in the distant future... a mad {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will drive our companions and our homeland to the brink of destruction. The reason we came back here... is to find a way to prevent Amphoreus from falling to its doom.
两位阁下，请你们找到让{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的灵魂重归完整的办法。只有修正了这段历史…翁法罗斯才能拥有未来。
Please, you must find a way to make {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s soul whole again. It is only by fixing this point in history... that we can salvage the future of Amphoreus.
用更悬锋的方式前进！（跳过解谜）
Progress forward in the way of Kremnos! (Skip puzzle)
如此昏暗破败，这就是悬锋城的未来吗？
This dark and derelict place... is this the future of Kremnos?
这些年里一定发生了很多事。
Kremnos must have been through a lot since then...
不知何时，从遥远的地平线外诞生了黑潮——它缓慢地逼近翁法罗斯的边界，而{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}是第一位与之接触的泰坦。

No one knows when the black tide first appeared beyond the distant horizon, but when it slowly encroached upon Amphoreus' borders, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} was the first Titan to venture forth.
那声战吼，是万敌阁下？
That battle cry... Is that Lord Mydei?
咦？它们在翁法罗斯应该随处可见才对。
Huh? They're all over Amphoreus.
你或许…是悬锋城的救赎啊……
You could well be... Castrum Kremnos' salvation...
不必心急，万敌阁下。待回到奥赫玛后，由我来为你转述吧。
Not now, Lord Mydei. I'll tell you everything once we return to Okhema.
万敌，你……
Mydei, do you...
走吧，回奥赫玛去。把胜利的消息带给两位半神。
In any case, let's return to Okhema and share news of our victory with the two demigods.
我…必须向你们坦白，我认为万敌是更合适的人选。他曾是悬锋城的王储，生命中的大部分时间都在随{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}一同征战。

I... want to be honest about this: I believe Mydei is the better candidate. He was once the crown prince of Kremnos after all, and much of his lifetime was spent fighting alongside {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.
你所说种种，也许正是迈德漠斯不愿接过这颗火种的理由。
The qualities you've mentioned are very likely the reasons Mydeimos refused this Coreflame.
所以…你做好觉悟了吗，哀丽秘榭的白厄？
So I will ask you once more... Have you made up your mind, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae?
能在如此乱世中静心享乐，翁法罗斯人的精神属实脱俗。
The people of Amphoreus must have extraordinary spirits to be able to enjoy their lives even in such troubled times.
万敌去哪了？
Where did Mydei go?
倦意包裹了你…此时此刻，无论哪位翁法罗斯的神明都无法让你的目光从这张躺椅上移开。
Exhaustion envelops you... At this moment, no god of Amphoreus could pull your gaze away from this lounge chair.
当你身处奇异的睡梦时，奥赫玛的另一处……
While you were having the strange dream, somewhere else in Okhema...
今天、明天，有什么区别呢？反正在{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑下，奥赫玛永远都是黎明。
Today, tomorrow, what difference does it make? It's always morning in Okhema under {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection.
因为我认为一定有其它解法。「比翁法罗斯的命运更为重要之物」…这个题面对你来说太过残酷，太不公平。
Because I knew there must be another solution. "Something more important than the fate of Amphoreus"... It is far too cruel and unfair to ask that of you.
我一时找不到合适的辞藻…但我知道你并不平庸，白厄阁下。万敌常戏称你为「救世主」…我想他的语气中并不都是玩笑。
I don't have the right words for you now, but... I know you're far from ordinary, Lord Phainon. Mydei often calls you "Deliverer" in jest, but I don't believe he means it mockingly.
最近这段时间，我的故乡…哀丽秘榭的景色总在我眼前闪过。
The sights of Aedes Elysiae — my homeland — have been flashing before my eyes lately.
悬锋城的那些家伙，掌握了不得了的技术啊…要是我也能把自己的身体和灵魂分割开来就好了。那样，我就能随时让魂魄出窍，飞回家乡那片熟悉的茅草地。
Those Kremnoans mastered some cutting-edge technology... If only I could separate my soul from my body too. That way, I'd be able to fly my soul back to the comforting fields of my homeland any time.
翁法罗斯内部，{NICKNAME}的私人浴宫……
Within Amphoreus, at {NICKNAME}'s private bath chamber...
万敌阁下没有到场……
Lord Mydei isn't here yet...
哀丽秘榭的白厄——请上前来。
Please step forward, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.
为了预言中的明天，我会成为翁法罗斯需要的神。
For our prophesied tomorrow, I will become the god Amphoreus needs.
「随我来吧，哀丽秘榭的白厄……」
"Come with me, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae..."
万敌，你刚才说的「担忧」，指的是……
Mydei, what do you mean when you said you were "worried"?
万敌阁下…由我来吧。
Lord Mydei... please allow me.
那，小英雄…如果有一天，我们必须和哀丽秘榭说再见了，你会愿意成为「救世主」吗？
Well, little hero... If the day comes for us to say goodbye to Aedes Elysiae, could you become a Deliverer then?
哈哈，我在逗你玩呢~放心吧，哀丽秘榭可是很和平的，坏人绝对找不到我们。
Haha, I'm just teasing you. Don't worry. Aedes Elysiae is a peaceful place. Bad people won't reach us here.
的确。我想起在树庭求学的时光，每逢考试，理应沉心复习的时候，平日无暇关照的杂务都会变得条理清晰起来。
I understand completely. During my time at the Grove, the closer exams drew, the more efficient I became at tackling everyday mundane tasks — anything but my actual studies.
他在盗火行者一役中立下了功劳，我愿意退让一步，给他时间找出剥离火种的方法。
In light of his assistance in the battle against the Flame Reaver, I am willing to grant him some time to find a way to remove the Coreflame.
但接受试炼的风险，也请你仔细掂量：成为半神意味着你将舍弃人的身份，接过欧洛尼斯的神权，只身背负翁法罗斯的「岁月」。

However, I urge you to carefully consider the risks of accepting the trial: Becoming a demigod means forsaking your humanity. You will inherit Oronyx's divinity and bear the Time of Amphoreus, all on your own.
事态发展至此，我身为领路人难辞其咎。你们一次次为奥赫玛挺身而出，仅凭一樽蜜露早已难表谢意。

It is difficult for me as the guide to absolve myself from blame for things to have progressed to this point. Time and again, you have risen to the occasion for Okhema. Merely rewarding you with some Honeydew is no longer able to express the extent of our gratitude.
我走过翁法罗斯的许多城邦，可从未了解过天外的世界。如果有机会……
Despite having visited many cities in Amphoreus, I still understand nothing about the world beyond the sky. If there is an opportunity...
谈不上麻烦。我只是觉得，两位应该对奥赫玛的内部局势有更多了解。
I wouldn't call it trouble. I just think it will be favorable if the both of you understand the situation in Okhema better.
跟你补充下前情：元老院是由翁法罗斯的城邦代表们组成的权力机构，手握圣城的立法权，负责主持数年一度的公民大会。

Some background information for you: The Council of Elders is an authoritative body in Amphoreus made up of different city representatives. They hold legislative power over the holy city and are in charge of presiding over the citizens' assembly held once every few years.
这是奥赫玛最重要的社会活动，影响力之大…甚至能左右逐火之旅的动向。
This is the most important social event of Okhema. It is highly influential... and can even affect what happens to the Flame-Chase Journey.
那刻夏老师从不相信神谕，倒也没有「背叛」一说。但他教导过许多黄金裔，早已是奥赫玛重要的盟友。我实在不愿…眼睁睁看着同袍兵戈相向。

Anaxa has never believed in the prophecy, so technically it cannot be considered a betrayal. However, he has taught many Chrysos Heirs and has long been considered an important ally of Okhema. I truly do not wish to... see comrades turning on one another.
事情总是扎堆而至…{NICKNAME}和迷迷还要应对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的试炼。我也计划去一趟树庭，搜集「天外之界」的线索。

Things are piling up again... {NICKNAME} and Mem are tied up with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s trial, and while I'm preparing to visit the Grove to uncover clues about the world beyond the sky.
说起来，奥赫玛的浴场似乎没有橡皮鸭玩具。只有这些…海豹？
Speaking of which, I don't recall seeing any rubber duck toys in the baths of Okhema. It seems like they only have these... seals?
也许，翁法罗斯的「开拓」之旅要步入新的阶段了。
Perhaps, a new phase of our Trailblazing expedition in Amphoreus is about to begin.
若你已准备好成为翁法罗斯的支柱，便上前来。
If you have already made your preparations to become a pillar of Amphoreus, please step forward.
第一次带你进入创世涡心的光景还历历在目。那时我无论如何也想不到，一位天外来客会肩负起翁法罗斯的命运。
I can still vividly recall when you entered the Vortex of Genesis for the first time. At that time, I could never have imagined that a guest from beyond the sky would shoulder the fate of Amphoreus.
你很累了，对吗？漫长的岁月里，你一直在守护翁法罗斯的命运。人们从记忆中汲取力量，每一丝涟漪都落在你的肩上。

Aren't you tired? Throughout the long years, you have always been protecting the fate of Amphoreus. Each time people draw strength from within their memories, every single ripple falls onto your shoulders.
翁法罗斯…永恒的无序…将会陷入……
Amphoreus... will succumb to... eternal disorder...
降落到翁法罗斯时，我们的车厢被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的长矛贯穿了。还记得当时的情境么？在重渊的废墟，我是这么说的——
When we landed on Amphoreus, our car was pierced by {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s lance. Do you remember? Back in the ruins of the Abyss, this was what I said:
{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}也提到了「找回被夺走的未来」，还有「欺骗死亡」。想想万敌的不死之身，翁法罗斯存在着某种奇迹般的伟力，甚至能够逆转死亡……

{RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} mentioned "finding your stolen future" and "cheating death." Considering Mydei's indestructible body, it seems to suggest that there is some kind of miraculous power in Amphoreus that can even reverse death...
此前在树庭，我还疑惑阁下为何不会受到我的诅咒影响。我还以为是天外旅客的异能，可没想到，竟然是这种原因……

Back at the Grove, I was puzzled as to why you were not affected by my curse. I thought that it might have been the special ability of a traveler from beyond the sky. Never did I expect that this would be the true reason...
翁法罗斯…需要你。
Amphoreus... needs you.
但我没能料到…奥赫玛居然同时出现了两位「欺瞒死亡之人」。
However, I never expected that... two people who have cheated death would appear in Okhema at the same time.
我们刚才就在聊这事。该死，万敌在奥赫玛待了那么久，怎么就没人研究过他的不死之身？但凡能留下一点成果，现在也不至于毫无头绪……

That's what we have been talking about. Ugh, Mydei has been in Okhema for such a long time but — has no one ever thought to study his indestructible body? If there were even any minor breakthroughs, we wouldn't be as clueless as we are right now...
我会设法让她返回奥赫玛，但也请做好希望落空的准备。请你理解，在翁法罗斯的历史上，没有人能逃离「死亡」的掌心。于时光的尽头，塞纳托斯静候着每一个人。

I'll try and get her to return to Okhema but do be prepared for a less-than-ideal outcome. Please understand that throughout the history of Amphoreus, no one has ever managed to escape the clutches of Death. At the end of time, Thanatos silently awaits all.
喂！请问——这是什么地方，位于翁法罗斯何处？
Hey! Excuse me — what is this place? Where in Amphoreus are we?
本人谨代表奥赫玛全体公民向你致意，也为神悟树庭的遭遇表示深切遗憾。
I greet you on behalf of all the citizens of Okhema and express my deepest regret about what happened at the Grove of Epiphany.
我名为吕枯耳戈斯，唤我「来古士」便可。现今是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老，以「神礼观众」之名，捍卫每一位正直的公民自我表达的权利。

I am Lycurgus, though you may call me Lygus. Holding an honorary position within the Council of Elders in Okhema, and as the Theoros, I stand to protect the right of all upright citizens to express themselves freely.
而我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，身为树庭在奥赫玛公民大会的特派公使，也早已了解你的能耐……
While I, Anaxagoras, serving as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema's citizens' assembly, have long known the extent of your abilities...
呵，那就说明翁法罗斯人编撰的神话，连笑话都不如。
Heh, in that case, the myths crafted by the people of Amphoreus are nothing more than pitiful jests.
四下望去…此地可有描绘吾的壁画？吾倒是好奇，树庭以外的人子，如何看待别尊泰坦呢。
Now that I look around... I wonder if there are any murals bearing my portrait around here. I'm quite intrigued to see how the children of humanity beyond the Grove perceive another Titan.
那刻夏老师？听说树庭的学者为了抵御黑潮英勇牺牲，想不到您还安然无恙…真是命运垂青！
Professor Anaxa? Word has it that the scholars of the Grove valiantly perished resisting the black tide. To find you here safe and sound... Thank the fates!
这么说，您此行是来向元老院禀报事件始末的么？我听说，不仅树庭被黑潮吞没，奥赫玛也不远了。就算有「纷争」的半神站在人类这边……

So, are you here to report the incident to the Council? I heard that after the black tide devoured the Grove, Okhema would be next in line. Even with the demigod of Strife standing alongside humankind...
但等到{RUBY_B#万敌}那位王子{RUBY_E#}登神，阻退黑潮，她又马上调转枪头，声称奥赫玛以外大势已定，唯一的威胁只剩阿格莱雅及其党羽。大概下一次公民大会，她们就该发难了吧。

Yet, when {RUBY_B#Mydei}the crown prince{RUBY_E#} ascended to godhood and repelled the black tide, she immediately altered her tune, declaring that all was resolved beyond Okhema, with the only remaining menace now being Aglaea and her adherents. They might well make their move at the upcoming citizens' assembly.
呵呵…难道说，汝是出于这种缘由，才在树庭遇袭时妄图炼化吾之灵魂不成？
Heheh... Was this the reason why you failed in your attempt to refine my soul when you were ambushed at the Grove?
汝还有家人哪，他们也在这奥赫玛城中？
So, there are other members in your family, eh? Are they also living in Okhema?
这、这可是渎神哪…即便自由如树庭，此举也足以将你送上火葬的尸床…！
B—But this is absolute blasphemy... Regardless of how much freedom the Grove provides, such an act could cause you to be burned at the pyre...!
你那至亲…她现在身在何处？快将她送离树庭，去到人寻不得的地方，否则你我都将接受七贤人会的审判哪…！

Your beloved... Where is she now? Send her away from the Grove at once, to a place where nobody will ever be able to find her. Otherwise, the both of us will be judged by the Council of the Seven Sages...!
神悟树庭「智种学派」掌门人，恶名昭彰的「渎神者」，身怀{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}火种的黄金裔，树庭惨案的幸存者……
Head of the Nousporists of the Grove of Epiphany, notorious blasphemer, a Chrysos Heir who bears {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame, a survivor of the Grove calamity...
黄金裔们呼唤战争，我们就回应以战争。冲突必将发生：既然阿格莱雅妄图用金血的力量压制善良的民众，我们就不惮彰显奥赫玛公民应有的权利和气概。

Well, since the Chrysos Heirs are calling for war, we will respond in kind. Conflict is inevitable. Since Aglaea endeavors to suppress the virtuous commoners with blood of gold, we will not hesitate to display the rights and mettle that the citizens of Okhema are so entitled to.
这片小小的舞台，正是奥赫玛千百年来最深刻的缩影。而在十五个日夜后，此地也将成为奥赫玛历史最重要、也是最后的转折点……
This tiny stage is the most profound embodiment of Okhema in centuries. In fifteen days, this site shall also become the most important, as well as the final turning point in Okhema's history...
她是奥赫玛众黄金裔中资历次长者，在岁月磋磨与火种烧蚀中逐渐丧失人性…是一位可敬可畏的对手。

She is the second-most experienced Chrysos Heir across the whole of Okhema, who has gradually lost her humanity to the ravages of time and the ablation of the Coreflame... A formidable opponent indeed.
执刑者遐蝶，相信你对这个名字并不陌生。早在我返回奥赫玛时，阿格莱雅便派她来监视我了。如果我没能及时赴约，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}必将先一步找上我。

I believe you're aware of Castorice the executioner. Long before I returned to Okhema, Aglaea had already dispatched her to monitor me. If I weren't able to reach this place in time, I would have been forced to meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} first.
至少，你我都同意这位穷奢极欲的暴君正是奥赫玛和平最大的敌人。元老院愿意捍卫您生存的权利，正如我们捍卫每一位遭到压迫的公民。

At the very least, the both of us agree that this tyrant who wallows in extravagance and greed is the greatest threat to achieving peace in Okhema. The Council of Elders is willing to defend your right to live, just as we defend every oppressed citizen.
我的支持代表树庭全体的支持。
Garnering my support is equivalent to garnering the support of the entire Grove.
虽然令人感到遗憾，但客观来说，树庭遭袭之后，学院的实际权力者变成了我。
Although the circumstances are rather unfortunate, from an objective point of view, it is an undeniable fact that ever since the Grove was attacked, I have become the de facto leader of the Grove.
退一步说，我早就是树庭在奥赫玛的特派公使，在公民大会上自然也保有关键的一票。
At the very least, I have served as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema for a significant amount of time. Of course, this also means that I will hold a crucial vote at the citizens' assembly.
以{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的名义，奥赫玛感谢您的诚意和宝贵意见。
In the name of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema thanks you for your sincere and valuable thoughts.
元老院宣誓对奥赫玛全体公民永远忠诚——至于你，阁下，你要如何保证自己配得上这份诚意，而不会像你现在背叛阿格莱雅一样，择机背叛奥赫玛战无不胜的人民？

The Council of Elders has vowed to all citizens of Okhema that it will always remain loyal to them. As for you, my lord, how will you guarantee that you will be able to live up to such earnestness and will not betray Okhema's indomitable citizens when the opportunity presents itself, just as you now betray Aglaea when it suits you?
你当然没有理由，但凯妮斯有。谁能掌握{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种，谁就能掌握奥赫玛……
You may not, but Caenis has. Whoever gets hold of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame will get to rule over Okhema...
看来方才的智辩实属枯脑焦心哪…若翁法罗斯有来生，记得多加强身健体，也别再逃避人情酬应了。
So, the intellectual debate from earlier was too draining for you, huh... If Amphoreus gets a new lease on life, you should focus on strengthening your body and stop shirking social interactions.
这也是「负世」之重的一道侧写吧。如果翁法罗斯真有来生，记得多锻炼啊。
I guess this also counts as one aspect of the Worldbearing burden. If Amphoreus does have a next life, you may want to get your body in shape.
（卡吕普索？她是七贤人…树庭的人？）
(Calypso? She's one of the Seven Sages... A member of the Grove?)
（晚安，迷迷。晚安，奥赫玛……）
(Goodnight, Mem. Goodnight, Okhema...)
（晚安，迷迷。晚安，奥赫玛……）
(Goodnight, Mem. Goodnight, Okhema...)
晚些时候 奥赫玛某处
Later, somewhere in Okhema...
元老院？元你个头！我的家乡早就被黑潮吞没了，还回到黄金世？我看是回到奥赫玛的黄金世还差不多吧！

The Council of Elders? More like the council of buffoons! The black tide took my hometown long ago! Who are they kidding with bringing back Era Chrysea? It's all a sham to create their own Era Chrysea in Okhema!
奥赫玛今天也很和平。
Just another peaceful day in Okhema.
欸？阁下竟然有这种兴趣吗，那你应该…很喜欢奥赫玛的氛围。
Hm? You're interested in that? Well, you'll feel right at home in Okhema then.
时至今日，我仍会觉得不可思议。在摇摇欲坠的翁法罗斯，唯独这里依旧是一片光明。奥赫玛的人们还会用投票来解决问题……

To this day, I still find it almost unreal that Okhema is the only place illuminated by light amidst the crumbling ruins of Amphoreus, and its people are even holding votes to reconcile differing opinions...
没错。现在，我是奥赫玛的「入殓师」……
Yes. You now know me as the mortician of Okhema...
因为我也是：我不明白，为什么阁下身为天外之人，会以这种残忍的方式早早卷入翁法罗斯的命运……
I felt just as confused. Why, as someone from beyond the sky, were you so cruelly dragged into Amphoreus's fate?
哪怕早在树庭，我们就有过无心的接触。那时明明什么都没有发生……
Even when we brushed against each other unintentionally in the Grove... and it was obvious that nothing had happened...
金织、控制狂、奥赫玛第一美人、阿格莱雅妈妈…还要我多说几个外号吗？
Goldweaver, control freak, number one beauty of Okhema, Aglaea the Mom... How many more nicknames do you wanna hear?
翁法罗斯货币和我们的不一样。
The currency I use isn't the same as the one in Amphoreus.
不过，计划有变：明天别去浴场，来奥赫玛城门口找我。
A minor change in plans, though. Don't go to the bath tomorrow. Come look for me at Okhema's city gates instead.
没什么，单纯因为我怕了裁缝女那副冷冰冰的面孔。如果可以，我一秒都不想在奥赫玛多待。
Oh, nothing really. Just a bit scared of the seamstress' frosty face. I wouldn't stay a second longer in Okhema if it were up to me.
次日 奥赫玛
Next day, Okhema...
给我带哪了，还是翁法罗斯吗？
Where am I? Are we still in Amphoreus?
万敌…阁下？
Lord Mydei...?
如果万敌阁下此时也在浅滩上，那他一定能成为我们的道标。因为，他和那些离群的亡魂不同…即便在死者的世界，他也一定能找到方向。

If Lord Mydei is also somewhere along the river shoals right now, then he will certainly become our signpost. After all, he's different from those wandering souls... He will find his way even in the realm of the dead.
如果赛飞儿阁下所言属实…或许真是万敌阁下所为。
If Lady Cipher is to be believed... this could be the handiwork of Lord Mydei.
神谕已然昭示你的姓名，「死亡」的黄金裔，奥赫玛理应将你奉为贵宾。
Since the prophecy has already pronounced your name as Chrysos Heir of "Death," Okhema ought to treat you as an esteemed guest.
整理好心爱的衣物，随我启程吧。奥赫玛欢迎你，遐蝶。
Tidy up your precious garments and come with me. Okhema welcomes you, Castorice.
据说，女王不计代价将她带回城堡，她意欲以这前所未见的伟力，将整个翁法罗斯纳入掌中……
I've heard that the queen spared no effort in bringing her back to the castle. Her Majesty intends to control all of Amphoreus with this unprecedented power...
万敌…阁下？
Lord Mydei...?
万敌阁下，我一直都想知道…死亡为何会抗拒你？
Lord Mydei, I have always wanted to... Why does Death reject you?
这真是那个霸道的万敌吗？
Is this really the proud Mydei?
万敌阁下，你愿意与我们同行吗？
Lord Mydei, are you willing to travel with us?
悬锋城是不是也有这个…
Didn't Castrum Kremnos also have this...?
缇安，还有万敌…我明白了。
Trianne and Mydei... I get it now.
我还在思量，万敌阁下。
I have yet to make my decision, Lord Mydei.
万敌阁下…还有一件事，或许你应该知晓。
There is one more thing you should know, Lord Mydei.
感谢你，万敌阁下。那个正确的选择…我会找到它的。
Thank you, Lord Mydei. I will find the right decision.
我…为重铸翁法罗斯生死秩序而来。
I'm... here to reforge the order of life and death in Amphoreus.
与此同时 奥赫玛
At the same time, in Okhema
汝声称：「翁法罗斯历史乃是『轮回』」——
You were saying that Amphoreus' history is cyclical...
奥赫玛在这一制度下屹立千年不倒，自然能证明其存在的合理性。
Okhema has stood strong under this system for a thousand years. It stands to reason that there is purpose in its existence.
——奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将为本场大会带来最后的演说！
Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, virtuous citizen of Okhema and the last speaker of the assembly.
刻法勒在上，各位奥赫玛的公民——
By Kephale above, dear citizens of Okhema...
我的故乡哀丽秘榭，那是一处被时间遗忘的村落。那里的好风如薄荷般清新，麦浪宽广到能连上海洋…我曾坚信，自己会在那与邻里亲友永享安宁。

Aedes Elysiae, my beloved hometown, is a village forgotten by time. It is a place with the most invigorating breeze and wheat fields that spread all the way to the sea... I once thought that there, I would enjoy a lifetime of peace and quiet with my friends and family.
这就是黑潮，奥赫玛如今迫在眉睫的威胁。凯妮斯或许承诺了，灾厄三泰坦皆已陨落，奥赫玛必将重返「黄金世」——

That is the black tide — a looming threat that can bring Okhema to its knees anytime. Caenis may have promised that, with the Three Titans of Calamity gone, Okhema will return to an Era Chrysea once more, but...
但现在，我要让各位失望了。因为，我会对你们说：即便{RUBY_B#万敌}「纷争」之半神{RUBY_E#}已为我们挡下许多，但「它」就要来了。
Much as it pains me, I must disappoint you: While {RUBY_B#Mydei}the demigod of Strife{RUBY_E#} has done everything in his power to hold them back, "they" are still coming.
那黑袍剑士…「盗火行者」的名字，恐怕早已传遍大街小巷。现在，「纷争」用他的惊雷送来信号，告诉我们：它已自死灰中复活，并渴求着众神的火种。

By now, the name of that black-robed swordmaster... the Flame Reaver, has likely echoed throughout the city already. The roaring thunder is a message from the Strife demigod: The Flame Reaver has risen from death, and they hunger for the Coreflames of the gods.
正是！奥赫玛美好的公民生活没有停歇的迹象。仔细想想吧，各位，这场公民大会能够和平召开，难道是因为危机消失了吗？

Exactly! The city of Okhema shows no signs of pandemonium or chaos. And why is that? I beg you, spare a moment to think about this. Are we able to stand here and hold this assembly in peace today because the danger has passed?
不！那是因为黄金裔们挺身而出，将灾厄挡在了奥赫玛的城墙之外——阿格莱雅用她的金线，维系并捍卫了你们所能享用的一切！

No! This peace we enjoy is no gift of fate. We are able to stand here today only because the Chrysos Heirs have stepped up and shielded Okhema from calamity! With her golden threads, Aglaea has preserved — and continues to preserve — these idyllic days that all of you hold dear!
元老院说，她会抛下所有人，只因神性正在蚕食她的身心。但各位可曾想过，那些贵人本能向她伸出援手——他们为何选择了冷眼旁观，并将奥赫玛推离逐火的事业？

The Council of Elders claims that Aglaea will one day forsake the people because her divinity is eroding her body and soul. But ask yourselves this: Rather than offering her aid and support, why do they choose to watch and push Okhema away from the Flame-Chase Journey?
她从未辜负奥赫玛的期待，却只因虫豸的围攻撕咬、就该蒙受莫大的羞辱吗？除却那后至的「神性」…她的本心，难道不是始终与「人」同在吗？

Not once has she ever failed Okhema, yet these vermin attempt to tear her apart, tarnishing her name with unfounded allegations! She may have been blessed by divinity, but hasn't her heart always stayed true to humanity?
他们想欺骗你们，把这场大会粗暴地归结成「人」与「神」的对立。还记得我的请求吗？奥赫玛的公民们，请擦亮双眼，仔细端详一下站在你们身边的人吧！
They attempt to mislead you and reduce this assembly to a crude standoff between gods and humans, but citizens of Okhema! Once more, I implore you to open your eyes and look at those around you!
在一片哗然中，奥赫玛不同城邦代表领袖将手中的陶片扔进陶罐中……
In an uproar, representative leaders from different cities in Okhema throw pieces of pottery into the dolium...
感谢诸位耐心等待。我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，谨代表神悟树庭七贤人与全体学者，投下庄严一票。
Thank you all for your patience. On behalf of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the scholars of Amphoreus, I, Anaxagoras, am ready to cast my vote.
元老们，公民们，请肃静！神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯请求向公民大会宣告。还请各位留步，以便聆听其宣言。
Elders and citizens, your attention, please! Stay for a moment more, if you will. Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany has an announcement for the assembly.
诸君！就在刚才，你们亲手决定了翁法罗斯的命运。作为逐火之旅的支持者，我也十分乐见诸位的抉择——
Just moments ago, all of you made a decision on the fate of Amphoreus. As a supporter of the Flame-Chase Journey, it pleases me to see the choice you have made.
都给我提起耳朵，听清楚了！现在，我，神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，就这样告诉你们——
Now, listen up, and listen well! I, Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, hereby declare:
逐火之旅许诺的一切确凿无疑：因为预言中{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的半神，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将以他完整无缺的记忆，将我们所有人重塑在新世界中！
