Everything that the Flame-Chase Journey promises is true! Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, the prophesized demigod who shall succeed {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, will reforge each and every one of us in the new world with his complete, intact memories!
天啊，连凯妮斯也背叛了奥赫玛……
By the gods, even Caenis has betrayed Okhema...
首先，对于奥赫玛元老凯妮斯，与「神礼观众」来古士，被指控疏忽职守，徇私枉法，致使尊神奥体遭受严重亵渎……
First, Elder Caenis of Okhema and Lygus the Theoros stand accused of neglecting their duties and abusing the law, leading to the egregious blasphemy against a god...
以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名：奥赫玛应在第七个{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}以前责成委员会展开检察，并公开宣示结果，以便进一步审理！

In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, Okhema is to form a committee before the seventh {RUBY_B#Noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#} to conduct an investigation and disclose the findings to the public for subsequent judgment!
其次，对于神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，指控其自身对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的严重亵渎——
Now, concerning Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany, he has confessed to grave blasphemy against {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}...
现在 奥赫玛
Presently, in Okhema
当然。吾在此立誓见证：神悟树庭「智种学派」的阿那克萨戈拉斯，业已战胜理性之试炼。
Very. I hereby swear I have borne witness: Anaxagoras of the Nousporists and the Grove of Epiphany has successfully overcome the trial of Reason.
你引领我们前来翁法罗斯，却始终不愿谈及真实目的。「收集记忆」…并不是一个能让我信服的回答。
You've guided us to Amphoreus but refused to tell us your true intentions. "Collecting memories"... is simply not a convincing answer.
当然，没问题。真正的原因是：翁法罗斯有着特殊的意义，在一些秉持极端理念的忆庭成员眼中，它…是一个「完美的范例」。

That's not a problem, of course. The true reason behind my intentions is that Amphoreus holds special significance. For some Memokeepers of the Garden with extremist views, it... is a "perfect example."
一个只能被忆庭之镜映照出的世界，意味着忆者拥有将其「私藏」的权利。如果那些「记忆」行者先一步掌握了翁法罗斯的奥秘……

A world that can only be seen through the Garden's mirror means that Memokeepers have the right to keep the world in their private collection. If those pathstriders of Remembrance were to uncover the secrets of Amphoreus first...
浮黎…祂的目光，刚刚掠过了翁法罗斯。
It's Fuli... THEIR gaze has just swept across Amphoreus.
更有趣的是，她的潜意识里也出现了「翁法罗斯」这四个字。
What's even more interesting is that the word "Amphoreus" has appeared in her subconscious.
「翁法罗斯」——不仅这人知道它，还有很多忆者都对那里感兴趣。
Not only does this person know of Amphoreus, but there are also many Memokeepers who are interested in the place.
这个神秘兮兮的翁法罗斯，既然从外部找不到有用的线索，那我干脆——登门拜访。
Since I'm not able to find any useful clues from the outside, why don't I personally visit this mysterious Amphoreus?
第二面镜，准备「思维折射」。从星穹列车到翁法罗斯天体还有一段距离，你得把我发射过去——
Second Mirror, prepare for the Thought Refraction. There's still some distance from the Astral Express to the Amphoreus celestial body. You're in charge of sending me over...
…坐标输入完毕，准备启动空间折跃。目标：未知天体「翁法罗斯」。
...Coordinates input complete. Preparing to activate spatial warp. Destination: Unknown celestial body, Amphoreus.
嚯…那就是翁法罗斯？外形还真是别具一格。
Oh... So that's Amphoreus? Its appearance is — well — sure is unique.
嚯…好一番壮观的景象，这就是翁法罗斯的入口吗？
Oh... What a magnificent sight. Is this the entrance to Amphoreus?
接下来…该怎么进入翁法罗斯内部呢？
Now then... How am I going to get into Amphoreus?
但标准总是灵活的。在不违反终极协议的前提下，我可以透露一条信息：如您所想，此地是「翁法罗斯」的入口。
However, standards are always flexible. While not violating the ultimate protocol, I'm able to disclose this piece of information: As you thought, this is the entrance to Amphoreus.
而现在——请回吧，女士。很遗憾，翁法罗斯不是您应当染指的世界。无论您建立过多少丰功伟绩，此地都不会轻易敞开大门。

Now, please kindly turn back. Amphoreus is not a world that you should be involved with. Regardless of what kind of magnificent achievements you have accomplished, this place will not open its doors so easily.
其一：由于不可言说的原因，翁法罗斯是「绝对封闭」的天体。除我以外，没有任何能协助您进入其中的方法。
First: For reasons that cannot be disclosed, Amphoreus is a completely isolated celestial body. Apart from me, no one else will be able to help you enter.
它关乎缠绕翁法罗斯的第三条命途，也是您和您的朋友至今未能解明的那一条……
It concerns the third Path that is entangled with Amphoreus — a Path that you and your friends still very much lack understanding of...
正在众人静候「纷争」的半神从试炼中诞生时，意外也发生了。开拓小队立即随万敌深入试炼，并救出了困于其中的白厄。正当众人松了一口气时，新的问题却随之而来。

While everyone is awaiting the demigod of Strife to emerge from the trial, something unexpected happens. The Trailblaze squad immediately follows Mydei into the trial and rescues Phainon, who is trapped inside. Just as everyone breathes a sigh of relief, a new problem arises.
万敌不得不肩负起「纷争」的重任，但悬锋人也绝不会将火种拱手让给宿敌奥赫玛。为了寻求理解，他决定首先向恩师，悬锋老将克拉特鲁斯请教，二人不欢而散。

Mydei had to shoulder the burden of Strife, but the Kremnoans would never willingly give up the Coreflame to their old foe Okhema. In an attempt to gain a better understanding, he decides to first seek advice from his teacher Krateros, a veteran of Kremnos. The two part on bad terms.
与此同时，奥赫玛向神悟树庭派出以缇安、遐蝶为代表的外交使节。众人抵达时意外发现黑潮来袭，并与神秘剑士交战，但最终还是成功救出那刻夏和他身负的火种。

Meanwhile, Trianne and Castorice are dispatched to the Grove of Epiphany as diplomatic envoys of Okhema. When they arrive, they discover to their surprise that the black tide has struck, and they fight a mysterious swordmaster. In the end, they manage to rescue Anaxa and the Coreflame that he carries.
就在众人返程途中，奥赫玛城内，悬锋老将因挟持缇宁，擅闯禁地被捕。在万敌斡旋下，缇宝等人同意袒露记忆，以便实现悬锋人与奥赫玛人的和解。

While everyone is on their way back, within the city of Okhema, Krateros is arrested for abducting Trinnon and trespassing on forbidden grounds. Under Mydei's mediation, Tribbie and her sisters agree to reveal their memories in order to facilitate reconciliation between the Kremnoans and Okhemans.
计划一波三折，但万敌以「纷争」半神之姿归来，协助众人成功夺回火种。不久后，他成功说服子民放下对宿仇的成见，便与众人告别，返回家乡，踏上对抗黑潮的前线。

The plan suffers multiple setbacks, but Mydei returns as the demigod of Strife and helps everyone reclaim the Coreflame. Not long after, he successfully persuades his people to let go of their prejudices against Okhema. He says goodbye to everyone and returns home to join the frontline against the black tide.
丹宝也能理解吧，毕竟，把你和{NICKNAME}囚禁在翁法罗斯的泰坦…就是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。
You get what I'm saying, right Dannie? After all, the Titan that imprisoned you and {NICKNAME} here in Amphoreus is none other than {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} themself...
但总有地上的人怀抱着飞向天空的梦想。树庭不乏对{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的研究，这也是我们此行的目的。
But there will always be people who dream of soaring toward the sky. The Grove has a wealth of research on {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, and that is exactly what we are here for.
偌大的树庭，不知要找的东西都分散在哪儿。我们分头行动吧，相信以丹宝的身手，黑潮造物也伤不到你。

In any case, what we're looking for could be anywhere in this enormous Grove. Let's split up to cover more ground. Dannie, with your skills, I'm sure those monsters born of the black tide will pose no threat to you anyway.
离开翁法罗斯的方法…
How to leave Amphoreus...
（艾格勒，统治天空的泰坦。神话中，它被描述为一只长有百眼、俯瞰世界的巨鸟。只要它依旧飞翔于云端，翁法罗斯人就无法离开地面……）

(In the myths, Aquila, the Titan who reigns over the domain of the skies, is a colossal bird that overlooks the world beneath them with a hundred eyes. As long as they continue to soar above the clouds, the people of Amphoreus will remain trapped on the ground...)
翁法罗斯的泰坦神话…
Amphoreus' Titan mythology...
（在翁法罗斯，「泰坦」是绕不开的话题。人们创造了神话，神话又塑造了他们…身在其中，总是很难保证客观。）
(In Amphoreus, Titans are a common topic of discussion. People create myths that, in turn, conceive Titans... It's a tricky task to keep an objective view when among the people of Amphoreus.)
（没能保护好{F#她}{M#他}，是我的失职…但还有一线希望。翁法罗斯独特的死生规则，如今反倒成了救命稻草。）

(I should have done more to keep {M#him}{F#her} safe... but it's not too late. We still have a fighting chance. The unique rules that govern life and death on Amphoreus might just work in our favor and save {M#him}{F#her}.)
（以树庭藏书之广博，会有类似记载吗？希望有吧……）
(The Grove is a veritable library of knowledge... Maybe they'll have records on a similar case? Please let there be one...)
果然，谈论「天空」在树庭算不上禁忌。这两位学者在争论的「天舟」，记得阿格莱雅审讯时也提到过，不是什么愉快的回忆。

As I expected, the Grove doesn't forbid discussions about the Sky. It's a debate between two scholars about the skyships... Aglaea also made mention of the ships when she interrogated us... a memory I'd rather forget.
可能…是因为我吧。黑潮对翁法罗斯的「光明」格外敏锐，也许是天空祭司的赐福吸引了它们。
The black tide is remarkably quick to detect the light of Amphoreus, so I... or rather, the blessings of the Sky Priest in me, might have unknowingly called them to me.
说「可能」有些委婉了。老师一向不敬神明，对神谕也持否定态度，即便在自由的树庭，他也被视作异端。

"Might" is an understatement. Anaxa has never been one to venerate the gods, nor has he ever found it within himself to put any faith in the prophecy. People have come to think of him as a heretic, even in a place as liberal as the Grove.
我对树庭还不够了解，方便问几个问题么？
There's still much I don't know about the Grove. Do you mind if I ask you a few questions?
神悟树庭有七大学派，虽然都是围绕「最初的学者」塞勒苏斯的理念建立的，但彼此间各有不同，其中「敬拜学派」是最为敬奉泰坦的一支。

The Grove of Epiphany is home to seven schools of thought. While all seven schools are founded on the ideologies of Thalesus the First Scholar, each is unique in its own way. Among them, the Venerationists revere and worship the Titans the most.
如今，几乎每一个翁法罗斯人都知道「天舟」的故事。{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的身躯比天空更伟岸，它的神罚是如此无情。
Nearly everyone in Amphoreus has heard the story of the skyships by now. {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s stature is loftier than the heavens, and their divine retribution is merciless.
这里是树庭的藏书处，友爱之馆。
This is the Library of Philia, a place where the Grove stores its collection of tomes.
那，树庭「打劫」过悬锋城么？
Well, if you don't mind: Did the Grove ever rob Castrum Kremnos?
友爱之馆的书目过于庞杂，一卷卷翻阅不现实。我们用藏书石版检索出需要的资料，统一带回奥赫玛研究吧。

There are too many books in the Library of Philia. Flipping through them all will take too long. Why don't we use the biblioslate to search for the texts we need? We can bring them back to Okhema for reading after that.
课题二：树庭内有真正的植物在模仿相邻近的仙女木的生长趋势，申请研究。回复：这是「莲食学派」的研究方向，暂不批准。

Topic 2: An observation of real plants within the Grove imitating the growth patterns of nearby White Dryads. Permission to research. Reply: Falls under the domain of the Lotophagist school, not approved.
「至于泰坦，它们真的符合凡人对神的认知？神造的世界必定是完美的，可翁法罗斯却遍布愚钝和丑陋！」

"Are the Titans truly an accurate reflection of what humans think gods should be? Worlds created by gods are indubitably perfect, but what of Amphoreus? Only foolishness and insensitivity everywhere you turn!"
说是审判，其实是辩论。他需要一一回应学者们的控诉，否则就要被逐出树庭。
Though what he took on in the end was more a debate than an actual trial. He had to address every one of the scholars' allegations, or face expulsion from the Grove.
对了，这沓投诉信提醒了我，树庭里还有个地方，或许存在石版中都查不到的线索……
By the way, this stack of complaint letters has reminded me of a place in the Grove... We may find clues there that aren't on the teleslate.
以树庭的藏书风格，竟会有这种眼皮底下的遗漏？
Given the Grove's meticulous approach to archiving, could there really be such an oversight right under their noses?
树庭都成这样了，小小打破一下禁令也没事吧…对不住啦那刻夏老师。
With the Grove in this state, I'm sure Anaxa won't be mad even if we sneak into the lab for a short while... Right?
这是怎么回事…奥赫玛的大家，还有我？连我也在老师的研究范围内？
What's going on...? Anaxa is conducting research on our friends in Okhema and... me?
从命运重渊到悬锋城，我已见过许多泰坦造物，树庭里也有不少{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}创造的生灵。
From the Abyss of Fate to Castrum Kremnos, I've seen many a Titan creation during my time in Amphoreus. Lifeforms created by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} can also be found in the Grove.
你还记得吗？黑潮抵近时，树庭本打算转移{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，可中途遭遇意外，那刻夏老师也以身殉道……

Do you remember? When the black tide was approaching, the Grove had planned to send {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' Coreflame to a safe place, but an accident happened along the way, and Anaxa lost his life in the process...
「应掌握造物的原理，令万物诞生时即为完美的状态」…如今那刻夏身在奥赫玛，他的目标……
"To conceive an entity of perfection, one must first understand the principles of creation"... If Anaxa is in Okhema now, then that means...
所以，奥赫玛的天空也是虚假的。
So, the skies of Okhema are fake, too.
因为那根本不是你，而是「卡吕普索」，来自树庭的七贤人之一。
Because that wasn't you. That was Calypso, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove.
七贤人就更是笑谈了，若真是在吾之树荫下蒙受庇护的贤人，吾必能发觉。汝不也对树庭的过去如指诸掌么？

And surely you jest. Don't you think I, of all people, would know if that were the name of one of the Seven Sages under the shade of my tree? Don't you claim to know the Grove's past like the back of your hand?
适应了奥赫玛的日光，都不习惯夜色了。
The night sky feels unusual... now that I've gotten used to the eternal light of Okhema.
总有种不妙的预感，难道树庭之灾背后还有别的秘密？
I have a bad feeling about this. Could there be more to what happened at the Grove?
半神议院是奥赫玛的政治腹地，重要性不亚于创世涡心。在我的使命结束后，总有一天，这里会取代猎神的疆场，成为你们的下一道难关——

Being Okhema's political center, the Demigod Council holds just as much significance as the Vortex of Genesis. Someday, after my duty is over, this site will take the place of the battlefield where you hunt gods, become the next challenge you ought to overcome...
你好，翁法罗斯的奥列格。
Hello, Oleg of Amphoreus.
雷声是「纷争」的烽火，是少主捎来消息了。他向奥赫玛掷来了传信的投枪，上面只有几个字。
Thunderclaps are beacon signals of Strife. They are a message from the young lord. He threw a spear bearing several words at Okhema.
「盗火者，死灰复燃，警惕。」
"Watch out. The Flame Reaver is back."
…果然。先前在悬锋竞技场，我们没有真正杀死它。
...I guessed as much. We didn't actually kill them back at the Kremnos arena.
奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，与异乡人{NICKNAME}，正在向我们走来！
Virtuous citizens of Okhema, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae and {NICKNAME} the outlander are heading toward us!
可是，要怎么才能让翁法罗斯回到「黄金世」？
But how are we supposed to send Amphoreus back to "Era Chrysea"?
树庭七贤人之一，阿那克萨戈拉斯，以及哀地里亚的「死亡女神」遐蝶——
Anaxagoras, one of the Grove's Seven Sages, and Castorice, Aidonia's "Goddess of Death"!
很简单：我们将有机会消除世间「死亡」，令翁法罗斯回到万物永生的时代…一个与「逐火之旅」完全不同的崭新未来！

The answer is simple: We will have a chance to rid the world of "death" and bring Amphoreus back to an era when all beings live forever... We'll usher in a new future that will be entirely different from "the Flame-Chase Journey"!
盗火行者迟早会盯上这里！
But this place will become the Flame Reaver's target sooner or later!
哦？莫非，盗火行者亲口告诉你了？
Oh? Could it be that you heard that from the Flame Reaver themself?
若我们消除了死亡，便不必畏惧那盗火者，不是么？
If we eliminate death, then there's no need for us to fear that Flame Reaver, right?
奥赫玛选择了她的命运。本次公民大会议题将变更为「暂停逐火之旅」，该决议并将张贴于纪名英雄墙前，全体公民应知晓城邦的前路。

Okhema has chosen her destiny. The issue up for discussion at this citizens' assembly shall be modified to the "Suspension of the Flame-Chase Journey." This resolution shall be put up on the Wall of Heroes such that all citizens are aware of the city's way forward.
翁法罗斯的历史在泰坦诞生前是一片「混沌」，这还不奇怪吗？
Amphoreus' history before the Titans were born was complete chaos. Is that not strange by itself?
听说现世的悬锋城也刻着同样的话，居然是炼金的术式啊。
I've heard that these words are still engraved in Castrum Kremnos even today. It didn't occur to me that they were actually part of an alchemical formula.
正如今日的逐火之旅——翁法罗斯的历史是一种「轮回」。
...Just like the Flame-Chase Journey of today. Amphoreus' history is cyclical in nature.
此时此刻，我正在努力帮助这里的人们逃离。*我们*打开了许许多多的百界门，把大家传送到了奥赫玛，*我们*的姐妹缇宝的身边……
Right now, I'm doing everything I can to help people escape. We have been guiding them through the Century Gate, sending them to Okhema, where our sister Tribbie is waiting.
也都想见证奥赫玛的第二次黎明——
And we all want to see Okhema's second dawn —
你会把那苦涩的真相…传达给奥赫玛的全城公民吗？
Will you share this harsh truth... with all the citizens of Okhema?
以普通人的标准衡量，几位的身手也算不错了。你们要是没误入歧途，怎么也能在奥赫玛当个守城卫士，领个铁饭碗吧？
By any standard, you all are quite capable. Had you not strayed, you could have been guarding Okhema, securing a stable income.
黑衣剑士，盗火行者，管你叫什么名字——
Black-clad swordmaster, the Flame Reaver, whatever your name is —
*太美丽了，斯缇科西亚…哎唷，这不盗火行者吗？*
Styxia, you're stunning... Oh? Look who it is — the Flame Reaver!
*初次…哦不对，多次见面，我是奥赫玛的大英雄，翁法罗斯的救世主！*
First time — wait, no, not the first time meeting you. I'm the great hero of Okhema, the Deliverer of Amphoreus!
…拜拜，「盗火行者」！
...Bye-bye, "Flame Reaver"!
现在——由我来验验你这盗火者的成色吧！
Now, let me see if you're worth your title, Flame Reaver!
*奥赫玛的全体公民哪——今天，我要给你们带来两个消息：一则悲报，一则佳音。*
To all citizens of Okhema — today, I bring you two pieces of news: one sorrowful, one joyous.
*那就是我要为诸位带来的喜报！伟大的负世泰坦陷入缄默以前，它在我的恩师耳边留下的话语…现在，我要将它传予翁法罗斯的全部世人！*

And that brings me to the joyous news I share with you today! Before the great Worldbearing Titan fell silent, they spoke one final message to my revered mentor. And now, I shall share those words with every soul in Amphoreus!
那时，我…咳、咳咳…我必须离开奥赫玛……
Back then, I... I had to leave Okhema...
你是翁法罗斯湮没无闻的英雄，赛法利娅。你拯救了我们所有人。
You are the unsung hero of Amphoreus, Cifera. You saved us all.
白厄阁下，在翁法罗斯的神话中——黎明机器是艾格勒赠予刻法勒的礼物，对么？
Lord Phainon, in Amphoreus's mythology, isn't the Dawn Device said to be a gift from Aquila to Kephale?
如果火种给你留下的消息属实，奥赫玛失去了黎明机器的加护……
If the Coreflame's message is true, Okhema has lost the Dawn Device's protection...
数日之前，奥赫玛的「昏光庭院」……
A few days ago, in Okhema's "Twilight Courtyard"...
克莱门汀小姐的医术，很厉害哦——*我们*也觉得，你一定能担得起昏光庭院的牌面！
Miss Clementine's medical skills are amazing! We believe you'll make the Twilight Courtyard proud!
其实…我并不是对事事都有自信哦，克莱门汀。
Honestly... I'm not confident about everything, Clementine.
谢谢你，克莱门汀！
Thank you, Clementine!
我之前一直留在树庭助讲，没什么机会来奥赫玛…大家都已熟记于心的语句，对我来说还十分陌生。
I've always been at the Grove helping with lectures and never had the chance to come to Okhema... The phrases everyone has memorized still feel unfamiliar to me.
奥赫玛危在旦夕，我必须尽快扛起半神的职责，以天空的力量庇佑大家。
Okhema is on the brink, and I must quickly embrace the role of demigod to protect everyone with the power of the Sky.
燃烧的天空、破碎的巨像，还有尸横遍野…糟透了。如果这就是「翁法罗斯」内部的样貌，那确实叫人意外。
Burning skies, shattered statues, corpses strewn everywhere... What a mess. If this is what the inside of "Amphoreus" looks like, it's truly shocking.
既然如此，黑塔。我对「翁法罗斯」世界本质的猜想，你是否也有足够的理由相信了？
If that's the case, Herta, do you now have enough reason to believe my conjecture about the true nature of "Amphoreus"?
不如再附加一个任务目标：玩牌的忆者告诉我，那结了冰的开拓小姑娘，很可能也被困在了翁法罗斯内部。
Why not add another mission objective while we're at it: The card-playing Memokeeper told me that the frozen Trailblazer girl might just also be trapped inside Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯悲剧的源头……
The source of Amphoreus' tragedy...
它们象征着翁法罗斯的十二位神灵：这个世界的命运、支柱、生灵和灾祸。
They embody the twelve Amphorean deities: Fate, Foundation, Creations, and Calamity of this world.
而继承其位的半神——不死的迈德漠斯，选择独自背负悬锋之名，还乡代冠，将其身化作圣城的最后一道防线。
And its demigod successor, the undying Mydeimos, chose to bear the title of Kremnos alone, returning home to be crowned as the last line of defense for the holy city.
万敌，愿你战无不胜。
Mydei, may your battles know no defeat.
不久前，树庭贤人之首与你们相伴，将黑潮中步出的残虐威胁斥回。
Not long ago, the head of the Grove Sages helped you repel the menace that is the black tide.
「盗火行者」…
It's the Flame Reaver...
这是…是那「盗火行者」的斗篷？！它怎么会在这里……
Could this be from... the Flame Reaver's cloak!? Why is it here?
这家伙，精神错乱了。
The Flame Reaver's gone mad. The end.
别生气呀，整这一出只是为了给你们提个醒，翁法罗斯可一点都不安全，全是流窜的威胁，包括那个黑衣剑客…不管在哪里都要提高警惕！

C'mon, don't be upset. I'm just giving you a kind reminder that Amphoreus isn't safe at all. The whole place is full of dangers, including that swordmaster... Make sure you stay on your toes, no matter where you are!
所以，那「盗火行者」是赛飞儿小姐的伪装？骗术？像真的一样…这就是「诡计」半神的力量？
So... was that a Flame Reaver disguise? Or a magic trick? It looked so real... Is that the power of the Trickery demigod?
打个比方，刚才，你们认出那块碎布是盗火行者的东西以后，心里想的是什么?
For example, what did you think when you realized that piece of cloth came from the Flame Reaver's cloak?
嗯…「难道盗火行者在这附近」？
Hmm... We thought that maybe the Flame Reaver was around here somewhere?
「糟了…一定是盗火行者来了」？
Well, we thought it must be the Flame Reaver coming this way...?
嚯…你可真受欢迎啊。但凡事讲究先来后到，先陪我搞定宝贝的事，我再送你俩去树庭呗？
Heh, aren't you a popular one? But I got to you first, so help me with the treasures, and then I'll send you two to the Grove.
遐蝶成功炼成死龙•玻吕刻斯，并利用它回到冥界见到「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯，并将泰坦火种与夺走的未来悉数归还，翁法罗斯的生死流转重归有序。

Castorice successfully recreated the Netherwing, Pollux, via alchemy and used its power to return to the nether realm, where she faced Thanatos the Death Titan. She returned both the Titan's Coreflame and the stolen future, restoring the cycle of life and death in Amphoreus.
奥赫玛人尊重智慧，渴望知识。若满城公民都知晓了二位的来历，想必会有更多人对「开拓」产生兴致——可惜对「天外之界」的探讨至今仍是禁忌。

Okhemans hold wisdom and knowledge in high esteem. If the citizens knew of your origins, I'm sure more would be intrigued by "the Trailblaze." Sadly, discussions about the "world beyond the sky" remain taboo.
阁下不必自咎。令翁法罗斯众多学者费神千年的难题，即便您天资过人，也不可能于一朝一夕间得到解答。
Don't be too hard on yourself, my lord. This puzzle has stumped Amphoreus's scholars for centuries. It isn't something you can solve overnight... even someone as gifted as yourself.
在树庭，我找到许多有关天空泰坦的研究，也了解到翁法罗斯的学者大多把「天外之界」的禁忌归结于艾格勒降下的诅咒。
In the Grove, I discovered extensive research on the Sky Titan. It appears that many scholars from Amphoreus believe the taboo against the "world beyond the sky" stems from a curse cast by Aquila.
正是。在翁法罗斯的十二位泰坦神明中，艾格勒是最为阴晴不定的一位。
Exactly. Of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus, Aquila is known for being the most capricious.
假设，丹恒阁下，我能为两位开辟一条脱离翁法罗斯的通路，且能绕过艾格勒的神罚……
Hypothetically, Lord Dan Heng, if I could open up a path out of Amphoreus that circumvents Aquila's divine punishment...
与此同时，在神悟树庭……
Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...
还好有哈托努斯这个翁法罗斯最一流的铁匠。
It's a good thing Chartonus is the finest blacksmith in Amphoreus.
今时不同往日，我肩负之物…无比珍贵，也无比脆弱。我为翁法罗斯的明日而挥剑，因此决不允许自己再被仇恨蒙蔽，有失职责。
Times have changed. The responsibility I bear is both precious and fragile. I wield my sword for the future of Amphoreus. I will not let hatred cloud my judgment again and neglect my duties.
好主意！…不过，那以后再来树庭就没盼头了。
Great idea! However, that would mean no more reasons to visit the Grove.
看来树庭的学者们在深奥的学术探讨之余，也没忘了自己的小爱好。那么，你要翻阅哪篇读物呢？
It seems that the scholars of the Grove, amidst their profound academic discussions, haven't forgotten their little hobbies. So, which reading material will you peruse?
…如果是后者，那盗火行者得负全责。
...If it were the latter, the Flame Reaver is fully responsible.
不过现在的翁法罗斯，好像也没有可以钓鱼的地方？
But then again, are there even any spots left to fish in Amphoreus these days?
在聊什么好东西呢？这是…《翁法罗斯占卜全书》？
What're you guys chatting about? Is this... the Amphoreus Divination Compendium?
要是占卜结果里提到的吉兆都是真实的…那我的家乡，哀丽秘榭，也就不会消失了。
If the good omens foretold by divination were true... my hometown, Aedes Elysiae, wouldn't have disappeared.
呵…竟然能直接叫出我们的名字，看来你对翁法罗斯遗落的历史也颇有研究啊，白厄阁下。
Ha... To directly call us by our name, it seems you, Lord Phainon, have studied the forgotten history of Amphoreus quite thoroughly.
能劳烦你把这段野史作者的姓名透露给我么，白厄阁下？我可不希望奥赫玛纯真的孩子们，被这家伙的春秋笔法荼毒啊。
Could you disclose the name of the author behind this popular legend, Lord Phainon? I'd hate for the innocent children of Okhema to be tainted by such slanted narratives.
…啊，这不就想起来啦！《悬锋与苍穹》，第三卷第五节——
...Ah, now we remember! Kremnos and the Firmament, Volume 3, Section 5 —
「最后，继承了阳雷骑士塞涅俄丝血脉的一族被瑟希斯的学者们接纳，并在树庭建立起了昏光庭院……」
"Finally, those descended from Seliose the Daythunder Knight were welcomed by the scholars under Cerces and established the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove..."
这…怎么会这样？我一直以为，有阿格莱雅大人在，奥赫玛一直都很安定祥和……
How can this be? I always thought that with Lady Aglaea here, Okhema would remain peaceful...
…克莱门汀？你…别着急，快先喘口气！
...Clementine? Take a breath... What's going on?
建立它的目的，原本是为了纪念那第一次逐火之旅，为了追忆于千年前为翁法罗斯做出重大牺牲的英雄们。
Its purpose was to commemorate the first Flame-Chase Journey, and to remember the heroes who made great sacrifices for Amphoreus a millennium ago.
我早说了，如今你不但痴盲，而且昏聩。近些日子，你对奥赫玛的掌控变弱了。
Like I said, you're not only blind but deaf too. Lately, your control over Okhema has weakened.
翁法罗斯最会撒谎的女人，也被那个阿格莱雅给骗了，桀桀桀！
You're Amphoreus's most cunning liar, and even you were fooled by Aglaea — hehehe!
哎呀，瞧瞧这紫色水晶的透亮程度…正好跟我的肤色绝配！赛飞儿大姐头，你果真是全翁法罗斯审美最顶级的侠盗！
Look at the clarity of this purple crystal... It matches my skin tone perfectly! Cipher, Cipher, you truly have the most refined taste of all the thieves in Amphoreus!
哎呀…这看上去可真够惨的。你觉得他们成功逃到奥赫玛了吗？
Oh... this looks tragic. Do you think they made it to Okhema?
八成没有。我在奥赫玛从没见过斯缇科西亚出身的家伙，连听都没听说过。
Probably not. I've never seen or heard of anyone from Styxia in Okhema.
呵，想想还真是不公平呀。仅仅是因为生错了地方，就得承受这样的灭顶之灾…反倒是那些奥赫玛人，只因为背靠负世泰坦，所以能一直维系到现在……

Heh, it does seem unfair, doesn't it? Just because they were born in the wrong place, they had to face such... devastation. Meanwhile, those in Okhema, simply because they're supported by the Worldbearing Titan, continue to survive...
「回奥赫玛来吧，我请求你。若没有你，他们将无法赢得抗争。」
"Please, come back to Okhema. I'm begging you. Without you, they don't stand a chance."
但我奉劝你们永远别再靠近奥赫玛，否则，愤怒的民众将把你们撕成碎片。
Stay away from Okhema forever. If you set foot there again, the fury of its people will tear you apart.
滚吧，别再出现在我们面前。转告你们身后的主子，想阻止逐火之旅，她最好集结一支比鼎盛时的悬锋更雄壮的军队。
Get out of here. Don't show your face around us again. If your master wants to stop the Flame-Chase Journey, she'd better bring an army that makes Kremnos at its peak look like child's play.
一切照常。我先给缇宝老师传信，让她尽力安抚公民。我们快马加鞭赶回奥赫玛，去确认城里的状况。假如中途再撞见拦路的敌人……

Stay on course. I'll contact Tribbie and ask her to keep the citizens calm. We'll hurry back to Okhema as fast as possible and assess the situation in the city. If we run into any enemies along the way...
针对泰坦发明，悬锋的铸魂技术。虽能保留神性…但会彻底过滤，人性的残余。
Invented for the Titans, Kremnos's Soul-Forging technology was. Though divinity it retains, filtered out, the remnants of humanity will be.
在树庭出现的家伙，还有在重渊和丹恒对峙的那些，都没有立刻诉诸暴力，只是监视和威慑。
The ones who appeared in the Grove, and those who confronted Dan Heng in the Abyss, didn't immediately resort to violence. They were just watching and trying to intimidate.
我会留在这里，带领卫士维持治安。你们就去弄清这起事情的原委吧——但别花太久，阿格莱雅已逝，必须有人代替她引领奥赫玛。
I'll stay here to lead the guards and maintain order. Find out what happened — but don't take too long. With Aglaea gone, someone has to take her place and lead Okhema.
你远赴树庭是为了让自己变得强大，强大到能对付威胁到奥赫玛的敌人。你没做错任何事，千万不要苛责自己呀。
You went to the Grove to prepare yourself for the threats to Okhema. You didn't do anything wrong, so don't be hard on yourself.
我知道阿格莱雅对我的期望。当下，奥赫玛最不需要的就是一个自怨自艾的引路人。
I know what Aglaea expected of me. Right now, the last thing Okhema needs is a leader wallowing in self-pity.
冲天的火光也许会令人们混乱、畏惧，但我并不担心他们会迷失方向。因为奥赫玛还有你在，白厄。
The blaze soaring into the sky might sow fear and confusion, but I have no worries about people losing their way. After all, Okhema still has you to guide them, Phainon.
你是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。
You are the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.
请他们告诉每个人，凡是对圣城的未来和逐火之旅心存顾虑的公民，都应该来参加这次集会。告诉他们，阿格莱雅将希望的种子留给了翁法罗斯。
Urge everyone who has concerns about the holy city's future and the Flame-Chase Journey to attend this gathering. Tell them Aglaea has left Amphoreus the seeds of hope.
谢谢你，哈托努斯——我会用这把长剑守护翁法罗斯的生灵。
Thank you, Chartonus. I will use this sword to protect the beings of Amphoreus.
他会站出来引领奥赫玛么？
Will he step up to lead Okhema?
请允许我见证：哪怕失去了「浪漫」的神权，奥赫玛仍会是末世中的理想乡。在这里，居住着阿格莱雅所期待的、神谕中的新世界所期待的……

Let me bear witness: Even without the divine authority of Romance, Okhema will remain a sanctuary in these end times. A place for the kind people Aglaea dreamed of, the kind of people foretold in prophecy...
距离翁法罗斯的新生还有一段长路。但我们不会在前进时遗忘过去，因为翁法罗斯的记忆总能造福后人。
There's still a long way to go before Amphoreus is reborn. But we will not forget the past as we move forward, for the memories of Amphoreus will always benefit future generations.
…她是奥赫玛的改衣师，黄金裔的领袖，「金织」阿格莱雅。而她这一生最大的壮举——
...She was Okhema's dressmaker, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, the Goldweaver Aglaea. And her greatest feat —
咱们之间又不是生离死别，你只是去悬锋城看门了而已，就别掺和这么催人泪下的场合了。
We aren't parting ways forever. You're just off to guard the gates at Castrum Kremnos. Let's not make this a tearful farewell.
回头见，哀丽秘榭的白厄。
See you around, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.
约好了，迈德漠斯。
It's a date, Mydeimos.
奥赫玛有没有什么稀罕的宝贝，是连你…唔…连我们的店里都没有的？
Does Okhema have any treasures so rare that not even your... I mean, our shop, has seen?
那就来说些你不知道的事吧。「盗火行者」——据我观察，那家伙可是对奥赫玛虎视眈眈哪。
Then let me tell you something you don't know. The Flame Reaver — they've been watching Okhema closely.
那家伙是像条疯狗一样丧失理智，但它绝对不是傻子。你猜它为什么一直没对奥赫玛出手？
That lunatic may have lost their mind, but they're no fool. Why do you think they haven't made a move on Okhema yet?
告诉你吧，那家伙之所以没有贸然进攻奥赫玛——多半是因为裁缝女织成的防御网比你们想象中的还要坚固。
Allow me to let you in on the actual secret. They probably held off from attacking Okhema because the seamstress's defense network was way tougher than you thought.
感激不尽。那盗火者实力莫测，请务必小心。
You have my deepest gratitude. That Flame Reaver's power is truly unfathomable. Please be careful.
与此同时，在神悟树庭……
Meanwhile, in the Grove of Epiphany...
自从树庭遭到黑潮破坏，我就一直想尽量远离这里，远离可能让人感伤的回忆。
I've been trying to stay away from here since the black tide destroyed the Grove... And through that, stay away from the memories that might make me sad.
先祖们，请稍等我片刻吧。我在树庭留下的回忆…值得花上一些时间来缅怀。
O ancestors, please wait for just a bit longer. The time I spent in the Grove... deserves some reminiscence.
…以上，就是你们在树庭的最后一堂课了。
...And that was your last lesson in the Grove.
从今往后，你们都有各自的路要走。从这里学去的知识能帮上多少忙，全看几位参悟的本领。
Now, each of you will head off on your own path. How much the Grove's teachings can help you in the real world depends on how well you can put knowledge into practice.
尽喜欢耍小聪明和嘴皮功夫——哀丽秘榭的白厄，扣一个学分！
All you do every day is wag that sharp tongue of yours — That's a credit deduction, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae!
根据树庭的讲义规范，授课教师在最后一个课时的结尾，应当「与学生畅谈卒业后之理想，引导学生走上妥实之道路。」

According to the Grove's protocols for a cohort's final class, the lecturer should take some time in that lesson to "discuss the students' post-graduation aspirations with them and guide them toward a solid path."
我看某些人的表达欲如此旺盛…不妨由你先来，哀丽秘榭的白厄——提问：你的理想是什么？
Since some of you are so eager to speak, why don't we start with you, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae? What is your post-graduation aspiration?
没想到又在树庭见面了。白厄说你在为征伐艾格勒作准备，莫非……
I didn't expect to see you again in the Grove. Phainon mentioned you were gearing up for the campaign against Aquila. Are you here to...
只有这样，地上的生灵才能创造出通往天空的彩虹桥。而我要寻访的第一位先祖，他的灵魂就驻留在树庭。
That's the only way for creatures on earth to forge the rainbow bridge to the sky, and the soul of the first ancestor I want to see is here in the Grove.
我也有此意。树庭现在危机四伏，多一个人就多了一层保障。
I was thinking the same thing. The Grove is fraught with danger right now, and an extra pair of hands translates to extra security.
下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?
和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.
下一位要去拜访的先祖…据说她的英魂留在了创世涡心。可惜仪式必须按顺序进行，要搭伙回奥赫玛吗，丹宝？
Now, the next ancestor on the list... her spirit is said to rest in the Vortex of Genesis. A pity that the ceremony has to be performed in strict order. Shall we head back to Okhema together, Dannie?
和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.
好不容易回来奥赫玛一趟，你本可以好好休息一阵的，我们一起叙叙旧……
It's been ages since you were last in Okhema. You could've taken some time to rest, and we could've caught up...
不能以貌取人呀，飞儿。小风堇在她的领域可是很厉害的专家哦，整个翁法罗斯都没有比她更靠谱的医师啦。
Don't judge a book by its cover, Ciphy. Cinny is a master of her craft. She's the most skilled and dependable physician in all of Amphoreus.
她一直都是那样啦，别在意。不管怎样，飞儿她愿意回来奥赫玛帮忙…实在是太好了。
Don't worry. She's always been like that... It's good to have her back in Okhema lending a hand.
走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.
呵…同为翁法罗斯的支柱，没想到「天空」的宿命要等到千年之后才能完满啊。
Heh... Who would've thought, as a fellow pillar of Amphoreus, the Sky's duty could only be fulfilled after a thousand years?
走吧，该回树庭去了…不能让丹宝和小伊卡担心呀。
Alright, time to head back to the Grove... I shouldn't keep Dannie and Little Ica waiting.
最后一站的目的地，是万敌阁下的故乡——悬锋城。
Our final stop is Lord Mydei's home — Castrum Kremnos.
悬锋城……
Castrum Kremnos...
万敌阁下在这里孤身对抗黑潮，日复一日…我有些担心他的状态。
Lord Mydei has been fighting the black tide here alone day after day... I'm worried about him.
他此前还以惊雷捎来消息，要我们提防盗火行者的行动。
He sent a message earlier, carried by thunder, warning us to watch out for the Flame Reaver's actions.
假如翁法罗斯与天外的隔绝的确是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}降下的诅咒，那今天过后，你们就能重返家园了。
If the curse separating Amphoreus from the world beyond the sky is truly {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s doing, then you'll be able to return home after their fall.
请打倒冷漠的{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}晨昏之眼{RUBY_E#}，还翁法罗斯一片仁爱的天空吧。
Please defeat the indifferent {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#}, and restore a compassionate sky to Amphoreus.
她也是奥赫玛，乃至整个翁法罗斯的骄傲。另外……
She's not just the pride of Okhema, but all of Amphoreus as well. And furthermore...
刚才那句话就是我发自内心的赞许，{NICKNAME}。要是那时我没有听从自己的直觉，信任你和丹恒，奥赫玛现在不知道会变成什么模样……
That praise was heartfelt, {NICKNAME}. Had I not trusted my instincts and put my faith in you and Dan Heng, it's hard to imagine what might have become of Okh-
风堇姐姐！愿迈德漠斯捍卫你！
Miss Hyacine! May Mydeimos protect you!
根据史料记载：信仰艾格勒的文明掌握着先进的科技。加上地理位置占优，天空之城是黄金战争中唯一能与悬锋城正面对抗的势力。

According to historical records, the civilization that worshiped Aquila once mastered advanced technology, which made their strategically located Sky Castrum the only force that could face Castrum Kremnos head-on in the Chrysos War.
但她没能终结艾格勒，归还「天空」的火种。有人说，她以自身封印了神明的怒火，将它囚禁在晨昏之眼深处，永世支撑翁法罗斯的苍穹。

Yet she still could not end Aquila nor bring back the Coreflame of Sky. Some say she sealed the wrath of the god within herself, trapping them deep within the Eye of Twilight to support the heavens of Amphoreus forever.
在天空城邦的习俗中，它连接着翁法罗斯的天幕，天象画壁呈现出的气候，将会转映为现实中的天气。
The Sky city believes that mural to be connected to Amphoreus's sky, and any weather condition depicted on it will become actual weather.
这么做，不会对奥赫玛产生影响么？
Wouldn't this affect Okhema?
不必担心，恐怕天象画壁早已失去了以前的作用。奥赫玛的白天，倚仗的也是刻法勒背上的黎明机器。
Don't worry. The mural probably lost its original function ages ago. Okhema's light comes from the Dawn Device shouldered by Kephale anyway.
我直面过天空的暴君，它的怒火足以熔化天穹——并非夸大其词，因为翁法罗斯的苍天即是它的权柄。
I have faced down the tyrant of the sky. It is no hyperbole that their raging fire is capable of melting the firmament. Amphoreus's heavens exist because of their authority.
好像和我翻阅过的所有翁法罗斯神话，都联系不起来。
It doesn't seem to match any of the Amphorean myths I've read.
据我们所知，正是艾格勒对世间降下了诅咒，禁止翁法罗斯人触碰天空之外的世界。
As far as we know, it was Aquila that placed the curse on this world, preventing Amphoreans from ever reaching the realm beyond the sky.
也许对神话的解读是错误的…想阻止翁法罗斯人接触天外之界的，可能另有其人。
Perhaps the interpretation of the myth is inaccurate... It might be someone else who seeks to prevent Amphoreans from reaching the world beyond the sky.
他们退化成了失去理性，同类相残的兽。不…这种说法是对兽性的侮辱。即便在翁法罗斯最荒蛮的山林间，我和索拉比斯亦从未目睹过那般疯狂。

They regressed into senseless beasts that devoured their own kin. No... that would be an insult to beasts. Solabis and I have never witnessed such madness, not even in the wildest corners of Amphoreus.
为了阻止艾格勒将整个翁法罗斯的天幕作为武器砸向大地，英雄塞涅俄丝选择牺牲自己，封印泰坦……
To prevent Aquila from using the sky of Amphoreus as a weapon to crush the earth, the hero Seliose chose to sacrifice herself, sealing the Titan in the process...
而且，*我们*和姐妹们之所以会离开雅努萨波利斯，就是为了给翁法罗斯带去希望和奇迹。而要把奇迹带入现实，光靠*我们*的力量可远远不够呀。
The reason we left Janusopolis was to bring hope and miracles to Amphoreus. But to turn those miracles into reality, our strength alone won't be enough.
奥赫玛的黎明…落幕了……
Okhema's Dawn has come to an end...
这…就是奥赫玛的末日吗……
Is this... the end for Okhema...?
意外才是我们旅途中的常量，无论如何，我们会陪奥赫玛走到最后关头。
The unexpected is always part of our journey. We'll stay with Okhema until the end, no matter what.
抱歉，阿格莱雅…我答应过你，要把「再创世」的选择留给翁法罗斯的人们……
Apologies, Aglaea... I promised you that I would leave the choice of Era Nova to the people of Amphoreus...
就在刚才，我们离开晨昏之眼以后…我感觉翁法罗斯的水体和我切断了联系。
Just now, after we left the Eye of Twilight... I felt the waters of Amphoreus severing their connection with me.
盗火行者……
The Flame Reaver...
若是如此，那你本应站在黄金裔身旁！为何要阻挠我们，「盗火行者」？
If so, you should be standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs! Why do you hinder us, "Flame Reaver"?
还远没到放松的时候…那盗火行者精通各种诡术，就算是万敌也不一定能限制住它的行动。
It's too early to relax... The Flame Reaver is a master in the art of deceit. Even Mydei may not be able to restrain them.
缇宝没有跟来…她是打算留在上层帮助万敌么？
Tribbie didn't follow us... Does she intend to stay above to help Mydei?
恐怕这就是翁法罗斯的末世了，哈托努斯。只有一个办法能拯救家园……
I fear this is Amphoreus's end, Chartonus. There is only one way to save our home...
嗯…记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间。哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往世的痕迹。
Yes... the textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus. Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.
记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间…哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往事的痕迹。
The textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus... Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.
难不成，万敌……
Don't tell me that Mydei...
前方不知是否还有盗火行者的分身…{NICKNAME}，护在白厄身边吧，以保不备。
We don't know if the Flame Reaver has any clones up ahead... {NICKNAME}, stay close to Phainon and keep him safe.
翁法罗斯人总把「宿命」挂在嘴边…那「开拓」的宿命，就是总会把每个世界的存亡与我们自身系在一起。
Amphoreans often speak of "destiny"... The destiny of the Trailblaze is to bind the life and death of every world to our own existence.
盗火行者在城内作乱，他还有诸多分身——泽弗，请找人通知克拉特鲁斯，让他带着最精英的卫士守在城内的关口——
The Flame Reaver is wreaking havoc in the city, and they still have many clones. Zeph, please get someone to inform Krateros, and have him lead the most elite guards to defend the city's passages...
征伐艾格勒以前，我做了最坏的准备。即便奥赫玛终有一日会被黑潮攻陷……
I prepared for the worst before the fight against Aquila. Even if there came a day when Okhema was taken by the black tide...
而在第二个故事里，丹恒和我讲到了那几位为「监狱星」付出了生命的无名客。我很清楚，你们两个甘愿为翁法罗斯做出同样的选择。
In the second story, Dan Heng told me about the few Nameless who sacrificed their lives for the "prison world." I know very well that the two of you are willing to make the same choice for Amphoreus.
我绝不会让你们的旅途在这里画上句号，{NICKNAME}。在翁法罗斯人从未触及的天外，还有很多人在等着你们回家。
I won't let your journey end here, {NICKNAME}. Somewhere beyond the sky, where Amphoreans have never reached, there are many people waiting for you to come home.
缇宁大人的百界门就开在奥赫玛的城外大道，{NICKNAME}阁下。
Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is open on the main street outside Okhema's walls, {NICKNAME}.
奥赫玛的夜幕降临时…所有的灵水也都随之枯涸了。*我们*猜到你会着急，所以才提前来这里等着。
When Okhema's night descended... all the spirit water dried up along with it. We anticipated that you'd be on edge, so we came ahead to wait for you.
巴特鲁斯…小白还不知道奥赫玛永昼的真相。
Bartholos... Snowy still doesn't know the truth behind Okhema's eternal daylight.
赛法利娅那丫头，用一个伟大的谎言骗过了整个翁法罗斯——
That girl, Cifera, spun a grand lie that deceived all of Amphoreus...
她骗过了你们所有人，让你们相信刻法勒背上那个大球会永远照亮奥赫玛……
She tricked all of you into believing that that giant ball on Kephale's back would cast light over Okhema forever...
所以，千年以来…维系奥赫玛永昼的并非刻法勒的神迹，而是赛飞儿以「诡计」的神权编织的谎言……
So, for the last thousand years... what maintained Okhema's eternal daylight was not Kephale's miracle, but Cipher's lie woven using the divine authority of Trickery...
桀桀桀…看来你的机灵程度也有限呀，小鬼。别忘了，本大爷可是翁法罗斯的十二泰坦之一……
Heeheehee... Guess you're not as smart as I thought, brat. Don't forget. I am one of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus...
记好咯——拯救了翁法罗斯的，不是刻法勒那个呆子的恩泽，也不是欧洛尼斯那个娃娃的呓语……
Remember this well... What saved Amphoreus wasn't the grace of that simpleton Kephale, nor was it the babbling of that child Oronyx...
为、为什么？！人家以为奥赫玛是安全的！
Wh—Why!? I thought Okhema was safe!
随着「理性」与「死亡」的火种得到归还，眼下还需讨伐的泰坦只剩下{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。白厄委托我们复现时空，反复挑战盗火行者磨练自身。逐火之旅成功在即，圣城却异变突生……

Following the return of the Coreflames of Reason and Death, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the only Titan that we still need to campaign against. Phainon asks us to recreate the past, and he repeatedly challenges the Flame Reaver to hone his abilities. The Flame-Chase Journey's triumphant conclusion draws nigh, yet a sudden disturbance occurs in the holy city...
与此同时，赛飞儿在龙骸古城与循火种而来的盗火行者周旋许久，最终不敌遭其杀害。但她早已设计将刻法勒火种交予贼灵巴特鲁斯，命它伺机将火种交付白厄等人。

At the same time in the city of the dead dragon's bones, Cipher contends with the Flame Reaver who comes seeking the Coreflame. Though she holds out for some time, she is no match and is slain in the end. But she had already given Kephale's Coreflame to Spirithief Bartholos, ordering them to wait for an opportunity to deliver the Coreflame to Phainon and the others.
伴随着赛飞儿的离去，「诡计」神力消散，因其谎言得以维续的奥赫玛千年黎明结束了。圣城遭到黑潮无情入侵，强大的盗火行者也步步紧逼。

Following Cipher's death, the divine power of Trickery dissipates, and the thousand-year dawn of Okhema that is sustained by her lie comes to an end. The holy city is met with the merciless invasion of the black tide, as the powerful Flame Reaver moves in ever closer.
盗火行者没有追来…真的是某种奇迹显灵了么？
The Flame Reaver isn't pursuing us... Could this really be some kind of divine intervention?
请您放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。黑塔女士同我正是为了翁法罗斯而来。
Rest assured, {NICKNAME}. Madam Herta and I have come here for the sake of Amphoreus.
两位所在之地，翁法罗斯，是一个由数据和忆质构建的世界，一位星神的实验场。
The place where you stand, Amphoreus, is a world constructed from data and memoria, an experimental field of a certain Aeon.
结论：假如放任翁法罗斯的进程不受限制地推移……
Conclusion: If Amphoreus continues unchecked on this course...
略去个中繁杂的推演，我向二位提出请求：为阻止「毁灭」的怒火席卷寰宇，恳请一位无名客能留在翁法罗斯，承担内应。

Putting aside the complex details of the inferences involved, I have a request to make, for one of you Nameless, to stay behind on Amphoreus, acting as an informant, in order to prevent the wrath of Destruction from ravaging the cosmos.
如果和那位机器先生说的一样，翁法罗斯注定会走向「毁灭」的结局…那人家也要陪伴在你身边，直到最后一刻。
If what that machine gentleman said is true, if Amphoreus is destined for destruction... then I'll stay by your side until the very end.
毕竟，就像列车之于你和丹恒…翁法罗斯也是人家的故乡呀。
Like how you and Dan Heng treasure the Express... Amphoreus means everything to me.
告诉我：{NICKNAME}能不为翁法罗斯的规则制约，平安返回{F#她}{M#他}的家乡。
Promise me {NICKNAME} can return safely to {M#his}{F#her} homeland, unbound by Amphoreus's laws.
以神礼观众之名，我见到：翁法罗斯已选择了她的命运。
As the Theoros, I declare: Amphoreus has determined her path.
请允许我重新自我介绍：我名为吕枯耳戈斯，过去是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老。身为「神礼观众」，我将见证并捍卫奥赫玛全体公民自由，直到最后一刻。
Allow me to reintroduce myself. I am Lycurgus, once an honored elder of the Okhema Council. As the Theoros, I have sworn to watch over and protect every citizen of Okhema until the very end.
当然，我知道仅是这样的回答不能满足阁下的好奇心。因此，我愿附上这样一条信息——它对翁法罗斯而言并无价值，但对您这样的天外行者则意义重大。
Of course, that alone won't satisfy your curiosity. So let me share something more... something that means little to Amphoreus, but everything to a traveler like yourself.
吕枯耳戈斯是万千「智识」行者的一员：它代博识尊将目光投向此地，以免翁法罗斯落入衰败的命运。
I, Lycurgus, am one of the Erudition's many pathstriders. Through me, Nous keeps watch over this realm, working to save Amphoreus from decay.
那过去的，我已如实陈述；那未来的，我将公平见证。对于神礼观众之名，还有翁法罗斯和她的命运，我问心无愧。
What's done, I've told truthfully. What's to come, I'll witness fairly. My conscience is clear... to my role as the Theoros, to Amphoreus and her destiny.
你熟悉的阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，也提出过类似的观点：翁法罗斯的一切，都是凭借「智种」在后人的记忆中诞生。
As your acquaintance Lord Anaxagoras suggested: everything in Amphoreus exists through Nouspores, living in the memories of those yet to come.
当然，我不准备探讨树庭的哲学，不妨把视线投向更远处吧。超脱于翁法罗斯，那被世人称作禁忌的天外……
But let's set aside the Grove's teachings for now, look further, past Amphoreus, to what they call the forbidden realms beyond the sky...
呵呵，这下您终于要踏入「翁法罗斯」的真相了。
Now, we come to the real truth of Amphoreus.
请相信他拯救奥赫玛的决心。
Believe in his resolve to save Okhema.
如何？阁下所见的风景，正是背负{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}火种的无名英雄的故乡：哀丽秘榭。
Beautiful, isn't it? This is Aedes Elysiae, home of the nameless hero who carried {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.
扮作贯穿白厄一生中最重要的伙伴，一位始终指引其前进、却不曾在翁法罗斯历史中留名的「无名英雄」，在最佳位置欣赏这段旅程。

Become his lifelong closest friend, witnessing his hero's journey from the best seat in the house, as the nameless hero whose unwavering guidance shaped Phainon's destiny, yet whose name was never recorded in Amphoreus's history.
孩子总是幸福的，觉得神明注意不到哀丽秘榭的小角落，会对我们睁一只眼、闭一只眼……
Ah, the blessing of childhood. Believing the gods might not notice our little corner of Aedes Elysiae, willing to let our small deceits slide...
哀丽秘榭的小校舍只有您一位老师，是太辛苦了。
With you being our only teacher in Aedes Elysiae, you must be working so hard.
还以为扔到海水里的许愿瓶，能把我们的心愿带到哀丽秘榭外面的世界，或者能带来一些回音……
You know what's funny? I really thought tossing that bottle into the sea would carry our wishes beyond Aedes Elysiae... maybe even bring something back to us...
要说哀丽秘榭最让人留恋的地方，除了大树下的秋千架，就是这儿了。
You know, besides the swing under the big tree, this has to be my favorite spot in all of Aedes Elysiae.
被连绵的山和海包围的哀丽秘榭，小时候还在纸上画过这里的风景。
I remember drawing Aedes Elysiae as a child, nestled between the sea and the mountains.
不过，占卜的次数多了，反倒会对命运产生迷茫。说着对神谕笃信不疑，但真要离开哀丽秘榭的话……
But here's the thing. The more divinations I do, the more doubt creeps in. I want to believe the prophecies, but actually leaving Aedes Elysiae...
你是说，「迷路迷境」里的…？
The ones from Membrance Maze, you mean?
迷路迷境？
The Membrance Maze?
只要沿着树洞爬一小段距离，穿过最狭窄的地方，就到它们的栖息地「迷路迷境」啦。
Once you get through the tight squeeze in the hollow, you'll reach their dwelling, the Membrance Maze.
不如担心一下，自己会不会被小妖精们拒绝吧。毕竟，迷路迷境实行的是「邀请制」，只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入呢。
Maybe worry more about whether the fairies will let you in! After all the Membrance Maze has an "invitation-only" rule, only children with pure hearts are welcomed.
「迷路迷境的最深处，揭晓未来答案的地方。」
"In Membrance Maze depths we seek to find, the answers future left behind."
粉色…在我印象里，迷路迷境似乎从来没有过粉色的妖精，不知道多哆啦迷有没有见过？
Pink ones? That's strange. I don't recall any pink fairies in the Membrance Maze. Have you seen any, Chief Dolimem?
…就不得不取消了。如果灾难将至，我们还是留在哀丽秘榭为好，以防万一。
...will have to be cancelled. If disaster's coming, we should stay in Aedes Elysiae, just to be safe.
我和白厄本来只打算离开村子一小段时间，学些本领回来。他要去悬锋城锻炼，我打算去雅努萨波利斯，接受命运泰坦的洗礼……
We weren't planning to be gone for long... just enough time to hone our abilities. Phainon would train in Castrum Kremnos, while I would seek the Fate Titans' blessing in Janusopolis...
学成之后，我们就回哀丽秘榭，保护村子的和平不受侵扰。
Then we'd return to Aedes Elysiae, to help keep our village safe.
哀丽秘榭离流血的世界太远了…这种传奇故事，实在无法不引人遐想啊。
Stories of such bloodshed like this feel so distant from Aedes Elysiae... but they sure can stir the imagination.
小小的哀丽秘榭，一昔之间降临了无数或尊贵、或传奇的人物：织者、门匠、君王、羁客、侍女、医师、学士……
The sleepy village of Aedes Elysiae in just one fleeting moment, welcomed an array of legendary figures: the Weaver, Gatekeeper, Ruler, Traveler, Servant, Healer, and Scholar...
他们的话语，和那言语中逐一流露的「心愿」，为哀丽秘榭出身的少年勾勒出对外界最初的想象。
Their stories and wishes showed the village boy glimpses of a world larger than he'd ever imagined.
这群丑陋的虫豸，不配假借着「人治」的名头再出现在奥赫玛了。
These crawling parasites have no place in Okhema, especially not under the deceitful claim of "human rule."
树庭女孩呢？
What about our friend from the Grove?
我也是这样想的，这些心愿…并不是沉重的东西，相反，像哀丽秘榭的孩子们喜欢的糖果纸，在有阳光的地方更加闪闪发亮。
I can't disagree with you. These wishes aren't weights to bear. They're like those candy wrappers the Aedes Elysiae children love, shining even brighter when bathed in sunlight.
刚才您不是说，翁法罗斯大灾将至吗？倘若如此，我和昔涟应该会一直留在哀丽秘榭才对，又怎会与形形色色的人相遇？
Didn't you say disaster would strike Amphoreus? If so, shouldn't Cyrene and I stay in Aedes Elysiae? How could we possibly meet all these people?
或许是他们来到了哀丽秘榭。
Perhaps they'll come to Aedes Elysiae?
如果是这样的话，那…哀丽秘榭的大家该由谁来保护呢？
If that's true, then... who will protect everyone in Aedes Elysiae?
您、您的意思是…哀丽秘榭，也要被卷入预言中的浩劫了吗？
Y—You mean... Aedes Elysiae will be swept up in the prophesied catastrophe?
孩子们，请躲在迷路迷境里，不要踏出此地半步。否则，你们二人一定也会被那恐怖的灾厄吞噬哪。
My children, take shelter in the Membrance Maze. One step outside and this horror will consume you both.
「黑潮」，这就是灾厄的真面目。它将吞噬世间万物，惟有迷路迷境能够幸免。
The "black tide." That's what this calamity truly is. It consumes all in its path, sparing none but the Membrance Maze.
对不起，村长大人！哀丽秘榭陷入危机，身为她的孩子…我绝不能袖手旁观！
Forgive me, Chief! But Aedes Elysiae needs us... and as her child, I must act!
（白厄也在。还有…万敌，缇宁？）
(Hold on. Phainon's here too? And is that Mydei and Trinnon?)
你脑子坏了吗？那金色头发的可是悬锋城的王子！要是惹他生气了…整座城邦的人都得没命！
Are you insane? That blond man is the crown prince of Kremnos! Mess with him, and every last person in the city could wind up dead!
阁下所见的景象，发生在光历4926年的门关月。彼时，悬锋王子迈德漠斯率领的孤军兵临奥赫玛城下。
Behold! It is the Month of Gate, Light Calendar 4926. The crown prince of Kremnos, Mydeimos, has led his forces to the gates of Okhema.
正如你所知，迈德漠斯性情高傲，但并非崇尚暴力之人。他向圣城元老提出角斗，只为给族人争取权利，不教他们以低人一等的姿态寄居他乡。

As you know, though Mydeimos was proud, he did not engage in needless violence. He challenged the elders of Okhema to a duel, not for glory, but for the rights and dignity of his people. To ensure they wouldn't live as second-class citizens in foreign lands.
在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄作为代表接受了迈德漠斯的挑战。这场「角斗」将改变逐火的进程……
After Aglaea's mediation, Phainon met Mydeimos's challenge as the elders' representative. This duel was to change the course of the Flame-Chase Journey itself...
对于逐火之旅，每一位黄金裔都不可或缺。无论是你，还是那位悬锋的王子，都浮现在神谕描绘的图景里。
Every Chrysos Heir is indispensable to the Flame-Chase Journey. And you and the crown prince of Kremnos are both a part of the prophecy.
怕你不知情，我多嘴一句：在悬锋城，你这小偷般的发言已是对角斗的亵渎，当受穿刺之刑。
For your information, in Castrum Kremnos, the punishment for profaning a duel with such crooked words is impalement.
悬锋印戒，我族的至宝。它就是我的选择。
The Signet of Kremnos, the crown jewel of our people. That's my choice.
你只需知道，悬锋千年的荣耀，足以令一位泰坦为之倾倒，碾碎你这无名小卒的灵魂！
Just know that Kremnos's thousand years of glory could bring a Titan to its knees, let alone a nobody like you!
（这也是日后，万敌背负的宿命……）
(And the very destiny that Mydei himself will eventually shoulder...)
理智告诉我，这些还远远不够。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，在翁法罗斯面前，它的消逝不过是一道无足轻重的伤疤。
Speaking rationally, I know it's not nearly enough. Aedes Elysiae was just a small village, its loss barely a scar on Amphoreus's face.
这还是我认识的翁法罗斯吗？
Did I stumble into the wrong Amphoreus?
因为我也忘不了哀丽秘榭的田野、红叶，树下有我的小秋千，我会在上面做甜甜的梦。还有迷路迷境的小妖精们，想到再也见不到它们，心就会很痛很痛……

I am with you because I remember it all too. The fields of Aedes Elysiae, those red leaves, that little swing of mine beneath the tree where I'd dream the sweetest dreams. And those dear fairies in the Lost Maze... It hurts so much knowing they're gone forever...
这场角斗关乎圣城的明天，既然站在这里，我就要为它摘得胜利。
The fate of Okhema hangs on this duel. I must claim victory, for their sake.
「——哀丽秘榭的来者，无名的英雄。」
"One from Aedes Elysiae, the Nameless Hero."
奥赫玛和悬锋孤军实力悬殊，可我方竟无一人阵亡，这恐怕并非巧合吧。
The Kremnoans far outmatch Okhema's forces, yet we haven't lost a single soul. That's no accident, is it?
看来奥赫玛也不像传闻中那么迂腐。比起圣城元老，在场各位更理解力量的本质。
Perhaps Okhema isn't as hidebound as the rumors say. You grasp the true marrow of power more clearly than those Elders.
历史会记下这一刻，神谕中的黄金裔已悉数就位，它喻示着翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明。
History shall remember this moment. The prophesied Chrysos Heirs now stand assembled, heralding a new dawn for Amphoreus.
西方有悬锋孤军坐镇，短时间内不会失守。那刻夏老师生前在北方和东方布下法阵，作用犹未可知，但我相信他。至于奥赫玛……

The west stands protected by Mydei's Kremnoans. It will hold for the time being. Professor Anaxa deployed wards in the north and east before... Their effectiveness is untested, but I believe in him. And Okhema...
所以，这是我们看{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}她{RUBY_E#}的最后一眼了。
So... this is the last time we'll see {RUBY_B#Okhema}her{RUBY_E#}.

您就一定能令翁法罗斯停滞的命运，再度流动……

Feeling a bit lost? As you now see, this scene marks the final act of the drama "Amphoreus"...
这一次，在{M#他}{F#她}的指引下，英雄将作出如何抉择，全世命运又将流向何方？还有，翁法罗斯一切的终极本质又是什么？……

The master of the countless memories we saw, the other important actor now stepping into the Vortex, they who have already burnt their own self to cinder — the Flame Reaver!
啊，一个完全数，多么绝妙的巧合。你我都心知肚明，在这三千万世徒劳中，翁法罗斯从未发生改变。

翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？

This is a moment the universe will remember. After millions of extrapolations, the experimental environment known as "Amphoreus" has finally achieved results.

This is the endpoint of Amphoreus's calculations: a perfect equation of Destruction.
呵呵，奇怪的问题。你可曾想过，在千万次演算中，翁法罗斯已然踏上不同于「智识」的另一条命途。它也早已将神明的赐福，平等地分给了每个孩子……

Heh, curious question. Have you ever considered that, after millions of extrapolations, Amphoreus is already following a different Path from the Erudition? It has long since granted divine blessings equally to each child...
那就是诸位体内流淌的金血，它源自与「毁灭」同名的负创神。翁法罗斯的黄金裔，从最初就是星神燃烧宇宙的柴薪啊。

The golden blood flowing in your veins... It comes from The Blemished One, whose name is "Destruction" itself. And Amphoreus's Chrysos Heirs were, from the very beginning, fuel for the Aeon to burn the universe.
就像你说的，翁法罗斯只是一场实验，我们是局中人，只能沿着既定的轨迹，走向被星星注视的结局……
Like you said, Amphoreus is just an experiment, and we're the participants. We can only walk along the predetermined path toward the ending under the watchful eyes of the stars...
但那也意味着，会向翁法罗斯投来瞥视的「星神」，肯定不止一位吧？

I understand. Then let me step into the cycles and continue Amphoreus's grand design: to deceive the gods, deceive the world itself.
直到翁法罗斯，迎来真正的黎明。
Until Amphoreus welcomes a true dawn.
…倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

Aedes Elysiae, the little village of my childhood. The gentle breeze and the sound of waves still linger.
你知道，这里只是记忆的一角，真正的哀丽秘榭……
You know, this is just a corner of the memory. The real Aedes Elysiae...
逐火之旅，乃至整个翁法罗斯，都不过是「星神」梦中的泡影？
The Flame-Chase Journey, and even all of Amphoreus, are nothing but illusions in an Aeon's dreams?
但这一次，翁法罗斯迎来了命运的转折。
But this time, Amphoreus encountered a turning point in its fate.
人们遵守约定，让你接过了所有的火种。这一世，在缇里西庇俄丝之后，翁法罗斯没有一名半神诞生。
The people kept their promise and handed you all the Coreflames. In this world, after Tribios, no demigods were born in Amphoreus.
这事和你无关，树庭男孩。退下吧，我可不想有人受伤哪。

Coreflame thieves... You really think you can scare off a Sage of the Grove with nothing but empty threats?
要本大爷说…你自己就是翁法罗斯天大的祸患！
If you ask me... you're the greatest disaster Amphoreus has ever known!
万敌…你对我的称呼始终没有变过。
Mydei... your name for me has never changed.
有趣。告诉我，往日的迈德漠斯在面对你时，可曾退缩过？
Interesting. Tell me, when the Mydeimoses of the past faced you, did they ever retreat?
如果你能胜出，去告诉来世的迈德漠斯：此人是可敬的对手，切记使出全力，不得怠慢。
If you win, tell the Mydeimos of the next life: This person is a worthy opponent, so always remember to give it your all and never slack off.

为翁法罗斯…带来玫瑰色的黎明。
May they bring Amphoreus... a rosy-fingered dawn.

Is this Amphoreus's wrath? If its choice has already been made, if fate is set in stone...
直到另一轮太阳在遥远的地平升起，为翁法罗斯带来真正的黎明。
Until another sun rises on the distant horizon, bringing the true dawn to Amphoreus.

I will burn... and fade away. I will become the Flame Reaver of this life and keep my promise to Cyrene.
还记得吗？在最初的时间线里，你和迈德漠斯曾在公正天秤前展开「角斗」，称量各自心中「比世界的命运更为沉重之物」。

Do you remember? In that first timeline, you and Mydeimos stood before the Scales of Justice, locked in a "duel," each of you weighing what you held dearest, "what weighed more than the fate of the world."

I will be the dawn of Amphoreus.

The version of Irontomb hiding in Amphoreus is its "source code." And this Scepter is its incubator.

Don't worry about her. She's absolutely chock-full of mysteries. Even if Amphoreus explodes, she'll probably float out perfectly protected in a nice thick layer of ice. Worry more about yourself instead.

就像你看见的，翁法罗斯所有被冠以英雄之名的人物，也都是身负缺陷的凡人。他们只是在每一个被世界需要的场合，恰到好处地出现在了那里。
