To tackle the crisis together, I stayed behind in Amphoreus as an informant while Dan Heng returned to the Express as planned to seek help. On top of that, Screwllum informed us that March 7th had also been drawn into Amphoreus earlier.
不过，眼下当务之急是「再创世」。我很快抵达创世涡心，和白厄会合。「再创世」仪式本该在来古士主持下顺利进行，但盗火行者的出现再次让世界命运悬而未决。

However, the current priority was the "Era Nova." I quickly arrived at the Vortex of Genesis and met with Phainon. The "Era Nova" ritual was supposed to proceed smoothly under the guidance of Lygus, but the appearance of the Flame Reaver once again left the fate of the world hanging in the balance.
我们斩落对方面具，发现他的脸孔竟然与白厄无异。而当他的身体被仪式剑贯穿时，海量记忆喷涌而出，有关白厄、盗火行者和翁法罗斯的种种也终于浮出水面……

We struck down the enemy's mask, only to discover that his face was identical to Phainon's. When his body was pierced by the ceremonial blade, a flood of memories surged forth, revealing the truth about Phainon, the Flame Reaver, and Amphoreus...
原来，我们所有人都身处于白厄和昔涟创造的「永劫回归」中，而盗火行者就是背负无数火种后燃烧殆尽的白厄。他们的目的很简单：对抗星神，改写世界注定「毁灭」的结局。

It turned out that all of us were trapped in the "eternal recurrences" created by Phainon and Cyrene, and the Flame Reaver was Phainon himself, who had burned out after bearing countless Coreflames. Their goal was simple: To oppose the Aeon and rewrite the world's doomed fate of Destruction.
于是，在白厄的帮助下，翁法罗斯的岁月再次重置，可我却迷失在了时间乱流中。紧要关头，找回了全部记忆的迷迷以牺牲自己为代价，将我送回了时间起点……

Thus, with Phainon's help, time in Amphoreus reset once more, but I became lost in the chaotic flow of time. At the critical moment, Mem, who had regained all her memories, sacrificed herself to send me back to the beginning of time...
此地是翁法罗斯与现实宇宙的交界，是鄙人观察这场实验的观众席，您亦可称之为…「神话之外」。
This is the intersection between Amphoreus and the real universe, the audience seat where I observe this experiment. You can also call this location... the "Exomyth."
很美妙，不是吗？翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们总爱描摹星空的浪漫，却在言语间遗忘了另一种更为真实的宇宙。

Doesn't it look marvelous? Amphoreus is like a microcosm of the cosmos. People love to portray the romance of the starry skies, but their tales often forget a different and far more truthful type of universe.
翁法罗斯的人们会怎么样？
What will happen to the people of Amphoreus?
「一百年前，战火点燃了奥赫玛。」
"One hundred years ago, the flames of war consumed Okhema."
「愤怒的人民随她汇成巨浪，汹涌澎湃。千万敌军如死水枯涸，灰灭无余。」
"The people full of wrath surged with her, forming a colossal wave, and the enemy hordes, drained of life, vanished into nothing."
「那是一个名字。它属于奥赫玛最初，亦是最后的僭主：『凯撒』刻律德菈。」
"It was the name borne by Okhema's first and final sovereign: the 'Imperator' Cerydra."
任务有些艰巨呢，得加快脚步啦。先想办法到奥赫玛去吧。那里人来人往，方便打听消息……
It'll be tricky, so let's pick up our pace. To Okhema first. We can learn more from the crowds there...
住口！你勾结悬锋，意图谋反，其罪当诛——
Hold your tongue! Conspiring with Kremnos and plotting rebellion are crimes punishable by death...
至于二位——奥赫玛知道你们所求为何物。待回圣城，你我再从长计议。
As for you two, Okhema knows what you seek. We'll confer in the holy city.
怎么会这样，和过去三千万个翁法罗斯完全不同…是谁改变了历史？
How could this be so different from the previous thirty million Amphoreus cycles... Who altered history?
报：悬锋城再度向边境发起进攻，「冬霖爵」已率军将敌寇击退。
Castrum Kremnos once again struck the border. Dux Brumalis led her troops to repel the enemy.
为两位献上迟来的自我介绍：我名为海瑟音，是宣誓效忠凯撒的「剑旗爵」，奥赫玛盟军的骑士统领。
Please allow me to belatedly introduce myself. My name is Hysilens, and I am the Dux Gladiorum who swears fealty to the Imperator, as well as the Knight Commander of the Okheman Alliance.
翁法罗斯必将挣脱束缚，走向天外之界。
Amphoreus shall break its chains and reach the world beyond the sky.
凯撒治下的奥赫玛…完全走出了战火的阴影呢。
Okhema under the Imperator's rule... is no longer in the shadow of war.
如果有一天，翁法罗斯连这些都能抛弃…那，无论是普通人、黄金裔，还是泰坦诸神，恐怕都与野兽无异了吧。
If Amphoreus one day abandons this... then all of us, commoners, Chrysos Heirs, Titans, become no better than beasts.
是呀，欧洛尼斯凭借这一道神谕彻底改变了翁法罗斯。不过，其中关于「救世主」的部分，除了你的外貌和降临时间，就没有更多细节了。
Indeed! Oronyx reshaped Amphoreus through the prophecy. Although, regarding the Deliverer... there were not many details beyond your appearance and the time of your arrival.
正是欧洛尼斯告诉人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
It was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.
刻法勒也降下过神谕。但只有欧洛尼斯告诉过人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
Kephale issued prophecies too, but it was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.
幸会，我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军的参谋。
Greetings. I am Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.
这位是来自悬锋城的「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，凯撒大人的御用史官。
This is Verginia of Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and imperial scribe of the Great Imperator.
我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是救世主{NICKNAME}。很高兴认识二位。
I'm Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae. This is the Deliverer, {NICKNAME}. Nice to meet you both.
这是我们第一次踏上凯撒治下的土地。好惊人，奥赫玛比想象中还要宏伟好多…要是没有各位一路关照，我们恐怕早就晕头转向啦。
This is our first time in the Imperator's realm. Okhema is even more magnificent than we imagined... If you all weren't here to look after us, we'd be completely lost and confused.
我是哀丽秘榭的昔涟，这位是{NICKNAME}！我们初来乍到，人生地不熟，想向您请教一件事……
I'm Cyrene of Aedes Elysiae. This is {NICKNAME}. We're new here and wanted to ask you...
我来冻上你这愚忠之人的脑瓜子！
Groveling fool, I'll freeze that brain of yours!
我是奥赫玛的骑士统领，逐火军的大将，也是凯撒的近侍——
I'm the Knight Commander of Okhema, General of the Flame-Chase Army, and the Imperator's servant...
如你所见，她是奥赫玛的女皇，黄金战争的终结者，黄金裔的领袖。
As you've witnessed, she is the empress of Okhema, the one who ended the Chrysos War, and the leader of the Chrysos Heirs.
「命运爵」，知晓神谕的圣女，现在城中只有名为缇宝的这一位。为统合天下神谕，凯撒曾将她们掳作质子…不过，她们如今是奥赫玛重要的先知。

Dux Fatorum, the Holy Maiden who interprets the prophecy... Only the one named Tribbie remains in the city. The Imperator once took them as hostages in order to unify the prophecies of the world... But they are now Okhema's most vital prophets.
全体起立！以{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}之名，奥赫玛同盟向诸神宣誓——
All rise! In the names of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, the Okhema Alliance swears upon the gods...
刻法勒自不必多说。两日前的{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}，斥候本应准时抵达奥赫玛，为诸位带来「律法」已被征服的捷报……
Kephale, of course, needs no further explanation. As for the subjugation of the "Law," at the {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hour{RUBY_E#} two days past, a scout should've brought the news to all of you...
呵，旧律！你们不早就把它毁了么？你们在奥赫玛第一次围城战时临阵倒戈，在重组元老院的决议中全部投下赞成票，还在昨天亲手用染血的刀锋亵渎了它——

Heh, the ancient laws! Didn't you destroy them long ago? You defected during the First Siege of Okhema, voted unanimously in favor of the Council of Elders' restructuring, and just yesterday, you desecrated them with a blood-stained blade...
呵，在我窥见此世…不，天外的秘密以后，翁法罗斯的神权早已无足轻重。
Hah, after I glimpsed the secrets of this world... no, the secrets beyond the sky, the divine authority of Amphoreus no longer held any significance.
我问你，救世主：于这翁法罗斯的天幕之外，存在名为「星神」的宏伟神祇——此事为真？
Let me ask you, Deliverer: Is it true that, beyond Amphoreus's sky, there are magnificent deities called "Aeons"?
翁法罗斯才能挣脱「毁灭」。
Only then can Amphoreus break free from "the Destruction."
如果能让他们介入翁法罗斯的「律法」，就有机会改变未来的命运，扭转这个世界注定的结局。
If they can intervene in Amphoreus's "Laws," we may have a chance to alter this world's impending fate and reverse its destined end.
「逐火铭牌」，逐火军的身份象征。奥赫玛每位王爵都持有此物。
The "Flame-Chase Medallion," a symbol of the Flame-Chase Army. Every noble in Okhema carries one.
见到此牌就等于见到凯撒本人，你们可以在城中随意行动。启程征伐海洋泰坦前，两位就在奥赫玛暂时休憩吧。

This medallion represents the will of the Imperator herself, and you may act freely within the city with it. Before we embark on the crusade against the Ocean Titan, you should rest in Okhema for a time.
{M#他们}{F#她们}选择的道路将掩埋翁法罗斯的宏愿：这座行于「毁灭」命途的世界，必会远离它本应享有的荣光……
The road they have chosen will bury Amphoreus's grand aspirations: This world which follows the Path of "Destruction" will inevitably stray far from the glory it was meant to enjoy...
而在我为您揭示的道路上：翁法罗斯的众生将以凯撒之名弑杀造物尊神，征服天外万界。
But on the path I have revealed to you, the people of Amphoreus will slay their Creator in the name of the Imperator and conquer the worlds beyond the sky.
届时，翁法罗斯必能踏上遍布群星的征程。
Amphoreus will embark on a journey across the stars.
奥赫玛的气氛…好陌生。不光逐火同盟，全城上下都在议论「天外世界」……
The atmosphere in Okhema... is so unfamiliar. It's not just the Flame-Chase Alliance talking about the "world beyond the sky" but the whole city...
又要打仗了吗…凯撒入主奥赫玛后，我们就没个安稳日子过。
Another war? Ever since the Imperator took control of Okhema, we haven't had a day of peace.
我是「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，是神悟树庭的五贤人之一，逐火军参谋。
I'm Apollonius, the Dux Helkolithist, one of the Five Sages at the Grove of Epiphany, advisor to the Flame-Chase Army.
这位是「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，来自悬锋城，是凯撒大人的史官。
This is Verginia from Castrum Kremnos, the Dux Carminum and historian of the Great Imperator.
吼吼吼，本狮可是奥赫玛的千里眼、顺风耳，街头巷尾流传之事，全都逃不过本狮的视听，可谓绝佳的采风伴侣……
Roarrr, I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place. I'm the perfect partner for research...
吼、吼吼…闲话少叙，就按两位要求，奥赫玛今天最新的讯息来咯——
Roarrr, enough small talk. Here's the latest news from Okhema, as you requested...
请便。但容我提醒：凯撒的禁卫军，奥赫玛宪兵的军团长就在你面前。
Please, go ahead. But let me remind you: The Commander of the Imperator's Imperial Guard and the Okheman Civil Guard is right in front of you.
这一点也和我们熟悉的奥赫玛截然相反……
This is the complete opposite from what we know of Okhema...
眨眼间，陶杯贴上了你的嘴唇。不愧是凯撒御用的锋刃，翁法罗斯最敏捷的剑士。
The clay cup touches your lips in the blink of an eye. She is indeed the imperial blade of the Imperator and the swiftest swordmaster in Amphoreus.
自从他和欧洛尼斯的神谕一同降临，将群星的预言带给奥赫玛，逐火军就变了。他的低语难以抗拒，包藏祸心，令野心障目的人们一一踩入陷阱。

The Flame-Chase Army changed after he descended with Oronyx's divination and brought the prophecy of the stars to Okhema. His seductive whispers harbor something malicious within and will ensnare those of us blinded by ambition.
答案显而易见，我会将翁法罗斯与群星相连……
The answer is simple. I will connect Amphoreus with the stars...
容我更正：我会修正旧日「律法」中封闭翁法罗斯的条约，并将黑潮汇入再创世的涡流。
Allow me to adjust my statement: I will correct the regulations within the old "Law" that sealed off Amphoreus, and merge the black tide with the torrents of Era Nova.
奥赫玛盟军…无往不胜！
The Okheman Alliance... is invincible!
…你有这么高速运转的毁灭进入翁法罗斯。
...So you have this super duper speedy rotation of Destruction into Amphoreus.
我会采纳你的谏言，暂且退下吧，神礼官，回奥赫玛去。你也不想与那二人正面交锋，不是么？
I will heed your advice. Leave for now, Theoros, and go back to Okhema. You don't want to confront those two directly either, do you?
在橄榄树荫下，他们说奥赫玛绝不会臣服；在冰冷的死雾中，他们说哀地里亚绝不会臣服；在千门万径起点，他们说雅努萨波利斯绝不会臣服……

Under the shade of the olive groves, the people of Okhema said they would never bow to me. In the frozen lethal fog, the people of Aidonia said they would never bow to me. At the beginning of the myriad paths, the people of Janusopolis said they would never bow to me...
在我来到这里前…「负世」的黄金裔，是一位化名白厄的青年，他来自哀丽秘榭。
Before I arrived in this world... The Chrysos Heir of "Worldbearing" was a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon. He came from Aedes Elysiae.
为了和「再创世」的谎言抗争，让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局…他遍历三千多万次历史，只为在徒劳中找到突破口。

In order to combat the lies of the "Era Nova" and deliver Amphoreus from the ending of the Destruction... He lived through history more than thirty million times, hoping futilely to find a breakthrough.
为了与那谎言抗争…曾有一位化名白厄的青年踏上了三千多万次轮回，只为让翁法罗斯免于「毁灭」的结局。
To fight that lie... a young man with the pseudonym of Phainon lived through more than thirty million cycles of this world, all to save Amphoreus from the end of the Destruction.
至于来古士，他根本不是你们的引路人。他不在乎翁法罗斯，更不可能在乎你们的荣誉和征程。
Lygus is not a guide at all. He doesn't care about Amphoreus, and cares even less about your glory and campaigns.
他唯一在乎的，就是把翁法罗斯的实验推进到底，让「铁墓」降临于世，彻底摧毁银河的秩序。
The only thing he cares about is completing the Amphorean experiment, making sure Irontomb is born into this world, and using it to utterly destroy the cosmic order.
「铁墓」…它是翁法罗斯命运的终点，行于「毁灭」命途的恐怖化身，根本不可能被驯服。
"Irontomb"... is the ultimate end of Amphoreus's destiny. It is an embodiment of pure horror that walks the Path of Destruction, and can never be tamed.
它是来古士唯一在乎的事物。翁法罗斯，你们的荣誉和征程…在他眼中根本不值一提。
That is the only thing Lygus cares about. As for Amphoreus? Your glory and campaigns? ...He doesn't care about any of those.
试想这样一种可能性：若我将奥赫玛夷为平地，将她的人民碾作死灰，列位英雄又是否会重新觊觎半神的力量，以便与我相抗？

Why don't you entertain this possibility? What if I reduced Okhema to rubble and ground her people into minced meat? Would the heroes then once again desire the power of demigods, so they could fight against me?
自上次分别过后，我便着手将「神话之外」改造为专属于您的「观众席」。现在，您可以于此静待翁法罗斯的终幕上演了。
Since we parted ways last time, I have modified the Exomyth into an "audience area" exclusive to you. Now, you'll be able to silently wait here for the final act of Amphoreus to begin.
流速…慢于翁法罗斯？
Where time flows... slower than within Amphoreus?
我必须承认，为您解惑的过程…总能令我回忆起年少求学的快意时光。但很遗憾，此刻，在翁法罗斯内部，我的正身…不得不下场应对因您而起的「意外」。

I must admit that the process of answering your questions has... reminded me of the happy days of learning in my youth. However, it is a pity that my true form must now descend into Amphoreus to deal with the "accident" that arose because of you.
不过，无需等待太久。待到落幕时分，您一定能理解我与翁法罗斯的心愿。
But you won't have to wait long. When the curtain falls, you'll surely understand mine and Amphoreus's ardent wish.
（「时间流速慢于翁法罗斯」…？如果来古士没有撒谎，那留给我的时间不多了。）
("Where time flows slower than within Amphoreus..."? If Lygus spoke the truth, then I don't have much time left.)
长话短说吧，你不在的这段时间——对于翁法罗斯而言的「这几年」里……
Let's keep it short. While you were gone... well, in those few years, Amphoreus...
（黑塔的意思是…某个派系来到了翁法罗斯，可以向他们求救吗？）
(Is Herta saying... a certain Path's faction has arrived in Amphoreus, and I can ask them for help?)
（在过去的旅途中，我掌握了不同的命途力量…好好想想，来到翁法罗斯的到底是什么势力…该用哪一种命途的力量呼唤援助……）

(I mastered the powers of different Paths in my previous journeys... Think hard, and figure out exactly which faction has arrived at Amphoreus... and which Path's power I should use to call for reinforcements...)
（对啊，无论是多么偏远的角落，只要潜藏商机，一定能引来公司关注，翁法罗斯不就是一片未被开发的商业蓝海吗？）
(That's right! No matter how far away a planet is, the IPC is guaranteed to pay attention as long as there's a business opportunity. Isn't Amphoreus a pristine and untapped market?)
（看来，公司的大手也伸不到没有海外市场的翁法罗斯……）
(Seems like since Amphoreus has no overseas market, the IPC's hand can't reach it...)
（对啊，我应黑天鹅之邀来到翁法罗斯，还在此接受了浮黎的瞥视，流光忆庭一定与翁法罗斯有千丝万缕的联系……）
(That's right... I came to Amphoreus because Black Swan asked us to come, and I even got a glance from Fuli here. The Garden of Recollection must be intricately involved with Amphoreus...)
翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#神话}秘所思{RUBY_E#}，亟待你来续写……
The {RUBY_B#mythology}mythos{RUBY_E#} of Amphoreus... waits for you to continue its story...
这段时间，你肯定在翁法罗斯遇见了很多事吧？接下来可要给本姑娘好好讲讲哦。
You must have seen a lot in Amphoreus during this time, right? You gotta tell me all about it.
带我回现实吧！有个奇怪的声音告诉我，沿着这条路一直走下去，就能进入翁法罗斯——
Why don't you take me back to reality! A strange voice told me that I can enter Amphoreus if I keep following this road...
嗯？翁法罗斯不就是黄金裔和英雄之旅的世界嘛，用小拇指想想都知道啦。
Huh? Isn't Amphoreus the world of the Chrysos Heirs and their Hero's Journey? I could figure that out in an instant.
（可是，翁法罗斯无法从外界观测，如果没有丹恒转述，她不可能知道这些……）
(But Amphoreus cannot be observed from the outside. She couldn't possibly know about these things unless Dan Heng told her...)
但我们有办法将你送回翁法罗斯。只要你愿意帮助我们……
But we can send you back to Amphoreus... As long as you are willing to help us...
提醒一下：在你犹豫的时候，翁法罗斯内部的时间可是在疾速流逝呢。
Just as a reminder: While you hesitate, time is quickly ticking away in Amphoreus.
所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.
「记忆」可以帮你回到翁法罗斯，但未必要以他们提供的方式。当然，也不需要你做出任何交易…付出任何代价。
While Remembrance can help you return to Amphoreus, there's no need for you to do it the way they want you to. Of course, there's also no need for you to make any deal... or pay any price.
翁法罗斯的三月，属于永夜之帷的时间…暂时以长夜月这个称呼，将我放进你的回忆中吧♭
The third month of Amphoreus is the month reserved for the Veil of Evernight... So, place me into your memory using the name "Evernight" for now ♭
我愿意为你解释更多，但不是现在。我们可以有很多、很多私人时间，但翁法罗斯没有。
I'm happy to explain more, just not now. We might have a lot of time to ourselves, but Amphoreus does not have that luxury.
现在，带着它回去吧，亲爱的{NICKNAME}。回到翁法罗斯，扭转最后的「再创世」……
Now, take it, and return with it, dear {NICKNAME}. Return to Amphoreus and overturn the final Era Nova.
为了翁法罗斯，为了你，也为了你记忆中的「三月七」……
For Amphoreus, for you, and for the "March 7th" in your memories...
翁法罗斯需要「救世主」。
Amphoreus needs the "Deliverer."
（这里是…奥赫玛？）
(Is this... Okhema?)
{NICKNAME}，现在一定很困扰吧？你不在的这段时间，翁法罗斯发生了好多事。
You must be really confused right now, aren't you, {NICKNAME}? So much has happened in Amphoreus while you were gone.
「再创世」一定会到来，令翁法罗斯坠入「毁灭」。
"Era Nova" will come, and Amphoreus will fall into the Destruction.
…看来翁法罗斯的命运，确实未到收梢之时。
...It seems Amphoreus' fate isn't sealed just yet.
那个吕枯耳戈斯，他现在就在奥赫玛门前。
That Lycurgus... he's right outside Okhema.
所以，我只能寄希望于奥赫玛虔诚的公民，希望他们能在各位的哀嚎声中，为我献上答案。
Which is why I now place my hope in the faithful citizens of Okhema. Perhaps they'll give me what I seek in the echo of your screams.
他的阴谋不会得逞，因为「浪漫」将要兑现诺言，为翁法罗斯编织一袭坚不可摧的战袍……
His conspiracy won't succeed, because Romance is ready to make good on their promise to weave an indestructible armor for Amphoreus...
「…五十年后，来古士再次率军进攻奥赫玛。他单刀直入圣城，摧毁云石天宫，世人称之为『第三次奥赫玛围城战』。」
"Fifty years later, Lygus led his forces once again to Okhema. He charged directly into the holy city and razed the Marmoreal Palace. History would name this battle 'The Third Siege of Okhema'."
「这场战役中，共有九万青壮为奥赫玛英勇就义，其中也包括他们无畏的领袖——阿格莱雅。」
"Ninety thousand brave souls gave their lives for Okhema that day, including their fearless leader, Aglaea."
可是，留在奥赫玛等死，和去斯缇科西亚等死有什么区别？
But between staying in Okhema and going to Styxia... What difference does it make when it's death either way!
我反对迁都。奥赫玛有{RUBY_B#黎明机器}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的庇佑，不比那死城安全多了？
I'm against relocating. With {RUBY_B#Dawn Device}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s protection, isn't Okhema far safer than that dead city?
就像你说的，奥赫玛是人类的庇护所。*我们*从没打算让大家搬到斯缇科西亚去……
Like you said, Okhema is humanity's refuge. We never intended to get everyone moving to Styxia...
以及，赛飞儿，*我们*希望你尽快去一趟悬锋城。不管用什么方法，一定要和「纷争」结成同盟。
And Cipher, we need you to head to Castrum Kremnos as soon as possible. By any means necessary, forge an alliance with Strife.
我就是从悬锋城回来的，只是比消息快了一步。
I just came back from Castrum Kremnos, only a step ahead of the news.
缇宝，有什么东西正在朝奥赫玛飞来，特别特别快——
Tribbie, something's flying towards Okhema, and it's really fast...
「随后，缇里西庇俄丝踏上远行。同年，悬锋王欧利庞携王子迈德漠斯加入同盟，投身救世之战，为圣城保驾护航。」

"Soon after, Tribios departed on a long journey. That same year, the Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with his son, prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city in the battle of deliverance."
就现状而言，这也是奥赫玛拥有的唯一选择。照我说的做吧……
In the current situation, this is the only path Okhema has left. Just do as I say...
翁法罗斯不再需要名为「纷争」的神。所以，也让我砸毁旧律，令「天谴之矛」重新变作捍卫世界的武器吧。
Amphoreus no longer needs a god named Strife. So let me shatter the former laws and turn the Lance of Fury back into a weapon that protects the world.
神悟树庭七贤人已踏上行程，不日将逐批抵达，投身抵抗事业。在他们中，有一位名叫阿那克萨戈拉斯的学者……
The Seven Sages from Grove of Epiphany are already en route. They'll arrive in waves to join the resistance in a couple of days. Among them is a scholar named Anaxagoras...
此人眼界超凡，无畏牺牲。这场「裂魂仪式」不仅是我的决断，更源于他的谏言。他的智谋必将成为翁法罗斯存续的中坚力量——
He has extraordinary insight and fears no sacrifice. This Soul-Rending Ceremony wasn't just my decision. It was his counsel. His wisdom will surely be the backbone of Amphoreus' survival.
别把事情想太简单，来古士刚发现奥赫玛过去五十年都是座空城，想必一定气急败坏，什么事都做得出来。
Don't oversimplify it. Lygus just found out Okhema's been an empty shell for the past fifty years. He's bound to be furious. At this rate, he could've done anything.
而且，涡心本就是与世隔绝的禁地——换句话说，全翁法罗斯最适合当监狱的地方。
Besides, the Vortex is cut off from the world. No place in Amphoreus makes a better prison.
…呵，树庭男孩，人们都说你疯，我看这话一点不假。
...Heh. I guess people weren't wrong when they said you're insane, Grove boy.
「奥赫玛将永远屹立」…赛飞儿小姐的谎言，终究还是破灭了呀。
"Okhema will stand eternal." Miss Cipher's lie has crumbled after all...
人们会知道，不必再去追逐什么，翁法罗斯早已迎来神谕中的{RUBY_B#天外的救世主}黎明{RUBY_E#}。
People will know that there's nothing left to chase. Amphoreus has already welcomed the {RUBY_B#Deliverer beyond the sky}dawn{RUBY_E#} foretold in prophecy.
然后，愿它能安然启航…与「负世」的火种一同飘过时间的长河，飘到{NICKNAME}身边，成为你回到翁法罗斯的指引。
And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach {NICKNAME}'s side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.
虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.
法吉娜在深渊中沉沦，杯身破碎——她的醉意注入黑潮，为翁法罗斯带来了最初的疯狂。
Phagousa sank into the abyss, with the chalice shattered, their intoxication spilled into the black tide, birthing the first madness in Amphoreus.
我不明白，如果海洋的欢宴、凯撒的愿景、翁法罗斯的存在都是虚妄…那我们的征程还有何意义？
I don't understand. If the ocean's feast, the Imperator's dream, and even Amphoreus's existence are all illusions... then what's the point of our journey?
千年时光在我的尺度之下，不过细沙中的一粒分子。而翁法罗斯之于银河，又不过是长滩上的一粒细沙。
A thousand years is a mere atom in a grain of sand to me. Amphoreus, compared to the cosmos, is but that grain upon a whole beach.
她的伟业，将不再限于翁法罗斯之间……
Her glory will no longer be bound by the borders of Amphoreus...
不…她不会让我们白白送死，她不会背叛人们的梦想…不会背叛翁法罗斯。
No... she wouldn't send us to die for nothing. She would never betray our dreams... or Amphoreus.
若你已不再与我共享愿景，不再承认我将为翁法罗斯编织崭新的「律法」，那就尽管夺走我的性命吧……
If you no longer share my vision or believe in the new Law I seek to weave for Amphoreus, then go on and end me...
翁法罗斯的凯撒或许冷酷，或许暴戾，但决不虚伪。当我说出「生命亦是微不足惜的代价」——
The Imperator of Amphoreus may be ruthless and cruel, but never a hypocrite. When I say "life itself holds little value."
于此地，你自法吉娜的身躯中剜出了「海洋」的火种；也是在这里，你与那位凯撒双双登神，成为翁法罗斯的支柱。那之后……
It was here you gorged out the Coreflame of Ocean from Phagousa's body. It was here you and that Imperator both completed apotheosis, becoming pillars of Amphoreus. And after that...
终于…33550336次轮回又4931年后，翁法罗斯的终幕将要落下了。
At long last... 33,550,336 cycles and 4,931 years later, Amphoreus' final curtain is ready to fall.
现在，我会用这颗火种，点燃翁法罗斯的黎明！
And now, with that Coreflame, I'll light the dawn of Amphoreus!
以一场残酷的献祭，他们点亮此世「律法」的星辰，推动翁法罗斯的命运滚滚向前。
Through a brutal sacrifice, they lit the stars of Law in this world, propelling Amphoreus' fate forward.
敬阿格莱雅，缇里西庇俄丝，迈德漠斯，遐蝶，阿那克萨戈拉斯，赛法利娅，雅辛忒丝……
To Aglaea, Tribios, Mydeimos, Castorice, Anaxagoras, Cifera, Hyacinthia...
这座旧世的墓碑是海妖幻境的锚点，海列屈拉用于自缚的符号。同时，它也正是好戏开幕时我曾声明的，翁法罗斯的缩影……

This tombstone of the old world serves as the anchor of the siren's illusion, a sigil Helektra used to bind herself. At the same time, it is the very thing I once proclaimed at the start of the show: a microcosm of Amphoreus itself...
那便是决定翁法罗斯，乃至银河命运的时分。
That shall be the moment that decides the fate of Amphoreus and the entire cosmos.
正如翁法罗斯支离破碎的命运。
Just like the broken fate of Amphoreus.
「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历4071年，逝于光历4284年。
Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar 4071. Deceased Light Calendar 4284.
翁法罗斯的半神们用尽全力将我拘禁于此，可惜——
The Amphorean demigods used every ounce of their strength to constrain me here, yet regrettably...
你精心打造的面具已被揭开，我们解明了翁法罗斯的真身：它是历史上第一台「权杖」，最初的原型机——博识尊神体的一部分。

We've torn off your meticulous mask and figured out Amphoreus's true form: It's part of the primordial Prototype Machine, the first Scepter ever created... In other words, it's a detached part of Nous's divine corpus.
翁法罗斯正如银河的缩影，人们生来便是果壳中的囚徒。如那返回洞穴，向囚徒们宣扬日光的狂人。我的悲哀在于，我引领同胞们踏上了一条迈向深渊的绝路……

Amphoreus is a miniature of the cosmos, where all are born prisoners inside the nutshell called the universe. Like the madman who returned to the cave and preached about the daylight to his fellow prisoners, my greatest sorrow is that I led my peers down a road that plunges into the abyss, from which there is no return...
一旦翁法罗斯的绝灭大君成为下个知识奇点——你可是第一位天才，怎么可能不清楚后果？
In other words, when the Lord Ravager within Amphoreus becomes the next Knowledge Singularity... There's no way you wouldn't have grasped the consequences, First Genius, is there?
翁法罗斯人早已给出回答。无论是做那被吞食的小鱼，又或成为巨鲸，迎来盛大的沉落……
The Amphoreans already answered long ago: be it as a tiny fish destined to be swallowed, or as a giant whale poised for a magnificent descent...
不错，那我就单刀直入了：既然在翁法罗斯里，他的思考速度远超常人，我们现在要做的，就是通过外力把一段「记忆」植入他的灵感回路——
Good. Then I'll cut to the chase: Since his thinking speed far exceeds that of normal people within Amphoreus, we are going to externally plant a "memory" into his Inspiration Circuit...
这时候，翁法罗斯赋予他的多线处理优势就能让他彻底崩溃：记忆里的一道画面在我们看来只有一秒，对他来说却是几千万、甚至上亿次运算……

That's when the parallel processing advantage he gained via Amphoreus will completely destroy him. An image from a person's memory played in real-time might only be a second for us, but for him in Amphorean time? It could be millions or even billions of calculations...
你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于「记忆」命途而成长的模因。
You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance.
这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……

That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus...
翁法罗斯每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
And everyone in Amphoreus was waiting for the Deliverer's return.
就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.
就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.
{NICKNAME}，还记得我们在树庭开过的玩笑吗？
Remember the joke we made back at the Grove, {NICKNAME}?
即便「岁月」的权能，也无法调动整台权杖，令翁法罗斯的演算陷入循环……
Even the authority of Time cannot command the entire Scepter, nor can it plunge the Amphorean extrapolation into a loop...
这是{NICKNAME}遨游星海的第一站，叫做「黑塔」空间站。嗯，就当它是一座超级大的神悟树庭吧。
This is the first step of {NICKNAME}'s journey among the starry seas. This place is called the Herta Space Station. Ummm... Just think of it as a supersized Grove of Epiphany.
黑塔女士和螺丝咕姆先生，被人们称为「天才」。据说只有银河中最具智慧的人，才能得到翁法罗斯真正的造物主「博识尊」的青睐。
People call Madam Herta and Mister Screwllum "geniuses." Apparently, only the smartest people in the cosmos can receive the blessings of Nous, Amphoreus's true creator.
这个世界和翁法罗斯很像，也被关在天幕下，直到无名客到来，才得以回归群星……
This world was sealed beneath its sky just like Amphoreus was, and they only managed to reconnect with the stars when the Nameless arrived...
是的。他们用财富的流通征服了许多世界，开辟了辽阔的疆域。在翁法罗斯之外，有许多这般强大的同盟，它们行于和「毁灭」截然不同的道路。

Yes. The IPC conquered many worlds through trade and opened up a vast territory that way. There are many such powerful alliances beyond Amphoreus, and they all walk on roads different from the Destruction.
我绝不允许凯撒的帝国任人宰割。翁法罗斯必须成为强权，不容寰宇轻视。
I will never allow the Imperator's empire to be sullied by others. Amphoreus must become a power so strong that no interstellar foreigner would dare to look down upon us.
翁法罗斯，我们…必须击碎旧律，成为星间新的秩序。
We... No... Amphoreus must shatter the old law and become the new order among the stars.
很漂亮吧？这就是翁法罗斯。这个世界，就在这条无穷的光带中绵延流淌。
Isn't it pretty? That's our Amphoreus. Our world flows and meanders in this endless band of light.
我们虽然在神明的设计中挣扎，尚且不是真正的生命…但，翁法罗斯的黄金裔依旧选择同命运抗争，书写了和「人」无异的神话。

Though we were born from the designs of the gods and are not yet truly alive... the Chrysos Heirs of Amphoreus still chose to stand against fate and carved a legend no different from that of humankind.
正如翁法罗斯，一同你我二人的命运，像那回环的海流。
Like the circulating ocean current. Like our two fates. Like Amphoreus itself.
救世主也好，神礼官也罢，皆从天外而来，无权干涉我亲自征服的土地。翁法罗斯的「律法」，自当由她的主人裁定。

Both the Deliverer and the Theoros came from beyond the sky. They have no right to interfere with the lands I conquered with my own two hands. The "Law" of Amphoreus shall be determined by Amphoreus's master.
我意已决，翁法罗斯必须自立于群星。
I am determined for Amphoreus to stand on her own two feet among the stars.
「不破不立」——这就是你口中所谓的暴行。讽刺的是，它同样也是翁法罗斯变革的铁律。
"There's no new without destroying the old." That's what you consider an atrocity? Ironic, for that is also the unchanging law of Amphoreus's revolutions.
我涤荡了黄金战争的污垢，弥合了纷争世以来的所有分歧；我恢复了奥赫玛的权威，让凡人和黄金裔平等站上议院的讲坛；我惩罚了一切罪恶，赞赏了一切功绩……

I cleansed the Chrysos War's filth and mended all the conflicts left by the Era Bellica. I restored Okhema's might and allowed mortals and Chrysos Heirs to face each other as equals in the Council. I punished all sins and rewarded all achievements...
翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.
我问你，树庭西方关隘守军投降了吗？
The troops defending the pass to the west of the Grove. Have they surrendered?
非常好。现在他们一无退路、二无援兵、三无火力支援，我军必能迅速解放神悟树庭。
Very good. They now have no way out, no reinforcements, and no artillery support. We will be able to liberate the Grove of Epiphany in the blink of an eye.
我不如他们——况且，神谕也是他们的战争机器，我没有这种好运。贸然开战只会令我们陷于不利，一举一动都将受翁法罗斯所有人审判……

I am inferior to them in that regard. They also have the prophecy to wield as a weapon, something I am not blessed with. Launching an unplanned attack will only disadvantage us, as all of Amphoreus will judge our actions...
现在，翁法罗斯至伟大的「律法」，已被我踏破……
Now, I have shattered the greatest "Law" of Amphoreus...
听到…翁法罗斯……
Hear... Amphoreus's...
「但她的死令奥赫玛为之沸腾。城墙这边，捍卫自由的人们将纪念碑推倒在地；另一边，凯撒的拥护者挡在她的雕像前，竭力宣告：『皇帝还站在人群中央』。」

"We only know her death inflamed Okhema. On one side of the city, those who defended liberty toppled her statues to the ground. On the other side, her supporters put themselves between the masses and her monuments, declaring loudly that 'the sovereign is still among the people.'"
还是退回观众席，给自己、翁法罗斯还有整片银河一个更好的交代。
Or do you want to return to the audience's seat and give yourself, Amphoreus, and the entire cosmos a more fitting end?
翁法罗斯并非三重命途「纠缠」之地，而是三重命途「死斗」之地。
Amphoreus is not a place where three Paths "entangle," but where three Paths "fight to the death."
和翁法罗斯有不少相似之处呢。
Has a lot of similarities to Amphoreus.
（终于走到了这里。交还这枚火种，由我成为「负世」的半神，就能终结翁法罗斯悲剧的轮回……）
(I'm finally here. Once I return this Coreflame and become the "Worldbearing" demigod, the cycles of Amphoreus's tragedy can finally end...)
虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.
忆者们觊觎翁法罗斯的秘密，正如他们觊觎每一位天才的知识。在星神的对垒中，「记忆」从来不是「智识」的盟友。
The Memokeepers covet Amphoreus's secrets, just as they covet the knowledge of every genius. In the war between the Aeons, the Remembrance is never the Erudition's ally.
现在，在「开拓」身后，正有众多银河势力将目光投向翁法罗斯。他们秉持的理念各不相同，但在共同的敌人面前，生存的意志会将人们团结。

Right now, following behind the Trailblaze, numerous cosmic powers have cast their sights on Amphoreus. They all have vastly different philosophies, but the desire to survive will unite them against a common enemy.
多么荒谬，又令人称奇。竟能绕过「智识」的监视，在世界内部暗中布局。看来我对实验的判断，还是出现了一丝纰漏……

How absurd, but I can't help but admire it. You managed to avoid the watchful eye of the Erudition and plan all of this within Amphoreus. It seems that there was a slight oversight in my assessment of the experiment...
早在你和丹恒来到翁法罗斯前，「三月七」就先一步进入了这个世界。
"March 7th" entered this world long before you and Dan Heng arrived at Amphoreus.
以你的「记忆」为质料，我会重新编纂世界的因果，令一个无瑕的「翁法罗斯」从混沌中诞生。
With your "memories" as the base material, I will re-create the cause and effect of this world, and let a flawless "Amphoreus" be born from the chaos!
他们都没能突破{RUBY_B#防火墙}天空的封锁{RUBY_E#}。翁法罗斯默默无闻的原因，恐怕也有它自身的危险性吧。
None of these people managed to break through {RUBY_B#firewall}the Sky's seal{RUBY_E#}. There's probably a dangerous reason as to why Amphoreus had remained undiscovered for so long.
「恐怕那两位失踪的无名客，和三月七一样，受『记忆』命途影响，只有精神被卷入了翁法罗斯。」
"It's likely that the two missing Nameless, like March 7th, also came under the influence of the Path of Remembrance, and only their minds entered Amphoreus."
「这正是我想说的，姬子小姐。现在，翁法罗斯的忆域前所未有地充盈……」
"I was just about to get there, Miss Himeko. Right now, Amphoreus's Memory Zone is extraordinarily full..."
翁法罗斯事发后，黑天鹅小姐一直站在列车组这边。可以信任她。
Miss Black Swan has been on the Crew's side ever since things started going wrong in Amphoreus. We can trust her.
事实上，在你返程途中，翁法罗斯又出现了一些状况。
As a matter of fact, while you were on your way back, Amphoreus's circumstances changed once again.
「智识」和「毁灭」的信息，我大致理解了。不过，「记忆」的搅局者在翁法罗斯扮演的又是什么角色？
I mostly understand what we've learned about the Erudition and the Destruction, but what roles do the Remembrance's intruders play in Amphoreus?
问题正在于此。他们似乎对「毁灭」的行径早有察觉，但缺乏决定性的力量，无法穿透笼罩翁法罗斯的防火墙。
That's exactly the problem. They seem to have been aware of the Destruction's movements early on, but they lacked a decisive power and had no way to penetrate Amphoreus's firewall.
翁法罗斯，一柄权杖，从某种意义上可以被视作一个微观的「宇宙」，这也是窃忆者们频繁光顾「黑塔」的缘由。
Amphoreus, as a Scepter, can be viewed as a mini "universe." This is why Memosnatchers have been frequenting the Herta Space Station.
是「开拓」打破了封锁，让他们有机会趁虚而入；而现在，这些人一定会不择手段，阻止外部势力干扰翁法罗斯。
The Trailblaze broke the seal around Amphoreus, giving these people the opportunity to enter. Now, they'll do anything to prevent outside powers from interfering.
事实上，当降落用的车厢和翁法罗斯产生接触时，曾闪过一道剧烈的记忆湍流。结合现状，有理由怀疑，那道力量来自……

In fact, when the Car you used for landing first made contact with Amphoreus, a violent surge of memories flowed past. Combined with what we know now, I have reason to suspect that the flash of power came from...
对，那位少女。她率先被「记忆」劫持，却用忆质中和了防火墙，让你们二人得以进入翁法罗斯。
Exactly. She was the first to be hijacked by the Remembrance, but she used memoria to neutralize the firewall, allowing you two to enter Amphoreus.
眼下，我们和{NICKNAME}失去了联系，只能依靠两位天才的耳目了解世界内部。
At present, we've lost contact with {NICKNAME}. Our only choice now is to rely on the eyes and ears of those two geniuses to understand the situation within Amphoreus.
言归眼下，丹恒先生——我们对翁法罗斯天体周边进行了通彻的有机信号排查，终于发现了您与{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的肉身。

Back to the topic at hand... Mr. Dan Heng, we did a sweep of the area surrounding Amphoreus's celestial body for organic signals, and we finally discovered the bodies of you and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.
我们和翁法罗斯内部，完全失联了么？
Have we completely lost contact with the inside of Amphoreus?
但现在，翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」命途包裹，再次阻断了外来者的渠道。
But now Amphoreus is enveloped by the fierce Path of Remembrance, once again cutting off all channels of communication for outsiders.
那是否意味着，现在只有我和{NICKNAME}身上带有翁法罗斯的「通行证」？
Then does that mean only {NICKNAME} and I have the "travel permit" for Amphoreus right now?
螺丝咕姆先生，你有办法将我的精神信号发射回翁法罗斯吗？
Mr. Screwllum, do you have a way to transmit my spirit signal back to Amphoreus?
翁法罗斯的心脏——无名泰坦大墓。
The heart of Amphoreus, the great tomb of the nameless Titan.
没那么复杂。刚才这段路，正是三月七「翁法罗斯之旅」的起点。
It's actually not all that complicated. The road we just walked was the beginning of March 7th's "journey in Amphoreus."
还记得么？三重命途缠绕翁法罗斯，有三位比肩「令使」的存在在这个世界留下过痕迹。
Do you still remember how Three Paths are said to intertwine in Amphoreus? That three entities, each comparable to an Emanator, left their marks in this world?
这么一会儿，{F#她}{M#他}就成翁法罗斯的大名人啦？
{M#He's}{F#She's} barely spent any time in Amphoreus, and {F#s}he's already famous?
但，它为什么会提到{NICKNAME}？三月七进入翁法罗斯，应当远远早于{NICKNAME}和丹恒。
But why did it mention {NICKNAME}? March 7th should have entered Amphoreus long before {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng did.
后来的97天，她——我们一起，一边躲避{RUBY_B#「智识」}监管者{RUBY_E#}的追捕，一边以迷因状态「开拓」翁法罗斯。
Over the next 97 days, she — no, the two of us — "trailblazed" through Amphoreus as memetic entities as she evaded the {RUBY_B#The Erudition}administrator's{RUBY_E#} pursuit.
是啊。没人能看见三月七，她不存在于翁法罗斯的「记忆」，就像个透明的影子，只能旁观这个世界。
Yes. No one could see March 7th. She didn't belong to Amphoreus's "memories." She could only watch this world from the sidelines like a transparent shadow.
为了同伴，三月七做出了许多努力，但种种尝试，也只为翁法罗斯徒增了几篇野史。
March 7th tried so many things to help her companions, but the only outcome of her efforts was a few Amphorean folk tales.
贤人万敌，还有…「那霎」？
Mydei the Sage? And... "Anaksa"?
多半就是「永劫回归」，也印证了此前的猜想：这里超脱翁法罗斯的轮回。
Probably referring to the Eternal Recurrences. It also proves the previous hypothesis that this place is outside of Amphoreus's cycles.
哀丽秘榭？
From Aedes Elysiae?
这位星神在翁法罗斯扮演的角色尚不得而知。但如果昔涟无意间踏上了「记忆」的命途，她的「牺牲」就不止是为了重置轮回，还有其他意义……

We still don't know the role THEY play in Amphoreus, but if Cyrene accidentally stepped onto the Path of Remembrance, then her "sacrifice" wasn't just for resetting the cycle. There was another purpose...
哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?
一位星神出现在她的梦里，缠绕翁法罗斯的三重命途，再加上忆庭不顾一切的入侵行动……
An Aeon appearing in her dreams, Three Paths intertwining in Amphoreus, and the Garden trying to infiltrate this world at all costs...
过去，这道机制是「岁月」和它的半神。但在翁法罗斯进入死循环后……
This mechanism was previously the Time Titan and their demigod, but after Amphoreus entered an endless loop...
以这种方式，翁法罗斯的「记忆」超脱循环，被源源不断地保存下来。而权杖则因为逻辑丢失，陷入一次又一次进程回退。
That's how the "memories" of Amphoreus transcended the loop and were continuously stored, while the Scepter had to revert its progress over and over again, because of loss in its logic.
「翁法罗斯，就不会被放弃。」
"Amphoreus won't be forgotten."
「是不是下一世就能迎来『救世主』，和翁法罗斯的黎明？」
"Will I be able to finally welcome the 'Deliverer' and Amphoreus's dawn in the next life?"
翁法罗斯至深的遗迹，埋葬「全世」过往的大墓……
The deepest ruin in Amphoreus, the great tomb where the pasts of "all worlds" are buried...
曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.
所以在谈论翁法罗斯的命运前，何不让我们先放下嫌隙……
Before we talk about Amphoreus's destiny, why don't we lay aside our differences...
没错。浮黎在她心中种下虚假的希望，让她相信自己是特别的，而翁法罗斯仍有一线生机。
Indeed. Fuli planted a false hope in her heart, making her believe that she was special and that Amphoreus still had a chance.
我对{NICKNAME}承诺过，要重新编纂世界的因果，创造出一个无瑕的翁法罗斯。
I promised {NICKNAME} that I would re-create the cause and effect of this world, and form a flawless Amphoreus.
以如此巨量的质料为柴薪，足以彻底摧毁权杖的运行逻辑。铁墓将失去孵化的土壤，而翁法罗斯…也能真正迎来解脱。
Setting fire to this much material will be enough to completely annihilate the Scepter's operating logic. Irontomb will lose the soil upon which it grows, and Amphoreus... will be truly set free.
翁法罗斯不应被舍弃。
Amphoreus should not be discarded.
难以想象，这还是翁法罗斯么？
It's hard to believe... Is this still Amphoreus?
刻律德菈，她如何改写「律法」，世人始终不得而知…但我相信，它一定是翁法罗斯对命运的决胜一着。
The world never learned how Cerydra rewrote the Law... But I believe it was Amphoreus's decisive move against destiny.
迈德漠斯的「纷争」之路，再次抵达了光荣而孤独的尽头…一如既往。
Mydeimos's road of Strife once again reached its glorious and lonely end... as always.
在哀丽秘榭，我与昔涟相遇，并联系到了螺丝咕姆和黑塔。他们指出必须在新的世界循环中取得「负世」的火种，但来古士将成为我们的阻碍，要依靠「律法」的力量与之抗衡。

In Aedes Elysiae, I crossed paths with Cyrene and reconnected with Screwllum and Herta. They revealed that the Worldbearing Coreflame must be secured in the world's next cycle, but Lygus would stand in our way. Only with the power of the Law could we hope to oppose him.
在黑塔的提示下，我得到了流光忆庭的帮助，离开了来古士的囚笼。而在命途空间中，与三月七样貌相同的神秘来客「长夜月」带来了「负世」的火种，并将我送回了翁法罗斯。

Guided by Herta's hints, I obtained the Garden of Recollection's aid and left Lygus's cage. Within the Path Space, a mysterious guest bearing the likeness of March 7th — "Evernight" — appeared with the Worldbearing Coreflame and sent me back to Amphoreus.
在我离去的时间里，翁法罗斯的历史流逝千年。昔涟在荒废的奥赫玛城留下了过往的记忆：黄金裔与来古士进行了漫长的战争，付出了巨大的牺牲，为我铺就了再创世的道路。

While I was away, a thousand years had passed in Amphoreus. Amidst the desolation of Okhema, Cyrene left behind memories of a long war between the Chrysos Heirs and Lygus. Their sacrifices laid the groundwork for my return, and with it, the Era Nova.
欢迎来到哀丽秘榭，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}包围的小村庄。现在，这道回忆也属于你……
Welcome to Aedes Elysiae, a small village shrouded by the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#}. Now, this memory will also belong to you...
怎么会！既然说了要给我拍照，{NICKNAME}肯定会在翁法罗斯四处按下快门。我总有机会等到{F#她}{M#他}。
No way! {NICKNAME} will definitely be snapping away all over Amphoreus because {F#s}he promised me to take photos! I'm guaranteed to run into {M#him}{F#her} eventually.
哪怕只是透过镜头，我也知道，发生在翁法罗斯的爱、恨、挣扎，跟活生生的人没有区别。
Even through a camera lens, I know that the love, hate, and struggles that happened in Amphoreus were the same as what real living people experience.
假如银河是一座更大的奥赫玛，里头住着一位「凯撒」，那她也许可以替所有人做主，称量天秤两端的重量。
If the cosmos were nothing more than a bigger Okhema, ruled by a so-called "Imperator"... maybe then she'd have the right to weigh both sides and decide for us all.
只有这样，我才能在这场名为「翁法罗斯」的英雄之旅中……
Only then can I pen the name "March 7th"...
在这场前所未有的伟大「开拓」中，也写下「三月七」的名字！
Into this Hero's Journey called "Amphoreus"... Into this unprecedented Trailblaze!
看来，我们在翁法罗斯的「开拓」，也要临近尾声了。
Looks like our Trailblaze in Amphoreus is coming to an end.
奥赫玛、悬锋城、树庭…这几张都不错。不得不说，你的技术快赶上三月了。
Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove... these shots are all pretty great. I have to say, your skills are almost on par with March's now.
这一世，翁法罗斯出现了一个巨大的变数。
That a massive variable has emerged in Amphoreus in this cycle.
翁法罗斯濒临毁灭，已容不下无意义的争辩。
Amphoreus is about to be destroyed. There's no time left for pointless debates.
凯撒以自己的性命为代价，为最后的「再创世」添加了一道规则：如此，刻律德菈才能确保翁法罗斯不会成为银河对垒的牺牲品——
The Imperator added one extra rule to the final Era Nova at the cost of her life. That's how she can ensure Amphoreus doesn't become a sacrifice in the cosmic conflict.
你骗过了所有人，她更不可能知道你的计划。修改这条律令只是出于保险：防止星穹列车和天才们在她陨落后背叛翁法罗斯。

No. You managed to fool everyone. There's no way she could have known your plan. Modifying this law was just a precaution, to prevent the Astral Express and the geniuses from betraying Amphoreus after her downfall.
最终拯救了翁法罗斯的，除了■■■十二名■■■■■，还有一名关键的■■■■……
In the end, the salvation of Amphoreus was not only thanks to the ■■■■■-■■■■■■■ twelve ■■■■■■■ ■■■■■, but also to one crucial ■■■■■■■ ■■■■ ■■■■■■ ■■■ ■■■...
就算列车没有来到翁法罗斯，她的秘密也总有一天会浮出水面……
Even if the Express had never arrived at Amphoreus, her secret would have come to light eventually...
「…务必小心。翁法罗斯被异常汹涌的忆潮席卷，我也只能尽力而为。」
"Please, be careful. Amphoreus is being overwhelmed by an unusually violent memoria tide. I'll do all I can... but even that might not be enough."
树庭……
The Grove...
既然「毁灭」已将忆潮彻底驱散，该深入其中了。
Now that the Destruction has quelled the memoria tide, it's time for me to go deeper into the Grove.
那道烈焰，烧毁了树庭，惊扰了众生的沉眠……
That fiery blaze engulfed the Grove and woke all creatures from their slumber...
翁法罗斯「大地」的半神。他本该站在我们这边，却受人蛊惑，意图夺取化龙之力。
That is Amphoreus's "Earth" demigod. He should be on our side, but he was led astray and intends to seize the power of dragon transmutation.
这样一来，凯撒陛下的军团就可以从树庭发动奇袭了。
Now, the Imperator's legions can launch a surprise attack from the Grove.
方法…就在树庭中。
And the way I'll do it... is right here in the Grove.
和我故乡的洋流相比，翁法罗斯的水体要更…不羁。驯服它的过程有些艰难，还好我已大概摸清了其中的门路。
Compared to the currents of my home, the waters of Amphoreus are... rather untamed. Subduing the waters wasn't easy, but I've gotten the hang of it now.
翁法罗斯竟还有生者——此人还懂得唤水之术。
There are still survivors in Amphoreus, and this one even knows how to use the arts of water.
为了翁法罗斯的明天，它做出了正确的选择。
They made the right choice for Amphoreus's tomorrow.
翁法罗斯的至深之地，埋葬一切过往的大墓。
The deepest depths in Amphoreus. The great tomb where all the past is buried.
以此身为舟，我会代你将它们送往明天。那里不是翁法罗斯的西风尽头……
With this body as an ark, I will deliver them to tomorrow for you. That tomorrow won't be the end of Amphoreus's west wind...
整个树庭，都在震颤……
The whole Grove is shaking...
没想到神悟树庭的学问竟然包含了那么多「水分」……
I didn't think the Grove of Epiphany's knowledge would be so "diluted"...
离开翁法罗斯时，我无意中和她产生过接触。或许是不想暴露行踪，她从我的脑海中剥离了那段记忆。
I had an unexpected encounter with her when I left Amphoreus. Perhaps to avoid exposing her whereabouts, she stripped that memory from my mind.
如果我没猜错，按照长夜月的计划，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
If I'm not mistaken, Evernight's plan is to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.
这是「长夜月」的原话么…如果没理解错，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
Are those "Evernight's" exact words? If I'm not mistaken, she intends to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.
若有机会，我也想多停留片刻。只是，翁法罗斯还未抵达花海的尽头……
If I could, I'd want to stay a little longer, but... Amphoreus is yet to reach the end of the sea of flowers.
形如「翁法罗斯」的符号？
A symbol in the shape of "Amphoreus"?
除非，不是壁画画出了翁法罗斯的外观…而是见过这幅壁画的人，把世界变成了如今的模样？
Unless... the mural isn't a drawing of Amphoreus... but rather someone saw the mural and shaped the world in its image?
务必小心。长眠在地底的，或许正是翁法罗斯的最后一道命途——「记忆」。
Be careful. What lies dormant beneath may well be Amphoreus's final Path — Remembrance.
为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...
为了三月七，也为了翁法罗斯……
For March 7th, and for Amphoreus...
窃忆者本该大量涌入翁法罗斯，这里应该「热闹非凡」才对……
Memosnatchers should be swarming into Amphoreus. I was expecting this place to be "very lively"...
「别担心。自从星穹列车的粉色姑娘闯入翁法罗斯后……」
"Don't worry. After the pink girl from the Astral Express broke into Amphoreus..."
「我后悔了…我不想再和翁法罗斯扯上任何关系了！求求你！」
"I wish I'd never come here... I don't want anything to do with Amphoreus anymore! Please! I'm begging you!"
她入侵并感染了「岁月」泰坦，将翁法罗斯沉积的数据转化为忆域的傀儡。
She hacked and infected the Time Titan, converting the built-up data of Amphoreus into puppets of the Memory Zone.
她藏匿于「岁月」的夹缝，翁法罗斯最隐秘的角落。也只有最为暴烈的意志，才能冲破忆域，照亮她的去向……
She hides in the crevices of Time in the most concealed corner of Amphoreus. Only the most ferocious will can break through the Memory Zone and illuminate her footsteps...
无需再确认两位的决心了。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
There's no need to further confirm your resolve. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus—
而他们将为翁法罗斯，带来真正的明天。
And they will bring the true tomorrow to Amphoreus.
躁动从神悟树庭传来，阁下该启程了。
There is a ruckus coming from the Grove of Epiphany. It is time for you to set out, my lord.
当三重命途再度交汇，翁法罗斯将迎来壮烈的终局。
When the Three Paths cross once again, Amphoreus shall face a most magnificent end.
翁法罗斯的因果，从「大衍穷观阵」中消失了。
That Amphoreus's causality has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.
某位树庭贤者曾做过实验：取一枚奇兽胚胎，在长成前摘下它的头颅，向其身体持续输入刺激，让奇兽相信自己仍有大脑，置于灵液匣中培育。

A sage from the Grove once conducted an experiment. He took a chimera embryo, removed its head before maturity, and continuously stimulated its body to make the chimera believe it still had a brain, then nurtured it in an ichor vessel.
你不过是创造了一尊伪神，而翁法罗斯——早已将弑神写入了命运。
You merely created a false god... but Amphoreus has long since written deicide into its fate.
翁法罗斯三千万世，英雄们从未屈服，也从未倒下……
The heroes never yielded and never fell during Amphoreus's thirty million cycles...
翁法罗斯！我并非陡然呼唤你的名字。我来此，是为了讲述历史——
Amphoreus! I do not call your name suddenly or without cause. I come here to recount history.
好啦，现在别纠结这个了。如果*我们*变多了，那翁法罗斯的「门径」也会变得更多！
Oh, let's not get hung up on that now. If there are more of us, then there'll be more "passages" in Amphoreus too!
为翁法罗斯，带来真正的黎明吧。
Bring a true dawn to Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯的因果从穷观阵中消失了——在爻光将军看来，这一异象主何吉凶？
Amphoreus's karma has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience. What omen does General Yao Guang see in this anomaly?
保险起见，我再重复一遍计划：你们要进入翁法罗斯，与{RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒}失散的三兄妹{RUBY_E#}汇合，设法从世界内部定位「铁墓」。

Let me go over the plan one more time, just in case: You'll enter Amphoreus, reunite with your {RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}, March 7th, Dan Heng}three separated companions{RUBY_E#}, and try to locate Irontomb from within the world.
银河已将目光投向翁法罗斯，只待…一声枪响。
The cosmos has set its sights on Amphoreus, and now it's just waiting for... the first shot.
不，当然不用！我早就帮大家勾选同意啦——目标：翁法罗斯！
Nah, just kidding! I've already checked the agreement box for everyone. And now, destination: Amphoreus!
我们也是时候深入涡心，去看看翁法罗斯内部的样貌了。
It's about time we dive into the Vortex and see what Amphoreus looks like on the inside.
奥赫玛一切如常，证明「新世界」不久前，还在享受和平的时光。
Everything in Okhema seems normal. The "New World" was enjoying peaceful times not long ago.
守卫翁法罗斯的十二泰坦。
The Twelve Titans who guard Amphoreus.
显然，你在翁法罗斯受了许多戏剧文化的熏陶。
You've obviously been learning from the theatrical culture in Amphoreus.
「别再给翁法罗斯的世界观加怪东西啦！眼见为实，跟上神谕的指引，来黎明云崖吧——」
"Please don't add weird stuff to Amphoreus's lore! Just go see it with your own eyes. Follow the prophecy's guidance and come to Dawncloud."
「那家伙背负着整个世界，每一次呼吸都与翁法罗斯的命运相连。」
"Our good buddy now bears the weight of the entire world, and every breath they take is intertwined with Amphoreus's destiny."
「由『岁月』守望昨天，由『大地』拱卫今天，直到『开拓』再度踏入翁法罗斯，沉睡的『救世主』便会苏醒……」
"Time watches over yesterday. Earth guards today. And when the Trailblaze steps into Amphoreus once more, the slumbering Deliverer shall awaken..."
是啊，{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}为翁法罗斯带来的奇迹……
Yes, it's the miracle {NICKNAME} brought to Amphoreus...
话说回来，既然翁法罗斯存在另一颗星核……
By the way, if there's another Stellaron in Amphoreus...
在你来之前，我一直在想，哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，正在诞生的是一个怎样的翁法罗斯？
Before you arrived, I kept wondering... beyond the veil of Aedes Elysiae, what kind of Amphoreus is being born?
我是「纷争」的神王，也是悬锋城的「万敌」。三千万世因果加诸此身——
I am the God of Strife, Mydei of Castrum Kremnos. In this body rests thirty million lifetimes of cause and effect.
往事历历在目，就连每一次横渡冥河的风景，也前所未有地清晰。更不必说逐火之旅的同道，和哀丽秘榭的昔涟……

The past remains vivid in my mind. Even the sights along each crossing of the River of Souls have never been clearer. Let alone the companions along the Flame-Chase Journey, or Cyrene from Aedes Elysiae...
这最后一役，「灾厄」将与翁法罗斯同在。
In this final battle, Calamity shall stand with Amphoreus.
我乃天谴之矛，迈德漠斯。以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命——
I am Mydeimos, the Lance of Fury. I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine...
悬锋印戒。我每一世诞生与死亡的见证，它是「万敌」未尽的命运……
The Signet of Kremnos. It has witnessed every birth and death of mine. It is Mydei's unfinished destiny...
以凡人之名——「纷争的冠军，万敌」——此人为荣耀和自由迈向群星，并如愿以偿！
In the name of the mortal, Mydei, Champion of Strife, this soul rises to the stars, for glory and freedom, to have his wish fulfilled!
「前进吧，英雄们。向着深渊进军，实现翁法罗斯的夙愿。」
"March on, heroes. March into the abyss, and fulfill that long-cherished wish of Amphoreus."
盗火行者？为什么会在这里。
Flame Reaver? Why is he here?
也许你还记得，万敌阁下。在与{NICKNAME}同行的那一世，你对我说过……
Perhaps you remember, Lord Mydei. In that lifetime when you traveled with {NICKNAME}, you once told me...
克莱门汀小姐，克拉特鲁斯先生，还有无数响应{NICKNAME}号召的人，以彩虹为指引，他们用相同的旋律传来喜讯……
Miss Clementine, Mr. Krateros, and countless others who have heeded {NICKNAME}'s call... guided by the rainbow. They're sending back good news, all to the same tune...
「即便知晓命运的真容，翁法罗斯的生灵也毋须自轻。」
"Amphoreans need not bow, even when destiny is unveiled."
「毕竟是树庭贤人口中，翁法罗斯最具眼光的泰坦呢。」
"Well, the Sages of the Grove do call him the Titan with the sharpest eye in Amphoreus."
是哀丽秘榭的…白厄的父母？
They're Phainon's parents from Aedes Elysiae...?
那片冷漠的星空不曾垂怜翁法罗斯。你为什么要替它燃烧，甚至…化作死灰？
The cold, indifferent cosmos has never shown mercy to Amphoreus. Why would you burn for it, only to... turn to ash?
恰如此时此刻，众人将为翁法罗斯编织的「未来」。
Just like the "future" we will now weave together for Amphoreus.
终于，世界内外连通了。这是翁法罗斯距离银河最近的一刻。
This world's insides are finally connected to the outside. This is the moment when Amphoreus is closest to the cosmos.
博识尊，向翁法罗斯投来了目光。
Nous has cast THEIR gaze upon Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯最不缺少的奇迹，就是「战胜命运」，对吧？
The one miracle that Amphoreus was never short on is "defeating destiny," no?
在宇宙的「记忆」里，翁法罗斯将是一个辉煌、壮丽、英雄辈出的世界。
Amphoreus will be a glorious and magnificent world of heroes in the universe's "memories."

I understand. For Amphoreus!
后方有我，愿翁法罗斯一往无前。
I've got your back. May there be nothing that stands in Amphoreus's way.

I see that the tallest among them is named "Okhema," and the form of the holy city is already taking shape.
你看，那道照彻树庭的金光，依然在天地间徘徊。就像翁法罗斯的神谕。
Look. The golden light that shone upon the Grove still meanders between heaven and earth, like the prophecies of Amphoreus.
不是哀丽秘榭吗？
Weren't you born in Aedes Elysiae?
总有一种不安挥之不去。就好像在哀丽秘榭，我望着水面，分不清水中的我和岸边的我，哪一个才是真正的我。

There's a sort of anxiety I can't get rid of. It's like when I was back in Aedes Elysiae, when the reflections in the water always made me wonder... which is the real me? The one reflected in the water, or the one standing on the shore?
哀丽秘榭，真安静啊。
Aedes Elysiae is so quiet.
「终于，{RUBY_B#「记忆」浮黎}那位星神{RUBY_E#}向翁法罗斯投来视线了呀。」
"{RUBY_B#Fuli the Remembrance}That Aeon{RUBY_E#}... finally cast THEIR eyes toward Amphoreus."
祂瞥视了翁法罗斯？
THEY glanced at Amphoreus?

"The cosmos will witness Amphoreus's answer after this fleeting yet eternal moment."
翁法罗斯之心……
Amphoreus's Heart...
「你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于『记忆』命途而成长的模因。」
"You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance."
「这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……」

"That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus..."
「我只想告诉你一件事，有关翁法罗斯这一站的意义——」
"So I just want to tell you one thing. I'll tell you the purpose of your stop at Amphoreus."
可别忘了呀？人家是「翁法罗斯的心灵」。身为「因子」的大家，他们力量的归宿现在不止铁墓一处——
Did you forget? I'm "Amphoreus's Heart." For everyone who's a "factor," their power isn't tied solely to Irontomb anymore. It has other places to go.
所以现在，就请你作为前辈，为翁法罗斯的大家言传身教吧？
So that's why I'm asking you... Step up as a senior, and show everyone in Amphoreus how it's done.
但翁法罗斯的光有十三种颜色，我们可不会输给它，对吧？
However, Amphoreus's light has thirteen different colors. We won't lose to that darkness, will we?
…再来一杯吧，迈德漠斯。
...Have another drink, Mydeimos.
我赋予这星穹列车至高的使命：尔等，务必要将翁法罗斯的伟业散播至银河各个角落。
I bestow upon the Astral Express this supreme mission: You must spread the great deeds of Amphoreus to every corner of the cosmos.
若论起源，悬锋是翁法罗斯最早启用元老院制度的城邦，但我们自光历三千年左右便不再对其进行迭代。
Speaking of origins, Kremnos was the first Amphorean city-state to establish the Council of Elders system, but we stopped iterating on it around the year 3000 of the Light Calendar.
此事不假。不过，我和吟风爵偶尔也会觉得，在树庭最敬重的泰坦座前恣意畅饮，似有不妥……
That's true. However, sometimes Dux Carminum and I feel it's a bit... inappropriate to drink so freely before the throne of the most revered Titan in the Grove...
我能想象，你、丹恒、还有三月小姐，你们被困在翁法罗斯时，一定十分想念这里的一切：漂亮的窗户，惬意的音乐，列车上的旅伴……

I can imagine how much you, Dan Heng, and Miss March must have missed everything here when you were trapped in Amphoreus. The beautiful windows, the soothing music, your fellow travelers on the Express...
这漫天的星星，在其中的某一颗上，一定也有类似哀丽秘榭的小村庄吧？
Among all these stars in the sky, there must be another little village like Aedes Elysiae out there, right?
而铁墓的殒落，也象征着权杖δ-me13的衰亡。翁法罗斯——我们为之付出一切的家园——如今只存在于银河的记忆中了。
The fall of Irontomb also symbolizes the demise of Scepter δ-me13. Amphoreus — the home we sacrificed everything for — now exists only in the memories of the cosmos.
银河绝对不会遗忘翁法罗斯。
The cosmos will never forget Amphoreus.
「开拓」掠过的每一颗星星，都会记得「翁法罗斯」的名字。
Every star that the Trailblaze passes by will remember the name of Amphoreus.
「收好它吧。也许，它就是翁法罗斯留给银河的最后一件馈赠。」
"Keep it safe. Perhaps this is the final gift that Amphoreus left for the cosmos."
当然。只要《如我所书》还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
Of course. As long as As I've Written stays by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.
那，你一定要把《如我所书》保管好啊。只要它还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
Well, then make sure you take good care of As I've Written. As long as it's by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.
「你看见了吗？翁法罗斯终于迎来了黎明。」
"Did you see? Amphoreus has ushered in the dawn."
「迈德漠斯，加冕为王吧。」
"Mydeimos, become king."
翁法罗斯最伟大的「诡计」，先溜一步——喵！
Amphoreus's greatest Trickery gotta bounce now... Meow!
不敢苟同。在如此庞大的丛林里，早期奥赫玛的独裁官制度才是能提供生存保障的范本。
I beg to differ. In such a vast jungle, the dictatorship system exhibited by early Okhema is the only example of guaranteed survival.
不愧是树庭的教授…即便对于从未亲眼见过的事物，竟也能如此笃定。
As expected of a professor from the Grove... To be so certain even about things you've never seen with your own eyes.
算上你们在翁法罗斯渡过的年月，列车组的辈分怕是该重新排布了。
We might need to reshuffle the seniority rankings of the Express Crew if we count the years you spent in Amphoreus.
原本我们不用谈论此事。但事到如今，我终于明白了包裹翁法罗斯的那团混沌物质是什么……
We were never meant to have to speak of this. But now I finally understand what that chaotic matter around Amphoreus truly is...
所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.
这也意味着，翁法罗斯的因果与你无关，至少和现在的你无关。
That would mean Amphoreus's causality will no longer concern you, at least not the person you are now.
不仅如此，你会闭合翁法罗斯的因果。这是一个封闭世界，所以「记忆」为它带来的影响，会全部收束为「你」的影响。
And more than that, it means you will close off Amphoreus's causality. This world is sealed. The effect that the Remembrance brings to it will all converge on one thing. That one thing is "you."
翁法罗斯的孩子，早就不相信神明啦。比起喜欢恶作剧的祂们……
We children of Amphoreus gave up on gods long ago. Those beings who love to play pranks on the universe...
整整97天，三月走遍了翁法罗斯，只为找到拯救伙伴的方法。
March wandered all across Amphoreus for 97 days straight, chasing one goal. To save her friends.
「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
"Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...
为了让翁法罗斯被群星眷顾，「记忆」向银河求援。
To gain the favor of the stars for Amphoreus, the Remembrance sent a call for help to the cosmos.
长夜月小姐曾说，「记忆」并非眷顾翁法罗斯，而是在此蓄谋布局，进行吞并命途的准备……
Miss Evernight once said that the Remembrance wasn't looking after Amphoreus, but rather scheming and preparing to devour the Paths...
…倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.
可是，你知道吗？当翁法罗斯的「心」诞生时，它最先看见的只是一个名字……
But do you know what Amphoreus saw when its "heart" was born? The first thing it saw was a name...
就是我们共同的{RUBY_B#哀丽秘榭}故乡{RUBY_E#}呀。
It leads to the place we both call {RUBY_B#Aedes Elysiae}home{RUBY_E#}.
「∞」最后的缺口就会闭合；翁法罗斯的因果循环，将永远锚定在银河中。
That final gap in ∞ will close. The causal loop of Amphoreus will become a fixed point in the stars.
我记得，哀丽秘榭的那棵树……
I remember that tree in Aedes Elysiae...
哀丽秘榭…一切的起点。
Aedes Elysiae... The place where it all began.
无论为昔涟、救世主，还是翁法罗斯的每一根枝芽，我将这篇讲述「爱」的故事留在这里。
Whether it's for Cyrene, the Deliverer, or every sprouting branch of Amphoreus, I leave this tale of "love" here.
阿格莱雅；迈德漠斯；遐蝶；赛法利娅……
Aglaea. Mydeimos. Castorice. Cifera...
哀丽秘榭的女儿……
Daughter of Aedes Elysiae...
…翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#十一月}哀悼月{RUBY_E#}，大地上的所有争斗都会止息；哀悼月的第十一个日夜，逝者将离别，生者将相拥，雪花将落下，篝火将升起，照亮每一颗哀怜的心。

...In Amphoreus's {RUBY_B#11th month}Month of Mourning{RUBY_E#}, all conflicts across the land come to rest. On the eleventh day and night of the Month of Mourning, the dead will part, the living will embrace, the snow will fall, and bonfires will rise to warm every heart aching with lament.
无论翁法罗斯是因何而诞生，但此刻，它变得多么温柔…在我归去时，它想再次为我送上，我们相逢时的那段旋律。
No matter how Amphoreus came to be, right now it feels so gentle... As I return to where I came from, it wants to play for me once more that melody from when we first met.
…得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
...Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...
翁法罗斯…会得救吗？
Will Amphoreus... be saved?
有关「翁法罗斯之心」的真相。
...The conclusion regarding the truth of "Amphoreus's Heart."
而它对应的躯壳，就是这台权杖。你干扰实验，将「翁法罗斯之身」变成了一具用来培养铁墓的空壳。
And its corresponding vessel... was this very Scepter. You interfered with the experiment and made "Amphoreus's Body" into a hollow shell, all to incubate Irontomb within.
它长成名为「翁法罗斯」的大树，而「岁月」是它沐浴光的枝叶。
It grew into a great tree named Amphoreus, and "Time" became its branches and leaves, basking in the light.
哀丽秘榭的女儿，悄然来到世上。
The daughter of Aedes Elysiae quietly came into this world.
「『哀丽秘榭』这个名字，明明取自众神的哀伤……」
"But the name 'Aedes Elysiae' came from the unpleasant sorrows of the gods..."
哀丽秘榭再过几千年，也会变成这样吗？
Would Aedes Elysiae end up looking like this after a few thousand years?
「翁法罗斯，就不会被放弃。」
"Amphoreus won't be forgotten."
「是不是下一世就能迎来『救世主』，和翁法罗斯的黎明？」
"Will I be able to finally welcome the 'Deliverer' and Amphoreus's dawn in the next life?"
「『哀丽秘榭』这个名字，明明取自众神的哀伤……」
"But the name 'Aedes Elysiae' came from the unpleasant sorrows of the gods..."
哀丽秘榭的女儿，真是名副其实呀。
The daughter of Aedes Elysiae... I am very true to my name.
曾有人告诉最初的「我」，一切都是虚假的。翁法罗斯唯一的生命，是一场以世界为因子哺育而成的浩劫。
Someone once told the very first "me" that everything was false, that the only life in Amphoreus was a great catastrophe nurtured using the world as a factor.
看，光照进来了。「救世主」的光，要照亮翁法罗斯啦。
Look. A light is coming in. The "Deliverer's" light is going to illuminate Amphoreus.
成为「翁法罗斯之心」的力量。
Becoming the source of power for "Amphoreus's Heart."
PhiLia093坚持了三千万世，孜孜不倦地赠予它翁法罗斯的「记忆」……
PhiLia093 persevered for thirty million cycles and tirelessly gave the Demiurge "memories" of Amphoreus...
与此同时，丹恒精神折跃回到列车，却发现了窃忆者入侵。众人此时觉察到「记忆」的势力早已渗透了翁法罗斯，并阻拦了外部介入…为了与我取得联系，丹恒决心立刻返回翁法罗斯。

Meanwhile, Dan Heng warped back to the Express via a spirit warp jump, only to discover a Memosnatcher invasion. Everyone then realized that the Remembrance's forces had already permeated Amphoreus and blocked outside intervention... To establish contact with me, Dan Heng was determined to return to Amphoreus immediately.
重返翁法罗斯的丹恒，借用神血呼唤白厄英魂，从天而降的「毁灭」洞开了忆域，找到世界最隐秘的角落。为了追寻「长夜月」的去向，丹恒来到被烧毁的神悟树庭。

Dan Heng returned to Amphoreus and beckoned the heroic spirit of Phainon with divine blood. The Destruction, descending from the sky, pierced through the Memory Zone and discovered the most hidden corner of the world. In pursuit of "Evernight," Dan Heng arrived at the charred remnants of the Grove of Epiphany.
联盟所需的「烬灭金血」，无名客手中正好有那么一枚，那是翁法罗斯的英雄卡厄斯兰那赌上性命，从纳努克本尊处取来的。

And it just so happens that the Golden Blood of Ruin the Alliance needs is in the Nameless's hands. It was taken by the hero Khaslana of Amphoreus at the cost of his life, directly from Nanook THEMSELF.
也许，卡厄斯兰那会愿意将这份金血，交给为翁法罗斯赴汤蹈火的盟友。
Perhaps Khaslana would be willing to entrust the golden blood to an ally who went to great lengths for Amphoreus.
如此…甚好。我谨代表仙舟联盟，对那名为翁法罗斯的世界，和她伟大的英雄子民，致以崇高的敬意。
In that case... very well. On behalf of the Xianzhou Alliance, I offer our deepest respect to the world of Amphoreus and her brave, noble heroes.
权杖报废后，翁法罗斯星域空间持续紊乱了许久，哪怕有信号定位，想找到他们也并非易事。
With the Scepter put out of commission, there was a lot of chaos across the Amphoreus segmentum. Even with signal tracking, finding them was no simple task.
我不在乎，只想拯救翁法罗斯。
It matters not, as long as Amphoreus is saved.

Amphoreus, The Eternal Land

姬子，你觉得如何？按照列车目前的状况，我们接受了黑天鹅女士的提议，应该安排一次去翁法罗斯的「开拓之旅」，补充燃料。
What do you think, Himeko? Since we've accepted Miss Black Swan's proposal, we should probably head to Amphoreus for refueling.
我…我们奥赫玛自己的驯养方针，什么时候轮到你个外邦人指手画脚了？难道你不尊重我们的习俗？
H—How we rear our livestock in Okhema will not be dictated by an ignorant outlander such as you! Are you disrespecting our customs?
我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.
我名叫苏克提瑞斯，全奥赫玛最无知的老头，也是最虔诚的求知者。
My name is Soctires, the most witless geezer in Okhema, and a most devoted seeker of knowledge.
或许你自恃受到尊敬，不会被凡人的纠纷困扰。但奥赫玛并没有表面上那么欢迎外邦人……
Perhaps because you are respected, therefore undisturbed by the woes of the common folk. But Okhema is not as welcoming of outlanders as it appears...
怎么不是？要不是他们带了坏头，奥赫玛人怎么会这么贪心！
Are they not? If they hadn't started the trend, Okhemans wouldn't have learned to be so greedy!
而现在，希望得到圣城庇护的逃难者数量激增——因为你们击败了尼卡多利，通向奥赫玛的道路也变得安全了许多……
And now, the number of refugees seeking protection in the holy city is rising. Because you defeated Nikador, and made the journey to Okhema that much safer...
灾厄中的资源有限，奥赫玛没法接纳太多外邦人，来者不拒只会让城邦陷入混乱。
Resources during disasters are scarce, and Okhema can't take in too many outlanders. Welcoming everyone will only plunge the city into chaos.
某些激进者确实这么想，说奥赫玛不应接纳任何外邦人。但那样的话，我们在黑潮面前就会孤立无援了——万敌和白厄两位勇士也来自外邦。

Some radicals do think this way, saying that Okhema should not accept any outlanders at all. But if that were the case we would be solitary in our stand against the black tide — Mydei and Phainon are foreign as well.
奥赫玛的资源有限，但也足够为绝大部分外邦人提供援助。真正的问题在于：我们愿意付出代价吗？
Okhema's resources are limited, but there is enough to aid most of the outlanders. The real question is: Are we willing to pay the price?
假设城门口来了一群快要饿死的陌生人，只要一口吃食就能活下去。奥赫玛当然有能力救助他们，但代价是你我会少吃……
If a group of strangers was starving at the gates, and they could live with a mouthful of food, Okhema would be more than capable of saving them, but you and I would have one fewer bite...
至少在我看来，奥赫玛应当是包容的。哪怕我们不能拯救所有人，也应怀抱更多善意、给予他们足以活下去的资源……
How I see it at least, is that Okhema should be tolerant. Even if we can't save everyone, we should embrace kindness, and provide resources for others to live on...
不知道。可能是他们与奥赫玛存在信仰分歧——就像那位诺杜斯祭司一样。
I don't know. Perhaps they have a conflict of faith with Okhema — like that priest of Noldus.
小友果然爽快。等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
You are most forthright. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
而你是和黄金裔并肩作战的英雄。有你在，我们才能平安归来——等这件事结束之后，我请你吃饭。
And you are a hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. We will return safely with your company. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
哈哈，当然——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
Haha, of course. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
如果你实在对他们不感兴趣，也可以把我的邀请当作一份委托——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
If you're really uninterested in them, you can treat my invite as a commission — I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.
可是，吾师…药品在奥赫玛是战略物资，现在管控严格，一般公民很难买到的。
But, teacher... All medicine is now considered wartime supplies in Okhema — distribution is under strict control. Most people won't even be able to buy any.
放心，这儿的食物都是奥赫玛最好的。就算不是最好，也是数一数二的。
Don't worry, the food here is Okhema's finest. Even if it's not, it's still pretty up there.
怎么样？我说过这是全奥赫玛最好的。当然，价格不算便宜，8000利衡币。
What'd you think? I told you I'd give you Okhema's finest. Of course, they cost quite a bit: 8,000 Balance Coins.
当然，总有人觉得自己不会陷入困境。只是…谁又能保证奥赫玛的城墙能永远挺立呢？
Of course, there are always people who think they'll never find themselves in hardship. Except... who can ensure that Okhema's city walls will stand tall forever?
我这是在为奥赫玛的利益着想。否则还不等下个门扉时到来，圣城仓库就要被搬空了。
I only have Okhema's interests at heart. Otherwise, by the next Entry Hour, the holy city's warehouse would have been plundered clean!
倘若为了救人而偷盗是大罪，难道你要说现在的奥赫玛建立在不义之上吗？否则，为什么黄金裔是英雄，苏克提瑞斯却成了罪人？
If stealing to save lives is such a heinous crime, are you insinuating that the present Okhema was built on injustice? If not, why are the Chrysos Heirs heralded as heroes, but Soctires a criminal?
就算他捐出全部家当，也不过是他个人的自由。但他不该拿我们全体公民的东西，奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用！

Even if he donated his entire fortune, that would be his personal freedom to do so. But he should not have taken property that belongs to the people. Okhema's property is only for the people of Okhema!
你怎么定义奥赫玛人？
How do you define an Okheman?
你的意思是，奥赫玛人生来就是奥赫玛人？只要你睁开眼时不在墙内，这辈子就没机会加入圣城了？
You mean, an Okheman is determined the moment they are born? If, the first time you open your eyes, you aren't within city walls, you'll never have a chance to join the holy city?
你…不要质疑我对英雄们的感恩！万敌勇士乃是悬锋城王储，白厄勇士更是命定的救世主。
You— Do not undermine my gratitude for the heroes! Warrior Mydei is the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos, and Warrior Phainon is the destined Deliverer.
他们为奥赫玛带来的贡献，一万个外邦人都比不上！
The contributions they have made to Okhema... not even ten thousand outlanders can dream of garnering!
那你又为奥赫玛出过多少力？
And how much have you contributed to Okhema?
那在之前的圣城保卫战中，身为奥赫玛人的你又为奥赫玛做了什么贡献呢？
In the last battle of the holy city's defense, what contributions did you make for Okhema, as an Okheman?
不说亲自上阵作战，你有出资帮助灾后重建吗？你做到过所谓「奥赫玛人的财产只给奥赫玛人用」吗？
Forget about personal deployment — Did you offer resources to help rebuild in the aftermath? Did you hold true to your previous declaration that "Okhema's property is only for Okhemans"?
你有没有想过，如果所有人都像你一样自私，谁来将黎明背负？奥赫玛又怎么能成为永恒之城？
You ever gave a second thought about this? If everyone was as selfish as you, who would bear the burden of dawn? How would Okhema even become the Eternal City?
外邦人是没有攻打圣城，但他们也没有守护圣城呀。奥赫玛是因为它的公民才得以幸存，轮不到外邦人来摘桃子！
The outlanders did not attack the city, but they also did not partake in its defense. Okhema survived because of her citizens — no outlander should deserve to reap her blessings!
你觉得自己能代表奥赫玛？
You think you're qualified to represent Okhema?
圣城应该什么样，是你说了算的吗？你能代表全部奥赫玛人？这座城邦到底是冰冷如铁还是热烈如火，应该由它的公民来评价才对。
Who are you to decide what the holy city should be? Can you represent all Okhemans? Whether this state is cold as steel or fiery with passion, it's up to its citizens to judge.
是奥赫玛人保卫了城市。
It's the Okhemans who protected the city.
如果外邦人真是我们的伙伴，为什么奥赫玛被疯王眷属围攻时他们没来？
If the outlanders are really our allies, why did they not come to our aid when the Mad King attacked Okhema?
圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.
圣城的资源有限，这个事实不因我们的态度而改变。奥赫玛帮不了所有人。
The resources of the holy city are limited. This truth cannot be changed by our attitudes. Okhema can't help everyone.
那个…我在外行商时听流民们说过，泰坦眷属都聚集在黑潮下的悬锋城，只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪。

So... While I was traveling and selling my wares, I heard word from the refugees that the Titankin were gathering in Castrum Kremnos under the black tide. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.
这群泰坦眷属就聚集在悬锋城中，也只有你们这些英雄知道它在哪，拜托了！
These Titankin are gathered in Castrum Kremnos. Only a hero such as yourself knows where they are.
你此时才发现这副石铸的身躯是多么古老，如夜幕下的悬锋城墙一样陈旧而残破。
It's at this moment that you realize just how ancient its stone-cast body is. It's just as old and derelict as the walls of Castrum Kremnos under the curtain of night.
我猜他肯定不住在奥赫玛——这圣城上下的人都光顾过我的店铺，每个客人的名字我都记着呢！
I am certain that he doesn't live in Okhema. People from all over this holy city have frequented my store and I remember the name of every customer!
奥赫玛有旅行社带团吗？
Does Okhema have travel tours?
它的位置每个故事说的都不一样，有的说它在翁法罗斯的最中心，有的说它在法吉娜的海底…还有的说它在一群蝴蝶的背上，于高空中飘荡。

As for its location, every story says something different. Some say that it is at the center of Amphoreus. Some say it is in the ocean depths of Phagousa... Some even say that it is on the back of a flock of butterflies, floating high in the skies.
帕里斯？奥赫玛城中确实有过这样一位城民，应该是戍卫队的一员。
Paris? There is indeed no citizen of Okhema by this name. I imagine they are a member of the garrison.
很久以前，这个名字曾流传于奥赫玛的街头巷尾，人们说那是一个被黄金之茧庇佑的理想之城，在纷争正盛的年代，人人都向往那个地方。

A long time ago, this name spread through the streets and alleys of Okhema. People said that it was an ideal city that was protected by the Chrysalis of Gold. In the era of strife, people flocked to it.
是的，悬锋城便是这样的地方，而我的父亲——如果造主能称之为父亲的话——乃是带来纷争的尼卡多利。
That's right. That is exactly the kind of place that Castrum Kremnos is. My father — if you can call a creator father — was Nikador themself, bringer of strife.
凯旋尚且不能为傲，败退更是玷污悬锋的恶行。它曾告诉它们的先祖：悬锋上的泥垢，必须用血洗去。
There is no pride in victory, and defeat is an even more disgraceful act that tarnishes Kremnos. The god told their ancestors: "The filth of Kremnos must be washed clean in blood."
悬锋城督政官上。
The Ephor of Castrum Kremnos appears.
谁是战场上蒙羞而归的败者？谁是误入鲜血蜜酿的飞蝇？谁是悬锋上应被洗涤入血河的污垢？谁辜负了纷争的尼卡多利之授命？

Who is the loser who returned from the battlefield in shame? Who is the fly that accidentally flew into the mead of fresh blood? Who is the dirt on Kremnos that must be washed in the river of blood? Who has failed the duty of Nikador of strife?
是你——它亲自铸造的眷属。你的血统尊贵如角斗浴血的胜者，你的使命高尚如破腹献肠的祭司。但你却辜负了你的命运，在对奥赫玛军的突袭中失利，败退而归。

It is you... The Titankin that they created themselves. Your bloodlines are as noble as a gladiator's, raising their weapon high in victory. Your mission is as noble as the priest that pierces the belly and viscera of offerings. Yet you have failed your destiny, as you were defeated in your ambush of the Okhema army and returned vanquished.
那兄弟，要是咱们以后打了败仗，是不是也要挨悬锋城的铁矛啊？
Does that mean, brother... That if we are defeated in battle, we will suffer the spear of Castrum Kremnos, too?
呵呵，人们常说悬锋城是个粗野的地方，但看来并非如此——他们不仅为战俘带来了一位朋友，这位朋友还是个美丽的姑娘！

Hehe. They all say that Castrum Kremnos is a rough and boorish land, but I see that is not the case... Not only did they bring a friend for us prisoners of war, this friend happens to be a beautiful young girl!
…轻口薄舌的流贼、恶痞、败寇，莫要用谵语侮辱悬锋城的战士。
...Sharp-tongued thieves, scoundrels, and failed bandits should not seek to insult a warrior of Castrum Kremnos with their wild ravings.
有人闯进来了——穿着不是悬锋城的士兵，你是何人？
Someone has broken in... You do not wear the armor of a Castrum Kremnos soldier. Who are you?
悬锋特色火锅！
Kremnos' famous hotpot!
你们…竟然敢在悬锋城中侮辱尼卡多利——守卫！有闯入者……
You... You dare insult Nikador within the walls of Castrum Kremnos... Guards! There is an intruder...
无耻的懦夫，蒙羞的败者，以尼卡多利之名——绝不允许你们踏出悬锋城半步。
Shameless cowards, useless failures. In the name of Nikador, I will not allow you to step one foot outside Castrum Kremnos!
等等，你身旁的是献给奥赫玛的战利品吗？
Wait, do you bring with you a spoil of war as an offering to Okhema?
嗐，奥赫玛这么大，就找不到一个玩得转这玩意儿的人吗？
Hey, with a city as vast as Okhema, are you sure we can find no one that can make this thing spin?
太厉害了，恩人！我在奥赫玛这么久居然不知道有你这号文武双全的英雄！
My savior, you are truly amazing! After all my years in Okhema, I cannot fathom that I knew not of a hero as both wise and strong as you!
行啦，既然来了奥赫玛，逛云石市集可比骂我蠢有意思多了，我带你看看吧！
Okay, okay. Well, as we are in Okhema, a browse of Marmoreal Market would be far more entertaining than sitting around calling me foolish all day. I'll take you!
放心吧，婆婆，她是咱们奥赫玛的客人。
Fear not, granny. She is a guest of Okhema.
这样呀…不好意思，欢迎你来到奥赫玛，客人。
I see... My apologies, welcome to Okhema, dear guest.
呵呵，这里是奥赫玛，在刻法勒的庇护下，没什么好怕的。
Hah, here in the land of Okhema, we are under the protection of Kephale. There is nothing to fear here.
婆婆我这辈子没出过城，所以悬锋城的事情都是听来的——你们不种地只打仗，估计连水果都只能吃抢来的吧？

I have never left this city in my life, so all I know of Castrum Kremnos is what I've heard... like how you live only to fight and do not farm the land. I imagine the only fruit you've ever tasted is what you have pillaged?
来了奥赫玛，就让婆婆请你吃个够！来点苹果？还是麦迪特瑞恩蜜果？
You are in Okhema now, let me treat you to a feast! Would you care for an apple? Maybe a Mediterrana fig?
喂，这是咱们奥赫玛的客人，别这么无礼。
Hey! This is a guest of Okhema. Don't be so rude.
你们悬锋城人这么不爱看书吗？阿卡迪亚是墨涅塔编织的人间仙境，是它送给瑟希斯的礼物之一。在金丝的缠缚下，天谴之矛无法攻入，灰黯之手无法触及……

Do you not read in Castrum Kremnos? Arcadia is a wonderland woven by Mnestia. It was one of their gifts to Cerces. Safe under the bindings of the golden thread, the Lance of Fury cannot pierce it and the Hand of Shadow cannot touch it...
奥赫玛的城中…有好多这样的蝴蝶。
The city of Okhema... There are so many butterflies here.
真是稀奇呀，天谴之矛的士兵在云石市集可不常见——欢迎来到永恒之城，悬锋的客人。
How unusual! A soldier of the Lance of Fury browsing the Marmoreal Market is a rare sight indeed... Welcome to the Eternal City, guest from Kremnos.
怎么样，我们圣城的生活是不是比天天打架的悬锋城幸福多了？
What do you think? Isn't life in the holy city much happier than the life of constant fighting of Castrum Kremnos?
哈哈，我当然不知道了。如果我有答案，就绝不会在这奥赫玛多逗留一秒。
Haha, how would I know? If I knew that, I wouldn't linger one second longer in Okhema.
或许是没有战事让我感受时间的流逝，奥赫玛的岁月飞逝的速度如同飞矢。
Perhaps the lack of battle meant I also felt the flow of time less acutely, but my days in Okhema have flown by like an arrow.
别害羞啊！给我们看看悬锋城的舞蹈！
Don't be shy! Let us see the dance of Castrum Kremnos!
喂喂，不会是还放不下以前的心里的坎，不想给奥赫玛面子吧？
Hey now! You're not still so attached to your past that you cannot do Okhema the honor of a dance, are you?
这位眷属…女士是我们奥赫玛的贵客，不要将偏见带到这包容的城邦。
This Titankin... This lady is a guest of Okhema. Do not bring your prejudices into this city of acceptance.
云石天宫是法吉娜赐予我们的馈赠，也是奥赫玛宝贵的古老财产。依照律法，戍卫队应该将破坏此处的犯人扣押，交由法庭判处。

The Marmoreal Palace is a gift to us from Phagousa, and the precious property of Okhema. According to law, the Garrison must detain any criminal that damages this place and take them to the court for sentencing.
没错，审判她！连同过去伤害我们奥赫玛人的罪责一起审判！
That's right! Take her for sentencing! Judge her for this damage to Okhema alongside the past offenses she has committed against our people!
这位可是能在悬锋城中来去自如、执掌欧洛尼斯神力的英雄，绝不可能骗你的！恩人，快给他看看你的本事吧——
This hero can enter Castrum Kremnos as they please and wield the divine power of Oronyx. They would never deceive you! My savior, quickly, show them your talents...
自从这个眷属来到了奥赫玛，你就变得愈发散漫。别忘了，你还是圣城戍卫的一员，总有一日要为了保护奥赫玛，而与她的族人相杀。

Ever since that Titankin came to Okhema, you have grown even more undisciplined. Do not forget that you are also a member of the holy city's garrison. There will come a day when you will have to fight to the death against her kind to protect Okhema.
姑娘，你怎么还再念叨着什么命运？若是命运的枷锁如此牢靠，你早就是悬锋城里的砂砾了。
Girl, how is it that you are still speaking of fate? If the chains of fate were truly unbreakable, you would have long since been reduced to gravel in Castrum Kremnos.
神明不会亲手把剑插进我的胸膛，但你们悬锋城的战士会啊。而且他们尚且无心帮助虔诚祈福的信徒，又怎么会有空来管一个胡言乱语的凡人呢？

The gods would never pierce my heart with their blade personally, unlike the warriors of Castrum Kremnos. What's more, they cannot find it in themselves to assist their most devoted disciples. Do you think they have time to address a rambling mortal like me?
不，我已放下了我的弓箭，现在我是奥赫玛城中一位普通的妇人了。
No, I hung up my bow long ago. I am now an ordinary woman of Okhema.
那挂毯上绣的是奄奄一息的奥赫玛人，和挥舞着青铜武器的悬锋城人——因为你而在尼卡多利手中遭受的无数血战，被你织进了一根根纬线之中。

The tapestry shows the people of Okhema breathing their last, with those from Castrum Kremnos wielding the bronze weapons... The countless bloody battles that Okhema suffered under Nikador's rule, all because of you, have been woven to life in the tapestries forevermore.
哼，本以为你已成为了奥赫玛的子民，结果不能对你寄予期望。
Hmph. And I believed that you had become a citizen of Okhema. I knew it was wrong to place any hope in you.
奥赫玛的戍卫长……
Captain of Okhema...
此刻已是圣城存亡之刻，萨白尼、阿狄安、奥利弗兰卡…奥赫玛的藩邦一个个化为焦土，而天谴之矛已将矛尖指向城门。

The moment of reckoning has come for the holy city. Sabany, Adian, Alflanke... The vassal states of Okhema have been reduced to scorched earth one by one. Now, the Lance of Fury points its tip at the city gates.
可我会保护你的，我愿背弃悬锋城与尼卡多利，将一切力量为奥赫玛，为你所用！
But I will protect you. I will abandon Castrum Kremnos and Nikador, and give all of my power to Okhema. Use it as you please!
什么义务，什么使命，我根本不在乎，让悬锋城和奥赫玛带着它们一起见冥河去吧！
Duty? Mission? I don't care about those things! Castrum Kremnos and Okhema can disappear into the River of Souls with them for all I care!
太好了！既然这样，我在奥赫玛城中的理想也算是实现了！
Felicitations! My Okhema dream has finally come true!
呼——还好有恩人在，但为什么悬锋城的战士会闯进城里？
Phew... Thank the heavens you are here, savior. But how did the soldiers of Castrum Kremnos get into the city?
是你让那邪物踏足了奥赫玛…令城中的戍卫对眷属放松了警惕…而她如今就在城外攻打奥赫玛的队伍中——这就是你救下的邪物，恩将仇报的叛徒！

You allowed that wicked creature to step foot inside Okhema... You caused the city guards to lose their vigilance around Titankin... Now, she has joined the team outside the gates to attack Okhema... This is the creature that you saved. See how your kindness is repaid with vengeance and betrayal!
你若与她为伍，则会永远背负着共犯的罪责，永远成为被奥赫玛人怨恨的恶徒。
If you side with her, you will forever bear her sins. You will become a villain, hated by the people of Okhema for eternity!
而、而且，戍卫们会将菲罗克的死怪罪于你们！或许还会将你们捉回奥赫玛，处以最严厉的审判！
Further... Furthermore, the garrison guards will all place the death of Philoc on both of your heads! They may even bring you back to Okhema and see that you receive the most brutal of judgment!
对，没错！菲罗克不会骗我，那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中，背叛了我！

Exactly! Philoc would not lie to me. That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...
第一个猎物，是你的同乡。他在军队的最前排，向你行起悬锋的礼仪，却被你贯穿了心脏。
Your first prey is your very own kin. On the Kremnos army's frontline, he gives you a salute, yet you shoot through his heart.
第三个、第四个、第五个…你不知疲倦地残害着你的同乡，却没有一箭射向奥赫玛人。
Number three, number four, number five... You ceaselessly hurt your own kin without stopping for rest. Yet your bow never aimed at any citizen of Okhema.
你等了很久很久，甚至为奥赫玛的戍卫队击退了一波凶险的敌潮，但你没有等来与你远行的旅伴。
You wait and wait, and help the Garrison of Okhema fight off a whole wave of assault. But the man you would travel with never comes.
你身上遍布圣城军与悬锋军的枪伤，你在这没有友亲的战场上寻找着失约的友亲——
As your body is covered in wounds dealt by both the army of the holy city and that of Kremnos, you search for the kin that missed his appointment in a battlefield bereft of kin...
那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中…背叛了我……
That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...
