没错，你是叛徒，你背叛了悬锋城，背叛了自己的同袍父兄，还想抛下这救赎你的圣城，你是不忠的叛徒。
That's right. You are a traitor. You betrayed Castrum Kremnos and your family. Then you set to abandon the holy city that saved you. You are exactly the traitor they made you.
没错，你是灾星，你为奥赫玛带来了动荡，你让这对你有恩的城失守，你是纷争的灾星。
That's right. You bring calamity, and you've caused Okhema to fall. The city was kind to you, but you brought strife on them all.
随着记忆谢幕的余音散去，你们又回到了飘着硝烟的悬锋城。
As the lingering echoes of the memory fade, you return to the smoke-filled streets of Castrum Kremnos.
失去生命的眷属尸首与碎石无异。你知道过不了多久，悬锋城带着血腥味的风会卷起沙砾，将这块巨石磨蚀成尘，飘往远方。

Having lost her life, the Titankin's body is no different from a pile of rubble. You know that before long, the blood-stained winds of Castrum Kremnos will whip up the surrounding gravel and reduce it to dust, carrying it far into the distance.
这只若虫在悬锋城中格外醒目。你知道，弥漫血腥味的废墟并不是浪漫眷属乐意造访的地方。
A nymph is an unfamiliar sight to the streets of Castrum Kremnos. As you know, ruins stained with the stench of blood are not a place that the Titankin of Romance would happily visit.
旧日的悬锋城，一场失败的战争后……
The former Castrum Kremnos, after a defeat in battle...
旧日的奥赫玛城门，一场胜利的战争后……
The former Okhema city gate, after a victorious war...
旧日的奥赫玛城中，一位战士在岁月的流淌中迷惘着……
Within the old Okhema, a soldier is lost in the flow of time...
许久后的奥赫玛城中，无休止的纷争再度苏醒……
A long time later, within the city of Okhema, the echoes of endless strife resurface once more...
在奥赫玛的城外，战士徘徊在注定的疯狂中……
On the outskirts of Okhema, the soldiers wander in doomed madness...
太懈怠了，奥赫玛人！刻法勒没教你们准时劳作的美德吗？
You Okhemans are so slothful! Has Kephale never taught you the virtue of punctuality in your labors?
她还曾让一位老人在耕耘月的头天到奥赫玛的城门边去，在那儿，他找到了在战争里失散的两个兄弟。
She even had an old person go to Okhema's city gates on the first day of the Month of Cultivation. There, he found the two brothers he thought lost during the war.
它说，在残破的命运三相殿里，一位名为帕西提亚的先知在等待着我们，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引我们抵达奥赫玛。
It said that, within the dilapidated Temple of the Three Fates, a prophet named Pasithea was waiting for us. She will bring a prophecy from the Fate Titans, leading us to Okhema.
来到奥赫玛后，帕西提亚女士很快融入了进来。她为被命运选中的人们提供帮助，也会例行给予我们一些谕示，就像今天这样。
After arriving at Okhema, Lady Pasithea quickly integrated herself. She offers her help to those chosen by destiny and routinely bestows her prophecies on us, just like today.
几日前，在奥赫玛闹得沸沸扬扬的，黄金裔们的贵客，对吧？
You're the honored guest of the Chrysos Heirs who was causing such a commotion at Okhema just a few days back, right?
顺便告诉他们，未来的一段时间里，神殿都不需要祭品和草药了。这里没有更多的报酬给他们，要想活命的话，就去圣城奥赫玛吧。
Also tell them, in the near future, the temple will have no need of tribute or herbs. We have little else to reward them with. If they wish to live, tell them to go to the holy city of Okhema.
我明白了。这绝非神谕所启示的毁灭，仅仅是我们这些卑劣的家伙，不满于侍奉命运泰坦的清贫，所以才被扎格列斯蛊惑，逃向奥赫玛而已。

Understood. This is absolutely not the destruction preordained by prophecy. Some of us are simply unhappy with the poverty that comes with worshiping the Fate Titans, so we were deceived by Zagreus and fled to Okhema.
在离开前，恕我冒昧地问一句——我们真的没法逃脱这命运吗？我们可以说服那些固执的祭司，向奥赫玛请求支援。
Before I leave, forgive me for asking — can we truly not escape this fate? We can persuade those stubborn priests to plead for aid from Okhema.
你斟酌的修辞会被无数后人引用，你的名字也会被树庭的学者们所牢记。
Your eloquent rhetoric will be quoted by countless others after you. Your name will also be remembered by scholars of the Grove.
我当然知道我们宣告的神谕是假的，可既然如此，它为什么不把真正的神谕给我们？眼睁睁地看着翁法罗斯走向灭亡？
I obviously know the prophecy we declared is false. But since that's the case, why doesn't the Titan give us the true prophecy? Do they wish to simply watch as Amphoreus is destroyed?
我们可以逃去奥赫玛。
You all can escape to Okhema.
就在我们走进奥赫玛的那天夜里，失去双目的我，在梦中听到了天帷之外的回音。
On the very night we marched into Okhema, I, who had lost my sight, heard an echo from beyond the heavens in my dreams.
不知从何时起，帕西提亚的身边已挤满了前来寻求谕示的市民，仿佛你们所在的并不是奥赫玛，而是过去的命运三相殿。
At some point, Pasithea found herself surrounded by citizens seeking an oracle. It felt as if you were no longer in Okhema, but transported to the Temple of the Three Fates in the past.
大祭司，请您告诉我们，圣女大人究竟得到了怎样的谕示？雅努萨波利斯，不，翁法罗斯的命运，将何去何从？
High Priest, please tell us. What order did the Holy Maiden receive? As for Janusopolis... no, the destiny of Amphoreus... how would it be?
也是，奥赫玛的大家也还在等我回去呢。
Yes, everyone at Okhema is still waiting for my return.
她名为帕西提亚，把她带出来，她会带来命运泰坦的神谕，指引你们活着到达奥赫玛。
Her name is Pasithea. Bring her out, and she shall bestow you the prophecy of the Fate Titans, ensuring your survival to Okhema.
如果我带着她逃走，逃去奥赫玛…如果，如果，你在听吗？欧洛尼斯，我可以献上一切，我的心脏，我的眼睛，只要能实现我的祈愿。
If only I brought her along to escape to Okhema... If only, if only... are you listening? Oronyx, I can offer my everything. My heart, my eyes... as long as you can fulfill my wish.
何况为襁褓中的文明保驾护航，本就是战略投资部的天职——根据拉帝奥教授的说法，稳固银河对翁法罗斯的共同认知，一定程度上有助于它的未来。

Besides, safeguarding new and growing civilizations is precisely what the Strategic Investment Department was made to do. According to Dr. Ratio, establishing a consistent understanding of Amphoreus across the cosmos will aid its future, to a certain degree.
看来，你早就做好准备了。真不愧翁法罗斯的「全世之座」。
I see you've long been prepared. As expected of the "Throne of Worlds" of Amphoreus.
你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...
翁法罗斯也是如此。同为发展中的文明，我们愿意为它的未来出一份力。善意就像火炬，传递下去才能烧得更旺。
The same goes for Amphoreus. As a similarly developing civilization, we are willing to contribute to its future. Goodwill is like a torch. It can only burn brighter when it is passed on.
这是属于翁法罗斯的故事。
This is the story of Amphoreus.
故事里说翁法罗斯有过六个月亮，那他们晚上岂不是不用点灯？
The story says Amphoreus had six moons. Guess they didn't need to turn on the lights at night, huh?
不过…贝洛伯格，会不会有一天也会像翁法罗斯那样，从宇宙里消失，只留下一本书呢？
But... will Belobog one day vanish from the universe like the Amphoreans did, leaving behind nothing except a book?
翁法罗斯没有消失！
Amphoreus hasn't disappeared!
嗯！如果真有那一天，我会像翁法罗斯的英雄们一样挺身而出，保护磐岩镇的大家。
Yeah! If that day ever comes, I'll stand tall like the heroes of Amphoreus and protect everyone in Boulder Town!
然后，我们可以和翁法罗斯签一份和仙舟一样的…贸易决定！
Then, we can sign a trade... adornment with the Amphoreans, just like we did with Xianzhou!
这不是重点啦。重点是，我们可以去奥赫玛泡温泉，坐大地兽…还有，我想养一只小奇美拉！
That's not the point! The point is, we can go to the hot springs in Okhema, ride dromases... and, I want to raise a little chimera!
不过…我们真的能像虎克老大一样坐星际航班，去翁法罗斯旅行吗？
But... can we really take an interstellar flight to Amphoreus like Boss Hook?
虽然觉得翁法罗斯离我们很遥远，但是看着他们在一次次轮回里挣扎的努力，看到最后整个银河摒弃嫌隙，一同对抗毁灭的决心……
Although Amphoreus seemed so distant from us, watching their struggles through each cycle, and seeing how the entire cosmos ultimately cast aside their differences to unite against the Destruction...
你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...
我想问个私人问题：你对翁法罗斯的这趟旅途作何评价？
I'd like to ask you a personal question: What do you think about this journey to Amphoreus?
他日得罪负荆去，今朝浴血奏凯来。悬锋故邦皆沦丧，烈火分劈炼金刚。
That day he left in disgrace, bearing thorns in apology. Today he returns, bathed in blood, triumphant. Kremnos, his homeland, lay all in ruin, split asunder by blazing fire that forged adamant.
今日我们不说那哀地里亚的渡冥仙子，且说那「背芒灵官迈德漠斯」。这迈德漠斯，诨名万敌。万敌二字，乃万众难敌之万敌，万人不敌之万敌！

Yet today we shall not speak of the Psychopomp of Aidonia, but of "Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden," and bears the byname Mydei. The name Mydei that signifies "a foe that no multitude could withstand," as well as "a foe whom none among ten thousand could overcome!"
风割旌旗，雨打残军。遍原哀鸿，但闻狮啸。你道这万敌是何许人也？其乃悬锋王储，为父不容，数载冥海沉浮，炼就不坏之身，蒙千面童姥所召，遂投身逐火大业。

The wind tore through the banners, and rain beat down upon the remnants of the army. Across the plain rose cries of sorrow, yet only the roar of the lion was heard. And you ask: What manner of man was this Mydei? He was the crown prince of Kremnos, cast off by his father, drifting for years upon the Sea of Souls, where he forged an indestructible body. Summoned by the Thousand-Faced Matriarch, he threw himself into the great cause of Flame-Chase.
这可真是：怒狮百战踞高座，悬锋威名永流芳。
Now this is epic: Like a battle-hardened lion on its throne, Kremnos's mighty name shall echo through the ages.
翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!
今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，且说那「负阳逐火白厄真君」。这白厄真君生于村舍巷陌，起于微末之中。何奈黑潮无情，凌虐乡野，瓦尽无存，唯他一人得生。

Today, we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, but of the "Lord Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light." Born in a humble village of bucolic background, Lord Phainon rose from the most modest beginnings. Alas, the merciless black tide ravaged the countryside, leaving nothing but ruins, and he alone survived.
白厄真君先拜于树庭居士门下，后又追随千面童姥。负日逐火，讨获十二火种，百折千回，终得再造生机。

Lord Phainon first apprenticed under the Sages of the Grove, and later followed the Thousand-Faced Matriarch. Carrying the sun and chasing flame, he sought out the twelve Coreflames. Through countless trials and tribulations, he at last won the chance to remake the world.
翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!
今日我们不说那背芒灵官迈德漠斯，亦不说那负阳逐火白厄真君。单说那十二金仙讨大君，打得那叫一个天摇地动，那叫一个难解难分!

Today we shall not speak of Mydeimos, the Backlit Spirit Warden, nor of Phainon, the Flame-Chasing Harbinger of Light. We speak only of the Twelve Golden Immortals who struck against the Archlord, and what a battle it was! Heaven and earth quaked, the struggle was fierce and unyielding!
而翁星中，白厄真君以身束缚大敌，十二金仙与之殊死搏斗。但见金丝浮荡、剑影刀光，破空飞矢、淋漓拳脚；自也有，烈风暴雨、奇术技巧，枪尖游龙、棋出杀招。

In the heart of Amphoreus, Lord Phainon restrained the enemy with his very body, while the Twelve Golden Immortals fought it in a battle to the death. Golden threads shimmered and drifted, blades and sword-lights flashed like lightning, arrows split the air, fists flew in a deadly dance. Then came storms and tempests, wondrous arts and cunning stratagems, spearpoints like swimming dragons, and lethal chess plays.
只可惜，不尽轮回，徒留银河一闪，万千追忆，化作故事一页。翁星就此归于原点。

Yet, alas, after all has been said and done about the endless cycle, all that remained was but a flash across the cosmos, thousands upon thousands of memories dissolving into a single page of story. Amphoreus returned then to its origin.
那遮天蔽日的巨木、停于半空的悬锋、流淌金血的英雄浴池…终有一日，此番盛景将重现宇宙；可惜，即便你我寿数绵长，恐怕也只能留待后人瞻仰了。

That sky-shrouding giant tree, the suspended peak of Kremnos, the hero's bath flowing with golden blood... One day, this splendid vision shall reappear in the universe. But, though our lifespans be long, I fear it shall be left for later generations to behold.
列位看官，翁星翻覆千轮事，都付于你我笑谈。若是大限之后，老朽能与那群黄金裔英雄一同，让故事代自己为诸位铭记，倒也算妙事一桩。

Good sirs and ladies, the countless turns of Amphoreus's fate are now entrusted to our cheers and chatter. Should it be, when my final hour arrives, that this old man may join those Chrysos Heir heroes, and let the tale remember me on your behalf... Why, that would be a fine thing indeed.
我相信翁法罗斯。
I believe in Amphoreus.
你转述了《如我所书》背后的故事，和翁法罗斯的现状…
You recounted the story behind As I've Written, and the current state of the Amphoreus...
它们对新生的翁法罗斯——姑且先这样称呼它——很关键。如果顺利，世界的演化能跳过无机生命阶段，向前迈进一大步。
They are crucial for the newborn Amphoreus. Well, let's call it that for now. If things go smoothly, the world's evolution can skip its inorganic life phase and take a big step forward.
螺丝和公司签订了专项协议。未来一段时间，他们会密切关注翁法罗斯的状态。
Screwy has signed a special agreement with the IPC. They will closely monitor the state of Amphoreus for a while.
奔涌的虚数能量让她创造了奇迹：以{RUBY_B#记忆}「自我」{RUBY_E#}为摇篮，闭合翁法罗斯的因果，让一个世界从忆域中诞生。

The surging Imaginary Energy enabled her to create a miracle. With {RUBY_B#the Remembrance}her self{RUBY_E#} as the cradle, she closed the cycle of causality in Amphoreus, making a world emerge from the Memory Zone.
新的翁法罗斯要多久才能诞生？
How long until a new Amphoreus is born?
但这不是翁法罗斯的答案，我想，应该也不是你的。
But that's not Amphoreus's answer, and I don't imagine it's yours either.
其实黑塔女士一直惦记着翁法罗斯。上次她三句不离某样东西，还是收容星核的时候呢。
Madam Herta has actually been thinking about Amphoreus all this time. The last time she couldn't stop talking about something was when we contained the Stellaron.
「翁法罗斯学」！
It shall be named "Amphoreology"!
回望来路，你讲述的翁法罗斯，在宇宙间深深扎下了根，静候发芽的那一天。
Looking back, the Amphoreus you spoke of has taken root deep across the universe, quietly awaiting the day it will sprout.
那当然！再怎么说，翁法罗斯也是咱们仨一起开拓的。本姑娘可是一阵好跑。
Of course! After all, we three trailblazed through Amphoreus together. I ran my heart out for this!
这便是你为翁法罗斯写下的最后一笔。它何时会回应，只有命运知晓答案。
This is the final stroke you write for Amphoreus. Only fate knows when it will respond.
翁法罗斯，明天见。
See you tomorrow, Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯有几个月亮？
How many moons does Amphoreus have?
迈德漠斯，真是翁星好儿郎！
Mydeimos, you're a true son of Amphoreus!
翁法罗斯？由忆质构成的世界？胡扯！
Amphoreus? A world made of memoria? What a joke!
翁法罗斯…我要是也能模拟出一个世界就好了。
Amphoreus... if only I could simulate a world like that.
{NICKNAME}，我们在「记忆」的路上一起走出了很远很远的距离。虽然*我*记忆中的翁法罗斯会永远轮回下去，将铁墓封印在过去……
{NICKNAME}, we've come such a long, long way together on the path of Remembrance. Even though the Amphoreus in my memories will forever continue its cycles, sealing the Irontomb in the past...
这一幕是《如我所书》的结局，也是现实中翁法罗斯的原点：总有一天，它将孕育出真正的生命。记忆中的人们，会一一诞生，在「明天」等候你。

This scene is the ending of As I've Written, and also the origin point of the Amphoreus in the real world: One day, it will give birth to true life. The people in the memory will be born one by one, waiting for you "tomorrow."
你想起「开拓」的承诺：逐火的故事将传唱群星。人们会记得，翁法罗斯是一个辉煌、壮丽的世界。
You recall the promise of Trailblaze: the story of Flame-Chase will echo across the stars. People will remember that Amphoreus was a brilliant, magnificent world.
是啊，翁法罗斯发生了太多事，三言两语要如何概括？这场讲述，恐怕会持续很久……
Yeah, so much has happened in Amphoreus. How could I sum it all up in just a few words? This story... I'm afraid it's going to take a while...
在你抵达前，翁法罗斯几乎无人知晓。因列车到来，它得以冲破囚笼，奔向群星。
Before your arrival, Amphoreus was virtually unknown. Thanks to the Express, it broke free from its cage and raced toward the stars.
作为逐火的一员，你也投身于翁法罗斯伟大的征程。你与英雄们邂逅、结缘，共创伟业。作为旅行者，你留下的足迹已足够遥远。

As a member of the Flame-Chasers, you've joined Amphoreus's grand journey. You've encountered heroes, forged bonds, and achieved greatness together. As a traveler, your footprints have already reached far and wide.
长久以来，奥赫玛应该都是一个四季如春的城市…至少雕塑上的人们穿得都很清凉。
Since a long time ago, Okhema should have been a city of eternal spring... A fortuitous phenomenon, for the statues are dressed lightly.
在高塔上仰望星空——这是与当今的翁法罗斯彻底无缘的古代情景。某一日，神明不再游弋于天空，于是人们失去了日月和繁星…当地人好像是这么说的。

Gazing at the starry sky atop the high tower — an ancient sight that the present Amphoreus will never know. One day, the gods traversed the skies no longer, and thus people lost their sun, moon and stars... That's what the natives say.
一般来说，有着鸟类身体结构的动物更擅长在白昼行动——猫头鹰等个案除外。这副壁画的构图似乎是一个旁证，说明翁法罗斯人真的很久没有见过自然的黑夜与白昼。

Typically speaking, animals with avian anatomy are diurnal — apart from owls. This mural's composition appears to be supporting evidence that Amphoreans really have not seen the natural day and night cycles for a long time.
类似山中别墅的景致，让你时常忘记这里是一座修建在云端的城市。奥赫玛的水来自何方，又最终会流向哪里？这个问题的答案也许只有法吉娜自己知道。

Scenery reminiscent of a mountain villa, often making you forget that this is a city built atop clouds. Where does Okhema's water come from, and where does it eventually flow? Perhaps only Phagousa knows the answer to this question.
尽管宇宙中的人们彼此生活的环境千差万别，但他们对自然风光的审美却出人意料地一致——甚至在翁法罗斯这个与外部几无瓜葛的世界，人们喜爱的也是流水、假山、绿植……

Even if the lives of people dwelling in the universe are light-years apart, their aesthetics towards nature's sights are surprisingly similar — even on a secluded world like Amphoreus, severed from external communications, its people still favor flowing water, faux mountains, and verdant flora...
曾有人对铁匠如此调侃：「若是哪天『黎明机器」』熄灭了，你们店里的锻造炉怕不就成了整个奥赫玛最亮的东西」。铁匠只是笑笑，并未作答。

Someone once mocked the blacksmith: "If there comes a day the Dawn Device goes dark, your forge's furnace would be the brightest thing in all of Okhema." The blacksmith only smiled in silent response.
此处离天空很近，虽然看不到「晨昏之眼，艾格勒」，但你可以在这里俯瞰整个奥赫玛的风景。
This place is very close to the sky. You can't see Aquila, the Eye of Twilight, but you have a scenic view that overlooks Okhema.
浴场在装修上花了不少心思，就连大门中央的圆形纹饰都有讲究——融合了法吉娜的酒杯印记与雅努斯的门扉缩影，暗示着「一杯入喉，万径通达」的翁法罗斯民间谚语。

The baths have been painstakingly renovated. Even the circular patterns in the center of the main door have its meaning, combining Phagousa's goblet insignia with a mini design of Janus' doorway — a clever composition alluding to the Amphorean idiom of "a cup down the throat opens myriad paths."
不愧是圣城奥赫玛，人们在泡澡这等休憩时间都不忘阅读。不知道瑟希斯知道了会作何感想：它的信徒在浴池里读书，这究竟是对法吉娜的挑衅，还是对瑟希斯献上诚挚的爱？

This is the holy city of Okhema indeed — even in their baths, her people have their heads buried in reading books. You wonder what would Cerces think if it knew: Is it a taunt on Phagousa, or a tribute of their devoted love to Cerces, that the Titan's disciples are reading in the bath?
奥赫玛的种质库，记载着末世中灭绝的物种信息。等到这趟开拓之旅结束，或许可以令它们再度重现银河——你的朋友中一定有不少对此感兴趣。

Okhema's gene bank, archived with the information of organisms that went extinct during the apocalypse. When this trailblazing expedition ends, they may, perhaps, resurface across the Cosmos once more — many among your friends will be quite interested in that.
这片区域被提供给了学者们，用于讲学或是辩论。人们会为了奥赫玛的未来而贡献出自己的智慧——或者为了「烤肉卷饼该不该加奶酪」一事而进行言语上的激烈交锋。

This area has been allotted to the scholars for academic lectures and debates. People will contribute their own wisdom to Okhema's future... or be engaged in fervent debate on whether cheese should be placed on grilled meat wraps.
「老师们辛辛苦苦站着讲课，学生却慵懒地坐在台下走神，是否有些悲哀？」——这个现象在奥赫玛得到了有效改善。

"Teachers stand tirelessly, expounding their learnings, yet their students lackadaisically sit below the podium, their eyes glazed. Isn't that somewhat tragic?" This issue has been effectively improved in Okhema.
但大多数时候，悬锋城的泰坦眷属们会主动寻找敌人。
But most of the time, The Titankins of Castrum Kremnos will actively seek out their enemies.
悬锋城文化的神龛，里面存放着英雄们的魂灵。
A shrine from the Castrum Kremnos culture, housing the souls of heroes within.
细腻而富有肌理，就像红烧肉一样…依稀记得在公司的拍卖会上，有某种古玩的卖点也是如此。不知道从翁法罗斯出去之后，你能不能为它也附加上可以参加拍卖会的价值？

Sinewy and full of texture, just like braised meat... You vaguely recall such a characteristic for a certain antique at an IPC auction. You wonder whether you could tack an auction-worthy price on this after you leave Amphoreus?
对于奥赫玛来说，现实更接近于哪一种呢？
Which one is closer to Okhema's reality?
奥赫玛…真是座神奇的城市。
Okhema... certainly is an interesting city.
泰坦——翁法罗斯最符合「神明」概念的事物之一，与其他世界那些难寻实体的精神寄托不同，巨躯彰显着它的「存在」。

Titans — beings that most closely epitomize Amphoreus' concept of divinity. Different from those elusive spiritual custodians of other worlds, their monolithic figures are tangible evidence of their existence.
雕塑的外形和「黎明机器」有几分相似，难怪有人说奥赫玛的每一寸墙砖都在模仿那位背负光明的泰坦。
The sculpture looks rather similar to the Dawn Device. No wonder people say that every single wall tile in Okhema is an imitation of the light-bearing Titan.
他们的决心固然值得赞许，但泰坦们究竟是何方神圣？它们的力量来自哪里？若要开拓翁法罗斯，这些问题的答案必须写进智库才行。
Their determination is admirable, but just what are these Titans? Where does their power come from? If Amphoreus is to be trailblazed, these questions must be answered and entered into the data bank.
你不是第一次听说这东西，它是翁法罗斯灾难的源头。关于它的来历，你在脑海中闪过了几种不同的可能性，其中一个甚至让人后怕。

This is not the first time you've heard its name. It's the source of the disaster that is befalling Amphoreus. As for its origins, a number of possibilities flash through your mind — one of which leaves you feeling quite uneasy.
博识学会首次观测到名为「翁法罗斯」的新生星体，并正式将其编入星图。
The Intelligentsia Guild reports its first observation of a newly formed celestial body, designated as "Amphoreus," which has since been officially incorporated into astral charts.
公司代表从无名客口中获悉，这颗新生的星球名为「翁法罗斯」。
According to information provided by the Nameless, IPC representatives have learned that this newborn planet is called "Amphoreus."
博识学会的维里塔斯•拉帝奥教授表示，根据「赞达尔回归原理」，翁法罗斯必将衍生出文明，其忆质内容会成为文明演化的重要依据。

Dr. Veritas Ratio of the Intelligentsia Guild stated that, according to the "Zandar Recurrence Theorem," Amphoreus will inevitably give rise to civilization, and its memoria content will serve as a key foundation for the evolution of that civilization.
我们有理由相信，假以时日，翁法罗斯必将成为寰宇大家庭中璀璨的一员。
We remain confident that Amphoreus, in due course, will establish itself as a beacon within the cosmic community.
奥赫玛建筑美学的杰作，眼前的云石天宫依山而坐，显扬不对称的律动之美。
An architectural masterpiece from Okhema, the Marmoreal Palace was build alongside a mountain to demonstrate the beauty of asymmetrical rhythms.
最后的圣城在你眼前展开，阳光掠过负世泰坦之肩洒向人间，奥赫玛人皆可窥见那宏伟的身影——
The last holy city lays before you, as the sun, on the shoulder of the Worldbearing Titan, shines down on humanity. All Okhemans can catch a glimpse of the majestic silhouette...
奥赫玛市民共浴的满溢主池。
The Overflowing Bath for residents of Okhema.
奥赫玛的市集
Okhema Market
旧日的荣光，悬锋的王，荣耀是你的名。
Glory of the olden days, King of Kremnos, honor be your name.
「永恒之城」奥赫玛
Okhema, the Eternal City
奥赫玛的公民议会
The Citizens' Assembly of Okhema
你可真是自说自话啊，万敌，战士之间不需要谦让。等到了尼卡多利面前，我们应当凭实力夺取火种。
I see your concern only stretches as far as yourself, Mydei. There is no need for humility among warriors. When we are faced with Nikador, we should use our strength to seize the Coreflame.
别吵啦！别吵啦！悬锋城现在飘到了哪里我们都还不知道呢，上哪儿找尼卡多利呀……
Stop fighting! Stop fighting! We don't know where Castrum Kremnos has drifted off to. Where are we supposed to go in search of Nikador...?
…我明白了。我会遣赛飞儿去看看，如果她愿意的话。现在，我们就在奥赫玛静观其变吧。
...I understand. I will send Cipher to take a look, if she is willing. For now, we shall have to sit and watch for any developments from inside Okhema.
果然还是偷偷摸来了啊，万敌。你这副身躯实在显眼，别处也就算了，在云石天宫，不被人注意就怪了。
So you did come creeping in here after all, Mydei. I don't know about anywhere else, but that conspicuous body of yours is bound to be noticed in Marmoreal Palace.
若你的长矛洞穿了我的咽喉或者心脏，那么便将王冠拿去，让悬锋新王浴血代冠。
If your spear had pierced my throat or my heart, you could have taken the crown and been bathed in the blood of Kremnos as the new ruler.
荣幸之至。克拉特鲁斯必不惜此身，如铸铁羽翼卫于王侧，坚守悬锋荣耀。
It would be my greatest honor. I, Krateros, would give my life and defend your side, like iron wings that hold tight the honor of Kremnos.
克拉特鲁斯，你在欧利庞手下坚持了三十余合，于众督战勇士中亦最为骁勇，我以悬锋王后之名，将一项特殊的职责托付予你……
Krateros. You stood tall over thirty rounds against the hand of Eurypon. You stand as the most courageous of all warriors. As Queen of Kremnos, I bestow unto you a special duty...
我腹中的王子，迈德漠斯，数月后将来到这个世界。他继承了王欧利庞与我的铮铮铁骨，又日夜沐浴在尼卡多利的神性照耀之下，必将成为新的悬锋之王。

Mydeimos, the prince that I carry in my body, will be born to this world in a number of months. He has inherited the iron bones of myself and King Eurypon and been bathed in the divine light of Nikador day and night. He must become the new King of Kremnos.
欧利庞，不要说笑了，你比谁都相信迈德漠斯。
Do not be ridiculous, Eurypon. You have more faith in Mydeimos than anyone.
若他果真身负悬锋城的未来，朕这颗头颅就是让他拿去又如何？
If he will truly bear the future of Castrum Kremnos, what does it matter if he takes my head?
咳，说笑，说笑。克拉特鲁斯，督战勇士中的魁首，今后你就是迈德漠斯的师傅了。必要时候，你可忠于他胜过忠于我。

Ahem, I was kidding, just kidding! Krateros, master primus of the Watchers. From this day forward, you shall be Mydeimos' mentor. When the time calls, your loyalty to him shall supersede your loyalty to even me.
王欧利庞，您还在犹豫什么！想象我们先前构想的伟业，您是永远的王，悬锋城将万载延续…与这相比，一名婴孩的性命又算得了什么？

King Eurypon, what are you waiting for!? Imagine the great undertaking that we conceived. You will be the eternal King and Castrum Kremnos will continue on for millennia... What is the life of a single baby compared to all of this?
…不过，道理朕是明白的。如今悬锋看似鼎盛，背后却危机四伏。在未名之敌黑潮的侵袭之下，就连尼卡多利也逐渐失神。

...I understand your reasoning. Though Castrum Kremnos seems to be prospering on the surface, behind the scenes there is danger all around. Even Nikador is gradually losing their mind under the attacks of our faceless enemy, the black tide.
为了悬锋城的永续…已无回头路可走了。
For the eternal future of Castrum Kremnos... I have no other choice.
克拉特鲁斯，您当真要离开悬锋城？如今悬锋正值鼎盛，王欧利庞对你又颇为重用，光是王翼冠军的名号就足使万人景仰了。

Krateros, are you really going to leave Castrum Kremnos? Kremnos is prospering and King Eurypon places great importance on you. Just the title of King's Aegis is enough to win the admiration of thousands.
我曾向你的母亲发誓，用生命捍卫你的王冠。在你成王之后，我将做你的铸铁双翼，你若想统一翁法罗斯，我永远会是冲在最前面的那个！

I once vowed to your mother that I would give my life to protect your reign. Once you become king, I will be your iron wings. If you wish to unite Amphoreus, I will always be the one who charges ahead of you into battle!
莫要让你的母亲、你的族人们失望啊，迈德漠斯。
Do not let your mother or your people down, Mydeimos.
你记住了「曾与万敌交谈过」
You remembered "Talking with Mydei."
在某个广为流传的童话中，英勇的冒险者顺着豆茎偷走了天上巨人的种种宝贝，最后还杀死了它。面对着如今的树庭，你忽然意识到这个故事对于天上的巨人实在很不友好。

In a widely told fairy tale, a brave adventurer climbed a beanstalk to steal treasures from the giant in the sky, ultimately killing it. Standing now in the Grove, you suddenly realize how unkind this story is to the giants above.
树庭中每有灵感的火花乍现，巨木便为这思想的新生而悄然欢庆——露水凝聚、滴落池中，如丝雨润海、息吹入风。

Every spark of inspiration that arises within the Grove brings silent celebration from the giant tree toward this birth of thought — Dew gathers and drips into the pool, like silken rain nourishing the ocean, or breaths of wind infusing the air.
不知道它究竟是在守护树庭，还是在等待某个永远不会归来的人。
One wonders whether it guards the Grove or waits for someone who will never return.
这大概就是为什么翁法罗斯的人们总说记忆是最难被掩埋的——它总会找到照进黑暗的缝隙。
This may be why the people of Amphoreus often say that memory is the hardest thing to bury — it will always find cracks through which to shine into the darkness.
「最初的学者」曾在此指出：只有在辩论的时候，我们才算是真正的聊天。自那以后，这里就成了树庭的热门景点。
"The First Scholar" once declared here: only when we debate are we truly engaging in conversation. Since then, this place has become a favored gathering spot within the Grove.
这便是神悟树庭最初的由来——那时瑟希斯还在翁法罗斯为子民们无私地传授着知识，有幸得到传承者变成为了它最初的信徒。

This was the origin of the Grove of Epiphany — back when Cerces selflessly imparted knowledge to the people of Amphoreus. Those fortunate enough to receive their legacy became their earliest disciples.
壁画上记载着树庭的历史：巨树的顶端绘着一道金色光芒，那是瑟希斯将智慧赐予人类的时刻。
The mural records the history of the Grove: at the top of the great tree shines a golden light — the moment when Cerces granted wisdom to humanity.
树庭的学者们说，这是他们最后一次得到瑟希斯恩赐时的景象。
Scholars of the Grove say this image depicts the last time they received Cerces' blessing.
树庭学者们认为这和瑟希斯的审美一致，每个细节都在传递着它的神谕：所谓理性的真谛，大概就是在纷繁中找到本质，即使是在描绘自己的时候。

Scholars of the Grove believe this simplicity aligns with Cerces' aesthetic. Every detail conveys the prophecy: the essence of reason lies in finding simplicity within complexity, even in self-representation.
「学医救不了翁法罗斯」——曾有助手抛下这样的话语，离开了这座微小而明亮的庭院。庭院的主人没有责怪这位助手，她知道同一种光明无法抹平所有人的心伤。

"Medicine cannot save Amphoreus!" — a former assistant once tossed out this remark before leaving the small yet radiant courtyard. The courtyard's master did not blame the assistant. She knew that a single kind of light could not heal every wounded heart.
圣树底部的王座，凡世智慧的顶点——无数树庭学者为抵达知识的宝座而耗尽毕生心血，但现在，它就这样毫不设防地展现在你的面前。

At the base of the Sacred Tree lies the throne, the pinnacle of mortal wisdom. Countless scholars of the Grove spent their lives striving to reach this seat of knowledge. Yet now, it stands before you, unguarded and unclaimed.
{NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
{NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.
{NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
{NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.
想要更具幻想色彩的世界，很好。你背负着巨剑与两瓶石榴汁，只身来到了决战平台，挡在你身前的是那位熟悉的盗火行者。

You want a more fantastical world. Great choice. You shoulder a giant sword and carry two bottles of pomegranate juices as you approach the final battle platform alone. Standing in your way is the familiar Flame Reaver.
{NICKNAME}当上了树庭之王。
{NICKNAME} has become the Sovereign of the Grove.
树庭学者并没有那么脆弱。比起生命，研究才是更值得守护的东西。
We Grove scholars are not so fragile. To us, research is worth far more than life itself.
我们的，心血，和翁法罗斯的，未来。
Our... efforts, and Amphoreus'... future.
给我吧。我会在结课报告里为你留下第二作者的位置，还会在致谢环节诚挚赞扬你的美德，往后，你就算是在树庭的核心期刊上发表过论文了。

Give it to me. I'll credit you as the second author in my final report and express sincere gratitude for your virtue in the acknowledgments. From then on, you'll have a publication in one of the Grove's core journals.
好。翁法罗斯，照明很差，我们，都要想办法。这些，给你花。
Good. Amphoreus... poor lighting. We... must find solutions. Here... take these flowers.
你呀，就别操心啦。多吃饭、多识字、多读读翁法罗斯的故事，看到你茁壮成长，妈妈比什么都高兴。
Honestly, you mustn't fuss over me. Just make sure you eat plenty, practice your reading and read lots of stories of Amphoreus. Nothing makes mommy happier than seeing you grow and thrive.
他知道布利萨不是悬锋城的对手，遂来求取能够拯救城邦的神谕。辅祭大人告诉他要善待并集结诸多盟邦，如此方能挫败天谴之锋的锐意。

He knew that Bulsa was no match for Castrum Kremnos and came in search of a prophecy to save his city. Sir Acolyte told him that if he gathers many allies and treats them well, he will be able to overcome the sharp edge of the Blade of Fury.
他本以为从此能高枕无忧，谁知悬锋城降临的时候，所有曾受他恩惠的小城邦畏惧天谴的锋芒，争先恐后地俯首称臣。

The King was convinced that he now had nothing to worry about. Who could have imagined that when Castrum Kremnos did attack, all of the small neighboring cities that had received his blessings were so scared of the Blade of Fury that they all rushed to surrender?
好在像布利萨那样牵涉进泰坦战争的城邦还不算多。希望和平能在翁法罗斯的大部分地方一直持续下去吧……
At least there weren't too many cities that were dragged into the strife of the Titans like Bulsa was. Let us hope that these days of peace will remain across the majority of Amphoreus...
身处这般末世，本来就压力很大，加上树庭到处黑漆漆的…我都快疯了。
The pressure is already great living in these end times. With the Grove now engulfed in darkness... I am starting to lose my mind.
…是真的。我本来也不信，在奥赫玛之外还能存有昼光。但是，在这个庭院里，真的有一束和煦的光从天井照下来……

...There really is. I didn't believe that there were places outside of Okhema that still had daylight either. However, there really was a single ray of light that descended from the heavens in this courtyard.
第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?
那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.
年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。

I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.
你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?
黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。

The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.
求援绝非逃兵所为。若无赌上性命的觉悟，半途就会死于黑潮的截击。
Calling for aid is not desertion. If you were not prepared to risk your life, the black tide would simply intercept you and kill you before you made it to Okhema.
啊，温暖而神圣的火。树庭的某位哲人曾说过：｢宇宙的过去、现在和未来是一团永恒的活火，它按一定尺度燃烧，又按一定尺度熄灭。｣
Ah, the warm, divine fire. A philosopher from the Grove once said: "The past, present, and future of the universe is an eternal, living flame, burning and extinguishing according to its own rhythm."
不要再破坏翁法罗斯世界观了。
Don't ruin the lore of Amphoreus.
你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.
你想起了遐蝶，「冥河的女儿」。初来奥赫玛时，你曾险些被她拥入温柔的花乡…直到肌肤相贴时，你才发现她的拥抱并不能为你带来死亡。

You think of Castorice, "Daughter of the River of Souls." When you first arrived in Okhema, she almost led you into her gentle, flower-filled realm... until your skin touched hers, and you realized her embrace wouldn't bring you death after all.
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
谁是翁法罗斯最聪明的人？
Who is the wisest in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有智慧的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the wisest person in all of Amphoreus!
谁是翁法罗斯最勇敢的人？
Who is the bravest in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最有勇气的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the bravest person in all of Amphoreus!
谁是翁法罗斯最美丽的人？
Who is the most beautiful in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为美丽的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the most beautiful person in all of Amphoreus!
谁是翁法罗斯最厉害的人？
Who is the strongest in all of Amphoreus?
当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为强大的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the strongest person in all of Amphoreus!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
不可以吼！本狮曾在悬锋城游历，特别崇尚武德，只认可单独对决的结果吼！
No! I once roamed through Castrum Kremnos, where I held martial honor in high regard and only recognized the outcome of one-on-one duels!
吼吼，听好了。众所周知，奥赫玛有许多可爱的生物，最受公民们欢迎的是哪种呢？
Roarrr, listen closely. It's well known that Okhema is home to many delightful creatures, but which one is the most beloved by the citizens?
答对了答对了！奥赫玛中最受公民们欢迎的生物，当然是本狮吼吼！
Yes, yes! The creature most beloved by the citizens of Okhema is, of course, this very lion!
相传，她将自己的研究以不为人知的方式保存了下来，又把它们分散到了翁法罗斯各地。这些石板可能是她的手笔…但有些细节还是难以解释。
It's said that she preserved her research in ways unknown and scattered it across Amphoreus. These slates may be her handiwork... but certain details remain unexplained.
石板上的内容于我无足轻重——除了遵从神谕、狩猎火种外，再无其他手段能拯救翁法罗斯。但将这些古物保存至今的方法，我很好奇。

The content of these slates is of little significance to me — other than following the prophecy and hunting for the Coreflames, there are no other means to save Amphoreus. However, the method by which these ancient relics have been preserved intrigues me.
嗯…树庭入口的石像边……
Hmm... near the statue at the Grove entrance...
你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.
木马外表看上去毫无机关，但你却可以明显感受到，有股神秘的推力在让你们缓缓前进。看来「渡河」云云并非虚言——雅努斯的神力，翁法罗斯人的第一款水上发动机。

The wooden horse appears to have no mechanism, but you can feel an unseen force gently propelling you forward. It seems the "crossing" is no mere metaphor — Janus' divine power, the first water engine of Amphoreus.
嘟嘟。消息发送失败的提示音让你有些沮丧。很遗憾，万帷网是奥赫玛区域限定。
Beep beep. The message fails to send, and you feel a pang of frustration. Unfortunately, the World Wound Web is region-locked to Okhema.
但是，克莱门汀小姐，这是你和风堇小姐好不容易才选定的昏光庭院新址。
But Miss Clementine... this is the new location for the Twilight Courtyard that you and Miss Hyacine spent so much time selecting.
为了重建庭院，风堇小姐确实花了很多心思。无论在树庭还是奥赫玛，当她为昏光庭院选址的时候，总是会跑遍每一处角落，只为找到环境最优美的一隅。

She truly put in a lot of effort to rebuild it. Whenever she was choosing a location for the Twilight Courtyard, whether in the Grove or Okhema, she'd search every corner, just to find the most beautiful spot.
克莱门汀小姐，也请你先行撤离吧，我来帮你搬走这些医疗用具。
Miss Clementine, please evacuate this place. I'll help you move these medical supplies.
嘿，这不是怕大姐头又把我拽去啥危险的地方嘛。现在这奥赫玛可不太平，咱一个小贼灵可不想掺和进啥大风大浪。
Hey, I'm just trying to avoid you dragging me to dangerous places. Okhema's not safe right now, and as a little Spirithief, I want no part in big troubles.
…你是说…我们的力量，诡计的力量…骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒和灾难，拯救了翁法罗斯？
...You mean... our divine power, the power of Trickery... has deceived all the world's fools, villains, and even the very calamities themselves? We saved Amphoreus?
上好的武器，我带来了。保卫奥赫玛，我与诸位勇士一同。
Fine weapons, I've brought them here. To protect Okhema, I stand with the brave warriors.
自从迁来奥赫玛，您的想法确实改变了不少。我想其他祭司们应该会笑着议论纷纷吧。
Your views have changed quite a bit since you arrived in Okhema. I imagine the other priests are probably laughing and discussing this behind your back.
但无论这次尝试成功与否，他大概都不会再回到奥赫玛了。
Regardless of whether this attempt succeeds, he probably won't be coming back to Okhema.
他是翁法罗斯注定的负世者，通向翁法罗斯未来的门扉。
He is the destined Worldbearer of Amphoreus, the gate to Amphoreus's future.
你盯着墙上的排风口，伸手感受着气孔处传来的微风，想起了翁法罗斯的一句民谚：「艾格勒的叹息即是凡间的风暴。」里面会是哪位泰坦在呼吸吗？

You stare at the vent on the wall, reaching out to feel the faint breeze escaping from its perforations. A saying from Amphoreus comes to mind: "Aquila's sighs are the storms of the mortal realm." Could there be a Titan breathing within?
大门上方的光源发出柔和的蓝光，在黎明与黄昏的交替中，它见证了翁法罗斯的兴衰。而你的出现，只是它漫长凝视中的一个瞬间。
The light above the gate emits a soft blue glow, witnessing the rise and fall of Amphoreus between dawn and dusk. Your presence is but a fleeting moment in its long, unwavering gaze.
壁画以金线勾勒出天文仪器、星座图谱与天象变化，艾格勒对翁法罗斯的观测与掌控跃然壁上。你不禁思考，当百眼凝视星空时，它看到了什么？

The mural, outlined in gold, depicts astronomical instruments, constellation charts, and celestial phenomena. Aquila's observation and control of Amphoreus come alive on the wall. You can't help but wonder: What did the Hundred Eyes see when it gazed upon the stars?
壁画上描绘着工具、酒杯与令人费解的器具，这是泰坦的象征，亦或翁法罗斯历史的剪影？或许两者皆是。
The mural depicts tools, goblets, and perplexing implements, symbols of the Titans, or perhaps glimpses of Amphoreus' history? Perhaps both.
难道这就是所谓的再创世，而你脚下的奥赫玛也会变成一片虚空？
Is this what Era Nova truly means? Will the Okhema beneath your feet also fade into nothingness?
再创世？啊，那个预言！怪不得刚刚有怪物在，原来是变天了啊。我还让一个奥赫玛人在神驹里面躲了躲呢。
Era Nova? Oh, that prophecy! No wonder the monsters were acting up, I guess we're in for a ride. I even let an Okheman hide inside the divine foal for a bit.
为保护刻法勒的火种，赛飞儿只身拖延着盗火行者。但那黑衣剑士最终还是回到了奥赫玛，这难道意味着……
To protect the Coreflame of Kephale, Cipher delayed the Flame Reaver alone. But that black-robed swordmaster eventually returned to Okhema. Does this mean...
你回想起车厢跨过云层被长枪洞穿的那一刻，那是冒险的伊始。在那之后，你目睹了燃尽血火的抗争，涉过月色下的花海…直到如今，主宰翁法罗斯命运的星辰渐次亮起。

You recall the moment the Express Car crossed the clouds and was pierced by the long spear. That was the beginning of the adventure. After that, you witnessed the strife that burnt out humanity's blood and walked through the sea of flowers under the moonlight... until now, when the stars that govern Amphoreus' fate are slowly lighting up.
麦粒与面粉是哀丽秘榭的主要物产，凝结着村民们的汗水与心血。
Grain and flour are key exports from Aedes Elysiae, each sack packed with the villagers' sweat and pride.
瀑布的流水急流而下，其中好似夹杂着过去的星辰。传闻中，翁法罗斯的一切水流都是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的血液。它们从四面八方汇集，流入真正的大海。

Water rushes down the waterfall, as if carrying with it stars of the past. Some say all the rivers of Amphoreus are the very lifeblood of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, flowing ever onward to the true ocean.
哀丽秘榭的时间，的确过得很慢。
Indeed, time seems to pass very slowly in Aedes Elysiae.
你想起自己第一次来到哀丽秘榭，是在来古士的叙述中。而当你从再创世的光中苏醒时，便已身处这方美好的小村落。
You remember hearing about Aedes Elysiae for the first time from Lygus's tales and when you awakened from the light of Era Nova, you found yourself in this peaceful village.
你想起那位生长于哀丽秘榭的少女，承载「岁月」的黄金裔。她曾以牺牲自我的代价重置时间，为翁法罗斯编织永不醒觉的长梦。
You recall the Chrysos Heir girl who once lived in Aedes Elysiae, bearer of the power of "Time." She had once sacrificed herself to reset the flow of time, weaving an endless dream for Amphoreus.
总有些东西是刻进人们DNA里的——就比如即便世殊时异，翁法罗斯壁画的美术风格也如出一辙。
Some things must be etched into our DNA. Like how, no matter how much the world changes, the art style on the Amphoreus murals looks exactly the same.
翁法罗斯的海洋如蓝宝石般剔透，在无人知晓的旧日，美丽的「海洋」眷属就在其间起舞…这场幻境的造主也不例外。
The Amphoreus' ocean sparkles like sapphire. In forgotten days, those fair Kins of Ocean danced beneath the waves — and the one who forged this fantasia was no different.
「纷争之半神」迈德漠斯，生于光历4071年，逝于光历4284年。
Mydeimos, the Demigod of Strife. Born Light Calendar 4071. Deceased Light Calendar 4284.
换句话说，如果我们在树庭遇见了，或者你们到研究室来找我，想请教我的学问，我只会回应「阿那克萨戈拉斯」这个名字。
In other words, should we meet at the Grove, or should you seek my wisdom at the lab, I will only respond to the name "Anaxagoras."
另外，在你们问我之前，我先解释，为什么是在这里授课而不是树庭——
And before you ask, allow me to explain why we're teaching here instead of at the Grove—
因为现在树庭的学者们正在气头上，打算把那刻夏老师吊起来。
Because the scholars of the Grove are currently very upset and are planning to hang Professor Anaxa.
圣城奥赫玛公派的学生。
Officially sponsored students from the holy city Okhema.
迈德漠斯……
Mydeimos...
我们早已告别过，海瑟音。数百年前，「金织」便已身殒奥赫玛。
We have already bid farewell, Hysilens. The Goldweaver has already met her demise in Okhema a few hundred years ago.
吓到了？哀丽秘榭的微风，可不该把你的心弦吹得如此紧绷，放轻松点。
Surprised, are you? The gentle breeze of Aedes Elysiae shouldn't have pulled your heartstrings so taut. Relax.
回想一下，在你离开哀丽秘榭，回到逐火的开端时——
Think back to when you left Aedes Elysiae, back to the beginning of the Flame-Chase...
你的旅程异常顺利。毕竟，逐火之旅的众人因一道欧洛尼斯的神谕相信了「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯……

Your journey has been exceptionally smooth. After all, the people of the Flame-Chase Journey believed in a prophecy of Oronyx, and were convinced a "Deliverer from beyond the sky" would descend upon Amphoreus...
「长夜月」的记忆残影彻底消退，仿佛从未在这里出现过，眼前只有哀丽秘榭的温柔海风和无尽夕阳。
The memory shard of "Evernight" fades away completely, as if it had never appeared here. All that remains is the gentle sea breeze of Aedes Elysiae and the endless sunset.
感谢你，吉奥刻勒斯，是你说服了树庭的学者，让我能够来此访学。
Thank you, Geocles, for convincing the scholars of the Grove to let me study here.
就算是学术氛围包容的神悟树庭，人们也会惊讶于访问学者是一头大地兽，而非一名山之民…解释起来可是费了我不少功夫。

Even in the tolerant academic atmosphere of the Grove of Epiphany, people were surprised that the visiting scholar was a dromas rather than a Mountain Dweller... It took quite some effort to explain that one.
光是注视着山之民与奥赫玛之间一触即发的态势，我便无心再关注其他了。
Just watching the tension building between the Mountain Dwellers and Okhema leaves me no room to think of anything else.
我懂了！我真是天才！放心把武器生产交给我吧喀，我会为翁法罗斯，炸出一个崭新的黎明！
I understand now! I am a genius! Leave weapon production to me, crrk! I will blast a brand-new dawn for Amphoreus!
这样啊。那看来，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子也要暂时告一段落了。有空就在浴宫泡泡澡吧！香喷喷的！
It seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. Why not take a moment to unwind in the bath chamber? It's really relaxing!
好有活力！但人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，步调慢下来，生活才更放松。
Such energy! But it seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's a good thing. Slowing down helps to relax and enjoy life.
好深奥的发言呢。人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，生活就是既有命中注定，也有许多突然的奇遇。
Such a profound statement. I feel like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's fine, life is about destined paths and unexpected adventures.
你知道吗？奥赫玛到处都是迈德漠斯的传闻，这个人身上充满了故事…「王子」都是这样的吗？
Did you know that Okhema is full of stories about Mydeimos? He's just bursting with tales... are all "princes" like that?
要人家说，一定是因为两人各有所长。力量、体质、军略，是迈德漠斯更胜一筹，但白厄更全面均衡，更重视技巧，而且——运气也很好！

If you ask me, it must be because they have different strengths. Power, endurance, strategy — that's where Mydeimos excels. But Phainon is more balanced and well-rounded, more focused on technique, and — he's also really lucky!
难分伯仲呢…此外，坊间似乎还流传着「万敌是王座级强者」的说法。虽然不明白是什么意思，但某种程度上，也说明他的实力深不可测吧。
It's really too close to call... oh, and there's another rumor that "Mydei is a throne-tier warrior." I don't quite know what that means, but it sure sounds like he's a force to be reckoned with.
不过，有关迈德漠斯的传闻也太多了。如果都是真的，他恐怕连吃饭的时间都没有吧？
Still... there really are way too many rumors about Mydeimos flying around. If they were all true, he wouldn't even have time to eat, would he?
树庭变成了这样，似乎没时间学习啦……
With the Grove being like this, there isn't any time to study...
但是放心，在奥赫玛，{NICKNAME}是受人敬仰的大英雄！人家会把你的名字，传到每一个人的耳朵里。
But don't worry. Here in Okhema, you're a celebrated hero, {NICKNAME}! I'll make sure everyone knows your name.
你想起自己在奥赫玛也见到过这样的人台，说不定它现在发生了变化？你应该再去看看。
You remember seeing such a dummy in Okhema. Maybe it has changed now? You should go check it out again.
衣匠大军，踏平奥赫玛！
The army of Garmentmakers will trample Okhema!
就在奥赫玛遭受入侵前不久，我得到了一些预言。可惜那会儿诸事缠身，一直没空关注它。
Not long before Okhema was invaded, I received some prophecies. Unfortunately, I was too busy to pay attention to them at the time.
谢谢，这对我和奥赫玛都意义重大——别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
Thank you. This is very important for me and Okhema. Don't worry. I'll help you throughout the process and share what I interpret.
在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.
在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.
嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在褔坛的金池中央，似乎有些神志不清了。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings, seemingly disoriented.
这可不是寻常账本！里边夹着一张旧地契，签署时间是泰坦纷争前更早的年岁，当时奥赫玛还是一片野地呢。
This is no simple accounting book! There is an old land deed stashed in there that was signed even before the war of the Titans, back when Okhema was no more than wilderness.
大敌当前，我自然也想为奥赫玛出一份力啊。
With the enemy at our gates, I naturally also wish to do my part for Okhema.
呃啊！您的风采，能和当年的悬锋勇士相媲美了！
Ack! You fight just like the Kremnos warriors of the past!
近来传闻奥赫玛出现了个「神偷」，风头隐隐有压过我之势。为了给扎格列斯老祖挣点颜面，我决心干票大的重整旗鼓。

Rumor has it that there's a "master thief" that's been running around recently, whose reputation seems to be threatening my own. So, I decided I'd do something big and restore glory to the great name of Zagreus.
悬锋城人把城市建立在这儿，又出于什么考量？就算他们真的这么爱脚底板发烫的感觉，至少也给悬桥加个扶手吧？

What were the people of Castrum Kremnos thinking when they built their city here? Even if they really enjoyed having their feet scorched, you'd think they would at least add railings to their bridges.
塞纳托斯于是又说：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。瑟希斯的秘果，高悬在树庭之上，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
So Thanatos said again: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Cerces' secret fruit, perched atop the Grove. How would you even be able to taste it?"
「不要相信奥赫玛人，即便他只是住在奥赫玛城郊。」
"Do not trust Okhemans, even if they only live in its outskirts."
扎格列斯老祖在被奥赫玛元老们设计陷害时如此评价道。
Ancestor Zagreus espoused these words when ensnared in a trap set by the Okheman Elders.
塞纳托斯于是又说：「巴特鲁斯，巴特鲁斯，您能偷盗世界上一切东西，唯独偷不到一件。瑟希斯的秘果，高悬在树庭之上，您能如何品尝到它呢？」
So Thanatos said again: "Bartholos, O Bartholos, you can steal everything beneath the sky, except for one thing: Cerces' secret fruit, perched atop the Grove. How would you even be able to taste it?"
「不要相信奥赫玛人，即便他只是住在奥赫玛城郊。」
"Do not trust Okhemans, even if they only live in its outskirts."
——扎格列斯老祖在被奥赫玛元老们设计陷害时如此评价道。
...Ancestor Zagreus espoused these words when ensnared in a trap set by the Okheman Elders.
哦哟，没有在这{RUBY_B#树庭}树林子{RUBY_E#}里迷路啊，不错不错。
Oh my, finding your way through {RUBY_B#the Grove}the woods{RUBY_E#} without getting lost? Impressive, impressive.
好啦，这种子本身也不是我想偷的东西，就大方地送给你吧。这树林子里只能进、不能出的道路不止一处，你可千万别阴沟翻船搞迷了路啊？
Tell you what. I wasn't really after this seed anyway, so consider it yours. Just remember — the Grove's paths often lead you in, but not back out. Mind you, don't lose your way!
桀桀桀，你的身手果然越来越好啦！能有你这样的侠义之士保护着翁法罗斯，我巴特鲁斯就算是香消玉殒…咳咳，咱这是在胡说些什么啊。
Hehehe, your skills have gotten impressive! With a valiant hero like you protecting Amphoreus, I, Bartholos, can rest in peace... Ahem, what nonsense am I spouting?
只是，翁法罗斯是个很小的世界，即使诡计多端的巴特鲁斯也渐渐发现自己没有新的角色可以扮演。但你——巴特鲁斯最好的朋友之一，却依然乐意和它游戏。
But Amphoreus is a tiny world, and even the tricky Bartholos ran out of roles to play. Yet you — one of their best friends — still enjoyed playing along.
所以，还是算了吧！我即将动身去和真正的巴特鲁斯会合，而你…不出意外，你将见证翁法罗斯最后、也是最初的命运。桀桀，掰掰！
So, never mind! I'm off to rejoin the real Bartholos, and you... if all goes as planned, you'll witness Amphoreus' last — yet also first — destiny. Hehe, see ya!
（假设台词）唉…果然还是要谨记泰坦的教诲，钱财乃身外之物…世界马上就要重启了，我是用不到这些私房钱了，就全送给你吧！说不定你的口袋反而能把它们带进下一世的翁法罗斯！

(Invented dialogue) Alas... I should've followed the Titans' teaching that riches are temporary... with the world about to restart, these savings are useless to me, so take them all! Maybe your pockets can bring them into the next Amphoreus!
别误会——第一，咱就是货真价实的巴特鲁斯；第二，货真价实的巴特鲁斯，在「正常时间」中，也确实不会出现在此时此刻的哀丽秘榭。
Don't get it twisted — first, I am the one and only real Bartholos. Second, the real Bartholos truly wouldn't be in Aedes Elysiae right now, "normally."
别误会——第一，咱就是货真价实的巴特鲁斯；第二，货真价实的巴特鲁斯，在「正常时间」中，也确实不会出现在此时此刻的哀丽秘榭。
Don't get it twisted — first, I am the one and only real Bartholos. Second, the real Bartholos truly wouldn't be in Aedes Elysiae right now, "normally."
在很久很久以前——啊，也可能就在上个轮回里——有一支来自哈图西里的雇佣兵被困在了奥赫玛城外。
A long, long time ago... Ah, or maybe it was just the last cycle... a group of mercenaries from Hattusili found themselves stranded outside the city of Okhema.
据说，世界上的第一个旅行杂技团就这样诞生了；他们从奥赫玛一路表演回了遥远的哈图西里，从此再也没有从事雇佣兵的工作。
And just like that, the world's first traveling acrobatic troupe was born. They performed their way from Okhema to far-off Hattusili and never went back to mercenary life.
桀桀，看这边，看这边。我听说，从这里出去就能离开翁法罗斯…这事儿是真是假？
Hehehe, look this way, over here. I heard you can get out of Amphoreus through here... is that true?
你别说…咱有时候就想，对于更外面的世界来说，翁法罗斯是不是就像一个大大的宝箱？要是这样，和咱们作对的铁墓，大概就相当于一只讨厌的宝箱怪吧！
Y'know what... Sometimes I wonder if Amphoreus is like one big treasure chest to the outside world? If that's the case, then Irontomb, our enemy, would be nothing but an annoying mimic!
你知道这些柱子是什么吗？桀桀，它们是支撑翁法罗斯的服务器——我猜是这样。
You know what these pillars are? Heheh, they're the servers that keep Amphoreus running, or so I'd guess.
喂喂，我现在可是卡在了翁法罗斯的服务器上唉！关心一下你的老伙计啦。
C'mon, I'm literally stuck inside the Amphoreus servers here! Spare a thought for your old pal here, will you?
翁法罗斯，是否让您留下了遗憾？
Do you have any regrets about your time in Amphoreus?
巴特鲁斯会买下奥赫玛的一整条街，以后想偷哪家就偷哪家；您呢，以后要是想回来坐坐，举会儿黎明机器玩玩也不在话下……
I'll buy a whole street in Okhema to rob any place whenever I want. And you, if you ever want to come back and visit, you can play with the Dawn Device all you want...
如果不算那些留着金血的英雄豪杰，毫无疑问——咱巴特鲁斯，就是在这{RUBY_B#翁法罗斯}方寸果壳{RUBY_E#}里陪伴了您最久的朋友。
If you don't count those heroes with golden blood, then without a doubt: I, Bartholos, have been your longest companion in this little {RUBY_B#Amphoreus}nutshell{RUBY_E#}.
这位安提基色拉人，就是我老师的老师，来古士老师。在整个奥赫玛，能流利诵读古泰坦语的学者，也只有他一人而已。
This is my teacher's teacher, the Antikytheran scholar, Mr. Lygus. He's the only one in all of Okhema who can fluently recite ancient Titan texts.
恩维尔同学谬赞了。只是安提基色拉人天然擅长记住各种零碎的知识，所以能帮助奥赫玛做一些力所能及的工作。
Avilius, you flatter me. Antikytherans are naturally good at remembering bits and pieces of knowledge, so I simply assist Okhema in ways I can.
别急着谢我，哦…对了，虽然这话说出来多少显得对树庭缺乏尊重，不过——
Don't thank me just yet. Oh, by the way... though I mean no disrespect to the Grove... but—
{NICKNAME}阁下，您可否帮我借树庭的「瑟希斯之心」一用？
{NICKNAME}, could you help me borrow the "Heart of Cerces" from the Grove?
可是…{F#她}{M#他}甚至不是树庭的学生…再说那个心，比人大多了……
But... {F#she}{M#he} isn't even a student of the Grove... Besides, that heart is much bigger than a person...
{NICKNAME}阁下，请收好这件小装置。如果您有空路过树庭，可以在「瑟希斯之心」晶体的下方找到一个小小的插口——刚好符合插入这件装置的规格。
{NICKNAME}, please take this little device. If you pass through the Grove, you'll find a small slot under the "Heart of Cerces" crystal. This device should fit perfectly.
哇！不过，树庭真的会同意让我们……？
Wow! But... will the Grove really let us...?
恩维尔。树庭…不久前遭遇了黑潮的袭击……
Avilius. The Grove... it was recently attacked by the black tide...
不知道。但按照有限的情报推断，最有可能的…是那个毁灭树庭的恐怖剑士。除了那缺乏理智的黑潮怪物，没人会故意去毁坏「瑟希斯之心」。

I'm not sure. But based on the limited information we have, the most likely culprit is the terrifying swordmaster who destroyed the Grove. Other than the mindless monsters of the black tide, no one else would deliberately damage the "Heart of Cerces."
也许我们翻译出的《黄金替罪羊的呓语》，就和那个毁灭树庭的剑士有关？意味着那个人的某种过去？
Maybe our translations of Golden Scapegoat's Mutterings are somehow connected to the swordmaster who destroyed the Grove? Could they reflect something from that person's past?
走，跟我去奥赫玛。
Come, let's go to Okhema together.
从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.
从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.
「然后，我就能证明，整个翁法罗斯都是以艾格勒为中心，进行周期性的旋转运动！」在雷鸣般的锻造声里，学者自言自语。
"And then, I can prove that the entirety of Amphoreus is centered around Aquila, revolving in periodic motion!" The scholar mutters to himself over the thunderous clamor of the forge.
你听说悬锋城正在举办新的竞技比赛，刻法勒在上，看来你注定要在那里夺得最初的荣誉。
You hear that Castrum Kremnos is holding a new tournament. Kephale above, it appears you are destined to seize your inaugural glory there.
好一位勇士！就连悬锋城的本地观众，都不由得为你喝彩。
What a warrior! Even the local spectators at Castrum Kremnos can't help but cheer you on.
更别提，错误的撰写人，还是树庭中赫赫有名的学者。你看向眼前正在分裂繁殖的小家伙们，苦恼是否要修正培育方案中的错误。

Not to mention that the one who made the erroneous entry is a prominent scholar of the Grove. You look at the tiny critters multiplying before you, conflicted over whether to correct the error in the breeding scheme.
已功成名就的你骤然意识到，这正是多年前被你无视的错误数据，在机缘巧合下诱发的结果。如果这件事被捅了出去，想必你很快就会被树庭扫地出门。

Having achieved fame, you suddenly realize that this is the result of a stroke of luck from the erroneous data that you ignored all those years ago. If this matter were to get out, you would surely be unceremoniously cast out of the Grove.
你的丑闻成为了树庭内的一大谈资，但至少，未来的学者再也不会被这样的错误刁难了。
Your scandal has become a hot topic within the Grove, but at least future scholars won't be obstructed by such blunders again.
拟造的螺丝咕姆站在商店前，饶有趣味地看着眼前的世界。看来，他没有在意差分宇宙被你和树庭联合复刻这件事。
The simulated Screwllum stands before the shop, observing the world with keen interest. It seems he's not bothered by the fact that you and the Grove have recreated the Divergent Universe altogether.
「即使身处困境，也能让你如此挂念，我感到十分荣幸」，螺丝咕姆亲切地向你问好，「至于树庭的文档解析工作，就由我来为你带来更多『祝福』。」
"Even in difficult times, to know that you think of me is an honor." Screwllum greets you warmly. "As for the Grove's document analysis work, I'll be the one to bring you even more 'Blessings'."
为何千年以来，尼卡多利唯独对晨昏之眼穷追不舍？是因为它的雷枪杀死了僭越天空的狂徒，故而要向天空的暴君复仇？还是因为，浴血的战士希冀挑战翁法罗斯最为强大的权威？

Why has Nikador relentlessly pursued the Eye of Twilight for a thousand years? Are they seeking vengeance against the tyrants of the skies for striking down the rebels who dared to reach their heights with their Lightning Spear? Or does the blood-stained warrior aim to challenge the most supreme authority in Amphoreus?
伤痕不断地出现在两位泰坦的神体，然后又痊愈，直至千年，胜负也未曾锚定。悬锋之下的尼卡多利终丧失理性，圣城之巅的刻法勒已长眠不醒。

Scars etch themselves again and again into the divine bodies of the two Titans, only to heal and reappear, with no victor after a thousand years. Beneath Kremnos, Nikador has descended into madness, while atop the holy city, Kephale remains in eternal slumber.
而战争的军团，仍怀揣着最后的荣耀，向着远方的奥赫玛进军。
Yet the legion of war, clinging to the last vestiges of its glory, still marches toward the distant Okhema.
在众神争斗不息的时代，战争在盾牌上溅射出火花，落下的碎屑成为悬锋城盾的秘密。无论事实如何，那些古老的盾牌已无法再造。

In an age where divine battles raged incessantly, war made sparks upon the shield. Its fragments became the guarded secret of Castrum Kremnos' defenses. Anyway, these ancient shields can no longer be replicated.
神明掷出投枪，划破夜空的光辉会指引悬锋城的子民，沿着光的轨迹，践踏沿途的每一座城邦，直到抵达已被焚毁的废墟。

As the god cast their spear, trails of light across the night sky would guide the people of Kremnos. Following the trail of light, they trample every city-state in their path, until they reach the burnt ruins.
因此，当国王德索斯暗中派遣信使与喀诺尔停战，却又出尔反尔，率领悬锋城的军团兵临城下，尼卡多利第一次向它的子民降下天谴。

When King Desos secretly brokered a ceasefire with Canor only to betray them, leading his forces from Castrum Kremnos to their gates, Nikador unleashed divine fury on their own people for the first time.
永夜笼罩尘世，失去理性的神明将所有生命都视作假想敌。曾力战黑潮，捍卫翁法罗斯的征服者，终究也成为了黑潮的帮凶，点燃无意义的战火。

An eternal night shrouds the mortal realm, and the god now devoid of reason sees every life as an adversary. The defender of Amphoreus against the black tide eventually turn traitor and assistant to the black tide, igniting futile wars.
可扎格列斯，它真的爱着我们吗？倘若有利可图，恐怕，就连翁法罗斯的覆灭，也不会耽误它的交易。
But does Zagreus truly hold any affection for us? If profitable, surely even the downfall of Amphoreus would not hinder their dealings.
「看看遍布翁法罗斯的贼之手，其实扎格列斯把自己的灵魂藏进了里面。只要集齐所有的手臂，把它们拼接在一起，就能复活千手的扎格列斯！比艾格勒的眼睛还多上十倍！」

"Behold the Thief's Hand strewn across Amphoreus — Zagreus has embedded their soul within them. Gather all the limbs, piece them together, and resurrect Zagreus the Thousand Hands, with ten times the power of Aquila!"
那是人类已无法归去，无法想象的黄金时代。野兽无需捕食，新叶不会枯萎。上千的城邦屹立在翁法罗斯，没有忧愁的生灵无限制地增长。

It was an epoch beyond comprehension, one we can never return to — The Golden Age. Predators did not need to hunt and foliage remained evergreen. Thousands of city-states dotted Amphoreus, teeming with beings who knew no sorrow.
在公正之秤的见证下，它与众神签订了誓约。以冥河为界，死亡将平衡翁法罗斯的生命，逝去的灵魂终归于塞纳托斯的国度，登上摆渡者的长船，从今生去往来世。

Under the watchful eye of the Scale of Justice, they swore oaths with the gods. The River of Souls marked the boundary, where death would balance life in Amphoreus. Departed souls would journey to the realm of Thanatos, boarding the ferryman's long boat to transition from this life to the next.
这些原初的道路成为翁法罗斯的边界，时至今日，仍有无数人试图触及。
These primordial paths define the boundaries of Amphoreus, still sought by countless souls today.
这些框架成为翁法罗斯变化的源动力，所以轻盈的会上浮，沉重的会坠落。
These frameworks become the driving force behind Amphoreus' transformations, causing the light to rise and the heavy to fall.
以雅努斯为首，三位命运泰坦在混沌中划定时空，赋予法则，抟造出翁法罗斯的雏形，留下万物诞生的基石，是为创世之始。
Led by Janus, the three Fate Titans delineate time and space within chaos, bestow laws, and mold the embryo of Amphoreus, laying down the cornerstone for all creation.
在人子们的足迹布满翁法罗斯前，已有那伟大的神明开辟前路，因它曾到来，所以我们才能触及。
Before the footprints of humanity marked Amphoreus, this great deity had already paved the way. Their prior arrival enables us now to reach them.
你还想去到世界的尽头吗？在黑潮尚未降临的黄金时代，在无尽之海中寻到雅努斯的门扉，穿过它们，你将抵达翁法罗斯的每一个角落。而只有最虔诚的信徒，方能在惊涛骇浪中将它们开启。

Do you still desire to reach the world's end? In the Golden Age before the black tide, find Janus' gates amidst the Endless Sea, pass through them, and you can arrive at every nook of Amphoreus. Only the most devout disciples can open them amidst turbulent seas.
这里是悬锋城的竞技场，悬锋子民正在为他们那残暴的主庆祝一场胜利。而你，便是这场狂欢中注定要被牺牲的战利品。

This is the arena of Castrum Kremnos, where the citizens of Castrum Kremnos exalt in slaughter, celebrating yet another triumph for their bloodthirsty king. And you? You are nothing more than the loot, a doomed offering in this twisted carnival of death.
神悟树庭向整个翁法罗斯发出了实习学者考试，这对于苦心钻研学术二十年的你来说，是一个绝不能错过的机会。
The Grove of Epiphany has issued its Intern Scholar Examination — an open call across all of Amphoreus. After twenty long years of academic toil, you know this is a chance you cannot let slip away.
一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的悲报「您的学术成果非常具有科研价值！但遗憾的是与主流研究方向不符，您的简历已进入人才库，期待未来与您合作。」

A week later, the Grove of Epiphany delivers its verdict — a polite rejection. "Your research holds immense academic significance! However, it does not align with our current primary research direction. Your credentials have been added to our talent database, and we look forward to potential collaboration in the future."
「也罢，神悟树庭如此不识人才，不加入也罢。」说着说着你的眼角有泪划过……
"So be it. If the Grove of Epiphany can't recognize true genius, then I want no part of them." You say the words with defiance... but as you do, a lone tear betrays you, sliding down your cheek.
一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的悲报「您的学术成果非常具有科研价值！但遗憾的是与主流研究方向不符，您的简历已进入人才库，期待未来与您合作。」

A week later, the Grove of Epiphany delivers its verdict — a polite rejection. "Your research holds immense academic significance! However, it does not align with our current primary research direction. Your credentials have been added to our talent database, and we look forward to potential collaboration in the future."
「也罢，神悟树庭如此不识人才，不加入也罢。」说着说着你的眼角有泪划过……
"So be it. If the Grove of Epiphany can't recognize true genius, then I want no part of them." You say the words with defiance... but as you do, a lone tear betrays you, sliding down your cheek.
据说能进入神悟树庭面试的学者万里挑一，但是当你看到等候厅挤得像大甩卖期间的云石市集时，你不禁感叹如今的翁法罗斯真是人才济济。

They say only the rarest of scholars reach the interview stage, yet as you step into the waiting hall — crammed tighter than Marmoreal Market during a festival sale, you can't help but marvel at the sheer number of bright minds in Amphoreus.
这里汇聚了翁法罗斯绝大部分图书，你就像酒鬼找到了法吉娜的酒酿秘藏，恨不得在这座图书馆里用知识醉生梦死。

Here lies the vast majority of Amphoreus's books. To you, it's as if a hopeless drinker has stumbled upon Phagousa's legendary wine cellar — the sheer temptation to lose yourself in this sea of wisdom is overwhelming.
当时悬锋城准备吞并邻国小城，欧洛尼斯降下神谕，宣布了出征的失败。悬锋将军也会死于清泉关的隘口，死因是落马坠崖。

At that time, Castrum Kremnos prepared to annex its neighboring smaller city. Oronyx delivered a divine decree, foretelling the campaign's failure, and declaring the general of Kremnos would meet his end at Clearspring Gorge's narrow pass, doomed to fall from his steed to the cliffs below.
小城上下士气大振，最终利用狭隘地形以少胜多，挫败了悬锋城的进攻。而悬锋城的将军，也如预言中的那般牺牲。

The small city's morale soared, and they ultimately used the narrow terrain to achieve a victory against the overwhelming number of invaders, thwarting Kremnos's invasion. And just as the prophecy foretold, Kremnos's general met his destined end.
欧洛尼斯的所有预言中，仅仅只有一个还未验证，那便是关于翁法罗斯未来的走向。
Of all Oronyx's prophecies, only one remains unfulfilled, and that is the foretelling of Amphoreus' ultimate fate.
在那连泰坦都无法呼吸的压抑当中，时空交织如麻，襁褓中的翁法罗斯危在旦夕。
In that repression that could even choke Titans, space and time intertwined like fibers, with the newborn Amphoreus on the cusp of peril.
它是翁法罗斯最沉重之物，用庞大的身躯承载万物生长。
It is the most weighty thing in Amphoreus, carrying the growth of all things on its massive body.
吉奥里亚就这样诞生了。命运三姐妹将它作为最初的砝码，置于天平一侧，翁法罗斯终于有了稳定的物质。
And so, Georios was born. The Three Fates placed it as the initial counterweight on one side of the balance, and finally, Amphoreus had stable matter.
它是翁法罗斯最顽固之物，用永恒的耐心塑造大地万象。
They are Amphoreus's most obstinate creation, wielding endless patience to intricately sculpt the world in all its facets.
它是翁法罗斯最温柔之物，用无价的神启挽救堕落人子。
They were the most gentle being of Amphoreus, using priceless revelations to save fallen humanity.
在瑟希斯的赐福下，密密麻麻的麦穗从土里长出，春天也回到翁法罗斯。
Under Cerces's blessing, dense ears of wheat sprouted forth from the soil, and spring returned to Amphoreus.
当爱意和浪漫再无法抑制，它们如泉水般喷涌而出，化为漫野的金色羽翼。墨涅塔的蝴蝶飞向翁法罗斯的各方，直至那众神亦未洞晓的边陲。
Yet love and romance, unrestrained, burst forth like springs, flooding the fields as golden wings. Mnestia's butterflies soared to Amphoreus's farthest reaches — even to realms beyond divine sight.
艾格勒在翁法罗斯的边界建立起它的神国。它翅膀上短的羽毛，化作天上的霞光和火焰；那些长的羽毛，则被它制作成雷霆和闪电。
Aquila established their divine realm at the border of Amphoreus. The short feathers on their wings became the glow and flames in the sky. The long feathers were fashioned into thunder and lightning.
而这座立在巨人脚下的城市，后来被人们如此称呼——圣城奥赫玛。
And this city, founded beneath the giant, would one day be known as the Holy City of Okhema.
那些碎片，后来被扎格列斯铸成了金币。也有人说，它们成为了后世悬锋城盾的秘密。
Some say these fragments were later minted into coins by Zagreus. Others whisper that they became the secret behind the indomitable shields of Castrum Kremnos.
时过境迁，悬锋暴君的塑像已成陈迹，苔藓将用它青绿的手抚去过往的一切辉煌和悲欢。
As time marches on, the statue of the tyrant of Kremnos has become a relic as green mossy fingers smother all the glory and tragedy of the past.
据说这是军纪严明的悬锋城人最爱的游戏之一喀，当阵列变化，五面同样颜色的盾牌排成一列，就会发生奇妙的事情！
Apparently this game is a favorite of Castrum Kremnos' locals, who maintain strict military rigor. When a formation changes and five identical colors of shield line up, miraculous things can happen!
我感觉到了…悬锋城的勇士正在与门对面那可怕的力量抗衡，一次又一次倒下，又一次又一次站起来……
I can feel it... The warriors of Castrum Kremnos are locked in combat with that terrifying force behind the gates. One after the other, they fall down, and they get back up again...
欢迎来到理性赐福的树庭，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}裂分之枝{RUBY_E#}的伟大不言自明！
Welcome to the Grove, a place blessed by Reason. The majesty of the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#} speaks for themself!
…喀？找我有事吗？没事的话请安静，我正在为即将出版的《神悟树庭风俗考》做田野调查喀。
...Crrrk? You need something? If not, please stay quiet, I'm conducting field studies for my upcoming Grove of Epiphany Cultural Studies.
金苹果有着许多象征，在崇尚智慧的树庭，它便代表着智慧；但这枚苹果只是一件装饰。
The golden apple bears many symbolic meanings. In the wisdom-worshiping Grove, it represents intellect. However, this apple is merely ornamental.
「与蛮邦战至力竭身亡」…树庭的勇士并不比其他城邦少。
"Died from exhaustion during the battle against the barbarian states." ...The heroic warriors of the Grove are no fewer than those of other cities.
若虫们的鸣叫声连成一片，仿佛夏日池塘中的青蛙——可惜翁法罗斯没有青蛙。
The chirping of the nymphs fills the air, blending together like the croaking of frogs in a summer pond — if only Amphoreus had frogs.
嗯嗯？什么叫「新的纷争半神回到了他忠实的悬锋城」「树庭贤人在公民大会激昂陈词」「黄金裔即将揭开再创世的新篇」？！

Wait, what? The new demigod of Strife has returned to his loyal Castrum Kremnos!? The Sage of the Grove delivered a rousing speech at the citizens' assembly!? Chrysos Heirs are about to unveil the next chapter of Era Nova!?
知道天底下所有的秘密，想问我问题的人能从云石天宫排队到悬锋城。为了图个清净，我只好躲起来。
I know all the secrets under the sky. The line of people wanting to ask me questions could stretch from Marmoreal Palace to Castrum Kremnos. For a bit of peace and quiet, I had no choice but to hide.
悬锋城的事，你应该知道吧。
You know what happened in Castrum Kremnos, right?
这里和悬锋城差好多！
This place is so different from Castrum Kremnos!
奥赫玛不会陷落的。
Okhema won't fall.
山的对面，是奥赫玛…
Across the mountains stands Okhema...
刻法勒的城邦…奥赫玛。
Kephale's city... Okhema.
你知道树庭发生的事吗？
Do you know what happened in the Grove?
奥赫玛的永夜…
Okhema's eternal night...
…糟了，该不会将奥赫玛的公共设置弄坏了吧？你对此感到担忧，但某种突如其来的睡意袭来。
...Oh, no. you didn't damage Okhema's public installations, did you? You feel great worry about this, but a sudden sleepiness comes upon you.
所以…下次可别乱来。这里可是奥赫玛，阿妈说，我们的一举一动，泰坦都能看得见。
So... Don't do that next time. This is Okhema, after all. Mom says that the Titans can see everything we do here.
不过刻法勒的光辉在奥赫玛留下过不少痕迹，你需要的话，我可以给你推荐——
But Kephale's light has left many markings upon Okhema. If you need, I can give you recommendations...
奥赫玛古话曾云：「泰坦赐，不可辞。」你欣然接受了泰坦内定于你的重任，将双手贴近圣烛装置——
An old saying from Okhema goes: "The Titans' offer is not one to be refused." You gladly accept the duty handed to you by the Titan and reach out to touch the holy candle with your hands...
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
这个回答一定没错。奥赫玛人人都喜欢金线织成的衣服，但不是每个人都能耐得住金线的「审讯」。
This answer is definitely right. Everyone in Okhema loves clothes woven from gold thread, but not all of them can withstand the interrogation from these threads.
万敌会怎么说？
What would Mydei say?
你记得万敌曾和某个狮口打过交道，他当然了解这群狮子的出题套路，叫他过来吧——
You remember that Mydei has dealt with a certain lion's mouth once. Of course, he would know these lions' tricks. Let's get him here...
悬锋城的人民习惯以热水泡浴，不过，要是沸腾的铁水从头浇下，即便是最勇武的人也会心生畏惧。
Castrum Kremnos' citizens are accustomed to hot baths, but if you pour boiling molten iron over your head, even the bravest individual would quake in his shoes.
哦、哦吼，这熟悉的风格，果然是万敌阁下的意见。
Oh, oh-ho, this familiar tone... I knew it was Lord Mydei's suggestion.
本狮毫不怀疑万敌阁下的勇气，嘿嘿，可惜可惜，这不是正确答案。
I do not doubt Lord Mydei's courage one bit, hehe. Alas, it is a wrong answer.
虽然被狮口狠狠咬到了，但万敌却没有丝毫改色，颤抖的反而是石铸的狮口。
Though the lion's jaw clamps down hard, Mydei's expression does not change at all. Instead, it is the stone-forged mouth that is quivering.
对、对不起！万敌大人，别把我砸碎！
I—I apologize! Lord Mydei, please do not break me!
万敌甩了甩手，不悦地离开了……
Mydei shakes off the pain on his hand and leaves with an expression of displeasure...
你想到了在翁法罗斯认识的第一个值得信赖的伙伴，白厄，他一定会回应你的请求。
You recall the first trustworthy companion you befriended in Amphoreus, Phainon. He will surely respond to your request.

"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
你是比最遵纪守法的奥赫玛好公民还要「守序善良」的存在，就连{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}都不得不为你的契约精神鼓掌。
You are an existence even more Lawful Good than the most law-abiding citizens of Okhema. Even {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} would applaud your devotion to upholding an agreement.
即使在折纸大学，你也从来没有系统接受过高等数学的试炼。那么，奥赫玛里的谁看起来像是数学比较好的人呢？
You never once systematically experienced the trials of advanced mathematics, even while at Paperfold University. Then, who in Okhema looks like someone who's good with numbers?
…问问万敌？
...Ask Mydei?
万敌的数学真的比你好吗？直到消息发送成功的时候，你仍有些怀疑。
Is Mydei's math really better than yours? You still feel apprehensive even as you send the message.
万敌头也不回地离开了，你看到他在走远后挠了挠头……
Mydei leaves without looking back, and you see him scratching his head as he walks away...
因为交易的时间，不巧正处在「机缘月」。在奥赫玛的历法中，第十二个月份——「机缘月」，是属于{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的月份。

That is because the date for this deal was unfortunately during the "Month of Fortune" — In Okhema's calendar, the twelfth month is the Month of Fortune, which belongs to {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}.
而你和大地兽商人约定还钱的日期，是「月末」当天。在「幽灵日」出现前，就算是奥赫玛最睿智的法官，也没法判定契约上的「月末」究竟指的是哪一天。

And the day you and the dromas merchant arranged for repayment is on the last day of the month. Before the Spirit Day appears, even the most sagacious judge in Okhema would be unable to determine which day is the "last day of the month" the contract is referring to.
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
奥赫玛的浴场里常见的沐浴香皂，掉在地上像烂泥一样滑溜，踩到它的人只有跌倒的份。
Bath soap is a staple in Okhema's baths. It could also slide all around like sloppy mud when dropped on the floor. The unfortunate soul who slips on it can only fall.
你确信奥赫玛的朋友们当中有比你更懂幽默的人，邀请谁来回答这个问题好呢？
Are you sure that you have friends in Okhema who have a better sense of humor than you? Who will you invite to answer this riddle?
记得在树庭求学时，我听过几节精彩的辩论。假如逻辑分为正直的逻辑和歪曲的逻辑，后者往往能用诡计把前者驳倒，但歪曲的逻辑本身却是不成立的。

I remember that I listened to a few outstanding debate sessions when I was studying at the Grove. Hypothetically speaking, if logic is divided into sound and twisted, the latter often employs trickery to refute the former, but twisted logic is fundamentally flawed.
哦吼？纵然本狮不便亲口妄议奥赫玛的政务，却非常乐于听到影射此事的笑话呐！
Oh-ho? It is inconvenient for me to speak ill of Okhema's political affairs, but I am very happy to listen to jokes that allude to such matters!
身为外邦人，擅自议论奥赫玛的管理事务恐怕有些不妥，还是再问问其他人的看法吧。
As an outsider, it may not be appropriate to be discussing Okhema's administrative affairs. Better ask for someone else's opinion.
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
哦吼？异乡的勇士，难道也向奥赫玛的哲学家学来了辩论的思维？可惜可惜，至少你还拥有一口袋的妙论，这不是正确答案。
Oh-ho? Brave outsider, could you have picked the brains of Okhema's philosophers? Alas, though you have a pocketful of clever rhetoric, this is a wrong answer.
求己不如求人，要选择奥赫玛的哪位朋友来替你回答这个刁钻的问题呢？
There's no shame in seeking help from others. Which friend from Okhema would you like to seek help from for answering this tricky question?
万敌会怎么说？
What would Mydei say?
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
「门扉时」和「幕匿时」…记得在翁法罗斯的历法中分别代表「清晨」和「晚上」。这东西在早晨搞丢脑袋，晚上还能找回来……

The Entry Hour and the Curtain-Fall Hour... I remember these respectively represent "dawn" and "sunset" in the Amphoreus calendar. This thing loses its head in the morning, but can retrieve it at night...
说不定，答案会是翁法罗斯某种独特的事物，既然如此，问问当地的新朋友们或许能得到答案？
Perhaps the answer is something special that only happened in Amphoreus. If that's the case, maybe our new local friends might have an answer?
在我认识的人中，能接近这点的或许只有万敌了，他的不死之身算是人尽皆知，也确实受悬锋族人爱戴。
Among the people I know, Mydei's the only one who has abilities that even come close to this. His immortality is known to all, and he is also beloved by the Kremnos clansmen.
吼，吼吼吼…万敌大人确实能死而复生，但这「可爱」，吼吼吼吼吼……
Ho, hohoho... Lord Mydei definitely can rise from the dead, but as for the "adorable" part... hohohoho...
好久没笑到嘴疼了…吼，那个——白厄大人，虽然您没答对，但我可以不咬您，这件事您千万别跟万敌大人提，我怕他把本狮给轰杀至渣呀！

It's been a long time since my jaws have hurt from laughing... Lord Phainon, you may have gotten it wrong, but I won't bite you. Please don't mention this to Lord Mydei, or I fear he'll pound me to dust!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
有人会把硬币用旧，有人会把旧硬币当成宝贝…离开翁法罗斯的时候，就顺手抓一把硬币带走吧，说不定星际和平公司会很乐意收购呢。

Some will wear down their coins, others will treat old coins like artifacts... When I leave Amphoreus, I'll just grab a handful of old coins. Who knows, maybe the IPC will be more than happy to buy them.
吼？妙啊。在这历史悠久的奥赫玛，要想收集到过去使用的古币可得花费一大笔开销，而穷人们手里正巧有许多…不对吼？

Ho? Wonderful. In a land like Okhema, steeped in history, one would have to spend a pretty penny to collect ancient coins. Yet the poor probably have plenty of them jingling in their pockets... Isn't that so?
万敌有什么看法？
What do you think, Mydei?
万敌瞪了狮口一眼便离开了。
Mydei gives the lion a dagger stare and leaves.
我记得城里的人们在辩论时，提到过类似的话题——答案是「机遇」。据说，这是奥赫玛每个商人都必须铭记的格言。
I remember a debate in the city mentioning something like that — the answer is "opportunity." It's apparently an aphorism that all Okheman merchants must remember.
勇士的家乡或许如此，可在奥赫玛，再贫穷的公民都拥有悠闲泡澡的余裕吼！
It may be so in your homeland, but in Okhema, even the poorest folk have the luxury of time to spend in baths!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.
要不问问万敌吧？
Why not ask Mydei?
战场上更是如此，悬锋城的军法就是为整顿纪律而设立的。狮子，满意了？
It is even more so on the battlefield. Castrum Kremnos' military code was established to instil order. Satisfied, lion?
吼？确实是很符合万敌阁下风格的回答，虽说与标准答案有差距，但既然您亲自来答题，本狮当然要给您开个后门，这口就不咬了吼！
Ho? An answer that fits Lord Mydei's character indeed. It may differ from the standard answer, but since you answered in person, I will show you some respect and dispense with the biting!
万敌瞪了它一眼后便离开了，你感觉到，这头狮子在瑟瑟发抖。
Mydei stares daggers at it before leaving. You can feel the lion quaking in its proverbial boots.
是不是完全不可爱了？就连奥赫玛最虔诚的大地兽爱好者都会为此感到苦恼吼！
Wouldn't that be the opposite of cute? Even the most enthusiastic of dromas lovers in Okhema would be chagrined!
「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
"Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

Aedes Elysiae really is a small world, huh?
（奥赫玛、悬锋城、神悟树庭、命运重渊…这些年里，我踏足了很多地方……）
(Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove of Epiphany, Abyss of Fate... I've walked through so many places over the years...)
（在刻法勒脚下的奥赫玛，居住着一群红色头发的信使……）
(At Kephale's feet lies Okhema, home to a group of red-haired messengers...)
（行人如织的奥赫玛，同样有着非同凡响的佳肴。其中最为人称道的，便是名为「红土块」的料理……）
(The bustling streets of Okhema are also home to extraordinary cuisines. Among them lies a dish that stirs the soul, known only as the "Redsoil.")
o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o「哥是哀丽秘榭最强最劲的猛男海豹！」)∋
o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o "I'm the mightiest, manliest seal in all of Aedes Elysiae!" )∋
多亏了{NICKNAME}，哀丽秘榭越来越热闹啦。
Thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, Aedes Elysiae is getting livelier by the day!
真是不可思议…哀丽秘榭的草地，竟然比私人浴宫的床铺更加舒适。
Unbelievable... The grass here at the Aedes Elysiae is even more comfortable than the beds in the private bath chamber!
是个好愿望，但看上去它甚至不愿统治哀丽秘榭。
That's a good wish, but this little guy doesn't even seem interested in ruling Aedes Elysiae.

A dromas? In Aedes Elysiae? That's a big problem, but there's an even bigger one...
哀丽秘榭的建筑都是砖瓦结构，在大地兽眼里就像自助餐一样美味。你必须阻止它——
The village buildings are mostly made of bricks and tiles, basically an all-you-can-eat buffet for a dromas. You have to stop it...
哎呀，给我卸哪儿来了，这还是哀丽秘榭吗？
Oh, where are we now? Is this still Aedes Elysiae?
…不久前，浮黎的目光掠过了翁法罗斯。加上黑塔女士此行获知的情报——
Not long ago, Fuli's gaze swept across Amphoreus. Combined with the intel Madam Herta gathered on this journey—
翁法罗斯或许将会引燃一位绝灭大君的怒火。
Amphoreus might soon trigger the rage of a Lord Ravager.
不知翁法罗斯背后暗中酝酿的毁灭，是来自早已闻名寰宇的焚风、星啸、铁墓，还是像幻胧这样尚不为世人所知的大君。
I wonder if the destruction secretly brewing behind Amphoreus comes from renowned Overlords like Zephyro, Celenova, and Irontomb, or from one still unknown to the world, like Phantylia.
呵，从这个角度看，翁法罗斯或许是个安全匣呢。毕竟，三股令使级别甚至更高的命途之力，一旦擦枪走火，可比查德威克那家伙的炸药带劲多了。

Hmph, when you look at it that way, Amphoreus might be a safety box. After all, three forces at the Emanator level or even higher — if they were to come to blows, it would be far more explosive than Chadwick's bombs.
若真如此…身在翁法罗斯内部的{NICKNAME}和丹恒，岂不是相当危险？
If that's true... wouldn't {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng be in extreme danger in Amphoreus?
听黑塔女士的叙述，那位叫来古士的智械，同样沐浴过博识尊的瞥视。有这样一位人物把守翁法罗斯，恐怕我们的计划会举步维艰。
Based on Madam Herta's account, that Intellitron named Lygus has also been bathed in Nous's gaze. Having such an entity guarding Amphoreus will likely make our plans extremely difficult to execute.
黑塔女士，你果真进入了翁法罗斯的世界吗？
Madam Herta, did you actually enter the world of Amphoreus?
螺丝咕姆先生的意思是，黑塔女士进入的翁法罗斯，有可能是那位来古士构建的认知障碍…就像同谐之力那样？
Mr. Screwllum means that the Amphoreus you entered, Madam Herta, might have been a cognitive barrier constructed by Lygus... similar to the power of Harmony?
翁法罗斯以空间作为第一道屏障，对黑塔女士来说，跨越这道屏障易如反掌。
Amphoreus uses space as its first barrier. For Madam Herta, crossing this barrier is child's play.
原来如此。黑塔女士提到，她在翁法罗斯的世界里看到过两位无名客的残像，只是那看上去既像残留的忆质，又像数据的投影。
That explains it. Madam Herta mentioned observing traces of the two Nameless in the world of Amphoreus, which appeared to be both residual memoria and data materialization.
推论：翁法罗斯的正身也许是一台亡佚的帝皇权杖，或其他类似的智识造物；而那位来古士便是权杖的操作员…或是隐居世外的又一位鲁珀特。
Deduction: Amphoreus's actual identity might be a lost Emperor's Scepter or similar Erudition construct, while Lygus may be its operator... or perhaps another Rubert hidden from the world.
前提：我们拥有那两位勇敢无名客的时间坐标，且识刻锚确实能对翁法罗斯起效。
Premises: We have the temporal coordinates of those two brave Nameless, and the Chronocognitive Anchor actually works on Amphoreus.
{NICKNAME}，你看，这里也和记忆中的哀丽秘榭一模一样。
{NICKNAME}, look! This place looks exactly like how I remember Aedes Elysiae.
没关系哦，试着拍拍看吧。在哀丽秘榭，偶尔也会有奇迹发生。
It's okay. Give it a little tap. Sometimes small miracles happen in Aedes Elysiae.
悄悄告诉你，哀丽秘榭的鱼儿都会读心魔法，除非心甘情愿，不然绝对不会上钩。
Wanna know a secret? The fish in Aedes Elysiae can read minds. Unless they're totally willing, they won't bite no matter what.
在想哀丽秘榭的事。
I'm thinking about Aedes Elysiae.
哎呀，太沉重的话题可不适合哀丽秘榭。还是聊回捉迷藏吧，作为交换，接下来轮到我来找你咯？
Ah, but that's too heavy a thought for a place like Aedes Elysiae. Let's go back to Hide-and-Seek. Now it's my turn to find you, okay?
迷路迷境的入口，无论看多少次都觉得很梦幻……
No matter how many times I see the entrance to the Membrance Maze, it still feels like a dream...
这么说来，哀丽秘榭到处都很安静呢。待在这种让人心静的地方，无论什么烦恼，都能一下子忘掉……
Come to think of it, Aedes Elysiae is such a quiet place. Residing in such a serene place instantly dispels all your troubles.
毕竟哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，去往其他城邦，我们一定能找到更高的观景台吧？
Aedes Elysiae is just a small village. If we visit a different city, we can definitely find a higher observation deck, right?
哀丽秘榭的风景，还真是怎么都看不够呢…下去的时候要小心哦，慢慢地，可别滑倒啦。
No matter how long you look, this view of Aedes Elysiae never gets old... Be careful when you're climbing down. Take it slow, and don't slip!
昔涟睡得很香。也许是哀丽秘榭的麦浪适合入梦，或是簌簌的林叶有助眠的魔法……
Cyrene is fast asleep. Perhaps the golden wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae is perfect to induce sleep, or maybe the rustling of leaves have a certain magical sleeping aid effect...
