可惜都被我找到了！哀丽秘榭还是站在人家这一边的嘛。
Too bad for you, I found you every time! Aedes Elysiae is on my side, after all.
在树庭被水淹没的无措？
The helplessness of drowning in the Grove?
悄悄告诉你一个秘密，哀丽秘榭的麦田，会永远地留在丰收的时刻。
I'll let you in on a secret. The wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae remain eternally in the season of harvest.
虽然我很想说…与你共度的这段时光，都会像这哀丽秘榭一样，永远留在无人叨扰的记忆之境。
Though I have to say... The times we spent together will be like Aedes Elysiae, preserved in a tranquil memory space forever.
而我们一起在哀丽秘榭度过的这段美好时光，让人家愈发觉得，与其奢望「永远」，不如相信……
And the wonderful time we spent together in Aedes Elysiae makes me feel even more that, rather than wishing for "eternity," it's better to believe...
人家有时也会因此懊丧…不过换个角度想，在面临重要的抉择之前，静下心来整顿思路也是很重要的。正好，哀丽秘榭最适合做这事啦。

Sometimes I get frustrated because of that... but looking at it another way, it's really important to calm down and clear your head before making a big decision. And Aedes Elysiae is the perfect place for that.
这样一来，哀丽秘榭也种下了「开拓」的种子呢。把它当作下一段旅途的起点……
Now, we've also planted the seeds of the Trailblaze in Aedes Elysiae. Take it as the start of another journey...
你知道吗？在哀丽秘榭的古语中，人们会将「初见」，念作「寻获」，又或者……「重逢」。
Do you know that in the ancient language of Aedes Elysiae, "first encounter" is read as "searching" or... "reunion."
然后…迎面撞上了一位悬锋卫兵打扮的壮硕男性。
Then... You find yourself face-to-face with a powerful-looking man in Kremnos guard uniform.
我也是悬锋城的人！
I am from Castrum Kremnos!
——疯王的追随者，找的就是你！没想到吧，我不是悬锋城的人！
— The Mad King's followers, you're the one I seek! You had no idea, did you? I am not from Castrum Kremnos at all!
告诉我——悬锋城里地位最高的将领，是什么模样？
Tell me. What is the highest-ranking general of Castrum Kremnos like?
（描述悬锋报名官的外观）
(Describe the appearance of the Kremnos registration officer)
（描述悬锋教官的外观）
(Describe the appearance of the Kremnos drillmaster)
等等，我是奥赫玛的人！
Wait! I am from Okhema!
…你怎么穿着悬锋城的盔甲？
...Why are you wearing the armor of Castrum Kremnos?
（指向奥赫玛的方向）
(Point in the direction of Okhema)
谎言。那是出城的路，莫非你希望我放下手中兵器，投奔奥赫玛？
Lies. That is the path out of the city. Perhaps you are hoping that I would lay down my weapons and seek asylum in Okhema?
兵卒的性命于这场战争而言无关痛痒，但若是手握实权的将领，定能令天秤倾斜。我要找的，就是悬锋城中地位最高的将领。
The life of a mere soldier is expendable in a battle like this. It is those of the power-wielding generals that can really tip the scales. I seek the highest-ranking general in Castrum Kremnos.
（描述悬锋报名官的外观）
(Describe the appearance of the Kremnos registration officer)
（描述悬锋教官的外观）
(Describe the appearance of the Kremnos drillmaster)
你不知道他究竟遭遇了什么，但结局已然清晰摆在你的面前，或是一队偶然路过的卫兵，或是冰冷无情的眷属…无论如何，悬锋城容不下除胜利之外的任何事物。

You have no idea what it was that happened to him, but the ending he met is clear to see. Perhaps he happened to bump into a troupe of wandering guards or a merciless Titankin... Whatever it may have been, Castrum Kremnos will tolerate no outcome but victory.
全新的盔甲被整齐放在道路旁的箱子里，看来它的主人已不再需要在悬锋城中活动了。但你认出了刻在头盔中央的小小的天秤标志，你记得这位忠于信念的战士。

A brand-new set of armor has been carefully stored in a box by the path. It seems that its owner no longer had any business in Castrum Kremnos. However, you recognize the insignia in the center of the helmet of a set of scales and recall the soldier who remained true to their faith.
「感官恢复时，我已身处破落的悬锋城，这里没有活物，只有失心的眷属在游荡。」
"When I regained my senses, I found myself in a deserted Castrum Kremnos. It lay in ruins and there was no life to be found. Only mindless Titankin wandered its ground."
悬锋城。
Castrum Kremnos.
奥赫玛。
Okhema.
神谕晦暗不明，神驹们也无法掌握目的地的确切情报，这样信息不同步的情况时有发生。横跨整个翁法罗斯的旅途，出现些微差错总是在所难免。

The prophecies speak in riddles, and divine foals cannot obtain real-time information on their destinations — Such asynchronous situations do happen once in a while. Given that our journey will take us across the entire world of Amphoreus, small errors are to be expected.
我是听说有位神驹在传送过程中迷失了，却没想到是在悬锋城。
I knew of a divine foal lost in teleportation, but never guessed it would be at Castrum Kremnos.
神谕晦暗不明，神驹们也无法掌握目的地的确切情报，这样信息不同步的情况时有发生。横跨整个翁法罗斯的旅途，出现些微差错总是在所难免。

The prophecies speak in riddles, and divine foals cannot obtain real-time information on their destinations — Such asynchronous situations do happen once in a while. Given that our journey will take us across the entire world of Amphoreus, small errors are to be expected.
我是听说有位神驹在传送过程中迷失了，却没想到是在悬锋城。
I knew of a divine foal lost in teleportation, but never guessed it would be at Castrum Kremnos.
是啊，你并非树庭学者，也对那些艰深的学术探讨提不起兴趣。学院生活并不适合像你这样将「开拓」视为终身事业的无名客，还是以后再来吧。
Fair enough, you're not a Grove Scholar, and such deep academic pursuits hold little appeal. Scholar's life ill suits a Nameless devoted to "Trailblazing" — better to return later.
致初次到访「神悟树庭」的学者——你好，欢迎参加雅努斯之驹的入学考试。
To first-time visitors of the Grove of Epiphany — welcome to the entrance examination of Janus' Steed.
当然。瑟希斯平等地为所有造物赐福，长久停驻在树庭中，我也分得了些许智能。即便是极为有限的知性，维持与你对话的程度也已足够。
Of course. Cerces bestows blessings upon all creations equally, and my long stay in the Grove has granted me some wisdom. Though my consciousness remains limited, it's enough for our dialogue.
智种学派与赤陶学派联合编写了这套试题。我们将根据回答情况，将你分配至树庭的不同区域参与后续教学活动。请务必认真作答。
These questions come from both Nousporists and Erythrokeramists. How you answer will decide which part of the Grove you'll study in, so make sure to think your answers through.
再创世…树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯，他口中的真相还真让人放不下心啊。泰坦是旧日的黄金裔，我在书库工作大半辈子，也从未听闻这种论断。

Era Nova... Anaxagoras of the Grove, the truth he speaks of is truly unsettling. The Titans were Chrysos Heirs of the past? I've worked in the library for most of my life, yet I've never encountered such a claim.
可最后呢？我们，圣城奥赫玛的公民，理性、智慧和光荣的传承者，在刻法勒的注视之下，我们从未退缩，一次又一次将敌人击垮！咕嘟——

And in the end? We, the citizens of the Holy City of Okhema, inheritors of reason, wisdom, and glory, have never faltered under the watchful gaze of Kephale. Time and again, we have crushed our enemies! Gulp—
究竟发生了什么，让明辨是非、处变不惊的奥赫玛人停住脚步，把道路围了个水泄不通？
What exactly happened to make the discerning and composed people of Okhema stop in their tracks and form such a huge crowd that blocks the road?
一日内竟有两种稀世神兵横空出世，奥赫玛着实藏龙卧虎。「永恒之城」并非浪得虚名，果然有其厉害之处。
To have two divine relics surface in the space of a day, Okhema certainly is a mecca of wonderment. The Eternal City certainly lives up to its name to harbor such an impressive arsenal.
托您的福，我们发现奥赫玛竟然还有位论精明不逊于自己的奇才！所以我们一拍即合，决定要合伙做点买卖。
With your blessing, we discovered that there was an equally shrewd talent in Okhema! We hit it off instantly, and decided to do business together.
奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?
是啊，翁法罗斯还有那么多有趣的事物等着你去开拓，为什么非得花时间来思考这些无用的内容呢。你不认为这是个有价值的话题。
You're right. Amphoreus has many interesting things awaiting trailblazing. Why must you waste time reflecting on such pointless conversations? This topic is clearly of no value to you.
是我刚才的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。

I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally came from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.
认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.
我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.
奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?
是我先前的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。

I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally come from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.
认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.
我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.
我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.
数学是阐述必然性的知识，哪怕悬锋城的战士全部改信墨涅塔，圆依旧是圆，不会变成方形。但「阿卡索斯」的存在，必须依赖现实历史。

Mathematics explains absolute and certain truth. If all the warriors of Castrum Kremnos were to suddenly follow Mnestia, a circle would still be a circle. It would not change shape. However, the existence of "Icatus" absolutely relies on real history.
要是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问「奥赫玛」与「悬锋城」是否也该真实存在？「神悟树庭」与「哀丽秘榭」是否也真实存在？
If "Icatus" truly exists, do "Okhema" and "Castrum Kremnos" also truly exist as well? What about "Grove of Epiphany" and "Aedes Elysiae"?
哈，我就猜到你准会相信他那套言论。要是在奥赫玛公然质疑阿卡索斯的真实性，是要引起众怒的。但没关系，我愿意为我的论点辩护。

Hah, I knew that you would favor his argument. If Okhema were to publicly doubt the truth of Icatus' existence, it would be certain to incite outrage. I do not mind, however. I am willing to defend my theory.
若是有座城邦，远在翁法罗斯的另一头，从未与奥赫玛有过任何通信，按你刚才的论点，那座城邦的人们便全都消失不见了。
If there were another city on the other side of Amphoreus that had never had contact with Okhema, then according to your logic, the people of this city would disappear without a trace.
呵呵，那就叫他们看吧，最好是睁大眼睛看好了，他们引以为傲的宝贝女儿，与他们最不耻的悬锋小子相爱的样子，准叫他们气得当场发疯，哈哈哈！

Teehee, then let them watch as much as they want. The sight of their pride and joy, their darling daughter, falling in love with the Kremnos kid they hate the most... That ought to drive them nuts, haha!
最后的城邦，「奥赫玛」…末日之下，这里应该是庇护所有人的家园，也包括你们。
The last city, Okhema... It ought to be a sanctuary for all in the end times, including for people like you.
对了，上次我说的，一起离开奥赫玛的事，你考虑好了吗？
That's right — have you given any thought to what I mentioned last time... about leaving Okhema?
我的傻瓜，厄琉斯，你还不明白吗？！他们的仇恨只与你那悬锋城的血脉有关。
Silly billy, Aelius... Don't you get it!? Their hate is only for your Castrum Kremnos bloodline.
其实，我的出身与宁芙的家庭相互对立…我是悬锋将领的后代，她则来自奥赫玛历史最为悠久的几个权贵家族。
Y'know, I come from a completely different class to Nympha... I'm a descendant of a Kremnos general, and she comes from one of the most powerful and long-lasting noble families in Okhema history.
即使黄金战争已结束这么多年，即使悬锋孤军已与奥赫玛握手言和，我的家族已随先王政权的崩塌而灭亡…可，这份仇恨从未消失……

And even though the Chrysos War has long finished, even though the Kremnoan Detachment has made peace with Okhema, and even though my family was wiped out with the fall of the old king's rule — none of this animosity has disappeared...
我随万敌殿下抵达奥赫玛的第一夜，就有刺客前来企图夺走我的性命，那时我还只是个懵懂的孩童。后来，万敌殿下向元老院提出抗议，他们才不情愿地收了手。

The first night I arrived in Okhema alongside Lord Mydei, an assassin made an attempt on my life. I was just a child back then... Lord Mydei lodged a complaint with the Council of Elders, and they reluctantly put a stop to things.
宁芙提出了一个我并不赞成计划：公开我们的恋情，再逃到奥赫玛城外，用舆论向他的父母施压，直到我们的婚事得到同意再返回……

Nympha proposed a plan that I don't agree with: Publicize our relationship, then flee outside Okhema and use public opinion to pressure her parents, only returning once they've agreed to our marriage...
宁芙的父母在奥赫玛的势力范围很广…这下麻烦了。
Nympha's parents have a very wide network of influence in Okhema... This is big trouble.
你们奥赫玛人玩挺大…
You Okhemans really know how to play hardball...
前两天，我这儿有笔十分可疑的交易——一个侍卫模样的男人，竟要出手一颗价值连城的悬锋鹰血红项链。
A few days back, I had a really suspicious trade — this guy who looked like a retainer wanting to pawn a priceless pendant made of Kremnos eagleblood.
鹰血红极为罕见，少有的存世珍品也多作为悬锋族人的传家宝，不会出现在普通奥赫玛守卫手上。
Eagleblood is very rare, and the rare extant treasures are mostly safeguarded by Kremnoans, so there's no way it'd be in the hands of an ordinary Okheman guard.
你拒绝了无数出身高贵的奥赫玛青年，没想到竟是为了个悬锋族人？还非得是这个！要不是卫兵将那条项链拿给我看，我都不敢相信他所言为真。

You rejected all those high-born young Okheman boys, but I never thought you were doing that for a Kremnoan! And it had to be this one! I'd never have believed it was true if the guard hadn't shown me the necklace.
你们的血脉将与悬锋城相融，你们的后代将流着纷争的血——
Your bloodline will merge with that of Castrum Kremnos, and your progeny will carry the blood of Strife...
你？你是那个悬锋小子！
You? You're that Kremnos punk!
我们私奔吧！我带你离开奥赫玛，现在、立刻、马上就动身！
Let's elope! Let me take you away from Okhema, right here, right now... Let's just go!
这样的故事持续了至少十分钟。或许是奥赫玛的阳光让你没有睡好，你渐渐闭上了眼……
The story lasts at least ten minutes. Perhaps the light in Okhema has been impacting your sleep, but you gradually close your eyelids...
听说她是跟着一群外邦人来到奥赫玛的，父母都在途中走散了…「走散」是委婉的说法。
I heard she came to Okhema with a bunch of outlanders, and her parents got "separated" from her along the way... And I'm speaking a euphemism, you understand.
这…恐怕办不到。奥赫玛外面是很危险的。
I... don't think you'll be able to. It's really dangerous outside Okhema.
是这样…我是奥赫玛推理协会的一名成员，听闻树庭在黑潮中惨遭毁灭的消息，就立刻前来调查。
Here's the thing... I'm a member of the Okhema Deduction Society. I rushed here to investigate upon hearing about the Grove's destruction by the black tide.
奥赫玛什么时候有推理协会了？
Since when did Okhema have a Deduction Society?
我听奥赫玛的人们说，您能使用欧洛尼斯的神力……
I heard the people of Okhema say that you can use Oronyx's divine power...
碰见您的时候，我就灵机一动：或许您拿着这几样东西去树庭里转一转，就能通过某种方式知道他们几个的下落了。
I had an idea when I saw you — Maybe you can somehow sense what happened to them if you go take a walk in the Grove with these things on you.
树庭同样有驻守的黄金裔，在黑潮来袭时不该如此不堪一击，还有那个黑衣剑士的行为…仔细想来确有些蹊跷。
There was a Chrysos Heir stationed at the Grove, they shouldn't have fallen so easily to the black tide. And that black-clad swordmaster's actions... they seem rather suspicious upon reflection.
他…难道不是第一次来树庭？
He's been to the Grove before, hasn't he?
如果这人之前从未来过树庭，我不相信这里错综复杂的结构没有让他产生困惑。
If he had never visited the Grove before, I find it hard to believe he wouldn't be baffled by its intricate layout.
至少第一次过来参观的时候，即使有尼科马库斯带路，我还是因为找厕所而迷失了方向…安德烈亚斯也抱怨过自己是个路痴，在树庭工作了好几年仍然会迷路。

Even when Nicomachus guided me on my first visit, I got lost looking for the restroom... And Andreas, who always complained about being directionally challenged, still got lost in the Grove despite working there for years.
可问题是…黑潮怪物真有如此智慧吗？为何他能轻易避开树庭的防备，直抵核心？
But the question is... does the black tide possess such intelligence? How did he manage to slip past the Grove's defenses and head straight for the core?
这也太可怕了…如果真是这样，或许奥赫玛的防守，其实也形同虚设？
That's horrifying... If that's the case, are Okhema's defenses just for show?
无论如何，这人一定以某种形式事先了解过树庭的情况，他的行为方式根本不像一个莽撞的抢劫犯，反而像是个对一切了如指掌的刺客。

Regardless, this individual must have scouted out the Grove beforehand. His methodical approach doesn't scream of a careless burglar, but rather hints at a calculated assassin who's thoroughly in the know.
科洛埃、尼科马库斯、安德烈亚斯…树庭的大家…愿你们在塞纳托斯的怀抱中安眠。
Clio, Nicomachus, Andreas... everyone at the Grove... may you rest in the embrace of Thanatos.
他不是失去理性的怪物，是专程来摧毁树庭的！
He's not just a mindless beast. He was on a mission to obliterate the Grove!
那就好…我知道你实力强悍，但眼下树庭黑潮未消，依旧万分凶险。
That's good... I know you're strong, but right now the black tide hasn't dissipated, and it's still extremely dangerous.
如果没有其他事情，还是早些回奥赫玛吧。
If there's nothing else, you'd better return to Okhema soon.
将奥赫玛推理协会三位成员的遗物交给珀里法斯
Hand over the belongings of the three members of the Okhema Deduction Society to Periphas
根据调查结果看来，面对本次黑潮，树庭的学者本应能够有序组织撤离，人员生还率相对较高，但…那位黑衣剑士的出现改变了一切。

According to our investigation, the Grove's scholars could have managed an organized evacuation from the black tide, with many survivors, but... everything changed when that black-clad swordmaster appeared.
沿着黑衣剑士的动向，来到了树庭中部。
Tracking the black-clad swordmaster led you to the Grove's central area.
入侵者未免太熟悉树庭了。
The invader seems unusually familiar with the Grove.
可她们每次回来，和我聊起在树庭的生活，说的却净是些乱七八糟的玩意…什么「偷读课外读物的小技巧」啊、什么「如何替人签到赚外快」啊……
But every time they came home and told me about life in the Grove, it was nothing but crazy stories... about "secretly reading forbidden books" or "getting paid to fake attendance"...
你说说、你说说，在树庭那种地方，还能把日子过得这么鸡飞狗跳，我怎么就养出这么两个天赋异禀的丫头！
Just imagine — making such a mess even in a place like the Grove! How in the world did I raise two daughters with such special talents for mischief!?
现在唯一可惜的，就是我这把年纪，怕是没办法亲自去树庭走一趟喽。
All I regret is that these old bones won't let me travel to the Grove anymore.
是盗火行者……
It's the Flame Reaver...
你说这人，一把年纪了，非得窝在树庭瞎折腾，让他回奥赫玛就跟要了他的命似的。
That stubborn old fool, always clinging to the Grove, treating Okhema like it's poison to him.
嘶…不好意思，我现在身上只有这些，但之后回了奥赫玛，你要是有什么需要都可以找我帮忙！
S—Sorry... it's not much, but once I'm back in Okhema, just name your price!
第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?
那刻夏，我以前和你辩论的时候或许不曾提起：我很早就志愿为树庭奉献自己的一生。
Anaxa, I may have not mentioned this in my previous debates with you, but I vowed to dedicate my life to the Grove long ago.
年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。

I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.
你的逻辑可真是一团浆糊。我知道你儿子在奥赫玛混得不错，何来无处可去一说？
Your logic makes no sense! I know your son is getting by pretty well in Okhema. What do you mean, "you have nowhere to go"?
黑潮来势汹汹，连卡林尼库斯那样的黄金裔都阵亡了。我就不奢望能离开了…只愿死前能再读一读树庭的藏书。

The black tide descends with brutal ferocity. Even a great Chrysos Heir like Callinicus lost their life to it. I don't expect that I would be able to leave. I simply wish to sit and read in the Grove library one last time.
你知道吗，就他那腿脚——上次我不小心给他那破烟斗弄坏了，老东西撵我撵了整整半个树庭！
And those legs he complains about? Last time I accidentally broke his favorite pipe, he chased me through half the Grove!
哎呦，太好了——年轻人，你可算回来了！风堇小姐才刚来过，得知你独自去了树庭，她很担心你的安全。
Oh thank goodness — you're back, young one! Miss Hyacine was just here, worried sick about you going to the Grove alone.
嗯，是这样的。在治疗那位来自树庭的伤者时，我发现了一封信，似乎是某位学者给妻子的家书。
Well, you see. During my treatment of a wounded from the Grove, I found a letter that appeared to be from a scholar to his wife.
然后我就想起来，灰宝不是和那刻夏老师一起去慰问过那些牺牲者的家属嘛，树庭的悲剧才过去没多久，我有点担心他们的生活状况。
Then I remembered that you and Professor Anaxa checked on the bereaved families before, and since the Grove incident is still recent, I'm worried about these families' situations.
据说翁法罗斯在最繁盛的时候，曾有超过1200只大地兽在这片土地上栖息，多么惊人的数字啊。所以，你知道这意味着什么吗？
It's said that during its prime, Amphoreus was home to over 1,200 dromases. What an astounding number! So, do you know what that means?
哎，怎么能算找麻烦，奥赫玛的公民们都知道异邦的客人神通广大，说不准您稍微拜拜{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，就能想出什么好法子了呢？

Oh, how could it be considered dumping? The citizens of Okhema all know how capable guests from outlands are. Perhaps if you prayed a bit to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, you might come up with a brilliant solution!
加油！全奥赫玛最美的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真讨好它才行啊！
Keep it up! Okhema's most beautiful dromas deserves your utmost effort to win its heart!
喂，对奥赫玛人这么友善干嘛？他们在排挤悬锋人的时候，可没这么好的语气！
Hey, why are you being so kind to these Okhemans? When they were ostracizing the Kremnoans, they weren't using such nice words!
你知道的，万敌是我兄弟。
You know, Mydei is a brother to me.
万敌刚走就闹事是吧？！
So Mydei leaves, and now you're stirring up trouble!?
那又如何？殿下是交代过我们要和奥赫玛人友善相处，可这难道意味着我们要步步退让，苟且偷生，丢掉悬锋人的尊严和荣耀吗？！
And what of it? His Highness instructed us to treat the Okhemans amicably, but does that mean we must retreat with every step, live dishonorably, and abandon the dignity and glory of the Kremnoans!?
不是。科可波阁下的主人从来只有一位，那便是万敌殿下。
No. Kokopo belongs to only one master, and that is His Highness, Mydei.
详细地说，科可波阁下的全名为「悬锋猛兽•科可波三世」，乃是陪伴过万敌殿下四处征战的坐骑，骁勇善战，勇冠三军，锐不可当。

To be precise, Kokopo's full name is "The Fierce Beast of Kremnos: Kokopo III." It was the loyal steed of Lord Mydei, accompanying him through countless battles — valiant, peerless in combat, and utterly unstoppable.
在这样的世界中，能平静活着便是种奢侈。而悬锋的王为他们扛起了重量。
In such a world, being able to live peacefully is a luxury. And the King of Kremnos bore that weight for them.
——奥赫玛的城门口，我会带着科可波阁下在那等你们，想随我返乡的，就自己来吧。悬锋城不会拒绝勇士，但也不欢迎懦弱之徒。
At the gates of Okhema, I'll wait with Kokopo. Come to join me if you want to return. Castrum Kremnos welcomes warriors but does not tolerate the cowards.
原来…那头大地兽的恋爱对象，就是万敌啊！
So... that dromas' true love is none other than Mydei!
别想了！我就算死在外面，也不愿在异邦的庇护下苟且偷生。悬锋的古训都被你们丢到脑后了吗，在那温热的浴池里泡得软烂不堪了吗？！

No more thinking! I'd rather die outside than survive under the protection of a foreign land. Have you forgotten the ancient creed of Kremnos? Have you soaked in those warm baths so long that you've gone soft!?
可这是王的意志！你要公然违背万敌殿下的命令吗？
But this is the will of our king! Are you going to openly defy Lord Mydei's orders?
殿下选择独自返乡，成为整个翁法罗斯的守护者，不就是希望我们能过上和平的生活，不必再与刀剑为伴吗！为什么非得要为那传统流血才行？
His Highness chose to return home alone and became the Guardian of Amphoreus so that we could live peacefully, free from the company of blades. Why must we bleed for tradition to prove ourselves?
既然…我们都将科可波阁下视作殿下的化身，离开了大地兽的帮助，你也难以抵达悬锋城，不如…未来的路，就交由它来决定吧。
Since we all regard Kokopo as His Highness's embodiment, you won't reach Castrum Kremnos without its help. Perhaps... let it decide the path ahead.
异乡的勇士，万敌殿下的同伴，请你为悬锋族人见证此行的结局——
As a warrior from the outlands, a companion of Lord Mydei, please bear witness to our choice —
悬锋的王在遥远处浴血奋战，我们理应支持他的决定，为他免除后顾之忧。
The King of Kremnos is far away, shedding blood for us. We should respect his will and ease his burdens.
不知道在这里，它能否听到悬锋城内正响起的厮杀声？在深沉的睡眠中，它是否也曾梦到过与主人共同征战的时光？是否仍觉得心神激荡，想再回到那个时候？

Here, can it still hear the sounds of battle ringing out in Castrum Kremnos? In its deep sleep, has it dreamed of warring alongside its master? Does it still feel the stir of its soul, yearning to return to those days?
大地兽做出了选择。它转身朝向奥赫玛的城门，头也不回地走去。
The dromas has made its choice. It turns toward Okhema's gates, walking away without looking back.
原来…那头大地兽的恋爱对象，是悬锋城啊！
Turns out... the dromas' true love is Castrum Kremnos!
你惊奇地发现那头号称「全奥赫玛最美」的大地兽再次出现在了工坊里，而科可波三世则站在它身旁，用充满柔情蜜意的语气轻哼着。
You're surprised to find the dromas once hailed as the most beautiful in all Okhema back in the workshop, with Kokopo III standing beside her, humming in a tone filled with tenderness and affection.
哼，还是悬锋城的土质尝起来更美味，对吧？
Hmph, but Kremnos' soil must taste better, right?
（那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
(Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)
我们不属于奥赫玛。
We don't belong to Okhema.
后来我接受了悬锋城最严厉的选拔，却目睹与我交好的战士们都在战场上死去！
Later, I underwent the harshest trials in Castrum Kremnos, only to witness my comrades fall one by one on the battlefield!
我听说，在比云石天宫还要高的山上，有很多人聚在一起，决定了奥赫玛的未来。
I heard that on a mountain even higher than the Marmoreal Palace, many people have gathered to decide Okhema's future.
奥赫玛，会不会也像阿卡索斯那样，变成一个黑漆漆、乱糟糟，可怕怪物遍地走的地方？
Will Okhema become like Icatus — dark, chaotic, full of terrifying monsters everywhere?
{F#女士}{M#先生}，你是奥赫玛的大英雄，肯定能进出云崖。你可以带我去刻法勒的身边吗？
{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you're Okhema's great hero, so you must be able to come and go at Dawncloud. Could you bring me to Kephale?
看呐，它高居云崖之巅，向奥赫玛的每一个人投去注视。我们的一切都因它的注视才得以存在。如此尊神，怎能不拜，怎能不为它献上牺牲？
Look, they sit atop Dawncloud, gazing upon every soul in Okhema. All that we are exists because of their watchful eye. A god so revered — how could we not worship and sacrifice to them?
可是，我想恳求您，千万不要把奥赫玛的光明丢下……
But I beg of you, please don't abandon the light of Okhema...
现在，大家都对奥赫玛的未来更有希望啦！
Now, everyone feels more hopeful about the future of Okhema!
我小的时候，奥赫玛可不像现在这样太平，三天两头都有纷争眷属袭击城墙。前一天还见过的人，可能第二天就……
When I was little, Okhema wasn't as peaceful as it is now. Attacks on the city walls by Strife Titankins were almost a daily thing. One day you'd see someone, and the next...
别说这种傻话，兄弟！我们不是约好了要一起站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点吗？
Don't say such foolish things, brother! Didn't we promise to reach the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together?
呃，这只是二楼啊！你这个样子，以后怎么站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点？
Uh, this is just the second floor! With you acting like this, how are you ever going to reach the top of the Okhema marketplace?
但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你们也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!
毕竟，我们是要站上奥赫玛小贩业顶点的男人啊！
After all, we're the men who will stand at the pinnacle of the Okhema marketplace together!
虽然奥赫玛现在面临危机，但天父刻法勒还在庇护着我们所有人，是这样的，对吗？
Okhema's struggling, but Sky Father Kephale's still got us. Yeah?
我想让他们知道，刻法勒的声音有多么坚定、温暖，奥赫玛绝对不会被黑潮攻陷，背负世界的泰坦从没有忘记过我们这些平民。

Let them feel the determination and warmth in Kephale's voice, let them be convinced that Okhema will stand tall against the black tide, and the Titan who bears the world has never forgotten about us.
他有着一张奥赫玛最常见、最普通的面孔，和千千万万个圣城守卫一样。你很难在人群中找到他。
He's got that extremely common and very ordinary face for an Okheman, just like all the countless other guards in the holy city. You'll be hard-pressed to find him in a crowd.
我知道，他父亲也是一名圣城卫兵，杀死过黑潮怪物…他一直想做同样的事，好证明自己也有能力保护家人与奥赫玛。
I know. His father was a guard of the city too, slaying monsters of the black tide... He always wanted to do the same thing, to prove he had the strength to protect his family and Okhema.
刻法勒，我们的天父，我诚心向你祷问。现在的奥赫玛，万帷网变慢了，消息真真假假，好像到处都在打仗，乱糟糟的，那些山崖上，还冒出了一些奇怪的虚影……

Sky Father Kephale, I ask you sincerely: Okhema and the World Wound Web have slowed. Be the news true or false, but everywhere seems to be at war, chaos reigns, and on the cliffs, stand strange shadows...
奥赫玛的大家，也都会好好地迎来再创世。
Everyone in Okhema will definitely reach the Era Nova safely.
当初打算离开树庭的时候，似乎也是这样的心情呢。只是，这次的出走，我竟然犹豫了这么久啊。
I had the same feeling back when I first planned to leave the Grove. But this time... I can't believe I hesitated for so long about running away.
在畅饮蜜酿之时，我脑中掠过一缕针扎般的念头——逐火之旅果真能如此完美么？一场欢宴，果真能承载翁法罗斯那悲惨的命运么？

As I indulged in the honey brew, a needle-sharp thought pierced my mind — could the Flame-Chase Journey really be this perfect? Could a mere banquet truly bear the weight of Amphoreus's tragic destiny?
我当然是阿波罗尼，树庭贤人、逐火军参谋，这确凿无疑。
I am, without a doubt, Apollonius, Sage of the Grove and advisor to the Flame-Chasers.
无论是怒而离开树庭，还是身先士卒讨伐海洋…你总是将自己视作一枚顽石，试图悬住世界的命运。
Whether storming out of the Grove in anger, or leading the charge against Ocean... you always see yourself as an immovable boulder, trying to hold the world's destiny in balance.
这是海瑟音大人的认知中，您来到翁法罗斯后，最为熟悉的饮品。
Lady Hysilens somehow knows that this is the drink you've become most familiar with since arriving in Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯唯一的一樽，源自「海洋」的纯酿，樽铭为「把欢宴带去明天」。无他，无价。
The last bottle in all of Amphoreus, a pure brew of the "Ocean," bearing the inscription "Take the Feast to Tomorrow." It is, quite simply, priceless.
「心酿」回归了。把握好「仅一次」的机会，让一位翁法罗斯遇到的朋友来尝试，或许……
The soul brew has returned. Make the most of this "one and only chance." Let a friend from Amphoreus try it, and maybe...
「罗浮杂俎」还顺利吗？
How's it going with Ghostly Grove?
希望铭记的东西…呀，看灰宝期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
Something to remember...? Oh, judging by Grayie's eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?
用料殊异如此之大，容吾猜测…你是炼成捍卫树庭的战略武器，亦或是钻研来自繁星的前沿科技…？
With such peculiar materials in such quantities, let me guess... Are you crafting a strategic weapon to protect the Grove, or perhaps researching cutting-edge technology from the stars...?
你还是见识短浅了。猜猜看，如今悬锋之王迈德漠斯下厨时，用的是什么刀具？
You're still quite narrow-minded. Care to guess what kind of knife the King of Kremnos, Mydeimos, uses when he cooks these days?
哎呀，人子唷，身为神悟树庭教授，可不能将求知若渴者拒之门外啊…小姑娘，过来吧，汝大可相信多嘴多舌之神，吾来答疑解惑。

Oh my, child of humanity! As a professor of the Grove of Epiphany, I simply cannot turn away those who thirst for knowledge... Come closer, young lady. You can trust this chatty God. I shall answer all your questions and clear your doubts.
而这位是索芙洛尼娅。或许你在奥赫玛城中见过她，那枚髀石护身符就是她送给我的。
And this is Sophronia. You might have seen her in Okhema. She's the one who gave me this knucklebone talisman.
在你送给翁法罗斯的新世界中，芙缇尼重获了视力，而索芙洛尼娅也拥有了声音。不过，她们还需要一些时间适应各自的礼物。
In the new world you gave to Amphoreus, Futini regained her sight, and Sophronia found her voice. However, they still need some time to adjust to their respective gifts.
也许，奥赫玛的领袖更加需要能够饱览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
Perhaps the leader of Okhema needs golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.
…我和你母亲吃一样的菜，迈德漠斯。
...I'll have the same as your mother, Mydeimos.
你是迈德漠斯的朋友吧？哈哈，这些天有太多人来拜访了，真想不到他人缘这么好。
You're Mydeimos's friend, right? Haha, so many people have been visiting these days. Who knew he has so many friends?
我们只是刚知道，有一世的迈德漠斯…受了许多苦。
We just found out that a past Mydeimos... suffered a great deal.
悬锋的存续…未必大于世界存亡。前世的我犯了太多错误，无论是用毒计杀死你，还是将迈德漠斯抛入冥海……
The survival of Kremnos... may not be worth more than the fate of the world. In my past life, I made too many mistakes, whether it was poisoning you, or casting Mydeimos into the Sea of Souls...
这么小声干嘛，和迈德漠斯当面说去。至少在最后，你如愿成为了更好的人啊。
Why are you whispering? Go tell Mydeimos to his face. At least in the end, you became a better person, just like you wanted.
当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—
奶奶快看我手里这些宝贝——哀地里亚的银戒，厄涅俄努斯的陶瓷，还有上好的银簪子…我从奥赫玛最好的裁缝铺里挑的，你戴上一定好看。

Grandma, look at these treasures in my hands. Silver rings from Aidonia, ceramics from Aenionus, and these fine silver hairpins... I picked them from the best tailor's shop in Okhema, they'll look beautiful on you.
现在，这个夙愿算是实现了大半吧。新生的翁法罗斯，定将迎来更有温度的律法。
Now, this long-cherished wish has largely come true. The reborn Amphoreus will surely embrace laws with more warmth and humanity.
若有人问起，就说这是由翁法罗斯的凯撒颁赐的——呵，要开具证明的话，就让他们亲自来谒见我吧。
If anyone asks, tell them it was bestowed by the Imperator of Amphoreus. Heh, and if they want proof, let them come and seek an audience with me themselves.
我曾梦想做个棋士，四处云游，以棋会友…可惜翁法罗斯不能一日无君，这个想法也就一直被我搁置了。
I once dreamed of being a chess master, traveling the world, and making friends through the game... But alas, Amphoreus can't go a day without its ruler, so that idea has been shelved away.
呵呵，我也没想到，当年嚷嚷着要去悬锋城学剑的你，有一天竟然能击败尼卡多利！
Heh, who would've thought? Back then, you were all about "wanting to learn swordsmanship at Castrum Kremnos!" And now look at you, you've actually beaten Nikador!
怎么会，我想念哀丽秘榭的菜好久好久了！
No way, I've been craving Aedes Elysiae's food for ages!
替老爸砍柴火，为伽尔巴叔叔制弓，和皮西厄斯老师讲讲树庭的见闻…还有闹着让我讲故事的披索和莉维娅，要满足他们的好奇心，可得费些功夫。

Chopping firewood for Dad, making bows for Uncle Galba, sharing tales from the Grove with Mrs. Pythias... And then there's Piso and Livia, always pestering me for stories. It takes quite some effort to satisfy their curiosity.
对了，还得去探望迷路迷境的妖精们…许久不见，它们恐怕又稀里糊涂地把日子过得一团糟了吧？
Oh right, I should also visit the fairies in the Membrance Maze... It's been a while. I bet they've made a complete mess of things again in their usual scatterbrained way?
老友，听你说起这些事情，好像回到了从前结伴征战的岁月里。不过，现在的翁法罗斯，再也不需要战争啦！
Old friend, hearing you talk about these things brings me back to the days when we fought side by side. But now, Amphoreus has no need for war anymore!
吉奥刻勒斯他，常常为从前的那桩背叛痛心，对那位奥赫玛的君王——刻律德菈，态度总是有些别扭。
Geocles is often heartbroken over that betrayal from the past, and his attitude toward the ruler of Okhema, Cerydra, has always been somewhat awkward.
翁法罗斯的持明卵？
An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?
倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?
敬翁法罗斯！
To Amphoreus!
我只是借此机会考验一下你的医术罢了。可别太得意忘形哦，树庭女孩。
I was just taking the chance to test your medical skills. Don't get too full of yourself, Grove girl.
劳你费心啰，树庭女孩！
Thanks, Grove girl!
希望铭记的东西…呀，看灰宝期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
Something to remember...? Oh, judging by Grayie's eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?
听说荒笛也在树庭仰望过「星空」，遮蔽双眼的永昼辉光退去后，天外真正的星空依旧令人着迷。
I heard that even Terravox once gazed at the stars in the Grove. After the blinding radiance of Eternal Day faded, the true starry sky beyond is still mesmerizing.
呜嗡…嚼嚼…翁法罗斯万物生灵现在都有了自己的归宿，我也可以安心享受美味的红土了。
Grumph... Nomnom... Now that all the Amphorean creatures have found their places, I can finally enjoy my delicious redsoil in peace.
翁法罗斯的持明卵？
An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?
倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?
那么——敬翁法罗斯的明天。
Well then, here's to Amphoreus's tomorrow.
汝计划以悬锋为饵，可自城邦陷落后，那些厮杀反而成为滋养疯狂的养料。
You planned to use Kremnos as bait, but after the city fell, those massacres only became sustenance for madness.
你说得对，罗浮杂俎账号名为「云璃一生应援」的先生。
Whatever you say, He-Whose-Ghostly Grove-Account-Is-Named-"YunliFanForLife."
你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
How much do you know about Amphoreus?
关于翁法罗斯…
Regarding Amphoreus...
打捞湮没无闻的「记忆」是我的职责，而翁法罗斯…就像橱窗中的珍宝，星神的明光闪烁其间，令人沉醉不已。
It is my duty to salvage memories that are forgotten, while Amphoreus... is a treasure behind a window, with the Aeons' blinding light radiating from within, mesmerizing all.
你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
How much do you know about Amphoreus?
你久久地望着那道创口，仿佛置身于炙热的阳炎照亮树庭的一刹那，似乎还有一声呐喊：「我焚烧一切，只为净化这虚伪的黄金！」

You gaze at the wound for what feels like an eternity, as if caught in that moment when scorching sunlight illuminated the Grove. And there was seemingly a bellow: "I shall incinerate everything, all to purify this False Chrysos!"
你是不是以为我在胡说八道？很遗憾，在翁法罗斯发现「光线通过胶体的散射现象」的树庭学者，就叫达利原。
You think I'm talking nonsense? Well, hate to break it to you, but the Grove scholar who discovered "light scattering through colloids" in Amphoreus was literally named Dall.
我们离开奥赫玛吧…
Let's leave Okhema...
我是伊阿宋，目前管理着这支商队「阿尔戈」。奥赫玛的大地兽都是我的好朋友，它们也是多亏了我才有自己的名字。
I'm Iason, the manager of this caravan "Argo." All dromas in Okhema are my good friends, and I'm the one who gave each of them a name.
最近世道挺乱，你要是有什么东西想从外面运进奥赫玛来，或者就是想买一些稀奇物件，找我们「阿尔戈」下单，那是最安全的。赫拉克勒斯像黄金裔一样值得信赖！
Things aren't as calm as they used to be. If you need to move anything into Okhema or find something rare, Argo's your safest bet. Trust me, Heracles is just as dependable as the Chrysos Heirs!
某日我望见在城里巡逻的白厄大人，灵光一闪将奥赫玛黄金裔们的英雄事迹绘制在了陶罐之上。
As for their origin, one day, while spotting Lord Phainon patrolling the city, I felt inspired and painted the epic tales of Okhema's Chrysos Heirs on a dolium.
翁法罗斯能撑到那天吗？
Will Amphoreus exist until then?
我当然还是希望翁法罗斯存续，这就要拜托各位黄金裔大人了。
But then again, I do hope Amphoreus endures — a responsibility that rests on all esteemed Chrysos Heirs.
可承住我理想的创作，并非如今大家认可我的原因…人们只记得我常为奥赫玛的名流作画，也只爱我笔下的黄金裔。

But people do not currently acknowledge me due to the creations that bear my true dream... People remember me mostly for my paintings of the upper echelon of Okhema and my portrayal of the Chrysos Heirs.
…上一世，我是预言中翁法罗斯的救世主。我的降生给所有瑟希斯的信徒带来希望，树庭上下倾尽所有将我养育至预言中对抗黑潮的那一天。

...In my previous life, I was the prophesied savior of Amphoreus. My birth instilled hope in every faithful disciple of Cerces, with the Grove sparing no expense in bringing me up for the day when I am prophesied to stand against the encroaching black tide.
这个白麻布是整个奥赫玛应用最广泛的布料。走在街上你能看见的十个人里，有九个都穿它制成的衣服呢。
White linen is a staple fabric in Okhema. It's everywhere — chances are, nine out of ten people you see are wearing clothes made from it.
我就知道你们这些本地人根本瞧不上外邦的流民！假惺惺地做给谁看呢？什么奥赫玛文化传统，我看被历史淘汰的糟粕还差不多！
I knew you locals wouldn't treat us outlanders with respect! Who are you trying to impress? Talking about Okhema's culture and history? Hah, sounds more like trash destined to be forgotten by time!
这个嘛，「躺食」其实是奥赫玛的一种传统习俗。在遥远的黄金世，人们曾认为侧躺在椅子上进食，能够更好地与大地泰坦产生共鸣。
Well, "reclining dining" is actually an old tradition here in Okhema. Back in the ancient Era Chrysea, people believed that reclining on chairs while dining helped them resonate with the Earth Titan.
最后是甜点——整个奥赫玛最新鲜的苹果，配上我改良过的肉桂蜂蜜酱，刚好适合为这一餐做个完美的收尾。
Finally, we've got dessert — the freshest apples in Okhema paired with my upgraded cinnamon honey sauce, a delightful end to your meal.
由于黑潮的缘故，这些年陆续有不少外邦人移居奥赫玛。我有幸从他们那得到了一些食谱，并结合其历史文化进行了复刻与适当的改良。这些是我比较满意的作品——

Over the years, many outlanders have made their home in Okhema due to the black tide. I've been fortunate enough to get some of their recipes and put my own spin on them based on the relevant history and cultures. Here are a couple of my favorites...
所以我用奥赫玛本地的奶浆果作为代替品——就结果来看，这个尝试还是挺成功的，哈哈。
Therefore, I used our milkberries in Okhema instead, and it was a pretty successful attempt, if I do say so myself!
你当时正准备越过悬锋城，对吧？没想到闯进了奥赫玛军队的埋伏，和我们一样。还有旁边这个{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒也是。

You were just about to cross Castrum Kremnos, right? You didn't expect to get into an ambush by the forces of Okhema, just like us and this believer of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} over there.
翁法罗斯也能有模因污染？
Can Amphoreus even get memetic pollution?
{NICKNAME}退化——奥赫玛的双耳陶瓶！
{NICKNAME} regresses — an Okhema twin-eared vase!
欢迎来到奥赫玛，年轻人，对这边的生活还适应吗？
Welcome to Okhema, young one. How are you finding life here so far?
哈哈，初来乍到时大家多少都会有些不适应。不过要是待得久了，你就会发现奥赫玛还是挺宜居的——无论气候、环境还是生活节奏。
Aha, it can take some time for everyone to get used to things at first, but once you do, you'll see that Okhema is quite cozy — that goes for the weather, the surroundings, and the lifestyle.
哈哈，那真是太好了。作为受到刻法勒庇佑的圣城，奥赫玛并没有受到黑潮的影响，无论气候、环境还是生活节奏都非常宜人。

Aha! That's great to hear! This holy city, blessed by Kephale, remains unharmed by the black tide. Over time, you'll find that Okhema is quite cozy — that goes for the weather, the surroundings, and the lifestyle.
说来黄金裔中那位万敌阁下就来自悬锋城，他偶尔路过这里时，总会买些石榴。托他的福，这种水果的销量一直不错。

Speaking of which, Lord Mydeimos among the Chrysos Heirs hails from Castrum Kremnos. He always picks up some pomegranates whenever he swings by. Thanks to him, the sales of pomegranates have been thriving.
诶呀，看起来你应该会和那位万敌阁下非常有共同语言呢。承蒙惠顾，100利衡币。
Oh, it looks like you and Lord Mydeimos share a similar taste. That'll be 100 Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!
我会，保卫奥赫玛的安全，不保卫的时候，我会做饭。
I'll be protecting Okhema, and when I'm not, I'll be cooking.
我以前，也是异乡人。刚来奥赫玛，元老院的移民官，问我以前做什么。我说，是厨师，是高级厨师。
I was an outlander too. When I came to Okhema, the immigration officer from the Council of Elders asked me what I did, and I told them I was a cook, and a good one.
奥赫玛的菜色，普通，但是诚实。想起以前见过，信仰扎格列斯的人，卖粥。
Okhema's food is simple but honest. I remember meeting a believer of Zagreus who sold congee.
我到过，悬锋城。在那边做饭，很累。
I've been to Castrum Kremnos. Cooking there is tiring.
哈哈，倒也不必较真！俗话说，「矫枉必须过正」——要是没有我们站在风俗的另一端，圣城奥赫玛，恐怕难免要变得过于神圣…那住着多难受啊？

Haha, no need to get all serious! Like they say, "when you push something, you gotta push it far." Without us standing on the other side of morality's scales, the holy city Okhema would become far too holy... and that'd be a pain to live in, don't you think?
不过，你也不用太担心；只要黄金裔还打算将泰坦取而代之，只要普通人里还有像我这样的冒牌信徒，奥赫玛的气氛就还不至于难以忍受…如果他们声称自己信的是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}就更好了！

But hey, don't stress too much. As long as there are Chrysos Heirs aiming to overthrow and become Titans, and there are still ordinary people like me pretending to be devout, Okhema's vibe won't be too suffocating... especially if they claim to worship {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.
实话说，上次我们的集会就被遐蝶小姐劝阻了，说奥赫玛再怎么样也是一座圣城，不可以这样无事生非、小题大作——她人虽然温柔，但那种生人勿近的感觉还是挺可怕的！

To be honest, Castorice dissuaded us at our previous gatherings, saying that Okhema is still a holy city no matter what, and we can't stir up drama like this. While she's gentle most of the time, she can be intimidating with how aloof she is at times!
总之，多亏了这是个承认遗产合法性的城邦…在「再创世」到来之前，只要奥赫玛还没有在黑潮中陷落，我就能无拘无束地生活下去。想睡就睡，想吃就吃，想晒太阳就晒太阳——多好。

Anyway, thanks to this city's acceptance of legal inheritance... I can lead a carefree life until the Era Nova, as long as Okhema remains steadfast against the black tide. I sleep, eat, and soak up the sun whenever I please... What a bliss.
对于那些笃信泰坦的人来说，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}无疑是最可怕的神明。人们说祂催生黑潮，要把毁灭带给{RUBY_B#世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}。

For devout disciples of the Titans, the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} is definitely a horrifying deity. They believe they are the mastermind behind the black tide, destined to bring catastrophe upon {RUBY_B#the world}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}.
这么说吧…如果你在奥赫玛听谁说自己笃信塞纳托斯，那么有很大的可能，这人只是不愿对泰坦顶礼膜拜，或者懒得参加任何祈求赐福的仪式。
Listen... If someone in Okhema declares themselves a follower of Thanatos, it's likely because they just prefer not to worship the Titans or partake in any rituals that beg for blessings.
留给{RUBY_B#旧世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}的时间不多了…很多人都悄悄地这么说。
Destiny hasn't got much time left for {RUBY_B#the Old World}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}... That's what many whisper in the shadows.
当然，如果刻薄一点…整个{RUBY_B#世界}翁法罗斯{RUBY_E#}恐怕也没有几个人算是真正地活着。只是…黄金裔们还在这里。所以我不会这么去说。
To be a bit more strict... there might be only a handful truly alive in {RUBY_B#the entire world}Amphoreus{RUBY_E#}. However... the Chrysos Heirs are here, so I'll hold my tongue on that.
或者这么说吧——翁法罗斯或许真的在被一些我们尚不清楚的秘密支配…但了解那些秘密的人肯定不在元老院里。

Or maybe, let's put it this way: Amphoreus might actually be under the control of enigmatic forces beyond our grasp... But those who hold such knowledge certainly aren't seated in the Council of Elders.
…你好。欢迎来到全世界最大的浴场的图书室。理论上你可以从这里借阅到任何一本在奥赫玛出版的书籍——只要不介意填写调书单之后等待几天。

...Greetings. Welcome to the library of the largest bath in the world. Theoretically, you can access any book published in Okhema, as long as you don't mind waiting a few days after filling out a book-transfer form.
你可能也知道，天文学在奥赫玛属于禁忌，只有树庭的少数学者可以秘密研究。很不幸，最近逃难来的人实在有点多，他们那里也是僧多粥少，只好把我推荐来浴场工作。

As you might be aware, astronomy research is prohibited in Okhema, and only a few scholars in the Grove secretly manage to sneak a peek. With a flood of recent refugees, they don't have enough work for specialists like me and had to recommend me to work here in this bath.
只是在奥赫玛，天文学…你懂的。虽说《艾格勒曲线论》本身是纯数学的著作，但顶着这个名号，恐怕没什么人愿意和它扯上关系，更不要说资助我出版了。

It's just that... astronomy in Okhema... you know how it is. While On Aquila Curves is a book in pure mathematics, its title might deter people from exploring it, let alone securing a sponsor for publication.
聊聊来奥赫玛之后的研究。
Tell me more about your research after arriving in Okhema.
聊聊树庭。
Tell me more about the Grove.
老身名为塔瓦纳安娜，来自遥远东方的哈图西里城邦。虽说在黑潮之前，我的家乡也曾像花园一样美丽，但赞美{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}——果然还是{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒庇护下的圣城{RUBY_E#}举世无双。

My name is Tavananna, hailing all the way from Hattusili in the far east. While my homeland was a paradise before the black tide — praise the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Pillar of Stone{RUBY_E#} — its charm would pale in comparison to the splendor of {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city under Kephale's wings{RUBY_E#}.
打听奥赫玛的事
Ask about Okhema.
「欢迎来到刻法勒庇护的奥赫玛，远道的异乡人。这里是翁法罗斯的最后乐土，也是由黄金裔守护的永恒之城。」
"Outlanders from distant lands, welcome to Okhema, the sanctum under the watchful eye of Kephale. This is the Eternal City, shielded by the vigilant Chrysos Heirs, the last paradise in Amphoreus."
看，只要稍稍关注几个{RUBY_B#公众号}云上广场{RUBY_E#}，我们外地人也能对{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}了如指掌。
See? Just follow a few {RUBY_B#public accounts}Nebula Plazas{RUBY_E#}, and even us outlanders can get the lowdown on {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}.
啊，外面的事吗？其实老身也知道，这年头除了{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}，四下里的确是乱得很。那个黑潮更了不得，哗地一下就淹过去，除了随身细软，那是什么也带不出来。

The outside world? Well, I know it's pretty chaotic out there everywhere except in {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}, and that black tide is a real menace. In the blink of an eye, it can swallow a whole city, and you'll barely have enough time to run for your life.
不过你大可放心！只要来了{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒的圣城{RUBY_E#}，有困难找元老院和黄金裔就好。你唯一的烦恼，只可能是无事可做，耐不住寂寞…哈哈。

But everything's safe in {RUBY_B#Okhema}Kephale's holy city{RUBY_E#}! If you ever run into trouble, just head to the Council of Elders or find the Chrysos Heirs. Your only trouble might be a bit of boredom... haha.
「最初的人们聚集在刻法勒脚下，文明的种子便在翁法罗斯萌芽。请看——」
"At Kephale's feet, humanity's dawn unfurled. Civilization's roots in Amphoreus twirled."
悬锋陷落，灾殃骤起，与英雄共赴——
Amidst rising plague and crumbling Kremnos. The outlander joins heroes, dispelling great woes.
但…我相信这只是暂时的。奥赫玛的居民一直都很坚强，未来也会是如此——愿刻法勒庇护我们。
But... I believe that this is temporary. Okhema's people have always been hardy, and so will the future — may Kephale protect us.
奥赫玛敞亮的天光里，随处可见你身影
Your form is seen everywhere within the divine light of Okhema
处理奥赫玛大小事务、为逐火之旅奔波，或许确实是疲累的生活，但于我而言，不过是重复了无数光阴的日常罢了。

Dealing with the affairs of Okhema and being constantly on the move for the Flame-Chase Journey could perhaps be considered a tiring life. To me, however, it is no more than a daily routine that I have repeated for ages.
而那些瑕疵品总会莫名流入奥赫玛的服装市场，标注着我的名字被高价拍卖，成为某位王公贵族的收藏。我虽不乐得见此，但也无权禁止，就随他们去吧。

These rejected items always inexplicably end up flowing into Okhema's clothing market. They're tagged with my name and auctioned for high prices to be added to some aristocrat's collection. Though I do not like this, I cannot forbid it. They can do as they please.
纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？

Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?
悬锋人中的悬锋人，万敌！
The most typical of the Kremnoans, Mydei!
悬锋人中的悬锋人…如此评价迈德漠斯倒也合理，他无疑是最英勇的悬锋人，在战场上，谁也不能将其击倒。
The most typical of the Kremnoans... A fair evaluation of Mydeimos. He is undoubtedly the most heroic warrior among all Kremnoans. He is unstoppable on the battlefield.
呵…看来你和奥赫玛的居民们一样，都很喜欢吾师。她们确实是黄金裔中最受奥赫玛平民欢迎者，平日里热衷于与街坊打交道，帮人们解决生活中的疑难琐事。

Hah... I see you are just as fond of my teachers as the citizens of Okhema are. They indeed enjoy enormous popularity among the people of Okhema. They spend their days deeply committed to communicating with their neighbors and helping people with both great troubles and trivial affairs.
看来，学习施展「百界门」对于小灰来说还是过于勉强了。不过不要难过，小灰很厉害！不需要「百界门」，也一定能成为翁法罗斯的大英雄！

It seems that learning to use the "Century Gate" is a bit too difficult for you now, Gray Hair. But don't be disheartened. You are already amazing! We know that you will become a great hero of Amphoreus even without the power of the "Century Gate"!
奥赫玛最棒小信使！
A round of applause for Okhema's greatest messengers!
哼哼哼~缇安今天心情也很好！准备去把奥赫玛再飞个遍！
Hum-hum-hum! Trianne is in a great mood today as well! Time for a flight over all Okhema again!
纷争泰坦尚未失神的辉煌年代，只有在其威压之下仍能稳持长枪、浴血而立的王储，才有资格继任悬锋之王。

In the glorious era before the Strife Titan fell, only the crown prince who could hold their spear firm under the divine pressure and stand tall under the rain of blood was worthy to become the King of Kremnos.
我能理解奥赫玛人对尼卡多利的嫌怨，但我也希望你明白，尼卡多利给予翁法罗斯的不止痛苦与恐惧。
I can understand the Okhemans' grudge against Nikador. However, I do hope that you will understand that Nikador has gifted more than just suffering and fear to Amphoreus.
在天谴之矛陷入疯溃前，它也曾是翁法罗斯的守护者。纷争的力量，亦可平息纷争。
Before the Lance of Fury fell into madness, they served as the guardian of Amphoreus. The power of Strife is also the queller of strife.
不知你是否听闻，我曾与自己的故乡有些过节。出于某些原因，我选择了离开悬锋城，在翁法罗斯各地流亡，悬锋孤军则是愿追随我同行的一众乡友。

I'm not sure if you have heard this before, but I had a few issues with my hometown. I elected to leave Castrum Kremnos for various reasons and wander across Amphoreus. The Kremnoan Detachment was a group of my fellow countrymen who were willing to follow me.
后来机缘巧合下，我们与奥赫玛结为联盟，为「金织」主持的逐火之旅效力。期间，悬锋孤军战功赫赫，并在征途中杀回王城，令先王败而授首。

Later, we happened to ally ourselves with Okhema and offered our services to the Flame-Chase Journey led by the Goldweaver. During that time, this lone army of Kremnos achieved great military success. Along the expedition, we fought back into their home city and defeated the previous king.
我自幼离乡，虽流淌着一脉相承的悬锋之血，但对那座王都没有那么眷恋。
I left my hometown at a young age. Though I carry the blood of Castrum Kremnos, I bear no affection for that kingdom.
至于我的同胞们…悬锋人思乡的方式，就是在战场上恣意拼杀。当他们在战场上染血高呼着「宁战死，毋荣归」的时候，我就知道…奥赫玛，无法成为他们真正的家。

As for my kin... the Kremnoans show how much they miss their home by fighting without restraint. When I see them on the battlefield, blood-stained and raising a cry of "valorous death before glorious return," I knew... that Okhema could never be their true home.
哼，与尼卡多利的决战都不足为惧，区区试炼有何可怕？但阻止我手握火种的并非泰坦的试炼…而是悬锋城的试炼。

Hmph. If a battle to the death with Nikador could not incite fear in my heart, what could scare me about a mere trial? The thing that stops me from grasping the Coreflame is not the trial of the Titan... but the trial of Castrum Kremnos.
你是从哪儿找到这块石板的？悬锋城么？
Where did you find this slate? Castrum Kremnos?
要是感兴趣，不如去悬锋城转转，说不定能在记忆的尘堆里翻出些有趣的旧史呢。
If you're interested, why not take a look around Castrum Kremnos for yourself? Maybe you will be able to dig up some interesting stories from among the dust of memories.
你还想追问些什么，但万敌别过脸去，对这个话题缄口不言。
Though you have more questions you want to ask, Mydei turns away and remains silent on the topic.
至于扫墓…奥赫玛的墓园里，有许多长眠者，都是由我来「入殓」的。我会定期前去清扫他们的坟墓——不知为何，我总担忧他们未能安眠。

As for visiting graves... Many of the deceased around the graveyards of Okhema were personally embalmed by me. I periodically go to their tombs to dust... I'm not sure why but I'm always concerned that somehow they cannot rest in peace.
奥赫玛的居民都挺怕你的。
The people of Okhema seem to fear you.
想不到阁下也对翁法罗斯的历史神话故事感兴趣呀！正巧，漫长岁月里我攒了不少有趣的故事，不知阁下想听什么样的？

I never would have thought that you were also interested in the mythological tales of Amphoreus, {F#miss}{M#mister}! As luck would have it, I have collected many interesting stories over my long years. What kind of tale would you like to hear?
如今，浴场精灵们所讲述的翁法罗斯创世神话，或许是目前最符合阁下想要的「正史」了。
Perhaps the story that best fits the description of "a formal historical account" is the myth of Amphoreus' creation that the bath sprites have been telling.
我的故乡啊…那是离奥赫玛最近的度假胜地，气候极为舒适…我家后院有座超级大的花园，我妻子在里面种满了她最爱的薄暮玫瑰。
My home... It is the closest scenic holiday spot to Okhema. The climate there is wonderful... My home had a gigantic garden in the rear courtyard. My wife filled it with her favorite dusk roses.
…抱歉，我的措辞有误，那里曾是离奥赫玛最近的度假胜地，嗯…*曾是*。
...Sorry, I should rephrase that. It was the closest scenic holiday spot to Okhema... Was.
有时候，我会想象我的战友们现在在哪里。也许他们在欧洛尼斯的怀抱中沉眠？也许他们变成了星星，永远守护着翁法罗斯？
Sometimes I imagine where my comrades are now. Perhaps they are sleeping under the protection of Oronyx? Perhaps they have become stars to watch over Amphoreus for the rest of time?
奥赫玛的繁荣离不开每一位居民的建设！啊，新面孔！
It is thanks to the hard work of its citizens that Okhema has come to be so prosperous! Ah, a new face!
奥赫玛真繁荣啊。
Okhema truly is prosperous.
{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}刚来奥赫玛啊？欢迎来到我们伟大的城邦！有什么不懂的你可以问我，或者问那些卫兵，知无不言！
Are you new to Okhema, {F#girl}{M#boy}? Welcome to our great city! If you need any help, you can always ask me or the guards. We shall help in any way we can!
能介绍下奥赫玛的情况吗？
Can you tell me a bit about Okhema?
你想知道奥赫玛的什么？让我想想…就从日常生活说起？
What would you like to know about Okhema? Let me think... Perhaps I should start from daily life?
从总体来说，奥赫玛是一个充满机遇的城市。在这里，每个人都有自己的生活之道。
Generally speaking, Okhema is a city that is bursting with opportunity. Here, everyone has their own ways of life.
但在这其中，有一个小秘密——在奥赫玛，真正的影响力往往来自于你认识谁，而不是你是谁。我听说有一位裁缝，她只给「特别顾客」做衣服，从而建立了一个令人惊叹的人际网。

However, there is a small secret that lies within all this... In Okhema, true influence comes from who you know, not who you are. I hear that there is a tailor who only makes clothes for "VIP clients." With this, she created an unbelievable personal network.
如果你能在复杂的人际关系中有一些独特的技巧，或许你就能改变自己的生活——又或者，你能改变的不仅仅是你个人的生活。而这，正是奥赫玛的魅力所在。

If you have a unique skill for navigating complex social relationships, there is a chance that you could transform your entire life... Perhaps you will transform even more than just your own life, too. This is where the true charm of Okhema lies.
在奥赫玛，我们相信欢宴不仅仅是享乐，更是一种社交和交流的方式。通过共饮，人们放下戒备，敞开心扉。这种氛围下，往往能产生最富创造力的想法。

In Okhema, we believe that feasts and parties are not simply opportunities to enjoy a good time. We believe that they are also an important method of socializing and communication. It is through drinking together that people drop their guards and open their hearts. It is this kind of atmosphere that is the richest with creative ideas.
听闻人越多，佳酿的口味就越醇厚。所以…在奥赫玛，没有人会独自痛饮，我们总是习惯了一起面对困难，一起庆祝胜利。

I hear that the flavor of this fine wine grows richer the more people there are. So... no one drinks alone in Okhema. We prefer to face life's difficulties together, just as we celebrate our victories together.
听上去很荒谬，是吧？奥赫玛最著名的演说家，居然害怕面对观众。我每次站在台上，都感觉像是面对一群饥饿的野兽。我的手心冒汗，喉咙发干，脑子一片空白。

It sounds absurd, right? The most famous orator in Okhema is scared to speak in front of people. Every time I stand on that stage, I feel like I am facing a pack of hungry beasts. My palms start to sweat, my throat goes dry, and my brain goes blank.
咳咳咳——各位，听我说，我们奥赫玛的繁荣离不开每一位居民的建设！每一位新生力量都至关重要，所以，我们得拿出来热情来欢迎我们的新朋友，加入奥赫玛！

Ahem — Everyone, hear my word! It is thanks to the hard work of its citizens that Okhema has come to be so prosperous! Every new strength that comes to be is crucial to our success. This is why we must show enthusiasm as we welcome our new friends to Okhema!
要我说那些外邦人就是不地道，闲得没事非要搞什么「分期付款」！从预售到定金截止三个月，等个尾款小半年，就算结了尾款想收到货还得再两个月！

If you ask me, these outlanders just don't know how Okhema works! They sit around doing nothing and demand "payment in installments"! They give you three months after the presale to pay the deposit and by the time you make the final payment, six months have slipped by. Even then, it'll still be two months before you even get what you asked for!
哪能啊，这么说吧——你在奥赫玛的这段时间运气非常不错，就算遇到些波折，最终也都会化险为夷。
No way, how about this — you've been very lucky during your time here in Okhema. Even if you encounter a few setbacks, you'll ultimately overcome them in the end.
那个，我是说，咱也是初来乍到，过去就是个家里蹲，在这奥赫玛实在找不到适合赚钱的营生，所以才从他们的传信石版里学了这么一套……
So, what I mean is I only just got here, too. I used to be a real homebody and couldn't find a way to earn a crust in Okhema, so I learned this trick from their teleslate...
…都是些乡间戏言罢了，在这圣城里只能当笑话来讲。而且，如您所见，凡事到了奥赫玛都会变得复杂起来——
...But that's all just rural superstition. Consider it all one big joke while we're here inside the holy city. Plus, as you can see, everything always gets a little more complicated in Okhema...
奥赫玛人一般会把肥皂的诞生归功于{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}，说是它有次不小心把橄榄油泼洒到了熄灭的火堆上，结果神的祝福因此变化出新的形态，于是就有了肥皂。

Okheman folks normally attribute the origins of soap to {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, saying the god once accidentally spilled olive oil onto an extinguished bonfire. The god's blessing then took on a new form, and thus soap was invented.
当然，您要是不在乎融化的肥皂是不是能像蜂蜜一样丝滑，那确实用矿物油都没问题。说到底也就是我们家乡的一种情怀啦！奥赫玛的人就不怎么在乎。

Of course, if you don't care whether your soap is as smooth as honey or not, then you can try using a mineral oil. After all, that's the vibe of our hometown! People in Okhema don't really care about too much.
哦。烟火气也是分很多种的，奥赫玛的烟火气又尤其与众不同。
Mmm. There's a variety of warmth to life, and Okhema's is particularly unique.
所以，等他好了之后，我就劝他、也劝了很多街坊，跟着我们家搬到奥赫玛来——毕竟这里是世界上最安全的城邦，几乎受不到黑潮的威胁。只是……

And so once he got better, I convinced him and all the other neighbors to all pick up sticks and move with us to Okhema... After all, this is the safest city in the world, with almost no threat from the black tide. But it's just...
没什么。黑潮真正降临的时候…一切就是会发生得很突然。可能你准备什么都无济于事。一整个移民旅团，因为半道遭遇了袭击，到头来只有少数几家成功抵达了奥赫玛，拿到了难民身份。

It's nothing. When the black tide really comes... it'll all happen very quickly. Maybe nothing we could do would be of any use. Out of an entire caravan of migrants, only a few small families reached Okhema and obtained refugee status due to running into attacks along the way.
哦，这个也算是奥赫玛独特的景致了。
Oh, this is another unique worldview native to Okhema.
是的，我刚来奥赫玛不久。
Yeah, I just came to Okhema not long ago.
哦，对了，还没来得及自我介绍呢。我叫盖亚，是树庭的学者，目前正在研究水培植物的相关课题。
Oh yeah, I haven't had a chance to introduce myself yet. I'm Gaia and I study at the Grove. My research topic is currently looking at hydroponic plants.
泪葱就是泪葱啊，奥赫玛种了几千年的调味料…你家炒菜不放葱吗？
Tear onions are just tear onions. They're a herb that's been used in Okhema for thousands of years... You don't eat onions where you come from?
植物们可不会说话，它们倾向于把自己的悲痛藏在根茎里，直到我们发现作物减产才窥得一二，届时奥赫玛恐怕也……
Plants can't talk, but they tend to hide their grief down inside their roots. We wouldn't notice if anything was going on until there was a drop in yields, by which time I'm afraid Okhema would...
嘈杂转为了寂静，随后转为了——悲鸣？你只能听见几句含糊不清的，听起来像是「悬锋的清洁工」之类的叫唤。
The rabble of noise turns to silence before turning into... wails? You only manage to overhear a few muddled words... Are they saying "Kremnos Cleaner"...?
啊啊，那些闹事的客人来自悬锋城，他们有人认得我…算是给了我这个老乡一个面子吧。
Ahh, those troublesome customers were from Castrum Kremnos. Some of them recognized me... Let's just say they showed their fellow countryman some respect.
抱歉，我也言重了。不必担心，这里是奥赫玛，于刻法勒的庇护下，即使我全盘托出，我们的生活也不会发生任何改变。
My apologies. That sounded threatening. There is no need to worry. This is Okhema, after all. Under the protection of Kephale, even if I tell you everything, our lives will remain unchanged.
我的确是一位「侍者」，过去也同然。但在悬锋城那时，我的雇主更愿意称我为「清洁工」，或是「解决方案」。
I was an "attendant" in the past, too. However, back in Castrum Kremnos, my employers preferred to refer to me as a "cleaner" or a "problem-solver."
不…悬锋城毁后，我辗转各地，却仅有{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的圣城愿意接纳一位蒙尘的人。那时我就下定决心，不到必要的时候，不再拿起清扫工具。

No... After Castrum Kremnos was destroyed, I roamed various places, but only the holy city of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would take in a stained fugitive like myself. I made a vow to myself at that moment that I would never again take up my cleaning equipment unless there was an absolute need.
你好呀！是从外邦来的客人吗？我代表奥赫玛大浴场欢迎你！
Hello! Are you a guest from another land? Allow me to welcome you on behalf of the baths of Okhema!
痛并快乐着——祝你能在奥赫玛玩得开心！
You who feel the pain in happiness... May you enjoy your time in Okhema!
真希望也有这样的命运能眷顾一个只知道躺着的懒人…祝你能在奥赫玛玩得开心！
I pray that such a fate could care for an idle person who spends all their days lying down... May you enjoy your time in Okhema!
哈哈哈哈，奥赫玛的哲学家实在有点多，要是人人都拦着你要辩论的话，那是挺累的！
Hahaha, Okhema is rife with philosophers. I'm sure it can become tiresome if everyone is stopping you to discuss such things!
不过没事儿，我也是一个只知道躺着的懒人——祝你能在奥赫玛玩得开心！
Fear not though, I am merely a lazy person who lives only to lie down... May you enjoy your time in Okhema!
我？我没有什么故事啦，只是一个无所事事的奥赫玛本地人而已。
Me? I have no stories. I'm just an Okhema native with too much time on my hands.
悬锋城人都这么不讲武德吗…
Do the people of Castrum Kremnos have no morals in war...?
悬锋城？不不，其实只有我而已，要不我怎么叫「狡猾的」尤利克赛斯呢~
Castrum Kremnos? No, no, this is just me. Why else do you think they call me "Ulixes the Cunning"?
问得好。很多悬锋战士踏上战场，就是为了迎接荣耀之死，所以他们都不怎么注重防护…这是习俗，没办法。

A fine question. Many Kremnos Warriors go to the battlefield in order to claim an honorable death. So they do not pay too much attention to defense... This is a custom, and there is nothing that can be done.
悬锋军视「在战场上战死」为最高荣耀，「凯旋」次之。「宁战死，毋荣归」是他们最喜欢的口号，而在床榻上了却一生则是最为人所不齿的结局。

The soldiers of Kremnos see "death in battle" as the greatest honor. "Triumphant return" is a close second. They like to say: "valorous death before glorious return," believing that peacefully passing away on your deathbed is the most contemptible ending.
悬锋城战士虽多，却也不是每个人都能成为战士。在踏上这条路之前，你得先做好觉悟。
There are many warriors in Castrum Kremnos, but not everyone can become one. One must be properly prepared before embarking on this path.
…不，感觉还是缺乏气势，得想个更帅气的出场词才行。身为克拉特鲁斯大人亲手提拔的悬锋伙友，可不能丢份啊。
...No, still lacks some panache. Got to have a more dashing opener. As a stalwart Kremnos vanguard handpicked by Lord Krateros, I mustn't lose face.
对，终有一天，我会在战场上对抗悬锋城之敌。届时我必须说出一段令人印象深刻的出场词，不然就会让伙友的身份蒙羞……
Yes. One day, I will take to the field and battle Castrum Kremnos' enemies. When the day comes, my opening lines must leave the deepest impression, or I will disgrace the vanguards...
听说欧利庞王当年御驾亲征，在战场上杀死了足足一百个敌人！以我悬锋伙友的身份，至少也得打二十个才行。
I heard that when King Eurypon personally fought in battle, he slew a hundred enemies on the field! As a Kremnos vanguard, I have to at least take out twenty.
悬锋伙友？克拉特鲁斯？
Kremnos vanguard? Krateros?
悬锋伙友是悬锋城最精锐的士兵。我们拥有整座城邦最好的武器和最严整的军纪，直接对欧利庞王负责，其他士兵也以我们为榜样。

The Kremnos vanguard are the most elite soldiers in Castrum Kremnos. We possess the finest weapons and most stringent military discipline in all the city, and are led directly by King Eurypon. Other soldiers hold us in the highest regard.
像他这样的精锐总共只有五名。他们是悬锋伙友中的佼佼者，也是王最亲密的战友。当王不在时，他们就是军中位阶最高的将领。

He is one of only five who hold such elite status. They are exemplars among the Kremnos vanguards, and most bosom comrades of the King. When the king is not around, they wield the utmost authority among the ranks.
战士，最重要的当然是荣耀。悬锋城有句古话：「身可死，荣耀不可弃。」而证明荣耀的最好方式，就是战胜强敌。

Glory is of course the most essential for warriors. Castrum Kremnos has an ancient saying: "The body may die, but glory cannot be abandoned." What better way to prove your honor than to topple a formidable foe?
只要能杀死一头那样的怪物，你就算是合格的悬锋战士了，但难点在于如何找到活着的钢爪兽…它们都快被杀光了。
If you can slay such a monster, you'd be more than qualified to be a Kremnos Warrior. Alas, the problem lies in finding a live Steelclaw Beast... They've almost all been killed off.
在战场上，懂得协作的战士远比孤军奋战的莽夫有用。回去吧，你不配在悬锋的光辉下献身。
On the battlefield, warriors who can work together are far more useful than solitary brutes. Go back. You are not worthy of sacrificing yourself under the radiance of Kremnos.
在你的眼中，他打造武器的过程朴实无华，除了力气大点、声音响些，似与翁法罗斯之外最平凡的铁匠并无二致。

In your eyes, his weapon forging process is unsophisticated, unpretentious. Apart from exhibiting more strength and producing louder clanging, he doesn't seem too different from the most ordinary blacksmiths in Amphoreus.
在翁法罗斯怎么挑选好武器？
How do I choose a good weapon in Amphoreus?
万敌，也形容过——「血浸多了。」
"Drenched in too much blood," said too Mydei.
万敌？
Mydei?
万敌，许多回，武器坏了。幸存的武器，我修复时，听得见沉吟。
His weapon, many times, Mydei has broken. A hum, I hear, when fixing the surviving weapons.
悬锋人的武器，大多如此。万敌，不同。
Mostly like that, Kremnoan weapons are. Different, Mydei's is.
如今在奥赫玛的山之民，我的族群，曾被使役，悬锋人。
Now Mountain Dwellers in Okhema, my people are. Used by Kremnoans, they once were.
信仰法吉娜的城邦，我们很少去。迄今为止，奥赫玛，我们最喜欢。
The city of Phagousa's faith, we rarely visit. Okhema, our favorite, it is so far.
啊哈，您一定是来自遥远的异邦的贵客，在这奥赫玛，谁人不知老希这「希吉拉与他的翻飞之手铺子」名头啊！
Aha, you must be a guest from afar. Here in Okhema, everyone knows of my famed shop, Hygilos and his Whimsy Hand!
一位生命花园的园丁被你的「球棒动力学理论」深深折服，盛情邀请你加入奥赫玛权威的学术组织。可你深知一切仅是享乐女神的愚弄，你的智慧会在系统时午夜12点后消失……

A Garden of Life Gardener is deeply engrossed in your "Baseball Bat Dynamics Theory," and heartily invites you to join a prestigious academic organization in Okhema. But you are deeply aware that this is but a trick by the goddess of pleasure — your intellect will fade when the system time strikes midnight...
他为何在此，你说不清。他邀请你骑上宽厚的背，你们游遍了奥赫玛的每个角落，你们笑语欢声，度过了难忘的一天……
Why he is here, you cannot say. He invites you to ride atop his broad back, and you journey to every corner of Okhema, spending an unforgettable day peppered with laughter...
…一突然窜出的男子打破了你的美梦。他介绍此处为奥赫玛国家一级景区，自己是背你爬上来的导游，需要你交付5000利衡币的门票钱和20000利衡币的辛苦费。

...A man suddenly pops up, disrupting your reverie. He introduces this place as Okhema's top national tourist attraction, and that he was the guide who carried you up the mountain. He also requests that you pay 5,000 Balance Coins in admission fee and 20,000 Balance Coins for the "service rendered."
一段从未听闻的跫音…今日竟果真有幸相逢。你好，奥赫玛的贵客。
Sounds of footfalls never before heard... I didn't think I'd actually get to encounter you today. Greetings, honored guest of Okhema.
我来到奥赫玛也有些时日了。如今我不再受传谕职责所囿，可以用预言替居民们解决生活上的小麻烦。
I have arrived in Okhema for some time now. I am not bound by the duty to deliver prophecies any longer, so I use them to help citizens resolve what little troubles they encounter in daily life.
我曾听说过雅努萨波利斯鼎盛期的辉煌往事。作为「奥赫玛同盟」的重要议事场所，雅努萨波利斯曾是一座富裕安宁的城邦。
I once heard of Janusopolis' glorious past during her height of power. As an essential Council venue within the Okhema Alliance, Janusopolis was once a prosperous and peaceful city.
这天外之音来自欧洛尼斯映照出的可怖景色，纷争掀翻大地，天帷遮蔽天空，一切沦于死亡。这命运一次又一次在翁法罗斯重演，受命运守护的城邦也难幸免……

This celestial echo comes from the horrific scene reflected by Oronyx. Strife split the earth, the veil blanketed the sky, and all floundered in death. This fate has been played out in Amphoreus time and time again — even the city protected by destiny itself cannot escape misfortune...
你好，「异乡人」阁下。上次那张悬锋城的照片，有帮上你们的忙吗？
Hello, esteemed outlander. Was that photo of Castrum Kremnos helpful to you?
这说明，传统的计时方式，根本不适合现在的奥赫玛！
This indicates that the traditional method of timekeeping is utterly unsuitable for modern Okhema!
对吧！要是将这个发现公之于众，我们就能改变奥赫玛沿用至今的历法了！
Exactly! By sharing this discovery, we could revolutionize the longstanding calendar system in Okhema!
奥赫玛会沿用传统的历法，将每天划分为五个时段，是因为人们错误地认为「黎明机器」的光芒不会改变，无法依据光照确定时间。

Okhema adheres to a traditional calendar, dividing each day into five distinct periods based on the mistaken belief that the light from the Dawn Device remains constant and cannot be used to determine time.
但奥赫玛不需要新的历法。
But Okhema does not need a new calendar.
我会去向元老院讲述我的猜想，邀请树庭的学者们见证我的发现。我要在集市里做演讲，在浴池里举办讨论会，我要让所有人都知道这件事。

I will go to the Council of Elders with my conjectures and invite Grove scholars to witness my findings. I'll give lectures in the marketplace, and hold discussions in the baths. I want everyone to know about this.
厉害啊。我在奥赫玛呆了这么久，头一次看这位卫士理人。平常我们怎么叫他都没反应的。
Incredible. I've spent years in Okhema and this is the first time I've seen this guard acknowledge anyone. Normally, he never responds, no matter how loudly we call.
奥赫玛的卫士，基本都是山之民。我们，敬业。
Most guards, in Okhema, Mountain Dwellers. We dedicated.
奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?
是啊，翁法罗斯还有那么多有趣的事物等着你去开拓，为什么非得花时间来思考这些无用的内容呢。你不认为这是个有价值的话题。
You're right. Amphoreus has many interesting things awaiting trailblazing. Why must you waste time reflecting on such pointless conversations? This topic is clearly of no value to you.
是我刚才的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。

I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally came from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.
认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.
我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.
奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?
是我先前的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。

I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally come from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.
数学是阐述必然性的知识，哪怕悬锋城的战士全部改信墨涅塔，圆依旧是圆，不会变成方形。但「阿卡索斯」的存在，必须依赖现实历史。

Mathematics explains absolute and certain truth. If all the warriors of Castrum Kremnos were to suddenly follow Mnestia, a circle would still be a circle. It would not change shape. However, the existence of "Icatus" absolutely relies on real history.
要是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问「奥赫玛」与「悬锋城」是否也该真实存在？「神悟树庭」与「哀丽秘榭」是否也真实存在？
If "Icatus" truly exists, do "Okhema" and "Castrum Kremnos" also truly exist as well? What about "Grove of Epiphany" and "Aedes Elysiae"?
哈，我就猜到你准会相信他那套言论。要是在奥赫玛公然质疑阿卡索斯的真实性，是要引起众怒的。但没关系，我愿意为我的论点辩护。

Hah, I knew that you would favor his argument. If Okhema were to publicly doubt the truth of Icatus' existence, it would be certain to incite outrage. I do not mind, however. I am willing to defend my theory.
若是有座城邦，远在翁法罗斯的另一头，从未与奥赫玛有过任何通信，按你刚才的论点，那座城邦的人们便全都消失不见了。
If there were another city on the other side of Amphoreus that had never had contact with Okhema, then according to your logic, the people of this city would disappear without a trace.
我正在尝试用不同深浅的灰色来表现天空的光照变化，艾格勒的仁慈赋予了奥赫玛如此美妙的景象。
I'm experimenting with various shades of gray to capture the shifting light in the sky. Aquila's mercy has blessed Okhema with such breathtaking scenery.
比如说，当我画奥赫玛的集市时，我不会去关注水果的颜色，而是专注于集市的喧嚣、人们的欢笑、讨价还价的热闹。
Take, for instance, when I paint the marketplace in Okhema, I don't focus on the colors of the fruit. Instead, I capture the buzz of the crowd, their laughter, and the vibrant bartering.
所以我很注重奥赫玛的历史，在资料收集上花费了大量时间——结果到头来，他们却总说我能看到过去，而不知道我背后有多努力。

I place great importance on the history of Okhema, dedicating an enormous amount of time to research. Yet, people often think I can simply see into the past, unaware of the extensive effort I put in behind the scenes.
怎么样，在奥赫玛的生活还习惯吗？有没有稳定的收入？千里迢迢来到圣城，可别一不小心把自己饿死了！
How are you finding life in Okhema? Do you have a stable income? It'd be a real shame if you came all this way to the holy city only to end up starving!
奥赫玛会饿死人？
Do people starve in Okhema?
或许吧…可你别说，我刚来奥赫玛的时候，因为在黑潮里受了惊吓，也是足足缓了一个星期才敢出门——总是害怕有什么怪物从地里、水里突然就冒出来。

Maybe... but honestly, when I first arrived in Okhema, I was so shaken by the black tide that it took me a full week before I even dared to go outside. I kept imagining some creature would suddenly pop out of the ground or water.
当然，也有很多人觉得奥赫玛本来就没有什么捷足飞贼，或许这个传闻是个谎言吧。
A lot of people also believe there never was a Phantom Strider in Okhema. It's all just a tall tale.
有个人在传信石版上发辩论场说，他在投奔奥赫玛的路上和家人走散了，结果遇到了一个不太会说人话的黑衣人，把刀剑架在他脖子上问他今天是星期几！

Someone on the teleslate forum shared that he got separated from his family en route to Okhema and encountered a man in black who was hardly able to talk. He confronted him with a sword, demanding to know the day of the week.
虽然不能做到像万敌哥哥那样刀枪不入，但我会证明，只要修炼得当，奥赫玛人也能拥有不输给悬锋人的勇武！
Although I can't achieve the invincibility of great Mydei, I will prove that with proper training, we Okhemans can possess courage and strength rivaling that of the Kremnoans!
是啊，我知道悬锋城有不少坏家伙，伤害了很多其他的城邦…但也有很多好人！像万敌哥哥和他的孤军，愿意保护我们……

Yeah, I know there are plenty of bad folks in Castrum Kremnos who've caused harm to many other cities... but there are also a lot of good people! Like Mydei and his detachment, who are willing to protect us...
我猜，万敌是你的偶像？
I guess Mydei is your idol?
那不是当然的吗？无敌又帅气，既是悬锋城的王储，也是奥赫玛的救星……
Isn't that obvious? He's invincible and dashing, not only the crown prince of Castrum Kremnos but also the savior of Okhema...
重要的是，他还愿意教我怎么锻炼！用什么来称赞万敌哥哥都不为过！
Most importantly, he's willing to teach me how to train! No amount of praise for Brother Mydei is too much!
只可惜悬锋孤军只让悬锋人加入…不过没关系，万敌哥哥说了，悬锋城有悬锋城的荣耀，奥赫玛也可以有奥赫玛的荣耀…嘿嘿。
It's just a pity that the Kremnoan Detachment only allows the Kremnoans to join... But it's fine. Mydei said that Castrum Kremnos has its own pride, and Okhema can have its own pride too... Hehe.
据说在悬锋人的故乡悬锋城，城外深不见底的壕沟上悬着几条碗口粗的巨大铁链子——那些挑战体力与勇气的人，就会在那几条铁链子上玩折返跑。

It's said that in the homeland of the Kremnoans, Castrum Kremnos, there are massive iron chains, each as wide as a bowl, suspended over the bottomless trenches outside the city. Those who challenge their strength and courage will perform shuttle runs on those chains.
虽然咱们奥赫玛没有他们说的那种铁链，但确实有不少道路都架设在云端。
Although we Okhemans don't have iron chains like that, a lot of our roads are built high in the clouds.
悬锋孤军…也就是那些住在奥赫玛的悬锋人，就会专门挑这些路线来跑步锻炼。
The Kremnoan Detachment, also known as those Kremnoans living in Okhema, specifically choose these routes for their running training.
咳咳，严格来说，这个在奥赫玛是犯法的！不过因为不会造成任何严重后果，所以就算被发现了应该也只会被口头警告吧……
Ahem, strictly speaking, this is illegal in Okhema! But since it doesn't cause any serious harm, even if you're caught, you'll probably just get a verbal warning...
偷东西的人练习的是潜行与保密的能力，找回东西的人则是练习侦察和寻物的本事。万敌哥哥说无影寻宝风靡之后，悬锋城就再也没有小偷了…至少没有活着的。

Those who steal practice their stealth and secrecy, while those retrieving the items hone their scouting and tracking skills. Mydei said that ever since shadowless treasure hunting became popular, there haven't been any thieves in Castrum Kremnos... or at least, none alive.
哦，这个最接近奥赫玛本身就有的活动！捷足战舞其实就是光脚跳舞…不过动作比较大开大阖，而且是穿戴好盔甲、全副武装地跳。

Oh, this is the activity most similar to what Okhema itself has! Swift-footed dancing is actually just barefoot dancing... but with much larger and more sweeping movements, and it's done while fully armored, armed to the teeth.
嘿嘿，不是我自夸，别看悬锋人会吃苦，真论锻炼效果，应该还是我自己发明的这个「飞瀑潜立」最有潜力！万敌哥哥都夸过咱呢！
Hehe, not to brag, but even though the Kremnoans endure a lot of hardship, I'd say the training method I invented, Flying Waterfall Stance, has the most potential! Even Brother Mydei has praised it!
慌乱的神色、结巴的话语、拙劣的借口，出卖了他的心虚。为了翁法罗斯民众的安危，正义的球棒侠决定问个水落石出。
The panicked expression, stammering words, and clumsy excuses betray his guilt. For the safety of the people of Amphoreus, the Galactic Baseballer of justice decides to get to the bottom of it.
嘴上嚷嚷着翁法罗斯人传承浴场文化义不容辞，我看你们呀，只是想趁机秀出你们的健身成果，享受旁人的垂涎。

You keep going on about how the people of Amphoreus are duty-bound to uphold the heritage of bath culture, but I see through you all — you just want to show off your fitness gains and enjoy the envy of others.
这可不是一时的风尚，也不是奥赫玛的专属，而是翁法罗斯所有城邦的通病，只是不同地方的狂热程度有高有低。
This is not just a passing trend, nor is it exclusive to Okhema. It is a common affliction in all the city-states of Amphoreus, though the level of fanaticism varies from place to place.
我、我哪有羡慕他们！我正在准备树庭的考试，我要成为学者，才不要做这种肌肉发达，头脑空空的人！
I—I'm not jealous of them! I'm preparing for the Grove exams. I want to become a scholar, not someone with big muscles and an empty head!
「塔拉萨波利斯」，对吧？是个我从来没听说过的名字呢，原来翁法罗斯还有这样一个城邦吗？
Thalassopolis, right? I haven't heard of that name before. So, there's a city like that in Amphoreus?
怀着微妙的心情，你给这人简单讲了讲自己与某位「寒腿叔叔」的孽缘。当然，是翁法罗斯本地化版本。
With certain strange emotions, you briefly explained your relationship with a certain Mr. Cold Feet. Of course, you gave them the localized Amphoreus version.
放心吧，只要您予我信心便足矣，我会用自己的力量向奥赫玛证明。
Rest assured. As long as you grant me confidence, that is enough. I will use my own strength to prove myself to Okhema.
放心吧，只要您予我信心便足矣，我会用自己的力量向奥赫玛证明。
Rest assured. As long as you grant me confidence, that is enough. I will use my own strength to prove myself to Okhema.
不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...
嗯…看你的打扮是来自外乡，一定还没适应这边的环境吧？这本或许能让你对奥赫玛的印象更加轻松些。这是拓本，无需归还，拿着慢慢读吧。

Well... judging by your attire, you must be from out of town and haven't quite adjusted to the environment here yet? This book might make your impression of Okhema a bit more lighthearted. It's a rubbing, so you don't need to return it. Take it and read at your own pace.
我猜你是想问，为什么会在云石天宫里建个图书馆，是吧？嗯…这要扯到几十个光历年前——记得刚好是第四十三个奥赫玛百年祭那会。
I guess you're wondering why there's a repository in the Marmoreal Palace, right? Well... this goes back several Light Calendar years ago — exactly during the 43rd Okhema Centennial Festival.
也不知是该怪他们特立独行，还是该夸他们懂得生活了。谁让这旁边就杵着全翁法罗斯最好的休憩处呢？
I don't know whether I should blame them for being so unconventional, or praise them for knowing how to enjoy life. After all, right next door is the best resting place in all of Amphoreus.
…我原本还想为您再做些更深入的介绍，但忽然想起，即便在奥赫玛，水漫琴也仅剩这一台。多做讲解，也不过是无用的知识罢了。
...I thought to give you a more elaborate introduction, but I suddenly remembered that there is only one such water lyre left, even in Okhema. It's pointless to tell you more about the instrument.
奥赫玛的人们称呼它为水漫琴，但对我们来说，它就是普通的琴。我原以为这些精密的机械早已被黑潮吞没了，没想到在此处还能见到。
The Okhemans call it a water lyre. But to us, it is an ordinary lyre. I thought these intricate devices were long devoured by the black tide. I never thought I'd see one here.
…忧伤么。初到奥赫玛的时候，我确实有些慌张。全知全能的刻法勒背负天空，搭建起的小小庇护所，其中是否有我的容身之处？我不知道。

...Sorrow, was it? I do admit that when I first arrived in Okhema, I was a little anxious. A tiny shelter built beneath the sky that is borne by the omniscient, omnipotent Kephale. Would there be a place for me here? I did not know.
…希冀么。那是自然，若是不抱有看到明日晨光的愿望，又该如何度过这个漫长的夜晚呢？即使奥赫玛不受黑夜侵袭，也不该忘记心怀信念。

...Aspirations, huh. That is only natural. If we do not cling to the hopes of tomorrow's dawn, how will we even endure this long night? Even if Okhema cannot be invaded by darkness, we should not forget to have faith in our hearts.
奇美拉是奥赫玛的宝物，大家都要爱护它们呀！
Chimeras are treasures of Okhema. Everyone should cherish them!
是吧！可惜成为园丁需要很长时间的培训，不然，我得要让所有奥赫玛的人们都来亲身领略奇美拉的可爱之处！
I know, right! A pity it takes a lot of training to become a Gardener, otherwise I'd make sure everyone in Okhema gets a chance to experience how totally adorable chimeras are!
请随便问吧，整个奥赫玛恐怕都找不到比我更了解它们的人了。
Ask away. I don't think there's anyone else in Okhema who knows more about them than me.
你应该听说过，奇美拉并非原本就生活在翁法罗斯的生物，而是花园的学者，使用「生命树种」培育出来的。
You must've heard before that the chimeras aren't actually native to Amphoreus. Rather, they were grown using the Seed of Life by the Garden's scholars.
要我说，奇美拉是瑟希斯赐给翁法罗斯的礼物——上哪再去找这么可爱又听话的小动物呢。复原古生物只是一厢情愿的想法，我们该接受现实才对。

I say, the chimera is a gift that Cerces bestowed upon Amphoreus — where else can you find such a cute and obedient critter? Reviving creatures of the past is nothing but a pipe dream, so we should just accept reality.
现在，奇美拉和奥赫玛的人们相处得可好啦，大家都很喜欢它们。
Now, the chimeras get along so well with the people of Okhema. Everyone loves them.
严格来说，生命花园是个学术组织，负责研究生命相关的知识。这里的学者很多都在神悟树庭进修过，接受瑟希斯的智慧熏陶。

Strictly speaking, the Garden of Life is an academic organization charged with researching all aspects related to life. Most of the scholars here studied at the Grove of Epiphany, where they were influenced by Cerces' wisdom.
但最近，随着奥赫玛要处理的现实问题越来越多，花园也会帮助居民们解决些实际麻烦，譬如照料大地兽啦，消除农作物的病害啦…之类的。

But in recent times, as Okhema has more realistic problems to resolve, the Garden has also become a haven to alleviate her people's worries. They can care for dromases and eliminate diseases from crops here, among other things.
说起来…我也有段时间没去树庭听讲座了。不知道他们有没有什么新发现……
Speaking of which... I haven't listened to a lecture at the Grove for quite a while. I wonder if they've made any new discoveries...
如果说奥赫玛真是最后的方舟…那么这方舟究竟在用什么形式保护我们的过去，就难免令人焦虑了。
If Okhema really becomes the final ark... Then, exactly how this ark is preserving our past is a cause for anxiety.
来聊聊翁法罗斯的古生物吧。
Let's talk about Amphoreus' prehistoric creatures.
行吧。古生物的知识…对翁法罗斯的未来可能确实没有什么帮助。
Fine... Knowledge on prehistoric creatures... probably isn't of much help to Amphoreus' future.
乐意效劳！那么首先，你了解「神悟树庭」吗？
Gladly! First, do you know about the Grove of Epiphany?
那些花园与庭院后来成为了「神悟树庭」——一个供世人醒神、求识、悟道的学院，一个在学术上兼容并包、百花齐放的圣地。

The garden and grove later became the Grove of Epiphany — an academy where people awoke their minds, sought knowledge, and invoked enlightenment. A sanctuary where academia embraces inclusivity and teems with diversity.
在翁法罗斯，人们通常将那些具有一定规模与影响的学术群体称作「学派」，而我便属于树庭七大学派中的「曳石学派」。
In Amphoreus, people usually refer to these structured and influential academic groups as Schools, and I belong to the Helkolithist school, one of seven in the Grove.
怎么会呢？ 浴池能让大家心平气和地坐在一块，这么好的地方，奥赫玛独此一家！
Not really? Everyone's calm and gathered in a bath. It's the most perfect place in all of Okhema!
简单介绍下，我叫尤利娅，是树庭的学者，现在是浴场的常客。我喜欢在这里跟普罗大众宣讲我一生信奉的瑟希斯之道。
An introduction is in order: I am Julia, a Grove scholar, and now a bath regular. I always enjoy the chance to regale everyone here about Cerces, the path to which I have devoted my life.
啧，我看你样貌不凡，没想到竟是和树庭那群老古板一样的庸人，真是可悲。
Tsk, you look like an extraordinary person, but you're just as intransigent as those old farts in the Grove. What a shame.
你别看树庭号称什么「智慧殿堂」，什么「瑟希斯庇佑的圣地」，其实都是些虚名。
The Grove may have monikers like the "Erudite Temple," "Cerces' Blessed Sanctuary" and whatnot, but they're all just lies.
可你看看奥赫玛，泰坦的奇迹随处可见，凡人有什么资格收费？知识为什么要付费？法吉娜会对泉水收费吗？刻法勒会对光照收费吗？

But look at Okhema — the Titans' miracles can be seen throughout her streets. What right do mortals have to charge a fee? Why is knowledge behind a paywall? Would Phagousa charge for their springwater? Would Kephale make you pay to bask in its light?
所有知识都该对公众开放，你要是想从树庭学点什么，来找我，我会免费教你。让我姐姐那种拿学问谋利的家伙看看，真正的知识是怎么传播的！
