All knowledge should be shared with the public. If there's anything you wish to learn from the Grove, just approach me, and I'll teach you everything free of charge. I'll show those selfish scholars like my sister how true knowledge should be disseminated!
你是树庭学者，都研究什么？
What are you researching as a Grove scholar?
我的研究？哦，那可太宏大了！我主要研究泰坦思维与翁法罗斯世界法则的关系。你知道吗，整个奥赫玛，不，整个翁法罗斯都是泰坦思想的具现！

My research? Oh, it's so all-encompassing! I mainly study the relationship between Titanic thoughts and the natural laws of Amphoreus. Did you know that the whole of Okhema, nay, the whole of Amphoreus, is a manifestation of the Titanic thoughts?
比如说，我发现雅努斯的思维模式可能影响了整个世界的空间结构。你有没有注意到奥赫玛的建筑总是成对出现？这可能就是雅努斯双面性的体现！

For example, I noticed that Janus' mode of thought may have influenced the entire world's spatial structure. Have you noticed that Okhema's buildings always come in pairs? This could be an allusion to Janus' duality!
最重要的是，这里是自由的！没有人管我，告诉我该研究什么，不该研究什么。我可以尽情地思考那些看似不着边际，但可能改变整个翁法罗斯的伟大理论！

Most importantly, this is the epitome of freedom! No one to stick it to me, tell me what I should be working on or otherwise. I can ruminate on the most far-fetched of concepts that may turn out to be grand theories that can change the whole Amphoreus!
所以，别以为我是在逃避工作。恰恰相反，我在这里做的研究，比在那个被世俗观念束缚的树庭里有意义多了！
So don't think I'm trying to avoid work here. Quite the contrary, I am conducting research that is far more meaningful than whatever is in the Grove, fettered by shackles of worldly sentiments!
我们姐妹俩的理念就是水火不容。她想把树庭变成一个解决日常问题的作坊，而我则要让它成为彻底开源的源泉，让翁法罗斯的每个人都能感受到瑟希斯的智慧！

Our philosophies are as opposite as fire and ice. She wants to turn the Grove into some workshop that can resolve everyday problems, while I want to turn it into a wellspring of openly shared knowledge, for everyone in Amphoreus to revel in Cerces' wisdom!
对了，差点忘记跟你说——以后你要是想从树庭学点什么，尽管来找我！记住我的话：知识应当是自由且免费的！这才是瑟希斯的精神！

Oh yes, almost forgot to tell you — if you want to learn anything from the Grove in the future, just look me up instead! Remember my words: Knowledge should be free of charge! This is what Cerces would want!
别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!
就是树庭的一些研究成果，在瑟希斯的祝福下，我们将自己的心血储存在特殊的「种子」上，开放授权给特定的人群阅读。
Some research outcomes from the Grove. With Cerces' blessing, we have stored our efforts into special "seeds," and are granting permission to certain groups to read them.
什么呀，我这是树庭授权的正当生意，每到机缘月还要向元老院交税的。
What kind of question is that? This is officially authorized by the Grove, and I pay my taxes to the Council of Elders every Month of Fortune.
瞧你这一脸迷惑的模样，住在花园附近的居民们倒是见怪不怪了——你一定是新来奥赫玛不久吧？
You look bewildered, though it's a common sight to those living near the Garden. You must be new to Okhema?
自我介绍一下，我叫维普萨尼娅，是神悟树庭的财务官。不过现在嘛...就当我是个树庭知识的推销员吧…嗯，按我妹妹的话来说我就是「到处推销」。
Allow me to introduce myself: I am Vipsania, Grove of Epiphany Financial Officer. But now... just think of me as a Grove Knowledge salesperson... Mm, my sister would say I'm "peddling wares."
既然你刚到奥赫玛不久，你想买点「种子」带走吗？里面都是树庭的珍藏噢。怎么样，要不要来点？
Since you haven't been in Okhema for long, how would you like to take home some "seeds"? They're all precious treasures from the Grove. How about it, care for some?
对了，你知道神悟树庭吧？人们都说，我们那儿有着翁法罗斯数一数二的聪明人。不过你可别在意这些吹捧，归根结底，做学问的基础还是做实验。没钱没平台，再聪明也白搭。

Oh yes, you know of the Grove of Epiphany, yes? Everyone says that we house all the brightest minds in Amphoreus. But don't listen to all that horn-tooting. At its heart, experimentation builds the foundation of knowledge. Without money or platform, even the smartest scholar is a fool.
我可不是那种倒卖树庭资源的混蛋，我这都是定期捞取「沉没树种」，看看适不适合应用到我们生活中，有合适的才好放到市场来叫卖。

I'm not one of those scoundrels reselling Grove assets. These are Sunken Tree Seeds that I regularly procure to see if they help with our daily lives. Only successful product tests are sold on the market.
怎么样，想不想为奥赫玛的知识传播出份力？
How about it, do you want to contribute to spreading the knowledge of Okhema?
糟了，传信石版有点问题，我和树庭那边没联系上。等修好了我再喊你，现在先把你放在预定名单里，抱歉抱歉……
Drats, there's something wrong with the teleslate. I didn't manage to link up with the Grove. I'll holler when I fix it, for now I'll put you on the reservation list, so sorry about that...
不过我得提前跟你打声招呼，可能是之前销量太好，树庭那边的传信石版有点问题，我现在还没联系上我的师门。
But I have to let you know in advance — there might be problems with the Grove's teleslate, perhaps due to how good sales were previously. I can't get in touch with my school.
至于其他的…什么类型的知识种子都有，这个得看我们树庭的学者们最近在研究什么了。
As for the others... We've got all kinds of Knowledge Seeds. It all depends on what our Grove scholars have been researching recently.
种子其实就是我们树庭的一些研究成果，在瑟希斯的祝福下，我们将自己的心血储存在特殊的「知识树」上，攫取其成熟的果实。
Seeds are actually some research outcome from the Grove. With Cerces' blessing, we stored our efforts in a special "Knowledge Tree," then harvest its ripened fruit.
通过特定的操作，可以在传信石版上开放授权给指定的人浏览。至于这背后的原理，除了瑟希斯的赐福之外，和树庭多年来传承的技术也有关系。具体原理太过复杂，我就不跟你赘述了。

By employing certain methods, we can authorize a specific individual to browse our teleslate. As for the underlying principles, apart from Cerces' blessing, it's also to do with the techniques passed down by the Grove for many years. The exact details are really complex, so I won't bother you with them.
至于我，我啊，就是把这些高深莫测的知识整理成大家能看懂的东西，然后再反哺树庭的开支。说白了，就是把知识变成钱，再把钱变成更多知识。

As for me, well, I organize this profound knowledge into something that everyone can understand, then support the Grove's expenses with the money. In simpler terms, it's turning knowledge into money, and that money into even more knowledge.
哎，我们小时候关系很好，长大了就不行了。她和我虽然同样是树庭的一份子，但观念上…只能说分歧很大。
*sigh* We were very close as kids, but not after we grew up. We may both be from the Grove, but in terms of perspective... I can only say that we don't see eye to eye.
真正的悬锋战士就该痛饮鲜血！…不过像我这样的人没什么机会踏上战场，只能用蜜酿来替代了。
True Kremnos warriors should slake their thirst in blood! ...But for someone like me who'd never get a chance to step foot on the battlefield, I'll have to make do with this honey brew.
法吉娜的生性并不残暴。作为替代，它向尼卡多利献上与鲜血颜色相近的石榴汁，借由信徒之手发放给了每一个悬锋城人…嗝，确实好喝。仔细想想，真正的鲜血应该又腥又咸吧……

Phagousa's nature isn't so brutal. In replacement, they gave Nikador pomegranate juice which looked a lot like blood, and had their disciples distribute them into the hands of everyone in Castrum Kremnos... *hic* This sure is tasty. When you think about it, actual blood probably tastes all fishy and salty, no...?
何况对悬锋战士来说，肚量也是战斗力的一部分——英雄不光要能打，还要能喝，不然怎么撑得过庆功宴！
And to a Kremnos Warrior, a belly's capacity is also part of battle ability — heroes must be good at both fighting and drinking! How else would we last through the victory banquet!
趣事？那就不得不提之前对奥赫玛的战争中，悬锋军遭遇断粮的事了。
Interesting stories? I must talk about the war on Okhema last time, when the Kremnoan army ran into a food shortage.
我虽然心里没底，但也不能打击士气，就抱着试试看的想法四处闲逛，没想到阴差阳错地溜到了奥赫玛的营帐附近——可能他们看我不像个战士吧。

I wasn't too confident, but I wasn't about to demoralize them. So I wandered around to see if I could think of anything. Who'd thought, I somehow ended up nearby the Okhema camp — I probably didn't look like a soldier to them.
至于可怜的奥赫玛人，他们的生产水平很高，几头角猪算不上什么损失——我还留了借条呢。
As for the poor Okhemans, they've got a rich production line. A few hornswines mean nothing to them. I even left an IOU.
但你别说，我还真上过战场。先前对奥赫玛发起的特别行动中，欧利庞王征发了所有的士兵…我也只能被迫跟着去了。
Though I have deployed before. In that special operation against Okhema, King Eurypon mobilized the entire army... I was forced to tag along.
至于表现…这么跟你说吧，悬锋城的士兵总共分为三种人：鲁莽者、勇敢者和犹豫者，而我是第四种——怯懦者。
As for how I did... I'll just break it down for you — there are three kinds of soldiers in Castrum Kremnos: The brash, the brave, and the balky. And I'm the fourth kind: The craven.
哎，你有所不知，外界总喜欢传些不着调的谣言，什么我能看到奥赫玛的过去啦，我的眼睛因为受泰坦的赐福而不堪重负啦。
Oh, you might not be aware, but there are all sorts of wild rumors out there. People say I can see into Okhema's past, or that my eyes bear the heavy gift of a Titan's blessing.
奥赫玛总是这么亮，不知道丹恒为什么能睡得那么好。
Okhema is always so bright, I can't understand how Dan Heng manages to sleep so soundly.
希望离开翁法罗斯之后，我也能记得在这里的时光。
I hope that I can still hold onto these memories even after I leave Amphoreus.
…我？奥赫玛的住民竟无知到这般地步，连「雅努斯之驹」的名号都未曾听过吗？哼哼，刻法勒号称全知全能，信奉者却如此孤陋寡闻，你真是不称职呐。

...Me? Are the citizens of Okhema so foolish that they've never even heard of Janus' Steed? Hmph, Kephale claims to be all-knowing and all-powerful, yet their followers sure don't know a thing. Incompetence!
自雅努斯为天地划定界限起，我们便侍奉在左右，打开通道，传达神谕。神驹身负使命，奔走在翁法罗斯的各处，难道你就从来没遇见过？

Ever since Janus carved the boundary between heaven and earth, we have been there serving, opening passages, and delivering prophesies. Have you never seen a divine foal cantering about Amphoreus on their missions?
雅努萨波利斯，不愧是翁法罗斯的中心。能来到这里，老夫的人生也算是圆满了呐。
Janusopolis... It's really what you'd expect from the heart of Amphoreus. Being able to make it here, I feel like my life has been worth something.
哈哈，年轻人你这么说也没错。雅努斯之城虽然崇高，但也是充满人间烟火的一座城市，比起奥赫玛或是哀地里亚来没有本质区别。只不过，对老夫来说……
Haha, you're not wrong, young one. Though the city of Janus is majestic, it is also a place where people live their normal daily lives, no different to Okhema or Aidonia. However, in my eyes...
翁法罗斯可没有哪条河叫做银河，冥河倒是有。怎么，你在冥河里游过？
Everyone in Amphoreus knows that one cannot traverse the sea of stars! The River of Souls is always available, though. Have you tried a dip?
神话里对刻法勒的赞誉，不过是由成功者书写的历史罢了。所谓全知全能，皆因奥赫玛是当今翁法罗斯最鼎盛的城邦。

They say that history is written by the winners, and that is precisely what has happened with the constant praise of Kephale in mythology. This so-called all-knowing and all-powerful nature comes from nothing more than the fact that Okhema is the most prospering city in Amphoreus.
我都想…整理好了，翁法罗斯正史第一章，万径之门开天辟地……
I want to... I've already prepared what I would write. Historical account of Amphoreus, chapter one: The Gate of Infinity splits the heavens and the earth...
退一万步说，即使悬锋人真的对雅努萨波利斯图谋不轨，只要我们以神谕统合众邦，悬锋城又有何惧？
Even if the Kremnoans did have a plot against Janusopolis, we need simply unite the nations through our prophecies. What is there to fear about Castrum Kremnos?
啊…没问题。要聊聊奥赫玛推理协会的故事吗？我的那几位朋友…他们都是很好的人。
Ah, sure. Would you like to hear about the Okhema Deduction Society? My friends... they are wonderful people.
他还是奥赫玛棍球协会的成员，据说打棍球的水平比「曳石学派」的很多人还要好…不过这个也有可能是他自吹自擂的结果。
He's also a member of the Okhema Stickball Society, rumored to play better than many from the Helkolithists, though that might be his own brag.
后来我们几个在浴场偶遇的同好就互相留了联系方式，成立了这个自封为「奥赫玛推理协会」的活动社。
Then, since we kept seeing each other at the baths, our group exchanged contacts and established what we now proudly call the "Okhema Deduction Society."
这工作听上去有点像所谓的「冒险者」，但其实不过每天在传信石版上跟进树庭发布的各种信息，推测黑潮的活动情况，从中规划一条相对安全的寻物路线……

While it might sound like the life of an "adventurer," it's mostly about checking on the teleslate information from the Grove, predicting the movements of the black tide, and mapping out a relatively safe route for retrieval missions...
一起去树庭的时候。
When we went to the Grove together.
的确，相伴旅行能让人发现朋友身上不为人知的一面。即使是相识已久的缇安老师，在这次树庭之行里，同样露出些隐蔽的性情。
Indeed, traveling together often reveals sides of a friend that were previously unseen. Even Trianne, whom I've known for so long, showed hidden sides of her personality on this trip to the Grove.
诶？问我对阁下的初印象吗？说来可笑，当时看到阁下与白厄站在一块儿，我还以为奥赫玛又迎来一位板正的救世主了呢。
Oh? What was my first impression of you? Funny story — when I first saw you standing with Phainon, I thought Okhema had welcomed yet another upright Deliverer.
…假如万事顺利，我们也许不会再见。感谢你们为翁法罗斯带来的一切。
If all goes well, we may not meet again. Thank you for everything you've brought to Amphoreus.
如今我身负神权，隐隐能感觉到…你们对翁法罗斯的未来重要非凡。
Now that I bear the divine within me, I can get the vague feeling that... that you have a great significance for the future of Amphoreus.
纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？

Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?
纷争之新神…万敌！
The new god of Strife... Mydei!
决然接下「天谴之矛」的火种，以不容置喙的王令终结悬锋王朝，又为族人带来荣耀的崭新未来……
He decided to accept the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury, ended the dynasty of Kremnos with an unquestionable royal decree, and brought his people a new future of glory...
如今孤身把守悬锋、将黑潮尽数拦截的迈德漠斯，在众人心目中，已然当得起翁法罗斯守护者一称。
Now remaining alone at Castrum Kremnos and holding back the entirety of the black tide, Mydeimos has undoubtedly earned the title of Guardian of Amphoreus in the hearts of the people.
愚钝的阿那克萨戈拉斯，树庭七贤人之一，从事渎神的「炼金术」研究，行事狂狷不羁、独爱口放厥词。
Anaxagoras the fool, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove, who engages in heretical alchemical research and acts with reckless arrogance, loving to spew nonsense with abandon.
看来，学习施展「百界门」对于小灰来说还是过于勉强了。不过不要难过，小灰很厉害！不需要「百界门」，也一定能成为翁法罗斯的大英雄！

It seems that learning to use the "Century Gate" is a bit too difficult for you now, Little Gray. But don't be disheartened. You are already amazing! We know that you will become a great hero of Amphoreus even without the power of the "Century Gate"!
在*我们*离开雅努萨波利斯后，这座城邦的黑暗愈发深重。继任的圣女遭受了较之*我们*更加严峻的控制…比如，现在生活在奥赫玛的「传谕梦母」。

After we left Janusopolis, the darkness that shrouded the city grew heavier. The Holy Maidens who succeeded us endured even stricter control — such as the current "Oracle Dreammother", who resides in Okhema.
遐蝶如今身在冥界，守候着翁法罗斯的生死流转。现在你之所见，只是复现而出的残像。
Castorice is now in the nether realm, guarding the cycle of life and death for Amphoreus. What you see now is simply a reflection, a lingering shadow of the past.
纷争世以来的漫长岁月，有无数世人、无数眷属、无数黄金裔与我、与奥赫玛、与泰坦们产生了命运的交织。不知你要问哪些人？

Over the many long years since the Era Bellica, there have been countless people, Titankins, and Chrysos Heirs who have formed bonds of destiny with myself, Okhema, and the Titans. Which ones are you referring to?
我会为吾师她们忧虑，曾对万敌心怀忌惮，也总替白厄未来将负的重担而不安。
I worry for my teacher and the others, I was once fearful of Mydei, and I am always uneasy about the weight of the burden that Phainon will carry in the future.
而属于白厄的命运，也已步步趋近…他将如烈阳一般冉冉升起，接下我的职责，为翁法罗斯的人们照亮前路。
As for Phainon's destiny, it too approaches step by step... He will rise like a blazing sun, take on my responsibilities, and light the way for the people of Amphoreus.
可不知从何时起，她突然变得与我们那般疏离，整日在奥赫玛之外漂泊羁旅，连与她面对面道声好都是那么奢侈。
But somewhere along the way, she became distant and spent all her days wandering beyond Okhema, and it became a rare luxury just to greet her face-to-face.
而在翁法罗斯坠入永夜之后…我在树庭重新建立起了昏光庭院。
After Amphoreus fell into eternal night... I rebuilt the Twilight Courtyard in the Grove.
最近我在奥赫玛到处转悠，寻找合适的角落，我想在奥赫玛重新建造一处昏光庭院。
Recently, I've been wandering around Okhema, looking for the perfect spot to rebuild the Twilight Courtyard.
翁法罗斯的医术是什么样的？
What is Amphorean healing like?
原来葫芦还能治病吗…要是树庭还保留着这类植物的种子就好了。
So gourds can even be used for healing? If only the Grove still had seeds from plants like that...
但是万敌却说我并非真正热爱战斗……
But Mydei says I don't truly love battle...
哈…我哪有那么高尚啊。比起我，如今独自在悬锋城的万敌，背负的职责才更沉重吧？
Ha... I'm not that noble. Compared to me, Mydei carries far heavier duties alone in Castrum Kremnos, don't you think?
我没有阿格莱雅的思虑与手腕，没有万敌的信念与心性，没有遐蝶的理智与审慎…而与缇宝老师她们比起来，我还少了一份乐观与执着。
I don't have Aglaea's foresight and strategy, Mydei's conviction and resilience, or Castorice's rationality and caution... I even lack Tribbie's optimism and determination.
可是，我却被伙伴们称作最完美的黄金裔，被奥赫玛的人民奉为救世主。
Yet, my companions call me the most perfect Chrysos Heir, and the people of Okhema revere me as the Deliverer.
关于盗火行者和你的过去……
About the Flame Reaver and your past...
其实还好啦！在见到盗火行者以前，我或许还会被那段阴影所紧缚，毕竟在童年的我看来，那道高大的黑色身影是那样残忍而不可战胜。
Honestly, it's not that bad! Before I encountered the Flame Reaver, I might have still been bound by that shadow. After all, as a child, I saw that tall, black figure as cruel and invincible.
没错。如今，盗火行者站在逐火之旅的对立面，它是奥赫玛的敌人，是所有对「再创世」抱有美好期待的人们的敌人。
Exactly. Now, the Flame Reaver stands in opposition to the Flame-Chase Journey. They are the enemy of Okhema and all who hold beautiful hopes for the Era Nova.
但请你相信我…我的私仇，在翁法罗斯的未来面前，根本微不足道。
But trust me... my grudge pales in comparison to Amphoreus's future.
万敌…真令人刮目相看。
Mydei... is truly impressive.
迈德漠斯，悬锋的新王，他曾一度在奥赫玛收获同伴和认可。但为了世界的明天，他选择离开，投身于永无止境的战争。
Mydeimos, the new king of Kremnos, once gained companions and recognition in Okhema. Yet, for the sake of the world's future, he chose to leave and devote himself to endless war.
袭击树庭的怪人…到底是何方神圣？
The strange entity who attacked the Grove... who could they be?
难道他是黑潮的化身？又或是某位泰坦的孑遗？若非万敌及时继承了「纷争」的神力，那牛皮藓似的家伙怕是要再追杀你们一阵。
Could it be an embodiment of the black tide? Or perhaps the remnant of some Titan? If not for Mydei inheriting the divinity of "Strife" in time, that persistent foe might have kept pursuing you.
首先，我先声明，我不是你理解的「坏人」。我只是树庭结业不久的学生，给元老院做事纯粹是为了丰厚薪酬，绝无任何政治立场。
For the record, I'm not who you think I am. I'm just a new graduate from the Grove, working for the Council of Elders purely for the generous pay. I have zero political stance.
你说你是刚从树庭结业的学生？
You mentioned you just graduated from the Grove?
所以我认清了现实，早早结业，领受父母之命出来找工作了。元老院的工作就是家父推荐来的——也因此，我躲过了树庭惨案。

So, I came to terms with reality, graduated early, and followed my parents' advice to start job hunting. My father recommended this position at Council of Elders — which, incidentally, helped me avoid the Grove tragedy.
哦，这个啊…也没什么可隐瞒的——我是靠奥赫玛之外的黑潮发财的。
Oh, that? It's no secret — I made my fortune outside Okhema, in the black tide.
在我看来，奥赫玛的管理者，无论是元老院、还是黄金裔，都不过徒有其名——每年税金浪费了不少，效率远不如我们这些商人。

To me, Okhema's administration — whether it's the Council of Elders or the Chrysos Heirs — is just an empty shell. Every year, so much tax money is wasted with little to show for it. The bureaucrats can't hold a candle to us merchants when it comes to efficiency.
奥赫玛想要进步，就需要更先进、更实际的社会架构与管理方式。我有心成为这个伟大变革的推动者，奈何我只是个「平民」。
If Okhema wants progress, it needs a better, more practical system of governance. I'd love to spearhead that change, but alas, I'm just a "civilian."
啧…等我改变奥赫玛的行政效率时，你就会知道的。
Tch... Well, you'll understand when I've streamlined Okhema's governance.
我的理想是独立于奥赫玛管理者之外，拆解官僚机构，削减多余监管法规和浪费的开支，让陈腐的管理者早点滚出黎明云崖。

My ambition is to create an administration independent of Okhema's rulers — one that dismantles the bureaucracy, slashes excessive regulations, and cuts wasteful spending. It's time to send those antiquated officials packing from Dawncloud.
啊，这位贵客，请留步——您不是奥赫玛土生土长的住民，对吧？
Ah, esteemed guest, please wait a moment — you're not a native of Okhema, are you?
…故乡覆灭时，我正在奥赫玛巡演，无家可归的我，自那以后就定居在了奥赫玛。现在想来，我生活于此的时光早已超过了故乡「米里奥斯」。
...When my homeland fell, I was touring Okhema. Left without a home, I've lived here ever since. Now, I've spent more years in Okhema than I ever did in Milios.
我的过去啊…要从何说起呢？正如你所知道的，我是米里奥斯人，不是奥赫玛人——不过我定居奥赫玛的起因，可能和大部分外地人不太一样。
My experiences, huh... Where should I begin? As you can see, I'm a native of Milios, not Okhema. But the reason I settled here might be quite different from most outsiders.
本人柯库翁，来自奥凯纳斯，一座以竞技体育闻名于翁法罗斯的古老城邦。
I am Glykon of Okeanas. It is an ancient Amphorean city-state known for competitive sports.
哈哈哈哈，你不会觉得我是在自吹自擂吧？可惜这奥赫玛还没有举办过同等级的大型体育竞技赛事，你不认识我，我不怪你。
Hahaha, you don't think I'm tooting my own horn, do you? It's a shame that Okhema has yet to host any large-scale sports competition on the same level, so I don't blame you for not knowing me.
是「奥凯纳斯运动会」——整个翁法罗斯最著名的运动会！天啊，真的需要我给你解释一遍吗？这翁法罗斯干脆毁灭算了。
The Okeanas Games — the most renowned sports event in the entire Amphoreus! Goodness, do I really need to explain it to you again? Amphoreus really is doomed.
我很怀念桂冠和掌声，圣城也得办奥赫玛运动会才行啊！
I miss the laurels and applause very much. The holy city needs its own Okhema Games!
有位树庭的哲学家想要伸手摘杏子，却被妻子责备，他说「我就是摘了，又*翁法罗斯粗口*会怎么样呢？」片刻之后，他死了。

There was a philosopher of the Grove who tried to pick some apricots but was scolded by his wife. He said, "So what if I picked them? What the *Amphoreus profanity* is going to happen?" Moments later, he died.
我，特阿诺，生前住在奥赫玛，在雅努萨波利斯度过了生命最后的三十年，美好地生，美丽地死。
I, Theano, lived in Okhema and spent my final 30 years in Janusopolis. I lived a good life and died a beautiful death.
这是留在神悟树庭附近的贤人墓——
This is engraved on a sage's tomb near the Grove of Epiphany —
是这样啊，你是刚到奥赫玛来的外邦遗民吧？这个时节，确实有很多人来寻求庇护。
I see... you must be a foreigner who's just arrived in Okhema, right? Many come seeking refuge.
对了，看你有些面生，打扮也不像是我们这儿的人。你是第一次来吧？这里是奥赫玛最神圣的地方。
By the way, you look unfamiliar, and your clothes don't seem like ours. This must be your first time here, yes? This is the holiest place in Okhema.
嗯…黑潮肆虐，所有人都在寻找一个容身之所，而奥赫玛，或许就是大家最后的希望了。
Hmm... The black tide ravages everything, and people are searching for shelter. Okhema, perhaps, is the last hope for all of us.
…这么多年过去了…欢笑，泪滴，奥赫玛的回忆……
...So many years have passed... Laughter and tears are all part of Okhema's memories.
奥赫玛最近怎么样？
How are things in Okhema lately?
我平日里都在侍奉刻法勒，很少到外面去，因此对奥赫玛其他地方的情况，我了解的不多。
I spend most of my days serving Kephale and rarely venture outside, so I know little about the rest of Okhema.
不过，黑潮无休止地蔓延，最近每天都有新的流民过来。他们在祈祷的时候声音都在抖，我猜想，奥赫玛的整体情况恐怕也不乐观。
However, the black tide spreads ceaselessly, and every day brings new refugees. When they pray, even their voices tremble. I'm afraid the overall situation in Okhema is far from hopeful.
的确，但并非奥赫玛的贵族——奥德里西安的「门瑟」世家，以律法的名义，向你致意。
Indeed, but not of Okhema. In the name of the law, House Mentes of Odressian greets you.
彼时黑潮压境，家族直系恐怕只剩我一人了。举城迁来奥赫玛时，我护住一人，又被黄金裔阁下所救，那时我才理解，何为「贵族的荣耀」。

With the black tide at our doorsteps, I'm afraid I am the only surviving heir of my family. It was during the great migration to Okhema, when I sheltered another and was in turn rescued by the Chrysos Heir, that I finally understood the meaning of a noble's honor.
这便是贵族的规则。但说白了，因人而异罢了。即使是奥赫玛，也有着严重缺乏身为贵族自知的元老。他们也该被丢到黑潮里洗一洗，说不定就好了。

These are the rules of nobility. But in reality, it all depends on the individual. Even in Okhema, there are elders who sorely lack the self-awareness befitting a noble. Perhaps a thorough rinse in the black tide would do them good.
你在奥赫玛这里是做什么的？
What are you doing in Okhema?
履行贵族义务，参与议会的讨论，为城邦与民众谋求长存，我为此职责深感自豪。可惜，我的一票与民众的一票相当，奥赫玛还是太过保守了。

Performing my noble duties, participating in council discussions, and seeking long-term solutions for the survival of the city-state and its people. I take great pride in this responsibility, but alas, my vote is equal to any other. Okhema remains overly conservative.
起初，他们说{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}会庇佑卡弥特斯不陷落于黑潮。然后，他们说奥赫玛会永远不受黑夜侵袭……
At first, they claimed {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} would protect Carmitis from the black tide. Then, they promised Okhema would never be touched by the dark night...
…嗯，这都是借口。云石天宫承载着奥赫玛人的热情与回忆，它可能会打烊，但却从未冷清过。我眷恋这片水流，所以我会留在这。这…是我的固执。

Well, I'm just making excuses. The Marmoreal Palace carries the passion and memories of the Okhemans. It may close temporarily, but it has never been desolate. I'm attached to these waters, so I'll stay here. Call it... stubborn, I don't know.
嗯…我在树庭研习多年，又把大半辈子花在了研究上。仰赖瑟希斯赋予的理性，在我看来，那刻夏的论证并无纰漏。
Hmm... I studied at the Grove for many years and spent most of my life doing research. By the wisdom bestowed by Cerces, I see no flaws in Anaxa's reasoning.
我的家人在黑潮中不幸身亡，我逃来奥赫玛投靠亲戚时，马尔库斯就在我们附近的街上晃悠。
My family died in the black tide, and when I fled to Okhema to stay with relatives, Marcus was always hanging around the street nearby.
相信我，朋友，这地方可是整个奧赫玛最好的席位——无论是见证神明的谢幕，还是观看凡人的演出。
Trust me, my friend, this spot offers the best view in all of Okhema — whether witnessing a deity's final act or observing mortal theatrics.
奥赫玛是我们最后要守护、也最终会庇护我们的家园，一定是的。
Okhema is the last home we'll protect... and will ultimately shelter us. It must be.
想到了翁法罗斯可能根本没有未来？那的确非常可怕…不过，我们也可以试着把它变成生存的动力。
Frightened by the possibility that Amphoreus has no future? It is terrifying... but perhaps we can transform that fear into a will to survive.
翁法罗斯人的灵魂是不灭的吗？很可能。
Are the souls of Amphoreans immortal? Quite possibly.
不过，多亏了阁下的援手，现在安全区的范围有所扩大，我们也能得到更多喘息的空间。翁法罗斯迎来新生前，一切还是不能大意。
However, thanks to your help, the safe zones have expanded somewhat, giving us more breathing room. Still, we mustn't lower our guard until Amphoreus is reborn.
万敌他……
And Mydei...
不死的迈德漠斯牺牲了——目睹了那一幕的圣城卫士已为我送来了悲报。
The undying Mydeimos has fallen — Holy City Guards who witnessed his end have delivered this tragic news to me.
阁下，收起你的哀容吧——迈德漠斯必不愿见此。
Please, cast aside your grief — Mydeimos would not want you to grieve.
但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!
如今，末日的舞台被搬到奥赫玛…若我还有时间，我该如何为后人传递文明的信号？
And now, Okhema has become the stage of the apocalypse... If I still have time, how should I leave a message for those who come after us?
正如我们初见时我所说，我无比期盼翁法罗斯的明天……
As I told you when we first met, I long for Amphoreus's tomorrow...
但，连永不熄灭的黎明机器都撑不住了，我看这就是翁法罗斯的终点了……
But even the ever-burning Dawn Device can't hold up anymore. I think this is the end of Amphoreus...
嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在褔坛的金池中央，希望逃遁进另一个世界呢。

Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings, hoping to escape into another world.
贵客早已知晓黑潮对翁法罗斯大地的摧残，无论人还是奇兽，都无法从它的影响下幸存——唯有一物例外。

The esteemed guest is already aware of the devastation the black tide has wrought upon the land of Amphoreus. Neither humans nor strange beasts can survive its influence, only one thing is an exception.
这，便是从无到有的第一步。若能探明织者之秘背后的原理，终有一天，翁法罗斯的人民将不再畏惧天灾。
This is the first step from nothing to something. If we can uncover the secrets behind the weavers' mystery, one day, the people of Amphoreus will no longer fear natural disasters.
行吧，听你的。臭小子，那会儿连个锄头都举不起来，一转眼就要去悬锋城学剑了……
Alright, have it your way. Kid, not long ago you couldn't even lift a hoe, and now you're off to Castrum Kremnos to train with a sword...
哀丽秘榭要是没了这片麦田…都不知道要怎么数季节呢。
If Aedes Elysiae ever loses this wheat field... I don't even know how we'd keep track of the seasons.
你之前说…是要去悬锋城，对吧？不知道那里离咱们的哀丽秘榭有多远？
You said... you're going to Castrum Kremnos, right? I wonder how far that is from our Aedes Elysiae?
哈哈，我也不知道。听说悬锋城像大地兽一样，会慢慢到处走动呢。
Haha, no clue. I heard that Castrum Kremnos roams around slowly, just like a dromas.
别担心，老妈，等学成我就回来了。而且，悬锋城搞不好走着走着，哪天还能路过咱们这儿呢。
Don't worry, mom. Once I finish my studies, I'll come straight home. Who knows? Maybe one day that city will wander right past our village.
呵呵，那妈可要时不时到谷堆上看看，有没有像山一样的大地兽来哀丽秘榭附近了。
Then I'll have to keep watch from the haystack. Just to see if a mountain-sized dromas is headed for Aedes Elysiae.
白厄，你曾说打算离开哀丽秘榭，去外面的广阔天地远行，准备做得怎么样了？
Phainon, you once said you wanted to leave Aedes Elysiae and explore the wider world. How's that going?
至于你拜托我收集的关于树庭的信息，现在倒是有些眉目了。
As for the info of the Grove you asked me to look into, I've managed to dig up a few leads.
呵呵，有志气当然是好事。不过…我还听说，神悟树庭崇尚辩论与独立思考，学术风气极为自由，各种惊世骇俗的理论层出不穷。

Hehe, that's the spirit. But... I've also heard the Grove of Epiphany places great value on open debate and independent thinking. The academic scene is extremely free — so much so that bizarre and radical theories pop up all the time.
好想赶快长大啊…呜，哀丽秘榭的日子，为什么就不能过得更快些呢？
How I wish I could grow up faster... Why do the days in Aedes Elysiae have to go by so sloooow...
哀丽秘榭的环境似乎受某种特殊力量影响，将我从你的记忆中塑型，称其为魔法也不为过。
Aedes Elysiae is influenced by a unique power that molds me from your memories — magic, one might say.
去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.
去找寻妖精竖琴的地址吧，在迷路迷境深处应该会有发现。
Go search for the fairy harp. You should find something in the depths of the Membrance Maze.
也许是因为哀丽秘榭没有夜晚吧？在这里，一切都是最美好的模样，比如阳光下的麦田，波光粼粼的水面……
Maybe it's because there's no nighttime in Aedes Elysiae? Everything here stays in its most beautiful state — golden wheat fields under the sunshine, water surfaces sparkling with light...
没关系，哀丽秘榭到处都是盛开的鲜花。下次人家会在{NICKNAME}心情更好的时候出现。
It's okay. Aedes Elysiae is full of blooming flowers. I'll come back when you're in a better mood.
也不怕你笑话，我的家族是一支孱弱的冬之民，早在黄金战争初期，所居的天空堡垒便被悬锋城击落，因而不得不在大地上流徙。

Not that I'm afraid of a little playful teasing. My family hails from a frail branch of the Winterfolk. Back in the early days of the Chrysos War, the sky bastion we lived in was struck down by Castrum Kremnos, forcing us into exile on the earth below.
就连我的爵位，也是亲手挣得的。用武器指着君王要求赐爵，除了我之外，全翁法罗斯也找不出第二个了吧？
Even my title, I earned it with my own hands. Pointing a weapon at the monarch to demand a title, there's likely no second soul in all of Amphoreus who's done the same, is there?
到那时…先让这翁法罗斯刮上几年暴风雪如何？
When that time comes... Mayhaps I'll let Amphoreus experience a few years of snowstorm? How does that sound?
过去…这该从哪里说起好呢…要是从头说起的话，我记得自己是出生在悬锋外城的一个无名部族……
Where to begin... If I start from the very beginning, I remember being born into an unknown tribe in the outskirts of Castrum Kremnos...
啊，抱、抱歉，你一定不会想听这些琐事，还是从我被逐出悬锋城说起吧。
Ah, s—sorry, you probably don't want to hear such trivial things. Let me start from when I was expelled from Castrum Kremnos.
「她如风暴般席卷历史，以烈焰与智谋重塑了翁法罗斯的格局与命运……」
"She swept through history like a storm, reshaping the fate and fabric of Amphoreus with flame and cunning..."
我曾是布利萨的王储，我们的城邦信仰艾格勒。泰坦战争的时候，艾格勒和尼卡多利打仗，我们也不得不和悬锋城较上劲。

I was once the crown prince of Bulsa, and my city-state was loyal to Aquila. During the Titan War, as Aquila and Nikador came to blows, we found ourselves with little choice but to face Castrum Kremnos.
凯撒大人治好我的伤，并叫我率军，用计多次战胜了那不可一世的悬锋军。
The Great Imperator mended my wounds and instructed me to lead the army. Through tactics and strategies, the Imperator laid low the formidable forces of Kremnos many times.
我年少时便加入了树庭，沉浸于学业之中，眼中只有那遮蔽天穹的葱郁树冠。
In my youth, I joined the Grove, immersed in studies beneath its all-shrouding sky dome.
但在两尊泰坦的庇佑下，树庭的大部分贤人都闭目塞听，在名为知识的枷锁中自我陶醉……
Yet under the Titans' protection, most Sages of the Grove remained willfully blind, shackled by self-indulgent "knowledge"...
规劝无果后，我离开了树庭，成为统络诸军的参谋，替凯撒效力、为此世分忧。
When persuasion failed, I left the Grove. As Imperator's advisor, I marshaled armies to shoulder this world's burdens.
将来么…做好我的本职工作，等待翁法罗斯迎来新生，仅此而已。
The future? I'll do my duty, awaiting Amphoreus's rebirth. Nothing more.
凯撒大人所说的星海，我并无兴趣。我在意的，唯有翁法罗斯的命运罢了。
The sea of stars fascinated the Imperator, but holds no allure for me. My sole concern is Amphoreus's fate.
等到他们昂首阔步地驶向星海…或许我会回到树庭，做回一个沉浸学术、偶尔健健身的普通贤人吧。
Perhaps when they sail triumphantly toward the cosmos... I'll return to the Grove, a common sage lost in books... and occasional exercise.
答，错了——这又不是悬，悬锋城，没人有那么，狂，狂野的品味！
W—Wrong. They are not Kremnoans, they don't have such... barbaric tastes!
本狮让他细说，他说在奥赫玛那时，醉后建了个辩论场，想和公民们探讨凯撒大人的伟大之处，发了很多长篇大论。

I prompted him for more details, and he talked about how he had set up a Forum in Okhema when he was drunk. He wanted to discuss the eminence of the Great Imperator with the citizens, and posted many long essays.
据神话所述，在那遥远的黄金世，乃至是灾厄三泰坦降世之前——翁法罗斯也曾纷争遍布，只见那汪洋化作血海，浅滩遍布硝烟吼——

According to legends, in the distant Era Chrysea, before the Three Titans of Calamity descended, war was once rife in Amphoreus, oceans were dyed by blood, and the shores were shrouded by ashes from gunfire.
仿佛是预感到未来的你仍会回到哀丽秘榭，在启程前，昔涟在桌上悄悄地留了一封信笺——
As if she sensed you'd one day return again, she quietly left behind a letter on the table, just before you left.
「而哀丽秘榭，就是你下一段旅程的起点。等准备好了，再从这里出发吧。」
"Aedes Elysiae is where your next journey begins. When you're ready, set out from here."
远远眺望餐馆的招牌，听着热火朝天的喧闹，看着原本漫无目的的妖精们找到了热衷之事…就像迷路迷境从悠长的熟睡中醒转过来了哪。

I can see the restaurant's plaque from a distance, hear the cheerful noise, and watch fairies who used to drift about aimlessly now find their passion... It's as if the Membrance Maze has finally awakened from a long slumber.
将菜肴的香气封存进谷物之中，这天才般的想法，是迷路迷境何等的恩赐迷！
Locking a dish's aroma inside grains, what a genius idea! Truly a gift from the Membrance Maze, mem!
想象一下，以{RUBY_B#刻法勒的食材}奥赫玛麦{RUBY_E#}作为基底做粥，加入十一位泰坦的对应食材，那道菜该有多么出色啊！

Just imagine, using {RUBY_B#Kephalean ingredients}Okheman oats{RUBY_E#} as a base for porridge, then adding in corresponding ingredients for each of the eleven other Titans — how amazing that would taste!
诺杜斯先生…您说得对。能听到这些争论，或许是我们来到奥赫玛后最大的收获。
Mr. Noldus... You're right. Hearing such discourse is perhaps the greatest boon I've received since we came to Okhema.
没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...
真的假的？我家乡的城邦，满打满算也只有一千年的历史…奥赫玛的历史原来这么悠久啊。
Really? With all things considered, the city back in my hometown has only roughly a thousand years of history... Okhema has such a long-standing history.
「在光历的第三个一百年中，人们在刻法勒脚下建立起聚落，由此诞生了奥赫玛的前身。」
"In the third century of the Light Calendar, people built settlements at the feet of Kephale. Thus was the precursor of Okhema founded."
别多想了，我们好歹在奥赫玛，但愿刻法勒能一直保佑我们……
There's no need to stress yourself out. After all, we're in Okhema. May Kephale protect us...
别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!
你理解我？你一个小孩子家家能理解什么！我就不明白了，偌大一个奥赫玛竟然只有你一个司仪，这合理吗！
You understand how I'm feeling? What could a child possibly understand!? I don't get it. How can there be only one ceremonial officiant in a huge place like Okhema? It's just ridiculous!
因为想成为司仪的话，需要去树庭进修，并通过「敬拜学派」的特殊考核……
That is because in order to become a ceremonial officiant, you have to train in the Grove and pass a special examination put in place by the Venerationists...
不可能，我就是黄金裔！况且，自我决心踏上这条道路，我便无所畏惧，就像神话中真正的英雄一样。我一定会拯救奥赫玛的诸位……
No way. I am a Chrysos Heir! Plus, I have decided to take this path for myself. So, I have no fear! Just like those heroes in the myths! I will save everyone in Okhema...
你可闭嘴吧，众所周知，黎明机器将永远照亮奥赫玛！
Oh, do shut up. As far as we all know, the Dawn Device will forever illuminate Okhema!
奥赫玛的剧作家们会在这个节日上展示他们的新作品，而观众会评选最佳剧本和表演者。
The playwrights of Okhema will showcase their new works during this program, and the audience will decide the best script and performers.
这不就是「机械降神」吗？我对奥赫玛的观众水平表示怀疑。
Wait, isn't this a literal "deus ex machina"? This makes me skeptical about the tastes of Okhemans.
没想到在奥赫玛也能享受到这样的手艺…
Who knew I'd be able to enjoy such a soothing massage in Okhema...
但是不行！我的梦想从「成为树庭七贤人」，不断降级成了「成为教授」、「成为助教」、「成为学者」…现在已是「顺利毕业」了。

But that won't do! My dream has been constantly compromised from "becoming one of the Seven Sages of the Grove" to "becoming a professor," then "becoming a teaching assistant," then "becoming a scholar"... and now it's just "graduating successfully."
你为什么要回到神悟树庭？
Why did you go back to the Grove of Epiphany?
准确地说，我的毕业论文就在神悟树庭的水里。
To be precise, my thesis is in the waters of the Grove of Epiphany.
我既然不顾死活地回到了神悟树庭，我的精神状态肯定也异于常人！
If I'm crazy enough to come back to the Grove of Epiphany despite the risks, my mental state must fall outside what's considered normal!
不过！我不会开口的。我改变不了神悟树庭的现状，我改变不了翁法罗斯…我能改变的，只有我自己，让自己不要轻易依赖别人——
But I won't say a word! I can't change the state of the Grove of Epiphany and I can't change Amphoreus... What I can change is only myself, to stop relying on others so easily...
嗷呜…多亏丹恒大人将神悟树庭固定住，如今我们也重新有了立足之地。但仅仅有立足之地是不够的，我想出发，做点什么，就像荒笛大人那样……

Awoo... Thanks to Lord Dan Heng for stabilizing the Grove of Epiphany, we finally have a place to live again. But just having a foothold isn't enough. I want to set out and do something, just like Lord Terravox...
嗷呜～我还会在树庭待一段时间，如果你也有些迷茫，不如和我一起停下来。我记得不少荒笛大人的故事，我可以讲给你听～

Awoo~ I'll be staying in the Grove for a while. If you're feeling a bit lost too, why not take a breather here with me? I remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, and I'd love to share them with you~
嗷呜嗷呜～在出发之前，我暂时打算在树庭停留一段时间。我还记得不少荒笛大人的故事，你如果想听的话……
Awoo awoo~ Before setting off, I plan to stay at the Grove for a while. I still remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, if you'd like to hear them...
「翁法罗斯的所有故事，通常都可以看作是『掉入洞穴』之中，而那些故事的结尾要么是『逃离洞穴』，或是『死在洞穴』之中……」
"All Amphorean stories can typically be seen as 'falling into caves,' ending with either 'escaping from the cave' or 'dying in the cave'..."
…我会和留在树庭的同伴们好好聊聊，我们将去往何方。
...I'll have a good talk with my companions who stayed in the Grove about where we should go next.
无论「毁灭」如何影响整座树庭，它始终是「理性」火种的一道保险。
No matter how the Destruction affects the entire Grove, the Grove remains an insurance for the Coreflame of Reason.
你在星穹列车的窗外看到过相似的「8」，当忆者拨开迷雾，翁法罗斯以一道首尾循环的光带呈现在所有人视线里。故事以此为起点，终点又将通往何方呢？

You've seen a similar "8" outside the window of the Astral Express. When the Memokeeper parted the mist, Amphoreus revealed itself to everyone's eyes as a band of light that loops back on itself. As the story begins here, where will its end lead us?
向您问好，救世的英雄。感谢诸位为翁法罗斯重新谱写出希望的乐章，可惜此刻身侧并无水漫琴，否则正好能为利波小先生伴奏一曲。

Greetings, heroes of deliverance. Thank you all for composing a new symphony of hope for Amphoreus. It's a pity I don't have a water lyre with me right now, or I could have accompanied little Master Lipos with a tune.
就照着这个做，我们能改变翁法罗斯航空界，价钱好商量！
Just follow this plan, and we can revolutionize the Amphorean aviation industry! Price negotiable!
咳，简单来说，就是开一家主题餐厅，另外再定期搞点活动什么的宣传宣传。目前考虑的风格有：奥赫玛、悬锋城、雅努萨波利斯、斯缇科西亚、神悟树庭……

*ahem* Long story short, I'm thinking of opening a themed restaurant and promoting it with some regular events. The styles we're considering include Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, Janusopolis, Styxia, Grove of Epiphany...
神悟树庭主题能好吃吗？
How can the Grove of Epiphany theme be tasty?
哪儿那么简单！你们又不是不知道，就她俩那闯祸的能力，当初在树庭求学的时候可没少挨通报……
If only it were that simple! You know those two all too well. With their talent for causing trouble, they got called out plenty of times back at the Grove during their studies...
嗯，听说克瑞斯开了家主题餐厅，能同时吃到奥赫玛和悬锋城的特色菜……
Hmm, I heard Kyros opened a themed restaurant where you can try specialties from both Okhema and Castrum Kremnos...
我从旁人那听说了些悬锋城外的美食，可真是琳琅满目，馋得我口水都快流出来了。
I've heard about all the amazing food outside Castrum Kremnos from others. There's such a mouthwatering variety. I'm practically drooling just thinking about it!
这…爸爸妈妈从小就这样说：悬锋的孩子是与利刃一同降生的，注定要手执利刃，也注定要死在利刃之下。
This... My parents always said: Children of Kremnos are born with honed blades, destined to wield the blade, and die by it.
来，都可以来…嚯！这不是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄吗？真是百闻不如一见。
Sure, everyone's welcome... Wait, aren't you the great hero who saved Amphoreus! The stories don't do you justice at all!
好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我来介绍一下：这两位是费贝尔老爹的女儿；这是德墨忒尔婶婶家的波瑟芬妮；还有这位，来自悬锋城的天谴猎手小姐。

It's been a while, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to make introductions. These lovely ladies are Old Fabio's daughters. This is Possephone from Aunt Demetria's family. And this distinguished warrior is the Furiae Archer from Castrum Kremnos.
感谢你所做的一切，翁法罗斯的大英雄，向你致敬。
Thank you, great hero of Amphoreus, for everything you've done.
啊，是你！又见面了——几位，这是{NICKNAME}，在树庭遭难后帮我调查的那位好心人，也是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄！
Ah, it's you! We meet again. Everyone, this is {NICKNAME}, the kind soul who helped me investigate after the disaster at the Grove, and the great hero who saved Amphoreus!
这是有区别的，你要是不信，我这里还有树庭买到的「大地兽语翻译器」，我们问问！
There's definitely a difference! If you don't believe me, I've got this "dromas translator" I bought from the Grove. Let's ask!
黑黄配比七三，门扉时和离愁时各一次，另寻悬锋土。同意？
Mix black and yellow at a ratio of 7:3. Use it once during the Entry Hour and once during the Parting Hour. Then find some Kremnos soil. Agreed?
我还记得你第一次浑身是伤地出现在奥赫玛门口的时候，背上还背了两个伤员，当时可把我们吓坏了。
I still remember when you showed up at Okhema's gate for the first time, all banged up with two injured people on your back. Scared the life out of us back then.
也没什么不妥吧？奥赫玛城就是在几百光历年里无数次修缮翻新，才维持至今的。
What's wrong with that? Okhema has only survived to this day through countless renovations and repairs over hundreds of Light Calendar years.
哟！来，跟我一起！健身！锻体！赞美悬锋军！
Yo! Come on, work out with me! Let's get fit! All hail the Kremnos Army!
我知道，每只妖精对未知都有一探究竟的好奇心，但无论如何，不许踏入那片幽邃的森林，是迷路迷境永恒的禁令哪！
I know every fairy has a burning curiosity about the unknown, but entering that deep Forest is strictly forbidden. It's a permanent ban in Membrance Maze!
呜嗡！（上次我把一个树庭学生的作业石板吃掉了！）
Grumph! (Last time I ate a Grove student's homework slate!)
呜嗡。（偷偷告诉{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我之前偷溜去悬锋城，交到了一个朋友——它叫黄金狮首。）
Grumph. (Psst, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I'll tell you a secret. I sneaked out to Castrum Kremnos earlier and made a new friend! It's called Chryseus Leo.)
你赢了。许多年以后，人们还记得翁法罗斯的第33550338次永劫回归，和一群酝酿出了「毁灭」欲的小海豹。
You win. Years later, people will still remember the 33,550,338th Eternal Recurrence of Amphoreus, and those baby seals who birthed the desire for "Destruction."
o((•'ω´• )っ「有的嗷有的嗷！沉甸甸的金海豹杯，离开翁法罗斯的时候，不要忘了把它带上。」)∋
o((•'ω´• )っ "Yes, yes, of course! Don't forget to take this coveted Gold Seal Cup with you when you leave Amphoreus!" )∋
跟我说说，你信不过哪个泰坦？还是说你瞧不起拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄？
Now, which Titan's power do you doubt? Or perhaps you question the integrity of the great hero who saved Amphoreus?
相声社翁法罗斯分社？
Is this a duo comedy act, Amphoreus chapter?
还没和你正式地说一声「好久不见」，万敌。
Haven't had the chance to properly say "long time no see," Mydei.
瞧，我还带了老妈做的蜂蜜烙饼和葡萄馅饼，滋味不输给悬锋城的羊奶石榴汁。
Look, I even brought honey suncakes and grape pies made by my mom. They're just as tasty as the pomegranate goat milk from Castrum Kremnos.
下回也带我去拜访拜访悬锋的先王和王后，让他们品尝一下哀丽秘榭的特产吧。
Next time, why not take me to visit the former King and Queen of Kremnos and let them have a taste of Aedes Elysiae's specialties?
记得有人童年还想去悬锋学武？
Didn't someone want to practice martial arts in Kremnos when he was a kid?
嗯，万敌，抱歉，我想正式和你说一声……
Um, Mydei, sorry, I want to formally tell you something...
好搭档，如果去万敌的图书馆，你最想看什么类型的藏书？
Hey partner, if you could visit Mydei's library, what kind of books would you most want to check out?
说不定还有一些失传的悬锋古语？悄悄多学几句，下次就知道怎么应对他了。
Maybe there are some lost Kremnos sayings? If I secretly learn a few more, I'd know how to deal with him next time.
如果是白厄，想必会在鉴宝手册那里流连忘返。顺便，我还需要送他一本《如何读懂悬锋城的空气》。
If it's Phainon, he'd probably get lost in the appraisal manual. By the way, I should also get him a copy of How to Read the Air in Castrum Kremnos.
当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—
迈德漠斯，加冕为王！
Mydeimos, become king!
看字迹，既不像阿格莱雅女士，也不像缇宝老师。唔，如果是蝶宝和万敌阁下的话，也不应该呀！他们和凯撒大人几乎从没正式见过面。
Judging by the handwriting, it's not Lady Aglaea or Lady Tribbie. Hmm, and it shouldn't be Cassie or Mydei! They've never formally met the Great Imperator.
希望你铭记的东西…呀，看你期盼的表情，是想要翁法罗斯纪念品，对吧？
Something to remember...? Oh, judging by your eager expression, you want an Amphoreus souvenir, right?
听说心有灵犀的人，哪怕各自旅行，也会走到同一个终点。也许这就是我们在哀丽秘榭重逢的原因吧。
They say kindred spirits, even when traveling different separately, will eventually arrive at the same destination. Perhaps that's why we reunited here in Aedes Elysiae.
翁法罗斯的故事虽然暂时封笔了，但你的故事还很漫长。如果在某一页你踟蹰不前，一定要记得向前看哦。
Though the story of Amphoreus has reached its final page for now, your own story still has many chapters ahead. If you ever find yourself stuck on a page, remember to keep looking forward.
我们曾在哀丽秘榭共度过一段恬静美好的时光。那时候我问过你，以后回想起来，会怎么想象当时的我？
We shared some peaceful, beautiful moments together at Aedes Elysiae. Back then, I asked you, when you look back on these times, how will you picture me?
接下来，我会基于你的记忆，将那段岁月唤回哀丽秘榭，作为最后的相片陪伴你。
Next, based on your memories, I will recall those days to Aedes Elysiae, as the final photograph to accompany you.
好宁静的麦田…哀丽秘榭的时光，再也不会被打扰啦。
Such a peaceful wheat field... The tranquil moments of Aedes Elysiae will never be disturbed again.
每次那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅站在一起，就意味着奥赫玛要被闹得天翻地覆，哪怕是现在，我也不敢精神放松啊……
Every time Professor Anaxa and Aglaea stand together, it means Okhema is about to be turned upside down. Even now, I can't let my guard down...
呵！既然如此，别忘了我们身边就有一位——{NICKNAME}，听说你正打算把翁法罗斯的故事带到天外……
Hah! Speaking of which, we have someone right here. {NICKNAME}, I heard you're planning to take the story of Amphoreus beyond the sky...
无疑，奥赫玛的领袖需要能够纵览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
Without doubt, the leader of Okhema must command golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.
奥赫玛可少不了你。
Okhema can't do without you.
万敌阁下，你…怎么也来了？
Lord Mydei, what... what brings you here?
是的，但我还不知道，万敌阁下居然也要参加。难道说，你也准备好了手工制品？
Yes, but I had no idea that Lord Mydei would be participating too. Don't tell me you've also prepared some handicrafts?
厨、厨神争霸赛？这里不是翁法罗斯第一届手工制品交流会现场吗？
A—A Culinary Showdown? Isn't this supposed to be the 1st Amphoreus Handicraft Convention?
但现在，我已不再身负「死亡」，这双手恐怕也无法赢过万敌阁下了。
But now, I no longer bear the authority of Death. These hands of mine probably can't defeat Lord Mydei anymore.
那万敌带来的食材？
What about the ingredients Mydei brought?
太好了，就要万师傅炒。
Perfect, let's have Master Mydei do the cooking.
万敌阁下…真的有那么夸张吗？
Lord Mydei... is it really going to be that dramatic?
哈哈，悬锋城流传过一句古语：猫要么在睡觉，要么在捣乱。我猜，阿格莱雅会更先按捺不住，要给她找点营生干一干了。
Haha, there's an old saying in Castrum Kremnos: cats are either sleeping or causing trouble. I bet Aglaea will be the first to get restless and find the cat something to do.
当你在那遥远的星间，踱行于自己的道路上时，若偶感沮丧，便向翁法罗斯的方向举杯吧。随时随刻——
When you're wandering among those distant stars, treading your own path, should you ever feel down, raise a glass toward Amphoreus. Anytime—
迈德漠斯，黄金厨神之王！
Mydeimos, the Chrysos God-King of Chefs!
翁法罗斯的万物生灵现如今都有了自己的归宿，我也终于能够放下重担，安心地享受美食时刻了。
All living beings in Amphoreus have found their place now, and I can finally put down my burdens and enjoy my meal in peace.
翁法罗斯的持明卵？
An Amphorean Vidyadhara egg?
倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?
来自圣城奥赫玛的。
The ones from the holy city Okhema.
（《粉霞天女历险记》？难道…我还在翁法罗斯？）
(Adventures of the Rosy Celestial Maiden? Could it be... am I still in Amphoreus?)
这块石板只是个模型，里面没写一个字。不过，咱照着翁法罗斯的风格印了个封面，看着是不是有模有样？
This tablet's just a prop. There's not a single word written inside. But hey, I copied the Amphorean style for the cover. Looks pretty legit, don't you think?
现在想想，还是有点遗憾，要是能从翁法罗斯多带点纪念品出来就好了。
Come to think of it, it's kind of a bummer. I wish I could've grabbed more souvenirs from Amphoreus.
翁法罗斯的七月名为自由月。它既是属于刻法勒的月份，亦是每名囚徒心底最渴望、却无法触及的东西。
July in Amphoreus is called the Month of Freedom. It belongs to Kephale and represents what every prisoner yearns for deep in their hearts, yet can never grasp.
除去都是参赛选手外，这两个受害人还有一个共同的特征——他们都是看了罗浮杂俎上的流言，跑到绥园附近瞎逛的傻瓜。

Besides the fact that they were participants, they also had a similar characteristic — they're both fools who went to Fyxestroll Garden to poke around after reading the messages on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove.
您是…悬锋城最德高望重的大学者！
You are... the most prestigious scholar in Castrum Kremnos!
我愿为你拭去心中的迷雾——请重拾你的神格，回归往昔的荣耀；从此黑潮便不再可畏，明日将照耀翁法罗斯的大地。

I am willing to disperse the fog in your heart. Please reclaim your divinity and return to the path of glory. The black tide will not be feared henceforth, and tomorrow will shine upon the great land of Amphoreus.
勇者不与弱者共舞，悬锋之伟大由鲜血浇灌。
The valiant does not consort with the weak. The majesty of Kremnos is nurtured by fresh blood.
喂喂，前面那些穿着铠甲的…是奥赫玛的援兵吧！喂——我们在这里啊！！！
Hey look, those armored figures up ahead... They're Okheman reinforcements, aren't they! Heyyyy! We're over here!!!
等下…那是…新型号的悬锋战士？！
Wait... They're... the new Kremnos Warrior models!?
呀，灰宝，你来了！快看，这些小家伙好可爱，也很有精神，要是能带回庭院就好啦。
Hey, Grayie, you're here! Look, these little ones are so cute and energetic. Only if I can bring them back to the Grove.
差点忘了，灰宝没有在树庭学习过，缺少这方面的知识……
I almost forgot, you never studied at the Grove, Grayie, hence you lack knowledge in this area...
先说清楚，我可是黄金裔的贵客，奥赫玛是我的地盘，都放尊重点！
First things first, I am an esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, and Okhema is my turf, so pay your respects!
并且，小奇美拉也很能干。最近奥赫玛不是遭到了袭击嘛，到处都乱糟糟的。多亏了这些小家伙帮大家工作，这才解决了人手不足的问题。该好好感谢它们才是呢。

And little chimeras are very capable. Okhema was under attack recently, so it's a mess everywhere. It's all thanks to these little ones that we managed to solve the labor issue. We should be grateful to them.
生命花园是奥赫玛重要的学术场所，当然不允许有人在这胡闹。快过去吧！
The Garden of Life is a key academic venue of Okhema. No nonsense is allowed here. Get over there quickly!
…不对，我见过你，想想…哟，这不是伟大的黄金裔嘛？对，你们是奥赫玛的领导者，高所有人一等，当然有资格教我做事。

...Hang on, I've seen you before. Wait... Oh, if it isn't a great Chrysos Heir? Ah yes, leaders of Okhema, and an echelon higher than the rest — of course you are qualified to tell me how to do my job.
妙！太妙了！不愧是黄金裔，奥赫玛的大英雄！
Wonderful! Simply wonderful! That's a Chrysos Heir for you, Okhema's great heroes!
想扮英雄，又不愿意花钱？奥赫玛哪有这么好的事。
You want to play hero and not pay a dime? There's never a free lunch in Okhema.
这、这…我要去向花园投诉。你们滥用权势，欺压奥赫玛的公民！
Th—This... I'm lodging a complaint to the Garden. You're abusing your authority and oppressing the citizens of Okhema!
你来奥赫玛的时间不久，我就先做个说明吧。这些奇美拉受生命花园的统一管理，分成若干个小队，会帮城里的居民做些简单的工作。

You haven't been in Okhema long, so I'll just give you a brief explanation: These chimeras are managed by the Garden of Life, and divided into smaller squads that help out this city's residents with simple tasks.
就算是累趴下的奇美拉，只要想到奥赫玛的繁荣，也会不由自主地高昂起头！
Even if we work ourselves to the bone, we will hold our heads up high when we think about Okhema's prosperity!
若是小队的成绩始终不达标，管理员不仅要支付一大笔罚金，还要…在公民大会上被通报批评——谁叫奇美拉是奥赫玛的代表物种呢？

If the squad still doesn't hit its targets, the administrator not only has to pay a hefty fine, they'll also be... issued a memo of criticism at the citizens' assembly. I mean, the chimera is Okhema's mascot, after all.
呀，通报批评…我在树庭求学的时候，都没有被那刻夏老师这么处罚过。对、对不起……
Ah, a memo of criticism... I was never punished so harshly by Professor Anaxa even when I was studying back at the Grove. S—Sorry...
灰宝！公民大会很恐怖的，要是惹他们不开心的话，甚至会被驱逐出奥赫玛的哦。
Grayie! The citizens' assembly is terrifying! If you upset them, you might even be driven out of Okhema.
你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...
你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...
应该不是。近期奥赫玛要处理的事情确实很多，只能辛苦小奇美拉了……
Probably not. There've been plenty of happenings that needed to be settled in Okhema, but that's just more effort on the chimeras' part...
可惜，现在的翁法罗斯没有给我们这个机会呢。
Alas, we don't have that chance in present-day Amphoreus.
我受阿格莱雅女士之托，前来奥赫玛为伤者提供治疗，原本想着很快便能返回，但……
I was besought by Lady Aglaea to come forth to Okhema to provide treatment for the wounded. I initially wanted to return post-haste, but...
学医救不了奥赫玛。
Medicine won't save Okhema.
是在感谢你们呢。小奇美拉为奥赫玛的居民帮了大忙，我也想…嗯，尽自己的一份力。
I'm simply grateful to you all. The chimeras have helped Okhema's citizens so much, so I too, wanted to... yes, to do my part.
你所有的努力，都是在为奥赫玛的居民服务呀。
All your efforts are in service of Okhema's citizens.
我同意大家的看法，奇美拉是种相当聪明的生物，很认真，也很有热情，愿意为奥赫玛的居民们解决麻烦。能取得如此成绩，都是它们的功劳。
I agree with everyone that chimeras are smart creatures — dedicated, passionate, and willing to solve troubles for Okhema's people. It is all thanks to their efforts that we've achieved such success.
果然，即使有差分宇宙的支持，靠这点忆质的残渣就想构建翁法罗斯的模型，还是太勉强了。
As expected, even with the support of the Divergent Universe, trying to construct a model of Amphoreus from these mere scraps of memoria is still a bit of a stretch.
此时此刻，翁法罗斯内。
Currently, in Amphoreus...
你恍然回过神来，这里是「神悟树庭」。即使并非初次来访，你还是被眼前的光景所震慑。
You snap back to reality — this is the Grove of Epiphany. Even though it's not your first time here, the scenery before you still manages to leave you speechless in awe.
来吧，我将给予你树庭中最伟大的宝藏。
Come. I shall bestow upon you the greatest treasure of the Grove.
借由{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系和{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金丝，这些智慧得以向外延伸，覆盖树庭的各个角落，交错成承载知识的网络。

Through {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} roots and {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia's{RUBY_E#} golden threads, this wisdom has been able to extend outward, enveloping every corner of the Grove, interwoven into a network that bears knowledge.
这里收集了翁法罗斯古往今来的神话和历史，从众神和英雄身上，我们得以学会「什么是美德」。
Gathered here are Amphoreus' collective myths and histories throughout its entire existence. We learn what virtue is from gods to heroes.
原来是树庭神域。
So this is the Grove Art Online.
既然树庭选择以这种方式将知识传授给你，那就一定有它的道理。
Since the Grove elects to impart knowledge to you through such a method, it must have its reasons.
赛飞儿回奥赫玛了…
Cipher has returned to Okhema...
（奥赫玛一直是白昼，都快忘了现在是休息时间了。还是睡吧…）
(With Okhema being in daylight forever, I almost forgot it's now resting time. I should sleep...)
咳咳…大概这就是奥赫玛运动精神吧！简称，奥运精神。
*cough* This must be what they call the Okheman athletic spirit! Some also call it the Okhemic spirit.
淘汰赛第一轮，{NICKNAME}选手将对战悬锋城的「十敌」选手。
Opening the Elimination Rounds, {NICKNAME} will challenge Yourdei from Castrum Kremnos.
…哼！现在我的实力只有吾王「万敌」的十分之一，所以我叫「十敌」。
Hmph! For His Majesty Mydei, every day is his day. But I am but a pale shadow of his strength, and I must seize the day — hence the name Yourdei.
不要再增加悬锋城刻板印象了。
Please don't reinforce the stereotypes about Castrum Kremnos.
悬锋城自古以石榴汁代血。请「十敌」阁下先喝下鲜血蜜酿，为您壮行！
According to the customs of Castrum Kremnos, pomegranate juice represents blood. Lord Yourdei, take this sanguine honey brew for courage!
缇宝最爱笑，总是给奥赫玛城的大家，拭去眼泪，带来温暖的希望。
Tribbie's the cheerful one, always there to dry tears and bring hope to everyone in Okhema.
这么认真，小海豹也没在树庭上过学呀！
You're taking this way too seriously. Baby seals don't study at the Grove!
我是乡下来奥赫玛的土「豹」，听不懂你这些流行词。
I'm a humble "seal" from the Okheman countryside. I don't understand your trendy terms.
与此同时，在奥赫玛某处……
At the same time, somewhere in Okhema...
换句话说，到奥赫玛之后没怎么做梦？
So, you haven't had any dreams since arriving in Okhema?
举个例子，奥赫玛历史上曾有位联军统帅做过一个梦：梦见一只雄鹰飞来，抓起了母鹿和它的幼崽，最后这只雄鹰却被乌鸦攻击，并被啄死。

For example, in Okhema's history, there was a general of the alliance who once had a dream: In the dream, an eagle swooped down, and caught a doe and her fawn, but was attacked and pecked to death by crows in the end.
我以奥赫玛「金织」的名义，托大工匠哈托努斯打造了一樽「金海豹杯」，作为比赛胜者的奖赏——
By the name of the "Goldweaver" of Okhema, I've commissioned the Grand Craftsman Chartonus to create a "Gold Seal Cup" to be awarded to the winner of the competition —
尽管远方的黑潮尚在威胁，但我们也希望奥赫玛的公民们，能借着比赛，畅快地宣泄心中压抑已久的情绪。
Even though the threat of black tide still looms, we hope that the citizens of Okhema can use this competition to release the pent-up emotions they've been holding in for so long.
作为黄金裔的贵客，我也希望你能尽情借此深入领略一番奥赫玛的风情。
As the esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, I hope you can immerse yourself into the culture of Okhema with this experience.
看看你的周围吧。一夜之间，奥赫玛的人类水平下降了一万倍——
Look around. In one night, the humans in Okhema have decreased their capacities by ten thousandfold—
翁法罗斯的危机从来不止于一种。
The crisis of Amphoreus is never just one thing.
翁法罗斯可没有那么严谨的进化论。
Amphoreus doesn't care about such strict theories of evolution.
在翁法罗斯的历史里，也有过太多无论预言真假，都可能造成「真实的冲突」的事情。
In Amphoreus's history, there were plenty of things that could cause "real conflicts," regardless if the prophecies were true or not.
各位，我有一个翁法罗斯梦！
Everyone, I have a vision of Amphoreus!
不过，*我们*无法预料，奥赫玛的公民当中会不会有人顺应预言去行动。而且目前听到的内容，恐怕还并非预言的全貌。
However, we cannot foresee whether any Okhema citizens might act on these prophecies. Besides, what we've heard may only be part of the whole prophecy.
我从未指望过金线能防住翁法罗斯最狡猾的贼——赛飞儿。
I never expected the golden thread could stop Amphoreus's most cunning thief — Cipher.
…那叫「罗浮杂俎」！行不行啊你。
Ugh, it's Ghostly Grove, not Ghastly Gravy!
「罗浮杂俎」是罗浮仙舟上规模最大的灵异爱好者网站，所有喜欢怪力乱神的罗浮人都知道它。
Ghostly Grove is the most renowned website for paranormal enthusiasts on the Luofu. Everyone who loves the mysterious and the unexplained knows about it.
你们向白露解释了「罗浮杂俎」的事。
You tell Bailu about the website Ghostly Grove
不知道网友们会作何反应，你们明白，再过段时间「罗浮杂俎」就会热闹起来。
I'm not sure how the online community will react, but you can bet the Ghostly Grove will be the talk of the town sooner or later.
我也在浏览「罗浮杂俎」上的种种奇闻轶事，有趣的很。
I've been browsing through some of the stories on Ghostly Grove myself — they make for good reading.
藿藿刷了几个时辰的「罗浮杂俎」，每逮着一个可疑事件就问咱们「你说这是不是尾巴干的？」
Huohuo has been browsing Ghostly Grove for hours. Every time she finds a suspicious incident, she says: "Do you think Tail did this?"
关于此事，诸位打算如何在「罗浮杂俎」上发布？毕竟事涉神策府…希望各位能……
With respect to this incident, what is your plan for posting on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove? Since it concerns the Seat of Divine Foresight, I am hoping you could...
总之，浮烟的事情交给我，至于「罗浮杂俎」的事情…按照老规矩，你们得编一套新的说辞了，这些事情就交给你们了。
Well then, I will take care of the Cirrus situation. As for what gets written in the Luofu's Ghostly Grove, I'll leave that up to you.
对了对了，帮我参谋一下这次该在「罗浮杂俎」上发什么吧！这可是大新闻，全靠这期内容涨粉了。
Now, let's think about what to publish on Ghostly Grove! This is huge news — this post will definitely boost our following.
就、就让小桂子保留着吧，我睡觉前不看一会「罗浮杂俎」，会睡不着……
Madam Hanya, p—please, let Little Gui carry on uploading... I can't fall asleep without browsing Ghostly Grove before bed...
老师可知道「罗浮杂俎」？我看见有人说这里出了怪事，便来这里看看。
Do you know about "Ghostly Grove"? I heard from someone on the site that there were strange things happening here, so I came to see.
怎么样，棋鬼的事到底是怎么回事呀，要不要在「罗浮杂俎」上更新一下？
So, what was the real deal with the Chess Ghost? Do you want to post an update on the "Ghostly Grove"?
记得桂乃芬要我们帮忙发布「罗浮杂俎」吗，就拜托你了……
Remember Guinaifen asked us to post up to the Ghostly Grove? Could you please do that...
总之事情算是告一段落，我们在「罗浮杂俎」上发一下吧。
Anyway, the whole thing's over and done with now. Let's post up to the Ghostly Grove, okay?
啊，竟然还是你们几位，真是够辛苦的。不过，去「罗浮杂俎」上发帖求助果然有效。
Ah, it's you! You really do work hard. I see posting on the "Ghostly Grove" page really gets things done, though!
别忘了，我们还得将这件事影响减至最小，要在「罗浮杂俎」发布新的帖子。
Don't forget, we have to minimize the impact of this incident, it would be best to put a new post on "Ghostly Grove."
于是乎，你在「罗浮杂俎」上找到了我们，希望十王司能驱散鬼魅。
So, you contacted us on Ghostly Grove, hoping that the Ten-Lords Commission could help drive away these ghosts for you.
…不过，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
...Although, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.
你看，我早就给裳裳你说过了，这「罗浮杂俎」上真真假假什么都有，大家想要的不是真相，而是一段愉快的怪谈体验。
Look, I told you before, that there are all sorts of stories on Ghostly Grove, some true, some not. What people are searching for here is not the truth, but a fun ghost story.
…虽然凶宅是假的，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
...Even though the haunted house isn't true, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.
是这样的，最近我收到了一个包裹，打开一看，里面是罗浮杂俎网站寄来的「订阅奖励银牌纪念」。
Basically, I got a parcel recently. And when I opened it, there was a Silver Subscription Commemorative Medallion from the Ghostly Grove website.
没啦！你也知道，罗浮杂俎不过是个灵异见闻类主题的小网站。发过来的银牌也不是真的用银子打的呢。
Nope! As you know, the Ghostly Grove is a small paranormal-themed website. The silver medallions dished out aren't even made out of real silver.
所以我想来想去——我决定，在罗浮杂俎的个人账号上录个视频，发表下获奖感言。还有就是…收集下粉丝的提问，做个答疑环节，算是对粉丝们的回馈！

So after racking my brains — I've decided to upload a video to my personal account on the Ghostly Grove as an acceptance speech. And also... do an ask-me-anything segment with fans so I can give a little something back!
那时的奥赫玛是真正的「永恒之城」。比起一座城市，它更接近一位母亲。站在山崖上向外眺望，视野所及之处全是我们的领土！

Okhema was a true "Eternal City" back then. People did not think of it as their city, but rather a motherly figure. When one stood on top of the hill and looked outward, everything we could see was our territory!
在达米亚诺斯的带领下，你来到了奥赫玛外的附属城邦，在地下的一扇门前停住了脚步……
With Damionis' guidance, you have come to a vassal city outside of Okhema and stopped before an underground door...
这里看起来和奥赫玛很像。
This place looks so similar to Okhema.
奥赫玛祖上还挺阔？
Okhema's ancestors must have been quite wealthy?
那是当然！早在黄金战争时期，奥赫玛就是当之无愧的「永恒之城」了。
Of course! Even as far back as the Chrysos War period, Okhema has always been the undisputed "Eternal City."
据说，很久很久以前，奥赫玛城门口有八座山。
Once upon a time, so the story goes, eight mighty mountains blocked the entrance to Okhema.
我听遐蝶说了，你初抵奥赫玛时曾与大地兽游戏甚欢。被大地兽所喜爱的都不是坏人。
Castorice mentioned you had a great time with the dromases when you first got to Okhema. Anyone the dromases like is a good person in my book.
我是神悟树庭的教授，风堇女士的同僚，希望这能解答你的疑惑，小家伙。
I am a professor at the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of Lady Hyacine. I hope this answers your question, little one.
呜呜呜？（神悟树庭？是做什么的地方？）
Grumph? (Grove of Epiphany? What's that place?)
贵客还记得当初，和白厄阁下等人初访奥赫玛时所乘的大地兽吗？它们就是旅团的成员。
Dear guest, do you remember the dromas you rode with Lord Phainon and the others when you first visited Okhema? They are members of our troupe.
多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.
一段时间后，风堇带你们转移到了奥赫玛的昏光庭院，并进行了简单的检查
Shortly after, Hyacine takes you to the Twilight Courtyard for a quick medical examination.
——不用浪费时间了，助教，现在树庭中的记叙都是谬论！
Don't waste your time, Hyacine. Everything in the Grove's records is misleading!
云石天宫，翁法罗斯的清汤锅底。形形色色的人们来到这里，希望能让水流冲走自己的烦恼，就像焯水。
Marmoreal Palace is Amphoreus's melting pot. All manner of people come here, hoping that the waters will wash away their worries, just as meat is stripped of its scent by boiling soup.
多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.
从那时起，崇拜大地兽的教团便在奥赫玛城各个角落悄然建立。而一头大地兽究竟为何拥有此等力量，学者们议论纷纷……
Since then, cults devoted to dromases quietly sprang up across every corner of Okhema city. As for why such a creature wielded power so great, scholars still argue to this day...
来到奥赫玛后，我结下了许多的缘分。而与驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的相遇，则是我最珍贵的宝物。

Since coming to Okhema, I've formed many precious bonds. But meeting Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has been my most treasured gift of all.
呜嗡——（有大地兽问我，你怎么连这个都懂？我只好说，我{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}在奥赫玛教过我。）
Grumph— (A dromas asked me how I knew about this. I could only say that my {F#Mama}{M#Papa} taught me at Okhema.)
多年后，一只比山还高的大地兽出现在了奥赫玛。它的阴影遮蔽了黎明机器，脚步让整座圣城都为之震颤。
Years later, a dromas taller than a mountain appeared in Okhema. Its shadow loomed over the Dawn Device, and its footsteps made the entire holy city tremble.
澎湃的大地之力在它体内奔涌。它走过奥赫玛城外的农田，之后三千个光历年里，那里的粮食亩产达到了一千八……

The surging power of Earth coursed through its body. After it passed through the farmlands outside Okhema, the crop yield there reached 24,100 pounds per acre for the next three thousand Light Calendar years...
哎，最近奥赫玛出现了一大批采用最新仿造技术制成的假古董，不光是辨别能力较弱的老人，甚至连一些专业爱好者也难以分清。
Recently, Okhema has seen a surge of fakes made with the latest imitation techniques, not just fooling the elderly with weak discernment but even some enthusiasts.
如你所见，由于近期持续动乱，奥赫玛内假货猖獗，每天都有鉴定不完的假宝贝。
As you can see, due to the recent unrest, Okhema is rampant with forgeries, leaving us with an endless stream of fakes to appraise every day.
嗯，我还可以顺带给你介绍下这些宝贝背后的翁法罗斯史，可谓是一举三得。光说话也没意思，先来看看我手头还有些什么吧。
I can also give you a quick rundown of the history behind these treasures, three birds with one stone. But enough chatting, let's take a look at what else I've got here.
奇兽一直是翁法罗斯器皿上的常见主题。许多远古的物种都消失了，我们唯有透过前人的勾勒去想象它们的模样——
Magical beasts have always been a common theme on Amphoreus vessels. Many ancient species have vanished, and all we can do is imagine their forms through the sketches of our ancestors —
把它当个故事听吧，你只要记得这块火腿不符合奥赫玛食品卫生标准就好。
Consider it merely a tall tale, and keep in mind that this ham falls short of Okhema's food safety regulations.
有人说，这瓶口的形状像悬锋战士的头盔，因此推断它最早来自悬锋城，边沿的那抹红色则来自尼卡多利的鲜血。
Some claim the bottle's neck resembles a Kremnos Warrior's helmet, hinting at its origins in Castrum Kremnos, with the red shade at its edge a trace of Nikador's blood.
奥赫玛的打假就靠你了，灭灭骗子们的气焰！
Okhema's battle against counterfeiters is in your hands! Show those fraudsters who's the boss!
呀，{NICKNAME}，见到你真高兴。快来看，要见识下哀丽秘榭的宝物吗？
Ah, {NICKNAME}, it's good to see you! Come take a look. Want to see the treasure of Aedes Elysiae?
该从哀丽秘榭出发了吧？
Shouldn't we head out of Aedes Elysiae already?
拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，终于出现了哪！
The honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... has finally come!
拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，你终于出现了哪！
Honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... you've finally arrived!
「咳咳，这是故事的登场人物之一，出生在哀丽秘榭的平凡少女，只是恰好和我同名，又一样纯真可爱。」
"Ahem... this is one of the characters in the story, an ordinary girl born in Aedes Elysiae. She just so happens to have the same name as me... and is every bit as pure and adorable."
特地前来迷路迷境，帮助妖精们重建荒废的餐馆。
For coming to Membrance Maze, to help the fairies rebuild our long-abandoned restaurant.
求求了，英雄们！妖精们肚子瘪瘪的，就想毁灭世界！拜托了，请拯救迷路迷境！
Heroes, we're begging you! The fairies are starving... and when they're hungry, they just want to destroy the world! Please help us. Save the Membrance Maze!
哪有这么严重，顶多就是妖精们的怒火席卷七分之六个翁法罗斯。
It's not that serious... At most, their fury will burn through six-sevenths of Amphoreus.
就是这样。就当是为了翁法罗斯，我们一起复兴餐馆，满足妖精们的小小愿望吧。
So that's the situation. For the sake of Amphoreus, let's rebuild the restaurant together and grant the fairies their little wish.
迷路迷境的生态也太神奇了吧！
The ecology of Membrance Maze is just amazing!
哀丽秘榭社区食堂。
Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen.
记好了，餐馆的新名号就定为「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」。
Got it. From this moment on, the restaurant shall be known as "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2."
迷！我们郑重宣布——「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」正式收录进迷其林美食名单中，是一星级餐馆了迷！

Mem! We hereby announce — "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" is now officially listed in the Memchelin Gourmet Guide as a 1-star Restaurant, mem!
只是他住的地方很远，过来哀丽秘榭得多花些时间。算算…今天该到了吧？
Yeah, but he lives pretty far from here. Coming all the way to Aedes Elysiae takes time. If I'm not wrong... he should be arriving today.
是万敌，餐馆有救了。

迈德漠斯？没想到新厨师是你。
Mydeimos? Never thought you'd be the new chef.
万敌带着几个妖精忙碌了起来。不多时，厨房门口便架起了一口大锅。
Mydei and the fairies spring into action. Before long, a massive pot is set up right outside the kitchen door.

I've heard the construction in Castrum Kremnos is ridiculously fast, but seeing it in action... really puts things into perspective.

I think I can manage. With Mydei sharing some of the kitchen duties, I'll have more time to help out front.

I, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, reject this proposal with full conviction.

提起哀丽秘榭，首先想到的便是麦田。活动期间，餐馆提供以小麦为原料的菜品，并用饱满的麦穗作为装饰，寓意丰收。
When I think of Aedes Elysiae, the golden wheat fields come to mind. During the event, we could serve wheat-based dishes and decorate the place with bundles of wheat, symbolizing a bountiful harvest.
但「哀丽秘榭」作为主题，对小妖精们而言会不会太难懂了呀。
But if the theme is "Aedes Elysiae," wouldn't that be a bit too difficult for the little fairies to understand?
近来，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」在迷路迷境中的关注度急剧上升，他们以美味的菜品与温暖贴心的服务，赢得了妖精们的极高赞誉。

Lately, "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" has been gaining tons of buzz in the Membrance Maze. With delicious food and warm, thoughtful service, they've won over the hearts of our fairy folk.
而我们的主厨，在揉制面团与最终烘焙时，也使用了悬锋城特有的技巧，能让烤饼的口感变得更为酥脆，同时令蜂蜜的香味得到最大程度的发挥。
And the head chef used a signature technique from Castrum Kremnos when kneading the dough and baking it, which makes the pancakes extra crisp and really brings out the full aroma of the honey.
迷！恭喜恭喜迷！「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」通过了本次美食评审，是二星级餐馆了迷！

Mem! Congratulations! "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" has passed the culinary review! You're now officially a 2-star restaurant! Mem!

噢？店长希望我和万敌认真切磋一番吗？好啊，我赞成这个提案。
Oh? You want me and Mydei to go head-to-head in the kitchen? Fine by me. I'm in.
迷！原来就是你，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的掌管者，黄金料理界的领军人物，迷称「开拓之主」的迷之店长……

Mem! So it's you, the one who runs The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2, the legendary figure leading the world of golden gourmet cuisine! Mems call you the "Trailblazer of Flavor"... the mysterious owner behind it all!

Mem! Alright, listen up. We are the fearsome names whispered in every restaurant of Membrance Maze...

At first, you thought this was just another friendly cook-off, a typical Phainon vs. Mydei showdown.
趁还来得及。赶紧投敌迷！记住，要投敌！
Hurry to our side while you still can! Defect to Mydei, mem! Mark my words: Defect to Mydei!
——迷迷！迷！带我们再赢一次吧，万敌主厨！
Memem! Mem! Lead us to another victory, Chef Mydei!
——迷迷！迷！三日之期已到，现在，万敌主厨将夺回属于他的一切迷！
Memem! Mem! The three-day wait is over. Chef Mydei is here to reclaim what's rightfully his, mem!

「主厨角斗」正火热进行。究竟是来自悬锋城的烹饪大师，万敌主厨更胜一筹……
The "Chef Showdown" is heating up! Will Chef Mydei from Castrum Kremnos rise to the top...
还是在哀丽秘榭主场作战的白厄主厨更能征服顾客的味蕾……
...or will Chef Phainon, fighting on home turf here in Aedes Elysiae, win over the crowd?
白厄是餐馆最初的厨师，土生土长的哀丽秘榭人，他制作的菜品，或许会更适合妖精们的口味。
He was our restaurant's very first chef, born and raised right here in Aedes Elysiae. His dishes probably suit the local fairies' tastes more naturally.
万敌的赢面更大。
Mydei's got the upper hand.
无论白厄还是万敌，他们都是本店的厨师。我自然不该偏向任何一方。这个问题，恕我无可奉告。
Both Phainon and Mydei are valued chefs here. I can't afford to take sides. I'm afraid I have no comment.
白厄与万敌，两位主厨轮流掌勺期间，各自售出的菜品份数……
During their respective turns in the kitchen, chef Phainon and chef Mydei each sold...
我和万敌都做好准备了，随时可以出发。
Mydei and I are all set. We can head out anytime.
——迷迷！迷！干净利落地击败对手吧，万敌主厨！
Mem! Memem! Take them down quick and clean, Chef Mydei!
食材质量是菜品的根本，而我对哀丽秘榭的麦田有信心。我很清楚，这片土地上的作物与肉类有多鲜美，独特的风味能让所有品尝者赞不绝口。

Great dishes start with great ingredients, and I believe in the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae. I know exactly how flavorful this land's crops and meats are. Their unique taste is sure to leave a lasting impression.
而万敌阁下对哀地里亚的传统炖菜做出了改良，增添了用以提鲜的酸味，汤底浓郁却不会感到腻，北地特有的刺激口味被淡化，只留下了温暖的感受。

Meanwhile, Lord Mydei has reimagined Aidonia's traditional stew with a touch of acidity that lifts the flavor. The broth is hearty without being heavy, and the bold northern spices have been mellowed into a warm, comforting finish.
——迷迷！迷！别执迷不悟了，要投敌！投敌！
Memem! Mem! Stop being so stubborn! You need to switch sides and vote for Mydei!
迷！我们郑重宣布，从现在起，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」就是三星级餐馆了迷！

Mem! We'd like to officially announce that from this day forth, The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 is a certified 3-star restaurant, mem!

Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei will be managing the fields, so professor, wouldn't you prefer spending time somewhere more lively?
…不得不说，这些巨大蔬菜还真挺沉的，我和万敌搬得都快累瘫了。

——迷路迷境的丰收节，今天总算要正式开幕啦。
The Harvest Festival at Membrance Maze is finally opening today.
有请——奥赫玛最最最最最富有的，金织女士！
Please welcome — the absolutely, positively, definitely richest person in Okhema, Lady Goldweaver!
如今，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的名号响彻整个迷境，孩子们都为品尝到你们制作的美食而欣喜。餐馆举办的活动，也收获了一致好评。

Now the name of The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 echoes across the entire Maze, with children excitedly enjoying your culinary creations. Your special events have earned unanimous praise.
「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」的第四次迷其林美食评审，直接通过！
The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 has automatically passed its fourth Memchelin Food Review!
希望在迷路迷境生活的这段时光，能成为你们珍贵的回忆哪。
May your time in the Membrance Maze become a treasured memory.
直说吧，迈德漠斯。在这里没什么需要顾忌的。
Speak your mind, Mydeimos. There's no need for restraint in this place.
都集中注意哦，老师的问题是，在迷路迷境的游学旅行很快就要结束啦，大家有什么宝贵的感悟，或者难忘的回忆呢？
Everyone, pay attention! The teacher's question is: With our field trip to Membrance Maze soon coming to an end, what valuable insights or unforgettable memories have you gained?
我可是听到了哦，老师悄悄向村长打听妖精的教育方式，还盛赞田地的那几位农夫干活非常认真，勤劳乖巧，比树庭的贤人都要强！原话是……

I happened to overhear! The professor quietly asked the chief about the fairies' education methods, and went on to praise those farmers in the fields, calling them hardworking, disciplined, and even better than the Sages of the Grove! His exact words were...
「树庭学者耗尽毕生心血得到的成果，都不及妖精随手播下的种子。」

Champion of Strife, Mydei
在士兵之间，久负盛名的城邦…… 悬锋， 是每一个战士的向往之地。
Among the soldiers, there was the famed city-state... Kremnos, a place every warrior longed for.
他名叫迈德漠斯…… 万敌。 是悬锋的王储。
His name is... Mydeimos, crown prince of Kremnos.
就像翁法罗斯的每一位黄金裔… 是写作「诅咒」的祝福。
As with every other Chrysos Heir in Amphoreus... A blessing, yet also his curse.
听说是悬锋城的传统。 以鲜血滋养身躯。
People considered it a Kremnoan tradition, to sustain their bodies with fresh blood.
野史之所以为野史， 是因为悬锋城消失已久。
The reason it's called a wild tale, is because Castrum Kremnos has long vanished.
传闻，悬锋城的末日之战， 男人也投身沙场。
Rumor has it that during the final battle of Castrum Kremnos, this man, too, took to the battlefield.
迈德漠斯，往日的英雄…… 他是悬锋的叛徒， 弑父的王储。
Mydeimos, a hero of yore.. Now a traitor to Kremnos, the patricidal crown prince.
从何时起， 他以「万敌」之名为人所知？
Since which day, Did he become known as "Mydei"?
「伤及万敌的锋刃，必定足以弑神。」 人们至今仍在找寻。 然而那也只是他遵循的传统……
"A blade that can cut through the mighty must be enough to slay gods." The people to this day still seek it, Yet it is simply a tradition he follows closely...
前尘旧事，铸就他的身躯。 「除了悬锋的传统，你还剩下什么？」 白发的友人曾向他提问。
The stories of the past forged his body. "Apart from Kremnos' traditions, what do you have left?" The white-haired friend once asked.
那战场无人能近， 悬锋的孤军，横于逐火的道路，
None may approach that battlefield. The lone army of Kremnos, an obstacle on the Flame-Chase Journey.
那是他必然不屑一顾的野史—— 据说悬锋城拥有神赐的秘仪， 王的力量以此代代相传… 这是他们独挡千军的奥秘。
It's a wild tale he won't care to opine — It's said that Castrum Kremnos has secrets divine, Through which the king's power has passed, A one-man army, by strength in their bloodline.
以至明日，星星会如此传唱： 悬锋的孤王，其人名为万敌。 他一生行向的，是永劫战火， 他身后留下的，是荣光遍地。
In the morrow's sky, the stars will chant: The lone king of Kremnos is called Mydei. His journey was one of ceaseless, eternal warfare, And behind him, he left a world ablaze with glory.
在奥赫玛的一角， 初来乍到的旅人驻足片刻。
In a corner of Okhema, the newly arrived traveler stops for a moment.
城中的人们说， 「三位大人是奥赫玛的支柱。」
The citizens call them, "The Three Pillars of Okhema."
「还是讲些快乐的故事吧！」 孩童抹去因记忆而生的眼泪， 「*我们*最擅长翁法罗斯的童谣啦！」
"Perhaps we should tell you some happy tales instead!" The child wipes away her tears of reminiscence, "Our greatest talent is performing Amphoreus' nursery rhymes"
奥赫玛的山坡， 曾长满金色的无花果。
Upon the hills of Okhema once grew, Golden figs as far as the eye could see.
母亲莞尔不答， 只是用睡前故事， 为孩童梦中的翁法罗斯， 又镀上一层命运的金光。
The mother smiles and does not answer, Only using bedtime stories, To once again gild another golden sheen of destiny, To the Amphoreus of the child's dreams.
远离奥赫玛的日子里， 少女习惯了独自旅行。
In the days spent away from Okhema, The girl grew accustomed to traveling alone.
你也曾在树庭，咕咕嘟嘟…… 差点淹死。 「这个，就快点忘掉吧。」
You, too, tread in the Grove, gurgling... Almost drowning. "Just erase this from your mind quickly."
你们来到了哀丽秘榭， 这是「昔涟」最珍爱的家园。 它永远温暖，永远轻柔， 也是重新翻开第一页的起点。
Here lies Aedes Elysiae, Cyrene's most beloved sanctuary. Forever warm, forever gentle, the place where the story begins again.
让我找找， 翁法罗斯这本漫长的书卷…… 缺的是哪几章？
Let me uncover, the missing chapters... in this long chronicle of Amphoreus.
我看到你啦，「翁法罗斯」。 你是那么美丽…… 像一篇遗世独立的悲剧。
I see you, Amphoreus. You are so beautiful... Like a tragic tale that stands apart from the rest.
我看不到你，「迷路迷境」。 所以我许愿…… 请从这颗种子里生长出来。
I can't see you, Membrance Maze. So I wish... Please, grow out from this tiny seed.
那青色的巨龙， 朝着翁法罗斯而来， 遥远的呢喃翻涌， 成为刻在大地中的低吼。
That great cerulean dragon, Approached Amphoreus, The distant whispers roiling, Becoming a roar engraved in the earth.
翁法罗斯从此有神话流传—— 一匹巨龙将裂土掣曳拼合， 使大地再度完固。
And from that day forth, Amphoreus had a new legend... Of how a giant dragon collected the broken lands, And once again made the earth whole.
笼罩翁法罗斯的地震， 持续了三个昼夜。
The earthquake that engulfs Amphoreus Lasts for three days and nights.
许多熟悉的身影， 在银河生态中活跃， 却并非翁法罗斯的旧识。
Many familiar silhouettes, Are now active in the cosmic ecosystem, Yet they are not my old Amphorean friends.
来翁法罗斯前的最后一站， 是丹恒的故乡，一个名叫仙舟的地方。
Before arriving at Amphoreus, Our last stop was Dan Heng's homeland, a place called Xianzhou.
奥赫玛人迎来一位君王。 尊名凯撒者，喜好自己与自己下棋。 被她视为「棋子」的， 无论泰坦巨擘，或是黄金裔。
The Okhemans welcomed a ruler. She was deemed Imperator, and loved to play chess with herself. She regarded all things as "pieces," Whether Chrysos Heirs or Titans magnificent.
我是奥赫玛的君王， 我曾直面诸神， 又何惧诸神之后高悬的「律法」。
I am the sovereign of Okhema. I once faced the gods, So what do I have to fear about the "laws" hanging behind such gods?
啊，您一如既往的果断。 这真是太好了。 神的囚笼翁法罗斯， 与所有乏善可陈的世界， 都需要一位魄力的君王。
Ah. You are as resolute as always. Good! As ever! This prison of gods, Amphoreus, And all mundane and average worlds Need someone like you, a daring ruler.
——翁法罗斯「神礼观众」， 与凯撒*合谋*者， 吕枯耳戈斯， 如是说。
...Amphoreus's "Theoros," The Imperator's co-conspirator, Lycurgus, thus spoke.
「以翁法罗斯之名， 我将赐予盲信以自由。」
"In the name of Amphoreus, I will grant freedom to the blindly faithful."
「以翁法罗斯之名， 我将赐予永生以长眠。」
"In the name of Amphoreus, I will grant eternal rest to the immortal."
「以翁法罗斯之名， 我将赐予毁灭以毁灭。」
"In the name of Amphoreus, I will grant destruction to the Destruction."
「以翁法罗斯之名……」
"In the name of Amphoreus..."
「我会赢。翁法罗斯会赢。」
"I will win. Amphoreus will win."
剑士的衣柜愈发拥挤。 人们称道奥赫玛的金织， 活泼开朗、手艺超群。
The swordmaster's wardrobe grew full, And people praised Okhema's Goldweaver For her cheerfulness and splendid skill.
地坼之灾， 平添了少女心头的疲惫。 树庭之役， 夺走了少女双眸的明媚。
The calamity of lands asunder Added to the girl's weariness. The battle of the Grove Robbed the light from the girl's eyes.
「这庭院，会否太小了些？」 「没关系，克莱门汀。 足够温暖就好。」
"Is this courtyard a tad too small?" "It's okay, Clementine. As long as it provides warmth plenty."
少女目送他离开， 心中涌起怅惘。 「克莱门汀，和我一起准备些东西吧…」 「我希望这里…变得更加亮堂。」
The girl watches the patient leave, And her heart swells in sorrow. "Clementine, prepare some things with me..." "I want this place... To be brighter tomorrow."
红发孩童笑盈盈牵住少女， 「好久不见，风堇！」 「是来奥赫玛做客，还是找*我们*帮忙？」 少女道出所需， 「我想要一些能发光的东西， 即便是废品也好。」

The red-head child takes the girl's hands. "Long time no see, Hyacine!" "Are you here in Okhema for a visit, or do you need help from us?" The girl recounts her needs. "I want some shining things, Even if they are considered junk."
不久后，树庭传开消息， 心如死水的人们慕名而来。 少女备好糖果与茶点， 聆听每一位访客的哀怨。
The news is soon spread by the Grove, And people with empty hearts visit in droves. The girl prepares candies and tea, And listens to every visitor's complaints.
灾难像哀悼月的暴雪， 将温暖与黎明掩葬。 无序的凶潮席卷理性的树庭， 那处小小的疗愈密境， 也被无情熄灭、踏为碎镜。

Like the blizzards in the Month of Mourning doth calamity fall, Burying warmth and dawn's calls. Orderless tides swallow up the Grove of reason, And that tiny healing haven, Is also extinguished, broken and barren.
转眼，奥赫玛的人们又看见， 少女四处收集零碎。 她想重建那片净地。
Soon, the people of Okhema see once again, The girl collecting more pieces and tokens, Wanting to rebuild that pure haven.
在树庭研习的时间里， 少女走遍所有的学派。
The girl had visited all the schools, During her time studying at the Grove.
少女在树庭行诊许久， 将医疗学论编撰成篇。
The girl treated ailments for many years in the Grove, Composing her medical treatises into tomes.
庭院迎来两名客人—— 悬锋的将领，为索凶寻仇而断了筋骨； 圣城的贵族，因金织陨落而生了心魔。
Two figures step into the courtyard's gate — A general of Kremnos, her body torn, by vengeance bound, by fury swayed. A noble of the holy city, once wrapped in gold, now haunted by a fate betrayed.
在翁法罗斯， 随处可见无名的造像。
In Amphoreus, untitled statues are a prevalent sight.
哀丽秘榭的白厄。

Aedes Elysiae... the man's hometown. Shrouded in secrecy, just like his past.
遥远的未来， 翁法罗斯的大地，将铭刻英雄们的足迹。
In the far-off future, The land of Amphoreus will bear the marks of the heroes' footsteps.

"Knowledge is also a power used to smite." While studying at the Grove of Epiphany, He etched this into his heart.

"Look at Mydei and Professor Anaxa. Boys all grow up into serious adults."
「可只要我笑口常开， 奥赫玛就还有阳光的少年人。」
"But as long as I keep smiling, Okhema will always have an upbeat, shining young man."

In Amphoreus, Untitled statues are a prevalent sight.
众人将他比作烈日， 要为翁法罗斯带来黎明。
